ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为智能建筑管理中的隐私保护人体检测提供了高效低成本的可行方案。

tldr: 本文研究利用低分辨率红外摄像头进行隐私保护的人体检测方法。
motivation: 传统人体检测需依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂且可能侵犯隐私，需寻找更经济且隐私友好的解决方案。
method: 从需标注边界框的单次检测器转向仅依赖无标签图像的自编码器，降低标注与计算成本。
result: 在两个低分辨率红外数据集上验证，方法显著减少标注成本与计算量，同时保持高检测精度。
conclusion: 该方法为智能建筑管理中的隐私保护人体检测提供了高效低成本的可行方案。
search_text: Privacy-Preserving Person Detection Using Low-Resolution Infrared Cameras 使用低分辨率红外摄像机进行隐私保护人员检测 In intelligent building management, knowing the number of people and their location in a room are important for better control of its illumination, ventilation, and heating with reduced costs and improved comfort. This is typically achieved by detecting people using compact embedded devices that are installed on the room's ceiling, and that integrate low-resolution infrared camera, which conceals each person's identity. However, for accurate detection, state-of-the-art deep learning models still require supervised training using a large annotated dataset of images. In this paper, we investigate cost-effective methods that are suitable for person detection based on low-resolution infrared images. Results indicate that for such images, we can reduce the amount of supervision and computation, while still achieving a high level of detection accuracy. Going from single-shot detectors that require bounding box annotations of each person in an image, to auto-encoders that only rely on unlabelled images that do not contain people, allows for considerable savings in terms of annotation costs, and for models with lower computational costs. We validate these experimental findings on two challenging top-view datasets with low-resolution infrared images. 在智能建筑管理中，了解房间内的人数及其位置对于更好地控制照明、通风和供暖、降低成本和提高舒适度非常重要。这通常是通过使用安装在房间天花板上的紧凑型嵌入式设备来检测人员来实现的，这些设备集成了低分辨率红外摄像机，可以隐藏每个人的身份。然而，为了准确检测，最先进的深度学习模型仍然需要使用大量带注释的图像数据集进行监督训练。在本文中，我们研究了适合基于低分辨率红外图像的人员检测的经济有效的方法。结果表明，对于此类图像，我们可以减少监督和计算量，同时仍然实现高水平的检测精度。从需要图像中每个人的边界框注释的单次检测器，到仅依赖于不包含人物的未标记图像的自动编码器，可以在注释成本和计算成本较低的模型方面节省大量成本。我们在两个具有低分辨率红外图像的具有挑战性的顶视图数据集上验证了这些实验结果。 本文研究利用低分辨率红外摄像头进行隐私保护的人体检测方法。 Thomas Dubail,Fidel Alejandro Guerrero Peña,Heitor Rapela Medeiros,Masih Aminbeidokhti,Eric Granger,Marco Pedersoli cs.CV

authors_text: Milad Azizkhani,Anthony L. Gunderman,Isuru S. Godage,Yue Chen
title: Dynamic Control of Soft Robotic Arm: An Experimental Study
title_zh: 软体机械臂的动态控制：实验研究
abstract: In this paper, a reinforced soft robot prototype with a custom-designed actuator-space string encoder are created to investigate dynamic soft robotic trajectory tracking. The soft robot prototype embedded with the proposed adaptive passivity control and efficient dynamic model make the challenging trajectory tracking tasks possible. We focus on the exploration of tracking accuracy as well as the full potential of the proposed control strategy by performing experimental validations at different operation scenarios: various tracking speed and external disturbance. In all experimental scenarios, the proposed adaptive passivity control outperforms the conventional PD feedback linearization control. The experimental analysis details the advantage and shortcoming of the proposed approach, and points out the next steps for future soft robot dynamic control.
summary: In this paper, a reinforced soft robot prototype with a custom-designed actuator-space string encoder are created to investigate dynamic soft robotic trajectory tracking. The soft robot prototype embedded with the proposed adaptive passivity control and efficient dynamic model make the challenging trajectory tracking tasks possible. We focus on the exploration of tracking accuracy as well as the full potential of the proposed control strategy by performing experimental validations at different operation scenarios: various tracking speed and external disturbance. In all experimental scenarios, the proposed adaptive passivity control outperforms the conventional PD feedback linearization control. The experimental analysis details the advantage and shortcoming of the proposed approach, and points out the next steps for future soft robot dynamic control.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，创建了一个带有定制设计的执行器空间字符串编码器的增强型软机器人原型，以研究动态软机器人轨迹跟踪。嵌入所提出的自适应被动控制和高效动态模型的软机器人原型使得具有挑战性的轨迹跟踪任务成为可能。我们通过在不同的操作场景（各种跟踪速度和外部干扰）下进行实验验证，重点探索跟踪精度以及所提出的控制策略的全部潜力。在所有实验场景中，所提出的自适应无源控制优于传统的 PD 反馈线性化控制。实验分析详细介绍了该方法的优点和缺点，并指出了未来软体机器人动态控制的下一步。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种带有自适应被动控制的软体机械臂原型，通过实验验证其动态轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统PD控制在软体机器人轨迹跟踪中存在精度不足和抗干扰能力弱的问题，需探索更高效的控制策略。
AI.method: 开发了自定义的执行器空间弦编码器，结合自适应被动控制与高效动力学模型，通过多场景实验验证控制效果。
AI.result: 在不同速度和外部干扰条件下，自适应被动控制均优于传统PD控制，实验分析了方法优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该控制策略有效提升了软体机器人动态跟踪性能，但需进一步优化以应对更复杂工况。

authors_text: Dawei Sun,Negin Musavi,Geir Dullerud,Sanjay Shakkottai,Sayan Mitra
title: Learning Certifiably Robust Controllers Using Fragile Perception
title_zh: 使用脆弱感知学习可证明的鲁棒控制器
abstract: Advances in computer vision and machine learning enable robots to perceive their surroundings in powerful new ways, but these perception modules have well-known fragilities. We consider the problem of synthesizing a safe controller that is robust despite perception errors. The proposed method constructs a state estimator based on Gaussian processes with input-dependent noises. This estimator computes a high-confidence set for the actual state given a perceived state. Then, a robust neural network controller is synthesized that can provably handle the state uncertainty. Furthermore, an adaptive sampling algorithm is proposed to jointly improve the estimator and controller. Simulation experiments, including a realistic vision-based lane-keeping example in CARLA, illustrate the promise of the proposed approach in synthesizing robust controllers with deep-learning-based perception.
summary: Advances in computer vision and machine learning enable robots to perceive their surroundings in powerful new ways, but these perception modules have well-known fragilities. We consider the problem of synthesizing a safe controller that is robust despite perception errors. The proposed method constructs a state estimator based on Gaussian processes with input-dependent noises. This estimator computes a high-confidence set for the actual state given a perceived state. Then, a robust neural network controller is synthesized that can provably handle the state uncertainty. Furthermore, an adaptive sampling algorithm is proposed to jointly improve the estimator and controller. Simulation experiments, including a realistic vision-based lane-keeping example in CARLA, illustrate the promise of the proposed approach in synthesizing robust controllers with deep-learning-based perception.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉和机器学习的进步使机器人能够以强大的新方式感知周围环境，但这些感知模块具有众所周知的脆弱性。我们考虑合成一个安全控制器的问题，该控制器在感知错误的情况下仍具有鲁棒性。所提出的方法构建了基于具有输入相关噪声的高斯过程的状态估计器。该估计器计算给定感知状态的实际状态的高置信度集。然后，合成一个鲁棒的神经网络控制器，可以证明可以处理状态不确定性。此外，提出了一种自适应采样算法来共同改进估计器和控制器。仿真实验，包括 CARLA 中基于视觉的真实车道保持示例，说明了所提出的方法在合成具有基于深度学习的感知的鲁棒控制器方面的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决因感知模块脆弱性导致的控制器鲁棒性问题，提出结合高斯过程状态估计与自适应采样算法的鲁棒控制器合成方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习感知模块存在脆弱性，可能导致控制器在感知误差下失效，需设计可证明安全的鲁棒控制策略以应对实际应用中的不确定性。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程构建输入相关噪声的状态估计器，生成实际状态的高置信区间，并设计鲁棒神经网络控制器处理不确定性，同时提出联合优化估计器与控制器的自适应采样算法。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真平台的视觉车道保持任务中验证了方法有效性，证明所提框架能合成应对感知噪声的鲁棒控制器。
AI.conclusion: 通过将概率状态估计与控制器合成结合，本文为安全关键系统提供了处理感知不确定性的可验证解决方案，未来可扩展至更多现实场景。

authors_text: Yingjun Tian,Renbo Su,Xilong Wang,Nur Banu Altin,Guoxin Fang,Charlie C. L. Wang
title: OpenPneu: Compact platform for pneumatic actuation with multi-channels
title_zh: OpenPneu：用于多通道气动驱动的紧凑平台
abstract: This paper presents a compact system, OpenPneu, to support the pneumatic actuation for multi-chambers on soft robots. Micro-pumps are employed in the system to generate airflow and therefore no extra input as compressed air is needed. Our system conducts modular design to provide good scalability, which has been demonstrated on a prototype with ten air channels. Each air channel of OpenPneu is equipped with both the inflation and the deflation functions to provide a full range pressure supply from positive to negative with a maximal flow rate at 1.7 L/min. High precision closed-loop control of pressures has been built into our system to achieve stable and efficient dynamic performance in actuation. An open-source control interface and API in Python are provided. We also demonstrate the functionality of OpenPneu on three soft robotic systems with up to 10 chambers.
summary: This paper presents a compact system, OpenPneu, to support the pneumatic actuation for multi-chambers on soft robots. Micro-pumps are employed in the system to generate airflow and therefore no extra input as compressed air is needed. Our system conducts modular design to provide good scalability, which has been demonstrated on a prototype with ten air channels. Each air channel of OpenPneu is equipped with both the inflation and the deflation functions to provide a full range pressure supply from positive to negative with a maximal flow rate at 1.7 L/min. High precision closed-loop control of pressures has been built into our system to achieve stable and efficient dynamic performance in actuation. An open-source control interface and API in Python are provided. We also demonstrate the functionality of OpenPneu on three soft robotic systems with up to 10 chambers.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种紧凑的系统 OpenPneu，用于支持软体机器人上多腔室的气动驱动。系统中采用微型泵来产生气流，因此不需要额外输入压缩空气。我们的系统采用模块化设计，具有良好的可扩展性，并在十个风道的原型机上得到了验证。 OpenPneu的每个气道都具有充气和放气功能，提供从正压到负压的全范围压力供应，最大流量为1.7 L/min。我们的系统内置了高精度压力闭环控制，以实现稳定、高效的驱动动态性能。提供Python的开源控制接口和API。我们还在三个具有多达 10 个腔室的软机器人系统上演示了 OpenPneu 的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OpenPneu的紧凑型多通道气动执行平台，用于软体机器人的气动驱动。
AI.motivation: 现有气动系统通常依赖压缩空气输入且扩展性差，难以满足多腔室软体机器人对紧凑性和模块化的需求。
AI.method: 采用微型泵生成气流替代压缩空气，通过模块化设计实现多通道（最多10个）气压控制，集成闭环控制算法并提供Python开源接口。
AI.result: 原型系统实现正负压双向调节（最大流量1.7L/min），在三个软体机器人系统中验证了其稳定性和动态性能。
AI.conclusion: OpenPneu为多腔室软体机器人提供了高精度、可扩展的气动驱动解决方案，推动了相关领域的研究与应用。

search_text: OpenPneu: Compact platform for pneumatic actuation with multi-channels OpenPneu：用于多通道气动驱动的紧凑平台 This paper presents a compact system, OpenPneu, to support the pneumatic actuation for multi-chambers on soft robots. Micro-pumps are employed in the system to generate airflow and therefore no extra input as compressed air is needed. Our system conducts modular design to provide good scalability, which has been demonstrated on a prototype with ten air channels. Each air channel of OpenPneu is equipped with both the inflation and the deflation functions to provide a full range pressure supply from positive to negative with a maximal flow rate at 1.7 L/min. High precision closed-loop control of pressures has been built into our system to achieve stable and efficient dynamic performance in actuation. An open-source control interface and API in Python are provided. We also demonstrate the functionality of OpenPneu on three soft robotic systems with up to 10 chambers. 本文提出了一种紧凑的系统 OpenPneu，用于支持软体机器人上多腔室的气动驱动。系统中采用微型泵来产生气流，因此不需要额外输入压缩空气。我们的系统采用模块化设计，具有良好的可扩展性，并在十个风道的原型机上得到了验证。 OpenPneu的每个气道都具有充气和放气功能，提供从正压到负压的全范围压力供应，最大流量为1.7 L/min。我们的系统内置了高精度压力闭环控制，以实现稳定、高效的驱动动态性能。提供Python的开源控制接口和API。我们还在三个具有多达 10 个腔室的软机器人系统上演示了 OpenPneu 的功能。 本文提出了一种名为OpenPneu的紧凑型多通道气动执行平台，用于软体机器人的气动驱动。 Yingjun Tian,Renbo Su,Xilong Wang,Nur Banu Altin,Guoxin Fang,Charlie C. L. Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Pu Jin,Lichao Mou,Yuansheng Hua,Gui-Song Xia,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: FuTH-Net: Fusing Temporal Relations and Holistic Features for Aerial Video Classification
title_zh: FuTH-Net：融合时间关系和整体特征进行航空视频分类
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are now widely applied to data acquisition due to its low cost and fast mobility. With the increasing volume of aerial videos, the demand for automatically parsing these videos is surging. To achieve this, current researches mainly focus on extracting a holistic feature with convolutions along both spatial and temporal dimensions. However, these methods are limited by small temporal receptive fields and cannot adequately capture long-term temporal dependencies which are important for describing complicated dynamics. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network, termed FuTH-Net, to model not only holistic features, but also temporal relations for aerial video classification. Furthermore, the holistic features are refined by the multi-scale temporal relations in a novel fusion module for yielding more discriminative video representations. More specially, FuTH-Net employs a two-pathway architecture: (1) a holistic representation pathway to learn a general feature of both frame appearances and shortterm temporal variations and (2) a temporal relation pathway to capture multi-scale temporal relations across arbitrary frames, providing long-term temporal dependencies. Afterwards, a novel fusion module is proposed to spatiotemporal integrate the two features learned from the two pathways. Our model is evaluated on two aerial video classification datasets, ERA and Drone-Action, and achieves the state-of-the-art results. This demonstrates its effectiveness and good generalization capacity across different recognition tasks (event classification and human action recognition). To facilitate further research, we release the code at https://gitlab.lrz.de/ai4eo/reasoning/futh-net.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are now widely applied to data acquisition due to its low cost and fast mobility. With the increasing volume of aerial videos, the demand for automatically parsing these videos is surging. To achieve this, current researches mainly focus on extracting a holistic feature with convolutions along both spatial and temporal dimensions. However, these methods are limited by small temporal receptive fields and cannot adequately capture long-term temporal dependencies which are important for describing complicated dynamics. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network, termed FuTH-Net, to model not only holistic features, but also temporal relations for aerial video classification. Furthermore, the holistic features are refined by the multi-scale temporal relations in a novel fusion module for yielding more discriminative video representations. More specially, FuTH-Net employs a two-pathway architecture: (1) a holistic representation pathway to learn a general feature of both frame appearances and shortterm temporal variations and (2) a temporal relation pathway to capture multi-scale temporal relations across arbitrary frames, providing long-term temporal dependencies. Afterwards, a novel fusion module is proposed to spatiotemporal integrate the two features learned from the two pathways. Our model is evaluated on two aerial video classification datasets, ERA and Drone-Action, and achieves the state-of-the-art results. This demonstrates its effectiveness and good generalization capacity across different recognition tasks (event classification and human action recognition). To facilitate further research, we release the code at https://gitlab.lrz.de/ai4eo/reasoning/futh-net.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）由于成本低、移动速度快，目前被广泛应用于数据采集。随着航拍视频量的不断增加，自动解析这些视频的需求激增。为了实现这一目标，当前的研究主要集中在沿空间和时间维度上的卷积提取整体特征。然而，这些方法受到小时间感受野的限制，无法充分捕获对于描述复杂动态非常重要的长期时间依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度神经网络，称为 FuTH-Net，不仅可以模拟整体特征，还可以模拟航空视频分类的时间关系。此外，通过新颖的融合模块中的多尺度时间关系来细化整体特征，以产生更具辨别力的视频表示。更具体地说，FuTH-Net 采用双路径架构：(1) 整体表示路径，用于学习帧外观和短期时间变化的一般特征；(2) 时间关系路径，用于捕获跨任意帧的多尺度时间关系，提供长期时间依赖性。随后，提出了一种新颖的融合模块来时空整合从两条路径中学到的两个特征。我们的模型在两个航空视频分类数据集 ERA 和 Drone-Action 上进行了评估，并取得了最先进的结果。这证明了其在不同识别任务（事件分类和人类行为识别）中的有效性和良好的泛化能力。为了便于进一步研究，我们在 https://gitlab.lrz.de/ai4eo/reasoning/futh-net 上发布了代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FuTH-Net网络，通过融合时序关系与整体特征提升航拍视频分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因时序感受野有限，难以捕捉航拍视频中的长期时序依赖关系，影响复杂动态描述。
AI.method: 设计双路径架构：1) 整体特征路径提取帧外观与短期变化特征；2) 时序关系路径捕捉跨帧多尺度时序关系，通过新型融合模块进行时空整合。
AI.result: 在ERA和Drone-Action数据集上取得当时最优结果，验证了模型在事件分类与人类动作识别任务中的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FuTH-Net通过双路径特征融合有效建模时序依赖，代码开源促进后续研究。

authors_text: Gary Sivek,Michael Riley
title: Spatial model personalization in Gboard
title_zh: Gboard 中的空间模型个性化
comment: 17 pages, to be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Conference on Mobile Human-Computer Interaction (MobileHCI 2022)
comments: 17 pages, to be published in the Proceedings of the 24th International Conference on Mobile Human-Computer Interaction (MobileHCI 2022)
abstract: We introduce a framework for adapting a virtual keyboard to individual user behavior by modifying a Gaussian spatial model to use personalized key center offset means and, optionally, learned covariances. Through numerous real-world studies, we determine the importance of training data quantity and weights, as well as the number of clusters into which to group keys to avoid overfitting. While past research has shown potential of this technique using artificially-simple virtual keyboards and games or fixed typing prompts, we demonstrate effectiveness using the highly-tuned Gboard app with a representative set of users and their real typing behaviors. Across a variety of top languages, we achieve small-but-significant improvements in both typing speed and decoder accuracy.
summary: We introduce a framework for adapting a virtual keyboard to individual user behavior by modifying a Gaussian spatial model to use personalized key center offset means and, optionally, learned covariances. Through numerous real-world studies, we determine the importance of training data quantity and weights, as well as the number of clusters into which to group keys to avoid overfitting. While past research has shown potential of this technique using artificially-simple virtual keyboards and games or fixed typing prompts, we demonstrate effectiveness using the highly-tuned Gboard app with a representative set of users and their real typing behaviors. Across a variety of top languages, we achieve small-but-significant improvements in both typing speed and decoder accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个框架，通过修改高斯空间模型以使用个性化的键中心偏移方式以及可选的学习协方差来使虚拟键盘适应个人用户行为。通过大量的现实世界研究，我们确定了训练数据数量和权重的重要性，以及将键分组到的集群数量以避免过度拟合。虽然过去的研究已经显示了这种技术使用人为简单的虚拟键盘和游戏或固定打字提示的潜力，但我们使用经过高度调整的 Gboard 应用程序以及一组代表性用户及其真实打字行为来展示其有效性。在各种顶级语言中，我们在打字速度和解码器准确性方面实现了小而显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过个性化高斯空间模型适应用户打字行为的虚拟键盘优化框架
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟键盘个性化方法在真实场景中效果有限，需结合真实用户数据和复杂应用进行优化
AI.method: 调整高斯模型参数，结合用户数据训练，并优化聚类策略防止过拟合
AI.result: 多种语言下打字速度和解码准确率均有显著提升
AI.conclusion: 个性化空间模型能有效提升虚拟键盘性能，验证了其在实际应用中的价值

authors_text: Aniruddha Tamhane,Tse'ela Mida,Erez Posner,Moshe Bouhnik
title: Colonoscopy Landmark Detection using Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用视觉变压器进行结肠镜检查地标检测
comment: Accepted for publication at Imaging Systems for GI Endoscopy workshop at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention- MICCAI 2022 ISGIE
comments: Accepted for publication at Imaging Systems for GI Endoscopy workshop at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention- MICCAI 2022 ISGIE
abstract: Colonoscopy is a routine outpatient procedure used to examine the colon and rectum for any abnormalities including polyps, diverticula and narrowing of colon structures. A significant amount of the clinician's time is spent in post-processing snapshots taken during the colonoscopy procedure, for maintaining medical records or further investigation. Automating this step can save time and improve the efficiency of the process. In our work, we have collected a dataset of 120 colonoscopy videos and 2416 snapshots taken during the procedure, that have been annotated by experts. Further, we have developed a novel, vision-transformer based landmark detection algorithm that identifies key anatomical landmarks (the appendiceal orifice, ileocecal valve/cecum landmark and rectum retroflexion) from snapshots taken during colonoscopy. Our algorithm uses an adaptive gamma correction during preprocessing to maintain a consistent brightness for all images. We then use a vision transformer as the feature extraction backbone and a fully connected network based classifier head to categorize a given frame into four classes: the three landmarks or a non-landmark frame. We compare the vision transformer (ViT-B/16) backbone with ResNet-101 and ConvNext-B backbones that have been trained similarly. We report an accuracy of 82% with the vision transformer backbone on a test dataset of snapshots.
summary: Colonoscopy is a routine outpatient procedure used to examine the colon and rectum for any abnormalities including polyps, diverticula and narrowing of colon structures. A significant amount of the clinician's time is spent in post-processing snapshots taken during the colonoscopy procedure, for maintaining medical records or further investigation. Automating this step can save time and improve the efficiency of the process. In our work, we have collected a dataset of 120 colonoscopy videos and 2416 snapshots taken during the procedure, that have been annotated by experts. Further, we have developed a novel, vision-transformer based landmark detection algorithm that identifies key anatomical landmarks (the appendiceal orifice, ileocecal valve/cecum landmark and rectum retroflexion) from snapshots taken during colonoscopy. Our algorithm uses an adaptive gamma correction during preprocessing to maintain a consistent brightness for all images. We then use a vision transformer as the feature extraction backbone and a fully connected network based classifier head to categorize a given frame into four classes: the three landmarks or a non-landmark frame. We compare the vision transformer (ViT-B/16) backbone with ResNet-101 and ConvNext-B backbones that have been trained similarly. We report an accuracy of 82% with the vision transformer backbone on a test dataset of snapshots.
abstract_zh: 结肠镜检查是一项常规门诊手术，用于检查结肠和直肠是否存在任何异常，包括息肉、憩室和结肠结构狭窄。临床医生的大量时间花费在结肠镜检查过程中拍摄的快照的后处理上，以保存医疗记录或进一步调查。自动化此步骤可以节省时间并提高流程效率。在我们的工作中，我们收集了 120 个结肠镜检查视频和 2416 个手术过程中拍摄的快照的数据集，并由专家注释。此外，我们开发了一种新颖的、基于视觉变换器的标志检测算法，该算法可以从结肠镜检查期间拍摄的快照中识别关键的解剖标志（阑尾口、回盲瓣/盲肠标志和直肠后屈）。我们的算法在预处理期间使用自适应伽玛校正来保持所有图像的亮度一致。然后，我们使用视觉转换器作为特征提取主干和基于全连接网络的分类器头，将给定帧分为四类：三个地标帧或非地标帧。我们将视觉 Transformer (ViT-B/16) 主干与经过类似训练的 ResNet-101 和 ConvNext-B 主干进行比较。我们报告，视觉 Transformer 主干在快照测试数据集上的准确率为 82%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer的算法，用于从结肠镜检查快照中检测关键解剖标志物。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜检查后需要大量时间处理图像以维护医疗记录或进一步检查，自动化此过程可提高效率。
AI.method: 收集并标注了120个结肠镜视频及2416张快照，采用自适应伽马校正预处理图像，使用Vision Transformer（ViT-B/16）作为特征提取主干，配合全连接网络分类器，将帧分为四类（三个标志物或非标志物帧），并与ResNet-101、ConvNext-B进行对比。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上，使用Vision Transformer主干的算法达到82%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformer在医学图像分析中表现出色，所提方法有效且优于其他经典网络结构。

authors_text: Ishika Singh,Valts Blukis,Arsalan Mousavian,Ankit Goyal,Danfei Xu,Jonathan Tremblay,Dieter Fox,Jesse Thomason,Animesh Garg
title: ProgPrompt: Generating Situated Robot Task Plans using Large Language Models
title_zh: ProgPrompt：使用大型语言模型生成情境机器人任务计划
abstract: Task planning can require defining myriad domain knowledge about the world in which a robot needs to act. To ameliorate that effort, large language models (LLMs) can be used to score potential next actions during task planning, and even generate action sequences directly, given an instruction in natural language with no additional domain information. However, such methods either require enumerating all possible next steps for scoring, or generate free-form text that may contain actions not possible on a given robot in its current context. We present a programmatic LLM prompt structure that enables plan generation functional across situated environments, robot capabilities, and tasks. Our key insight is to prompt the LLM with program-like specifications of the available actions and objects in an environment, as well as with example programs that can be executed. We make concrete recommendations about prompt structure and generation constraints through ablation experiments, demonstrate state of the art success rates in VirtualHome household tasks, and deploy our method on a physical robot arm for tabletop tasks. Website at progprompt.github.io
summary: Task planning can require defining myriad domain knowledge about the world in which a robot needs to act. To ameliorate that effort, large language models (LLMs) can be used to score potential next actions during task planning, and even generate action sequences directly, given an instruction in natural language with no additional domain information. However, such methods either require enumerating all possible next steps for scoring, or generate free-form text that may contain actions not possible on a given robot in its current context. We present a programmatic LLM prompt structure that enables plan generation functional across situated environments, robot capabilities, and tasks. Our key insight is to prompt the LLM with program-like specifications of the available actions and objects in an environment, as well as with example programs that can be executed. We make concrete recommendations about prompt structure and generation constraints through ablation experiments, demonstrate state of the art success rates in VirtualHome household tasks, and deploy our method on a physical robot arm for tabletop tasks. Website at progprompt.github.io
abstract_zh: 任务规划可能需要定义有关机器人需要行动的世界的无数领域知识。为了改善这一工作，可以使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 在任务规划期间对潜在的下一步动作进行评分，甚至在没有额外领域信息的自然语言指令的情况下直接生成动作序列。然而，此类方法要么需要枚举所有可能的后续步骤进行评分，要么生成自由格式的文本，其中可能包含给定机器人在当前上下文中不可能执行的操作。我们提出了一种程序化的 LLM 提示结构，可以跨情境环境、机器人功能和任务生成计划。我们的主要见解是通过环境中可用操作和对象的类似程序的规范以及可以执行的示例程序来提示法学硕士。我们通过消融实验对提示结构和生成约束提出了具体建议，展示了 VirtualHome 家庭任务中最先进的成功率，并将我们的方法部署在用于桌面任务的物理机器人手臂上。网站 progprompt.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProgPrompt方法，利用大语言模型生成适用于不同环境和任务的机器人任务计划。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需依赖大量领域知识或生成不可执行动作，而现有LLM方法存在枚举动作繁琐或输出不实际的问题。
AI.method: 设计程序式提示结构，通过环境动作规范和可执行示例程序约束LLM生成有效动作序列。
AI.result: 在VirtualHome家庭任务中达到最先进成功率，并成功部署于物理机器人臂执行桌面任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为跨环境机器人任务规划提供有效方案，提示结构设计对LLM生成可控计划具有重要指导意义。

authors_text: Marco Geiger,Dominik Martin,Niklas Kühl
title: Deep Domain Adaptation for Detecting Bomb Craters in Aerial Images
title_zh: 用于检测航空图像中的炸弹坑的深度域适应
comment: 56th Annual Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (HICSS-56)
comments: 56th Annual Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (HICSS-56)
abstract: The aftermath of air raids can still be seen for decades after the devastating events. Unexploded ordnance (UXO) is an immense danger to human life and the environment. Through the assessment of wartime images, experts can infer the occurrence of a dud. The current manual analysis process is expensive and time-consuming, thus automated detection of bomb craters by using deep learning is a promising way to improve the UXO disposal process. However, these methods require a large amount of manually labeled training data. This work leverages domain adaptation with moon surface images to address the problem of automated bomb crater detection with deep learning under the constraint of limited training data. This paper contributes to both academia and practice (1) by providing a solution approach for automated bomb crater detection with limited training data and (2) by demonstrating the usability and associated challenges of using synthetic images for domain adaptation.
summary: The aftermath of air raids can still be seen for decades after the devastating events. Unexploded ordnance (UXO) is an immense danger to human life and the environment. Through the assessment of wartime images, experts can infer the occurrence of a dud. The current manual analysis process is expensive and time-consuming, thus automated detection of bomb craters by using deep learning is a promising way to improve the UXO disposal process. However, these methods require a large amount of manually labeled training data. This work leverages domain adaptation with moon surface images to address the problem of automated bomb crater detection with deep learning under the constraint of limited training data. This paper contributes to both academia and practice (1) by providing a solution approach for automated bomb crater detection with limited training data and (2) by demonstrating the usability and associated challenges of using synthetic images for domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 灾难性事件发生几十年后，空袭的后果仍然可见。未爆炸弹药（UXO）对人类生命和环境构成巨大威胁。通过对战时图像的评估，专家可以推断出故障的发生。目前的手动分析过程既昂贵又耗时，因此利用深度学习自动检测弹坑是改进未爆炸弹药处置过程的一种有前途的方法。然而，这些方法需要大量手动标记的训练数据。这项工作利用月球表面图像的域适应来解决在有限训练数据的约束下通过深度学习自动检测炸弹坑的问题。本文对学术界和实践都有贡献：(1) 提供了一种利用有限训练数据进行自动炸弹弹坑检测的解决方案；(2) 展示了使用合成图像进行域适应的可用性和相关挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度领域自适应的方法，在有限训练数据条件下，利用合成月球表面图像迁移学习实现航拍图像中炸弹弹坑的自动化检测。
AI.motivation: 传统人工分析战时图像检测未爆弹成本高且耗时，而深度学习方法需要大量标注数据。在实际场景中训练数据有限，需探索领域自适应技术解决数据不足问题。
AI.method: 采用深度领域自适应技术，以合成月球表面图像作为源域数据，通过迁移学习适应目标域的航拍图像，实现炸弹弹坑检测模型的训练与优化。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在有限训练数据下可有效检测炸弹弹坑，同时展示了合成图像用于领域自适应的可行性及实际应用中的技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为学术界和实践领域提供了有限数据条件下炸弹弹坑检测的解决方案，并揭示了合成数据在领域自适应中的应用潜力与技术难点。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度领域自适应的方法，在有限训练数据条件下，利用合成月球表面图像迁移学习实现航拍图像中炸弹弹坑的自动化检测。
ai_content.motivation: 传统人工分析战时图像检测未爆弹成本高且耗时，而深度学习方法需要大量标注数据。在实际场景中训练数据有限，需探索领域自适应技术解决数据不足问题。
ai_content.method: 采用深度领域自适应技术，以合成月球表面图像作为源域数据，通过迁移学习适应目标域的航拍图像，实现炸弹弹坑检测模型的训练与优化。
ai_content.result: 验证了该方法在有限训练数据下可有效检测炸弹弹坑，同时展示了合成图像用于领域自适应的可行性及实际应用中的技术挑战。
ai_content.conclusion: 本研究为学术界和实践领域提供了有限数据条件下炸弹弹坑检测的解决方案，并揭示了合成数据在领域自适应中的应用潜力与技术难点。

search_text: Deep Domain Adaptation for Detecting Bomb Craters in Aerial Images 用于检测航空图像中的炸弹坑的深度域适应 The aftermath of air raids can still be seen for decades after the devastating events. Unexploded ordnance (UXO) is an immense danger to human life and the environment. Through the assessment of wartime images, experts can infer the occurrence of a dud. The current manual analysis process is expensive and time-consuming, thus automated detection of bomb craters by using deep learning is a promising way to improve the UXO disposal process. However, these methods require a large amount of manually labeled training data. This work leverages domain adaptation with moon surface images to address the problem of automated bomb crater detection with deep learning under the constraint of limited training data. This paper contributes to both academia and practice (1) by providing a solution approach for automated bomb crater detection with limited training data and (2) by demonstrating the usability and associated challenges of using synthetic images for domain adaptation. 灾难性事件发生几十年后，空袭的后果仍然可见。未爆炸弹药（UXO）对人类生命和环境构成巨大威胁。通过对战时图像的评估，专家可以推断出故障的发生。目前的手动分析过程既昂贵又耗时，因此利用深度学习自动检测弹坑是改进未爆炸弹药处置过程的一种有前途的方法。然而，这些方法需要大量手动标记的训练数据。这项工作利用月球表面图像的域适应来解决在有限训练数据的约束下通过深度学习自动检测炸弹坑的问题。本文对学术界和实践都有贡献：(1) 提供了一种利用有限训练数据进行自动炸弹弹坑检测的解决方案；(2) 展示了使用合成图像进行域适应的可用性和相关挑战。 本文提出一种基于深度领域自适应的方法，在有限训练数据条件下，利用合成月球表面图像迁移学习实现航拍图像中炸弹弹坑的自动化检测。 Marco Geiger,Dominik Martin,Niklas Kühl cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Stoler,Meghdeep Jana,Soonmin Hwang,Jean Oh
title: T2FPV: Dataset and Method for Correcting First-Person View Errors in Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: T2FPV：行人轨迹预测中第一人称视角误差校正的数据集和方法
abstract: Predicting pedestrian motion is essential for developing socially-aware robots that interact in a crowded environment. While the natural visual perspective for a social interaction setting is an egocentric view, the majority of existing work in trajectory prediction therein has been investigated purely in the top-down trajectory space. To support first-person view trajectory prediction research, we present T2FPV, a method for constructing high-fidelity first-person view (FPV) datasets given a real-world, top-down trajectory dataset; we showcase our approach on the ETH/UCY pedestrian dataset to generate the egocentric visual data of all interacting pedestrians, creating the T2FPV-ETH dataset. In this setting, FPV-specific errors arise due to imperfect detection and tracking, occlusions, and field-of-view (FOV) limitations of the camera. To address these errors, we propose CoFE, a module that further refines the imputation of missing data in an end-to-end manner with trajectory forecasting algorithms. Our method reduces the impact of such FPV errors on downstream prediction performance, decreasing displacement error by more than 10% on average. To facilitate research engagement, we release our T2FPV-ETH dataset and software tools.
summary: Predicting pedestrian motion is essential for developing socially-aware robots that interact in a crowded environment. While the natural visual perspective for a social interaction setting is an egocentric view, the majority of existing work in trajectory prediction therein has been investigated purely in the top-down trajectory space. To support first-person view trajectory prediction research, we present T2FPV, a method for constructing high-fidelity first-person view (FPV) datasets given a real-world, top-down trajectory dataset; we showcase our approach on the ETH/UCY pedestrian dataset to generate the egocentric visual data of all interacting pedestrians, creating the T2FPV-ETH dataset. In this setting, FPV-specific errors arise due to imperfect detection and tracking, occlusions, and field-of-view (FOV) limitations of the camera. To address these errors, we propose CoFE, a module that further refines the imputation of missing data in an end-to-end manner with trajectory forecasting algorithms. Our method reduces the impact of such FPV errors on downstream prediction performance, decreasing displacement error by more than 10% on average. To facilitate research engagement, we release our T2FPV-ETH dataset and software tools.
abstract_zh: 预测行人运动对于开发在拥挤环境中互动的具有社交意识的机器人至关重要。虽然社交互动环境的自然视觉视角是一种以自我为中心的观点，但其中轨迹预测的大多数现有工作纯粹是在自上而下的轨迹空间中进行研究的。为了支持第一人称视角轨迹预测研究，我们提出了 T2FPV，一种在给定真实世界、自上而下的轨迹数据集的情况下构建高保真第一人称视角 (FPV) 数据集的方法；我们在 ETH/UCY 行人数据集上展示了我们的方法，以生成所有交互行人的以自我为中心的视觉数据，从而创建 T2FPV-ETH 数据集。在此设置中，由于相机的检测和跟踪不完善、遮挡和视场 (FOV) 限制，会出现 FPV 特定错误。为了解决这些错误，我们提出了 CoFE，该模块通过轨迹预测算法以端到端方式进一步细化缺失数据的插补。我们的方法减少了此类 FPV 误差对下游预测性能的影响，平均减少了 10% 以上的位移误差。为了促进研究参与，我们发布了 T2FPV-ETH 数据集和软件工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出T2FPV方法及数据集，用于纠正第一人称视角下行人轨迹预测中的误差。
AI.motivation: 现有行人轨迹预测研究多基于顶部视角，缺乏针对第一人称视角（FPV）的高质量数据集及误差修正方法，而FPV视角下存在检测跟踪不完美、遮挡和视野限制等问题。
AI.method: 通过T2FPV方法将顶部视角轨迹数据转换为高保真FPV数据集（如T2FPV-ETH），并设计CoFE模块以端到端方式优化缺失数据填补，减少FPV误差影响。
AI.result: 在T2FPV-ETH数据集上，该方法平均减少位移误差超过10%，并发布数据集及工具促进研究。
AI.conclusion: T2FPV方法有效提升了第一人称视角下行人轨迹预测的准确性，为相关研究提供了数据支持和解决方案。

authors_text: Narotam Singh,Patteshwari. D,Neha Soni,Amita Kapoor
title: Automated detection of Alzheimer disease using MRI images and deep neural networks- A review
title_zh: 使用 MRI 图像和深度神经网络自动检测阿尔茨海默病 - 综述
abstract: Early detection of Alzheimer disease is crucial for deploying interventions and slowing the disease progression. A lot of machine learning and deep learning algorithms have been explored in the past decade with the aim of building an automated detection for Alzheimer. Advancements in data augmentation techniques and advanced deep learning architectures have opened up new frontiers in this field, and research is moving at a rapid speed. Hence, the purpose of this survey is to provide an overview of recent research on deep learning models for Alzheimer disease diagnosis. In addition to categorizing the numerous data sources, neural network architectures, and commonly used assessment measures, we also classify implementation and reproducibility. Our objective is to assist interested researchers in keeping up with the newest developments and in reproducing earlier investigations as benchmarks. In addition, we also indicate future research directions for this topic.
summary: Early detection of Alzheimer disease is crucial for deploying interventions and slowing the disease progression. A lot of machine learning and deep learning algorithms have been explored in the past decade with the aim of building an automated detection for Alzheimer. Advancements in data augmentation techniques and advanced deep learning architectures have opened up new frontiers in this field, and research is moving at a rapid speed. Hence, the purpose of this survey is to provide an overview of recent research on deep learning models for Alzheimer disease diagnosis. In addition to categorizing the numerous data sources, neural network architectures, and commonly used assessment measures, we also classify implementation and reproducibility. Our objective is to assist interested researchers in keeping up with the newest developments and in reproducing earlier investigations as benchmarks. In addition, we also indicate future research directions for this topic.
abstract_zh: 早期发现阿尔茨海默病对于采取干预措施和减缓疾病进展至关重要。在过去的十年中，人们已经探索了许多机器学习和深度学习算法，目的是构建阿尔茨海默病的自动检测。数据增强技术和先进深度学习架构的进步开辟了该领域的新领域，研究正在快速发展。因此，本次调查的目的是概述阿尔茨海默病诊断深度学习模型的最新研究。除了对众多的数据源、神经网络架构和常用的评估措施进行分类之外，我们还对实施和可重复性进行分类。我们的目标是帮助感兴趣的研究人员跟上最新的发展并重现早期的研究作为基准。此外，我们还指出了该主题的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来利用MRI图像和深度神经网络进行阿尔茨海默病自动检测的研究进展，分类总结了数据源、网络架构及评估指标。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病早期检测对干预治疗至关重要，而深度学习技术的快速发展亟需系统梳理现有方法以指导后续研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类整理不同研究的数据来源、神经网络模型结构、评估指标，并分析其可实现性与可复现性。
AI.result: 总结了主流深度学习模型在阿尔茨海默病诊断中的应用，指出现有研究的优势与不足，并提出未来研究方向如数据标准化和模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为阿尔茨海默病检测提供了有效工具，但需进一步解决数据异质性、模型泛化能力及临床转化等问题。

search_text: Automated detection of Alzheimer disease using MRI images and deep neural networks- A review 使用 MRI 图像和深度神经网络自动检测阿尔茨海默病 - 综述 Early detection of Alzheimer disease is crucial for deploying interventions and slowing the disease progression. A lot of machine learning and deep learning algorithms have been explored in the past decade with the aim of building an automated detection for Alzheimer. Advancements in data augmentation techniques and advanced deep learning architectures have opened up new frontiers in this field, and research is moving at a rapid speed. Hence, the purpose of this survey is to provide an overview of recent research on deep learning models for Alzheimer disease diagnosis. In addition to categorizing the numerous data sources, neural network architectures, and commonly used assessment measures, we also classify implementation and reproducibility. Our objective is to assist interested researchers in keeping up with the newest developments and in reproducing earlier investigations as benchmarks. In addition, we also indicate future research directions for this topic. 早期发现阿尔茨海默病对于采取干预措施和减缓疾病进展至关重要。在过去的十年中，人们已经探索了许多机器学习和深度学习算法，目的是构建阿尔茨海默病的自动检测。数据增强技术和先进深度学习架构的进步开辟了该领域的新领域，研究正在快速发展。因此，本次调查的目的是概述阿尔茨海默病诊断深度学习模型的最新研究。除了对众多的数据源、神经网络架构和常用的评估措施进行分类之外，我们还对实施和可重复性进行分类。我们的目标是帮助感兴趣的研究人员跟上最新的发展并重现早期的研究作为基准。此外，我们还指出了该主题的未来研究方向。 本文综述了近年来利用MRI图像和深度神经网络进行阿尔茨海默病自动检测的研究进展，分类总结了数据源、网络架构及评估指标。 Narotam Singh,Patteshwari. D,Neha Soni,Amita Kapoor eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhan Gao,Amanda Prorok
title: Environment Optimization for Multi-Agent Navigation
title_zh: 多代理导航的环境优化
abstract: Traditional approaches to the design of multi-agent navigation algorithms consider the environment as a fixed constraint, despite the obvious influence of spatial constraints on agents' performance. Yet hand-designing improved environment layouts and structures is inefficient and potentially expensive. The goal of this paper is to consider the environment as a decision variable in a system-level optimization problem, where both agent performance and environment cost can be accounted for. We begin by proposing a novel environment optimization problem. We show, through formal proofs, under which conditions the environment can change while guaranteeing completeness (i.e., all agents reach their navigation goals). Our solution leverages a model-free reinforcement learning approach. In order to accommodate a broad range of implementation scenarios, we include both online and offline optimization, and both discrete and continuous environment representations. Numerical results corroborate our theoretical findings and validate our approach.
summary: Traditional approaches to the design of multi-agent navigation algorithms consider the environment as a fixed constraint, despite the obvious influence of spatial constraints on agents' performance. Yet hand-designing improved environment layouts and structures is inefficient and potentially expensive. The goal of this paper is to consider the environment as a decision variable in a system-level optimization problem, where both agent performance and environment cost can be accounted for. We begin by proposing a novel environment optimization problem. We show, through formal proofs, under which conditions the environment can change while guaranteeing completeness (i.e., all agents reach their navigation goals). Our solution leverages a model-free reinforcement learning approach. In order to accommodate a broad range of implementation scenarios, we include both online and offline optimization, and both discrete and continuous environment representations. Numerical results corroborate our theoretical findings and validate our approach.
abstract_zh: 尽管空间约束对智能体性能有明显影响，但传统的多智能体导航算法设计方法仍将环境视为固定约束。然而，手工设计改进的环境布局和结构效率低下，而且可能成本高昂。本文的目标是将环境视为系统级优化问题中的决策变量，其中可以考虑代理性能和环境成本。我们首先提出一个新的环境优化问题。我们通过形式证明证明，在哪些条件下环境可以改变，同时保证完整性（即所有智能体都达到其导航目标）。我们的解决方案利用无模型强化学习方法。为了适应广泛的实施场景，我们包括在线和离线优化以及离散和连续环境表示。数值结果证实了我们的理论发现并验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文将环境作为决策变量，通过强化学习优化多智能体导航的环境布局，以提升性能并降低环境成本。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将环境视为固定约束，但实际中环境设计效率低且成本高，需通过系统级优化同时考虑智能体性能与环境成本。
AI.method: 提出新型环境优化问题，结合无模型强化学习方法，支持在线/离线优化及离散/连续环境表示。
AI.result: 理论证明了环境可变条件下的完备性，数值实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了多智能体导航环境优化框架，通过理论分析与实验验证了其可行性与优越性。

authors_text: Fabian Duffhauss,Ngo Anh Vien,Hanna Ziesche,Gerhard Neumann
title: FusionVAE: A Deep Hierarchical Variational Autoencoder for RGB Image Fusion
title_zh: FusionVAE：用于 RGB 图像融合的深度分层变分自动编码器
abstract: Sensor fusion can significantly improve the performance of many computer vision tasks. However, traditional fusion approaches are either not data-driven and cannot exploit prior knowledge nor find regularities in a given dataset or they are restricted to a single application. We overcome this shortcoming by presenting a novel deep hierarchical variational autoencoder called FusionVAE that can serve as a basis for many fusion tasks. Our approach is able to generate diverse image samples that are conditioned on multiple noisy, occluded, or only partially visible input images. We derive and optimize a variational lower bound for the conditional log-likelihood of FusionVAE. In order to assess the fusion capabilities of our model thoroughly, we created three novel datasets for image fusion based on popular computer vision datasets. In our experiments, we show that FusionVAE learns a representation of aggregated information that is relevant to fusion tasks. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional methods significantly. Furthermore, we present the advantages and disadvantages of different design choices.
summary: Sensor fusion can significantly improve the performance of many computer vision tasks. However, traditional fusion approaches are either not data-driven and cannot exploit prior knowledge nor find regularities in a given dataset or they are restricted to a single application. We overcome this shortcoming by presenting a novel deep hierarchical variational autoencoder called FusionVAE that can serve as a basis for many fusion tasks. Our approach is able to generate diverse image samples that are conditioned on multiple noisy, occluded, or only partially visible input images. We derive and optimize a variational lower bound for the conditional log-likelihood of FusionVAE. In order to assess the fusion capabilities of our model thoroughly, we created three novel datasets for image fusion based on popular computer vision datasets. In our experiments, we show that FusionVAE learns a representation of aggregated information that is relevant to fusion tasks. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional methods significantly. Furthermore, we present the advantages and disadvantages of different design choices.
abstract_zh: 传感器融合可以显着提高许多计算机视觉任务的性能。然而，传统的融合方法要么不是数据驱动的，不能利用先验知识，也不能在给定的数据集中找到规律，或者仅限于单个应用程序。我们通过提出一种名为 FusionVAE 的新型深度分层变分自动编码器来克服这个缺点，它可以作为许多融合任务的基础。我们的方法能够生成不同的图像样本，这些样本以多个噪声、遮挡或仅部分可见的输入图像为条件。我们推导出并优化 FusionVAE 条件对数似然的变分下界。为了彻底评估我们模型的融合能力，我们基于流行的计算机视觉数据集创建了三个新颖的图像融合数据集。在我们的实验中，我们表明 FusionVAE 学习与融合任务相关的聚合信息的表示。结果表明，我们的方法明显优于传统方法。此外，我们还介绍了不同设计选择的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FusionVAE的深度分层变分自编码器，用于解决RGB图像融合任务，克服传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器融合方法或非数据驱动无法利用先验知识，或仅限于单一应用，难以适应复杂场景下的多源图像融合需求。
AI.method: 设计FusionVAE模型，通过条件生成机制处理多噪声/遮挡输入图像，推导并优化其变分下界目标函数，构建三个新数据集进行系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明FusionVAE在图像融合任务中显著优于传统方法，且通过消融实验分析了不同网络结构设计的优劣。
AI.conclusion: FusionVAE为多模态图像融合提供了通用框架，但需根据具体应用场景权衡模型复杂度与融合效果的关系。

authors_text: Harsh Panwar,Ioannis Patras
title: Capsule Network based Contrastive Learning of Unsupervised Visual Representations
title_zh: 基于胶囊网络的无监督视觉表示的对比学习
abstract: Capsule Networks have shown tremendous advancement in the past decade, outperforming the traditional CNNs in various task due to it's equivariant properties. With the use of vector I/O which provides information of both magnitude and direction of an object or it's part, there lies an enormous possibility of using Capsule Networks in unsupervised learning environment for visual representation tasks such as multi class image classification. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Capsule (CoCa) Model which is a Siamese style Capsule Network using Contrastive loss with our novel architecture, training and testing algorithm. We evaluate the model on unsupervised image classification CIFAR-10 dataset and achieve a top-1 test accuracy of 70.50% and top-5 test accuracy of 98.10%. Due to our efficient architecture our model has 31 times less parameters and 71 times less FLOPs than the current SOTA in both supervised and unsupervised learning.
summary: Capsule Networks have shown tremendous advancement in the past decade, outperforming the traditional CNNs in various task due to it's equivariant properties. With the use of vector I/O which provides information of both magnitude and direction of an object or it's part, there lies an enormous possibility of using Capsule Networks in unsupervised learning environment for visual representation tasks such as multi class image classification. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Capsule (CoCa) Model which is a Siamese style Capsule Network using Contrastive loss with our novel architecture, training and testing algorithm. We evaluate the model on unsupervised image classification CIFAR-10 dataset and achieve a top-1 test accuracy of 70.50% and top-5 test accuracy of 98.10%. Due to our efficient architecture our model has 31 times less parameters and 71 times less FLOPs than the current SOTA in both supervised and unsupervised learning.
abstract_zh: 胶囊网络在过去十年中表现出了巨大的进步，由于其等变特性，在各种任务中都优于传统的 CNN。通过使用提供对象或其部分的大小和方向信息的矢量 I/O，在无监督学习环境中使用胶囊网络来执行多类图像分类等视觉表示任务具有巨大的可能性。在本文中，我们提出了对比胶囊（CoCa）模型，它是一种连体式胶囊网络，使用对比损失以及我们新颖的架构、训练和测试算法。我们在无监督图像分类 CIFAR-10 数据集上评估该模型，并实现了 70.50% 的 top-1 测试精度和 98.10% 的 top-5 测试精度。由于我们的高效架构，我们的模型在监督和无监督学习中的参数比当前 SOTA 少 31 倍，FLOP 少 71 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于胶囊网络的无监督视觉表示学习方法，用于图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 胶囊网络的等变性优势使其在无监督学习中具有潜力，但现有方法在参数效率和计算量上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计Siamese风格胶囊网络CoCa，结合对比损失函数与新型训练测试算法，优化架构以减少参数和计算量。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上实现70.50%的top-1和98.10%的top-5准确率，参数量减少31倍，FLOPs减少71倍。
AI.conclusion: CoCa模型在保持高性能的同时显著提升计算效率，为无监督视觉表示学习提供新方向。

search_text: Capsule Network based Contrastive Learning of Unsupervised Visual Representations 基于胶囊网络的无监督视觉表示的对比学习 Capsule Networks have shown tremendous advancement in the past decade, outperforming the traditional CNNs in various task due to it's equivariant properties. With the use of vector I/O which provides information of both magnitude and direction of an object or it's part, there lies an enormous possibility of using Capsule Networks in unsupervised learning environment for visual representation tasks such as multi class image classification. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Capsule (CoCa) Model which is a Siamese style Capsule Network using Contrastive loss with our novel architecture, training and testing algorithm. We evaluate the model on unsupervised image classification CIFAR-10 dataset and achieve a top-1 test accuracy of 70.50% and top-5 test accuracy of 98.10%. Due to our efficient architecture our model has 31 times less parameters and 71 times less FLOPs than the current SOTA in both supervised and unsupervised learning. 胶囊网络在过去十年中表现出了巨大的进步，由于其等变特性，在各种任务中都优于传统的 CNN。通过使用提供对象或其部分的大小和方向信息的矢量 I/O，在无监督学习环境中使用胶囊网络来执行多类图像分类等视觉表示任务具有巨大的可能性。在本文中，我们提出了对比胶囊（CoCa）模型，它是一种连体式胶囊网络，使用对比损失以及我们新颖的架构、训练和测试算法。我们在无监督图像分类 CIFAR-10 数据集上评估该模型，并实现了 70.50% 的 top-1 测试精度和 98.10% 的 top-5 测试精度。由于我们的高效架构，我们的模型在监督和无监督学习中的参数比当前 SOTA 少 31 倍，FLOP 少 71 倍。 本文提出基于胶囊网络的无监督视觉表示学习方法，用于图像分类任务。 Harsh Panwar,Ioannis Patras cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Abraham George,Alison Bartsch,Amir Barati Farimani
title: Minimizing Human Assistance: Augmenting a Single Demonstration for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 最大限度地减少人工协助：增强深度强化学习的单一演示
abstract: The use of human demonstrations in reinforcement learning has proven to significantly improve agent performance. However, any requirement for a human to manually 'teach' the model is somewhat antithetical to the goals of reinforcement learning. This paper attempts to minimize human involvement in the learning process while retaining the performance advantages by using a single human example collected through a simple-to-use virtual reality simulation to assist with RL training. Our method augments a single demonstration to generate numerous human-like demonstrations that, when combined with Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients and Hindsight Experience Replay (DDPG + HER) significantly improve training time on simple tasks and allows the agent to solve a complex task (block stacking) that DDPG + HER alone cannot solve. The model achieves this significant training advantage using a single human example, requiring less than a minute of human input. Moreover, despite learning from a human example, the agent is not constrained to human-level performance, often learning a policy that is significantly different from the human demonstration.
summary: The use of human demonstrations in reinforcement learning has proven to significantly improve agent performance. However, any requirement for a human to manually 'teach' the model is somewhat antithetical to the goals of reinforcement learning. This paper attempts to minimize human involvement in the learning process while retaining the performance advantages by using a single human example collected through a simple-to-use virtual reality simulation to assist with RL training. Our method augments a single demonstration to generate numerous human-like demonstrations that, when combined with Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients and Hindsight Experience Replay (DDPG + HER) significantly improve training time on simple tasks and allows the agent to solve a complex task (block stacking) that DDPG + HER alone cannot solve. The model achieves this significant training advantage using a single human example, requiring less than a minute of human input. Moreover, despite learning from a human example, the agent is not constrained to human-level performance, often learning a policy that is significantly different from the human demonstration.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，在强化学习中使用人类演示可以显着提高代理的性能。然而，人类手动“教授”模型的任何要求都与强化学习的目标有些矛盾。本文试图通过使用通过简单易用的虚拟现实模拟收集的单个人类示例来辅助强化学习训练，从而最大限度地减少人类对学习过程的参与，同时保留性能优势。我们的方法增强了单个演示，以生成大量类似人类的演示，当与深度确定性策略梯度和事后经验重放（DDPG + HER）相结合时，可以显着缩短简单任务的训练时间，并允许代理解决仅 DDPG + HER 无法解决的复杂任务（块堆叠）。该模型使用单个人类示例实现了这一显着的训练优势，需要不到一分钟的人类输入。此外，尽管从人类示例中学习，代理并不局限于人类水平的表现，通常学习与人类演示显着不同的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过单个人类示范最小化深度强化学习中的人类辅助，利用虚拟现实模拟生成大量类人示范以提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 人类示范虽能提升强化学习性能，但与完全自动化的学习目标相悖，需减少人类干预同时保持性能优势。
AI.method: 通过简易VR模拟采集单个人类示范，结合DDPG与HER算法生成多组类人示范数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在简单任务中显著缩短训练时间，并成功解决DDPG+HER单独无法完成的复杂任务（积木堆叠），且无需人类水平性能约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以极少人类输入实现高效训练，证明了单示范增强策略在减少人工依赖方面的有效性。

authors_text: Sadiq M. Sait,Aiman El-Maleh,Mohammad Altakrouri,Ahmad Shawahna
title: Optimization of FPGA-based CNN Accelerators Using Metaheuristics
title_zh: 使用元启发法优化基于 FPGA 的 CNN 加速器
comment: 23 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables. in The Journal of Supercomputing, 2022
comments: 23 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables. in The Journal of Supercomputing, 2022
abstract: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have demonstrated their ability to solve problems in many fields and with accuracy that was not possible before. However, this comes with extensive computational requirements, which made general CPUs unable to deliver the desired real-time performance. At the same time, FPGAs have seen a surge in interest for accelerating CNN inference. This is due to their ability to create custom designs with different levels of parallelism. Furthermore, FPGAs provide better performance per watt compared to GPUs. The current trend in FPGA-based CNN accelerators is to implement multiple convolutional layer processors (CLPs), each of which is tailored for a subset of layers. However, the growing complexity of CNN architectures makes optimizing the resources available on the target FPGA device to deliver optimal performance more challenging. In this paper, we present a CNN accelerator and an accompanying automated design methodology that employs metaheuristics for partitioning available FPGA resources to design a Multi-CLP accelerator. Specifically, the proposed design tool adopts simulated annealing (SA) and tabu search (TS) algorithms to find the number of CLPs required and their respective configurations to achieve optimal performance on a given target FPGA device. Here, the focus is on the key specifications and hardware resources, including digital signal processors, block RAMs, and off-chip memory bandwidth. Experimental results and comparisons using four well-known benchmark CNNs are presented demonstrating that the proposed acceleration framework is both encouraging and promising. The SA-/TS-based Multi-CLP achieves 1.31x - 2.37x higher throughput than the state-of-the-art Single-/Multi-CLP approaches in accelerating AlexNet, SqueezeNet 1.1, VGGNet, and GoogLeNet architectures on the Xilinx VC707 and VC709 FPGA boards.
summary: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have demonstrated their ability to solve problems in many fields and with accuracy that was not possible before. However, this comes with extensive computational requirements, which made general CPUs unable to deliver the desired real-time performance. At the same time, FPGAs have seen a surge in interest for accelerating CNN inference. This is due to their ability to create custom designs with different levels of parallelism. Furthermore, FPGAs provide better performance per watt compared to GPUs. The current trend in FPGA-based CNN accelerators is to implement multiple convolutional layer processors (CLPs), each of which is tailored for a subset of layers. However, the growing complexity of CNN architectures makes optimizing the resources available on the target FPGA device to deliver optimal performance more challenging. In this paper, we present a CNN accelerator and an accompanying automated design methodology that employs metaheuristics for partitioning available FPGA resources to design a Multi-CLP accelerator. Specifically, the proposed design tool adopts simulated annealing (SA) and tabu search (TS) algorithms to find the number of CLPs required and their respective configurations to achieve optimal performance on a given target FPGA device. Here, the focus is on the key specifications and hardware resources, including digital signal processors, block RAMs, and off-chip memory bandwidth. Experimental results and comparisons using four well-known benchmark CNNs are presented demonstrating that the proposed acceleration framework is both encouraging and promising. The SA-/TS-based Multi-CLP achieves 1.31x - 2.37x higher throughput than the state-of-the-art Single-/Multi-CLP approaches in accelerating AlexNet, SqueezeNet 1.1, VGGNet, and GoogLeNet architectures on the Xilinx VC707 and VC709 FPGA boards.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）已经证明了其解决许多领域问题的能力，并且其准确性是以前不可能的。然而，这带来了广泛的计算要求，这使得通用 CPU 无法提供所需的实时性能。与此同时，人们对 FPGA 加速 CNN 推理的兴趣激增。这是因为他们能够创建具有不同并行级别的定制设计。此外，与 GPU 相比，FPGA 的每瓦性能更高。基于 FPGA 的 CNN 加速器的当前趋势是实现多个卷积层处理器 (CLP)，每个处理器都针对层的子集进行定制。然而，CNN 架构日益复杂，使得优化目标 FPGA 设备上的可用资源以提供最佳性能变得更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种 CNN 加速器和随附的自动化设计方法，该方法采用元启发式方法来划分可用 FPGA 资源，以设计 Multi-CLP 加速器。具体来说，所提出的设计工具采用模拟退火 (SA) 和禁忌搜索 (TS) 算法来查找所需的 CLP 数量及其各自的配置，以在给定的目标 FPGA 器件上实现最佳性能。这里的重点是关键规格和硬件资源，包括数字信号处理器、块 RAM 和片外存储器带宽。使用四个著名基准 CNN 的实验结果和比较表明，所提出的加速框架既令人鼓舞又充满希望。在加速 Xilinx VC707 和 VC709 FPGA 板上的 AlexNet、SqueezeNet 1.1、VGGNet 和 GoogLeNet 架构方面，基于 SA/TS 的 Multi-CLP 的吞吐量比最先进的单/多 CLP 方法高出 1.31 倍 - 2.37 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元启发式算法的FPGA资源分配方法，优化CNN加速器设计。
AI.motivation: CNN计算需求高，FPGA因能效优势被用于加速，但复杂CNN架构导致资源优化难度增加。
AI.method: 采用模拟退火(SA)和禁忌搜索(TS)算法，自动划分FPGA资源并配置多CLP加速器。
AI.result: 在Xilinx VC707/709板上，针对四个CNN模型，吞吐量比现有方法提升1.31x-2.37x。
AI.conclusion: 元启发式方法有效优化FPGA资源分配，验证了多CLP框架的性能优势。

Experimental results and comparisons using four well-known benchmark CNNs are presented demonstrating that the proposed acceleration framework is both encouraging and promising. The SA-/TS-based Multi-CLP achieves 1.31x - 2.37x higher throughput than the state-of-the-art Single-/Multi-CLP approaches in accelerating AlexNet, SqueezeNet 1.1, VGGNet, and GoogLeNet architectures on the Xilinx VC707 and VC709 FPGA boards. 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）已经证明了其解决许多领域问题的能力，并且其准确性是以前不可能的。然而，这带来了广泛的计算要求，这使得通用 CPU 无法提供所需的实时性能。与此同时，人们对 FPGA 加速 CNN 推理的兴趣激增。这是因为他们能够创建具有不同并行级别的定制设计。此外，与 GPU 相比，FPGA 的每瓦性能更高。基于 FPGA 的 CNN 加速器的当前趋势是实现多个卷积层处理器 (CLP)，每个处理器都针对层的子集进行定制。然而，CNN 架构日益复杂，使得优化目标 FPGA 设备上的可用资源以提供最佳性能变得更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种 CNN 加速器和随附的自动化设计方法，该方法采用元启发式方法来划分可用 FPGA 资源，以设计 Multi-CLP 加速器。具体来说，所提出的设计工具采用模拟退火 (SA) 和禁忌搜索 (TS) 算法来查找所需的 CLP 数量及其各自的配置，以在给定的目标 FPGA 器件上实现最佳性能。这里的重点是关键规格和硬件资源，包括数字信号处理器、块 RAM 和片外存储器带宽。使用四个著名基准 CNN 的实验结果和比较表明，所提出的加速框架既令人鼓舞又充满希望。在加速 Xilinx VC707 和 VC709 FPGA 板上的 AlexNet、SqueezeNet 1.1、VGGNet 和 GoogLeNet 架构方面，基于 SA/TS 的 Multi-CLP 的吞吐量比最先进的单/多 CLP 方法高出 1.31 倍 - 2.37 倍。 本文提出一种基于元启发式算法的FPGA资源分配方法，优化CNN加速器设计。 Sadiq M. Sait,Aiman El-Maleh,Mohammad Altakrouri,Ahmad Shawahna cs.NE,cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.PF

authors_text: Kai Wang,Yunxiang Li,Michael Dohopolski,Tao Peng,Weiguo Lu,You Zhang,Jing Wang
title: Recurrence-free Survival Prediction under the Guidance of Automatic Gross Tumor Volume Segmentation for Head and Neck Cancers
title_zh: 自动大体肿瘤体积分割指导下的头颈癌无复发生存预测
abstract: For Head and Neck Cancers (HNC) patient management, automatic gross tumor volume (GTV) segmentation and accurate pre-treatment cancer recurrence prediction are of great importance to assist physicians in designing personalized management plans, which have the potential to improve the treatment outcome and quality of life for HNC patients. In this paper, we developed an automated primary tumor (GTVp) and lymph nodes (GTVn) segmentation method based on combined pre-treatment positron emission tomography/computed tomography (PET/CT) scans of HNC patients. We extracted radiomics features from the segmented tumor volume and constructed a multi-modality tumor recurrence-free survival (RFS) prediction model, which fused the prediction results from separate CT radiomics, PET radiomics, and clinical models. We performed 5-fold cross-validation to train and evaluate our methods on the MICCAI 2022 HEad and neCK TumOR segmentation and outcome prediction challenge (HECKTOR) dataset. The ensemble prediction results on the testing cohort achieved Dice scores of 0.77 and 0.73 for GTVp and GTVn segmentation, respectively, and a C-index value of 0.67 for RFS prediction. The code is publicly available (https://github.com/wangkaiwan/HECKTOR-2022-AIRT). Our team's name is AIRT.
summary: For Head and Neck Cancers (HNC) patient management, automatic gross tumor volume (GTV) segmentation and accurate pre-treatment cancer recurrence prediction are of great importance to assist physicians in designing personalized management plans, which have the potential to improve the treatment outcome and quality of life for HNC patients. In this paper, we developed an automated primary tumor (GTVp) and lymph nodes (GTVn) segmentation method based on combined pre-treatment positron emission tomography/computed tomography (PET/CT) scans of HNC patients. We extracted radiomics features from the segmented tumor volume and constructed a multi-modality tumor recurrence-free survival (RFS) prediction model, which fused the prediction results from separate CT radiomics, PET radiomics, and clinical models. We performed 5-fold cross-validation to train and evaluate our methods on the MICCAI 2022 HEad and neCK TumOR segmentation and outcome prediction challenge (HECKTOR) dataset. The ensemble prediction results on the testing cohort achieved Dice scores of 0.77 and 0.73 for GTVp and GTVn segmentation, respectively, and a C-index value of 0.67 for RFS prediction. The code is publicly available (https://github.com/wangkaiwan/HECKTOR-2022-AIRT). Our team's name is AIRT.
abstract_zh: 对于头颈癌 (HNC) 患者管理，自动大体肿瘤体积 (GTV) 分割和准确的治疗前癌症复发预测对于协助医生设计个性化管理计划非常重要，这有可能改善 HNC 患者的治疗结果和生活质量。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于 HNC 患者治疗前正电子发射断层扫描/计算机断层扫描 (PET/CT) 联合扫描的自动原发肿瘤 (GTVp) 和淋巴结 (GTVn) 分割方法。我们从分割的肿瘤体积中提取放射组学特征，并构建了多模态肿瘤无复发生存（RFS）预测模型，该模型融合了单独的 CT 放射组学、PET 放射组学和临床模型的预测结果。我们进行了 5 倍交叉验证，以在 MICCAI 2022 HEad 和 neCK 肿瘤分割和结果预测挑战 (HECKTOR) 数据集上训练和评估我们的方法。测试队列的集成预测结果的 GTVp 和 GTVn 分割的 Dice 分数分别为 0.77 和 0.73，RFS 预测的 C 指数值为 0.67。该代码是公开的（https://github.com/wangkaiwan/HECKTOR-2022-AIRT）。我们团队的名字是AIRT。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于PET/CT扫描的自动肿瘤体积分割方法，并构建多模态模型预测头颈癌患者的无复发生存期。
AI.motivation: 准确的肿瘤分割和复发预测对制定个性化治疗方案、改善头颈癌患者预后具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合PET/CT影像进行自动GTV分割，提取影像组学特征并融合CT、PET及临床模型构建多模态预测模型，采用5折交叉验证进行评估。
AI.result: GTVp和GTVn分割Dice得分分别为0.77和0.73，无复发生存预测C指数为0.67，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动分割与多模态预测融合，为头颈癌精准治疗提供了可行的技术支持。

authors_text: Gang Liu,Tianyan Zhou,Yong Zhao,Yu Wu,Zhuo Chen,Yao Qian,Jian Wu
title: The Microsoft System for VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022
title_zh: 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的 Microsoft 系统
abstract: In this report, we describe our submitted system for track 2 of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22). We fuse a variety of good-performing models ranging from supervised models to self-supervised learning(SSL) pre-trained models. The supervised models, trained using VoxCeleb-2 dev data, consist of ECAPA-TDNN and Res2Net in a very deep structure. The SSL pre-trained models, wav2vec and wavLM, are trained using large scale unlabeled speech data up to million hours. These models are cascaded with ECAPA-TDNN and further fine-tuned in a supervised fashion to extract the speaker representations. All 13 models are applied with score normalization and calibration and then fused into the the submitted system. We also explore the audio quality measures in the calibration stage such as duration, SNR, T60, and MOS. The best submitted system achieves 0.073 in minDCF and 1.436% in EER on the VoxSRC-22 evaluation set.
summary: In this report, we describe our submitted system for track 2 of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22). We fuse a variety of good-performing models ranging from supervised models to self-supervised learning(SSL) pre-trained models. The supervised models, trained using VoxCeleb-2 dev data, consist of ECAPA-TDNN and Res2Net in a very deep structure. The SSL pre-trained models, wav2vec and wavLM, are trained using large scale unlabeled speech data up to million hours. These models are cascaded with ECAPA-TDNN and further fine-tuned in a supervised fashion to extract the speaker representations. All 13 models are applied with score normalization and calibration and then fused into the the submitted system. We also explore the audio quality measures in the calibration stage such as duration, SNR, T60, and MOS. The best submitted system achieves 0.073 in minDCF and 1.436% in EER on the VoxSRC-22 evaluation set.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了我们为 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-22) 第 2 轨道提交的系统。我们融合了各种性能良好的模型，从监督模型到自监督学习（SSL）预训练模型。使用 VoxCeleb-2 开发数据训练的监督模型由 ECAPA-TDNN 和 Res2Net 组成，结构非常深。 SSL 预训练模型 wav2vec 和 wavLM 使用长达数百万小时的大规模未标记语音数据进行训练。这些模型与 ECAPA-TDNN 级联，并以监督方式进一步微调以提取说话者表示。所有 13 个模型均经过评分归一化和校准，然后融合到提交的系统中。我们还探讨了校准阶段的音频质量测量，例如持续时间、SNR、T60 和 MOS。提交的最佳系统在 VoxSRC-22 评估集上的 minDCF 达到 0.073，EER 达到 1.436%。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了微软在VoxCeleb说话人识别挑战赛2022（VoxSRC-22）track 2中提交的系统设计。
AI.motivation: 通过融合多种高性能模型（包括监督模型和自监督预训练模型）提升说话人识别系统的准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合ECAPA-TDNN、Res2Net等监督模型及wav2vec、wavLM等自监督模型，经级联结构微调后提取说话人表征，并通过分数归一化、校准（结合音频质量指标）及多模型融合生成最终系统。
AI.result: 在VoxSRC-22测试集上达到minDCF 0.073和EER 1.436%的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合策略结合音频质量校准有效提升了说话人识别系统的性能，验证了混合模型架构的有效性。

authors_text: Dening Lu,Kyle Gao,Qian Xie,Linlin Xu,Jonathan Li
title: 3DGTN: 3D Dual-Attention GLocal Transformer Network for Point Cloud Classification and Segmentation
title_zh: 3DGTN：用于点云分类和分割的 3D 双注意力 GLocal Transformer 网络
abstract: Although the application of Transformers in 3D point cloud processing has achieved significant progress and success, it is still challenging for existing 3D Transformer methods to efficiently and accurately learn both valuable global features and valuable local features for improved applications. This paper presents a novel point cloud representational learning network, called 3D Dual Self-attention Global Local (GLocal) Transformer Network (3DGTN), for improved feature learning in both classification and segmentation tasks, with the following key contributions. First, a GLocal Feature Learning (GFL) block with the dual self-attention mechanism (i.e., a novel Point-Patch Self-Attention, called PPSA, and a channel-wise self-attention) is designed to efficiently learn the GLocal context information. Second, the GFL block is integrated with a multi-scale Graph Convolution-based Local Feature Aggregation (LFA) block, leading to a Global-Local (GLocal) information extraction module that can efficiently capture critical information. Third, a series of GLocal modules are used to construct a new hierarchical encoder-decoder structure to enable the learning of "GLocal" information in different scales in a hierarchical manner. The proposed framework is evaluated on both classification and segmentation datasets, demonstrating that the proposed method is capable of outperforming many state-of-the-art methods on both classification and segmentation tasks.
summary: Although the application of Transformers in 3D point cloud processing has achieved significant progress and success, it is still challenging for existing 3D Transformer methods to efficiently and accurately learn both valuable global features and valuable local features for improved applications. This paper presents a novel point cloud representational learning network, called 3D Dual Self-attention Global Local (GLocal) Transformer Network (3DGTN), for improved feature learning in both classification and segmentation tasks, with the following key contributions. First, a GLocal Feature Learning (GFL) block with the dual self-attention mechanism (i.e., a novel Point-Patch Self-Attention, called PPSA, and a channel-wise self-attention) is designed to efficiently learn the GLocal context information. Second, the GFL block is integrated with a multi-scale Graph Convolution-based Local Feature Aggregation (LFA) block, leading to a Global-Local (GLocal) information extraction module that can efficiently capture critical information. Third, a series of GLocal modules are used to construct a new hierarchical encoder-decoder structure to enable the learning of "GLocal" information in different scales in a hierarchical manner. The proposed framework is evaluated on both classification and segmentation datasets, demonstrating that the proposed method is capable of outperforming many state-of-the-art methods on both classification and segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Transformer 在 3D 点云处理中的应用取得了重大进展和成功，但现有的 3D Transformer 方法如何高效、准确地学习有价值的全局特征和有价值的局部特征以改进应用程序仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新颖的点云表示学习网络，称为 3D 双自注意力全局局部 (GLocal) 变压器网络 (3DGTN)，用于改进分类和分割任务中的特征学习，具有以下关键贡献。首先，设计了具有双重自注意力机制（即一种新颖的点补丁自注意力，称为 PPSA 和通道方式自注意力）的 GLocal 特征学习（GFL）块，以有效地学习 GLocal 上下文信息。其次，GFL 模块与基于多尺度图卷积的局部特征聚合（LFA）模块集成，形成全局局部（GLocal）信息提取模块，可以有效地捕获关键信息。第三，使用一系列GLocal模块构建新的分层编码器-解码器结构，以分层方式学习不同尺度的“GLocal”信息。所提出的框架在分类和分割数据集上进行了评估，表明所提出的方法能够在分类和分割任务上优于许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为3DGTN的3D双注意力GLocal Transformer网络，用于点云分类和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有3D Transformer方法难以高效准确地学习全局和局部特征，导致应用效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含双自注意力机制（PPSA和通道自注意力）的GFL模块，并结合多尺度图卷积的LFA模块，构建分层编码-解码结构以分层提取GLocal信息。
AI.result: 在分类和分割数据集上均优于现有先进方法，验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合全局与局部特征学习，3DGTN在点云任务中实现了更优的性能表现。

search_text: 3DGTN: 3D Dual-Attention GLocal Transformer Network for Point Cloud Classification and Segmentation 3DGTN：用于点云分类和分割的 3D 双注意力 GLocal Transformer 网络 Although the application of Transformers in 3D point cloud processing has achieved significant progress and success, it is still challenging for existing 3D Transformer methods to efficiently and accurately learn both valuable global features and valuable local features for improved applications. This paper presents a novel point cloud representational learning network, called 3D Dual Self-attention Global Local (GLocal) Transformer Network (3DGTN), for improved feature learning in both classification and segmentation tasks, with the following key contributions. First, a GLocal Feature Learning (GFL) block with the dual self-attention mechanism (i.e., a novel Point-Patch Self-Attention, called PPSA, and a channel-wise self-attention) is designed to efficiently learn the GLocal context information. Second, the GFL block is integrated with a multi-scale Graph Convolution-based Local Feature Aggregation (LFA) block, leading to a Global-Local (GLocal) information extraction module that can efficiently capture critical information. Third, a series of GLocal modules are used to construct a new hierarchical encoder-decoder structure to enable the learning of "GLocal" information in different scales in a hierarchical manner. authors_text: Mianxin Liu,Han Zhang,Feng Shi,Dinggang Shen
title: Hierarchical Graph Convolutional Network Built by Multiscale Atlases for Brain Disorder Diagnosis Using Functional Connectivity
title_zh: 由多尺度图谱构建的分层图卷积网络用于使用功能连接进行脑部疾病诊断
abstract: Functional connectivity network (FCN) data from functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is increasingly used for the diagnoses of brain disorders. However, state-of-the-art studies used to build the FCN using a single brain parcellation atlas at a certain spatial scale, which largely neglected functional interactions across different spatial scales in hierarchical manners. In this study, we propose a novel framework to perform multiscale FCN analysis for brain disorder diagnosis. We first use a set of well-defined multiscale atlases to compute multiscale FCNs. Then, we utilize biologically meaningful brain hierarchical relationships among the regions in multiscale atlases to perform nodal pooling across multiple spatial scales, namely "Atlas-guided Pooling". Accordingly, we propose a Multiscale-Atlases-based Hierarchical Graph Convolutional Network (MAHGCN), built on the stacked layers of graph convolution and the atlas-guided pooling, for a comprehensive extraction of diagnostic information from multiscale FCNs. Experiments on neuroimaging data from 1792 subjects demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in the diagnoses of Alzheimer's disease (AD), the prodromal stage of AD (i.e., mild cognitive impairment [MCI]), as well as autism spectrum disorder (ASD), with accuracy of 88.9%, 78.6%, and 72.7% respectively. All results show significant advantages of our proposed method over other competing methods. This study not only demonstrates the feasibility of brain disorder diagnosis using resting-state fMRI empowered by deep learning, but also highlights that the functional interactions in the multiscale brain hierarchy are worth being explored and integrated into deep learning network architectures for better understanding the neuropathology of brain disorders.
summary: Functional connectivity network (FCN) data from functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is increasingly used for the diagnoses of brain disorders. However, state-of-the-art studies used to build the FCN using a single brain parcellation atlas at a certain spatial scale, which largely neglected functional interactions across different spatial scales in hierarchical manners. In this study, we propose a novel framework to perform multiscale FCN analysis for brain disorder diagnosis. We first use a set of well-defined multiscale atlases to compute multiscale FCNs. Then, we utilize biologically meaningful brain hierarchical relationships among the regions in multiscale atlases to perform nodal pooling across multiple spatial scales, namely "Atlas-guided Pooling". Accordingly, we propose a Multiscale-Atlases-based Hierarchical Graph Convolutional Network (MAHGCN), built on the stacked layers of graph convolution and the atlas-guided pooling, for a comprehensive extraction of diagnostic information from multiscale FCNs. Experiments on neuroimaging data from 1792 subjects demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in the diagnoses of Alzheimer's disease (AD), the prodromal stage of AD (i.e., mild cognitive impairment [MCI]), as well as autism spectrum disorder (ASD), with accuracy of 88.9%, 78.6%, and 72.7% respectively. All results show significant advantages of our proposed method over other competing methods. This study not only demonstrates the feasibility of brain disorder diagnosis using resting-state fMRI empowered by deep learning, but also highlights that the functional interactions in the multiscale brain hierarchy are worth being explored and integrated into deep learning network architectures for better understanding the neuropathology of brain disorders.
abstract_zh: 来自功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 的功能连接网络 (FCN) 数据越来越多地用于脑部疾病的诊断。然而，最先进的研究过去在一定的空间尺度上使用单个大脑分区图谱来构建 FCN，这在很大程度上忽略了不同空间尺度上以分层方式进行的功能交互。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新的框架来执行多尺度 FCN 分析以进行脑部疾病诊断。我们首先使用一组明确定义的多尺度图集来计算多尺度 FCN。然后，我们利用多尺度图集中区域之间具有生物学意义的大脑层次关系来跨多个空间尺度进行节点池化，即“图集引导池化”。因此，我们提出了一种基于多尺度图集的层次图卷积网络（MAHGCN），它建立在图卷积的堆叠层和图集引导池的基础上，用于从多尺度 FCN 中全面提取诊断信息。对 1792 名受试者的神经影像数据进行的实验证明了我们提出的方法在诊断阿尔茨海默病 (AD)、AD 前驱阶段（即轻度认知障碍 [MCI]）以及自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 方面的有效性，准确率分别为 88.9%、78.6% 和 72.7%。所有结果都表明我们提出的方法比其他竞争方法具有显着优势。这项研究不仅证明了利用深度学习支持的静息态功能磁共振成像进行脑部疾病诊断的可行性，而且还强调了多尺度大脑层次结构中的功能相互作用值得探索并将其集成到深度学习网络架构中，以更好地理解脑部疾病的神经病理学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度图谱的分层图卷积网络（MAHGCN），用于通过功能连接分析诊断脑部疾病。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常使用单一尺度的脑图谱构建功能连接网络（FCN），忽略了不同空间尺度间的层次化功能交互，限制了诊断效果。
AI.method: 利用多尺度图谱计算多尺度FCN，结合脑区的生物学层次关系进行节点池化（Atlas-guided Pooling），构建分层图卷积网络（MAHGCN）以提取多尺度诊断信息。
AI.result: 在1792名受试者的神经影像数据上，MAHGCN对阿尔茨海默病（AD）、轻度认知障碍（MCI）和自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的诊断准确率分别为88.9%、78.6%和72.7%，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度功能交互整合到深度学习框架中可提升脑部疾病诊断效果，为神经病理学研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Mahendra Kumar Gourisaria,Vinayak Singh,Manoj Sahni
title: A Trio-Method for Retinal Vessel Segmentation using Image Processing
title_zh: 使用图像处理进行视网膜血管分割的三重方法
comment: Accepted at 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis (MIUA-2022) (Abstract short paper)
comments: Accepted at 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis (MIUA-2022) (Abstract short paper)
abstract: Inner Retinal neurons are a most essential part of the retina and they are supplied with blood via retinal vessels. This paper primarily focuses on the segmentation of retinal vessels using a triple preprocessing approach. DRIVE database was taken into consideration and preprocessed by Gabor Filtering, Gaussian Blur, and Edge Detection by Sobel and Pruning. Segmentation was driven out by 2 proposed U-Net architectures. Both the architectures were compared in terms of all the standard performance metrics. Preprocessing generated varied interesting results which impacted the results shown by the UNet architectures for segmentation. This real-time deployment can help in the efficient pre-processing of images with better segmentation and detection.
summary: Inner Retinal neurons are a most essential part of the retina and they are supplied with blood via retinal vessels. This paper primarily focuses on the segmentation of retinal vessels using a triple preprocessing approach. DRIVE database was taken into consideration and preprocessed by Gabor Filtering, Gaussian Blur, and Edge Detection by Sobel and Pruning. Segmentation was driven out by 2 proposed U-Net architectures. Both the architectures were compared in terms of all the standard performance metrics. Preprocessing generated varied interesting results which impacted the results shown by the UNet architectures for segmentation. This real-time deployment can help in the efficient pre-processing of images with better segmentation and detection.
abstract_zh: 视网膜内神经元是视网膜最重要的部分，它们通过视网膜血管提供血液。本文主要关注使用三重预处理方法对视网膜血管进行分割。考虑了 DRIVE 数据库，并通过 Gabor 滤波、高斯模糊以及 Sobel 和 Pruning 的边缘检测进行了预处理。分段是由 2 个提议的 U-Net 架构推动的。对两种架构的所有标准性能指标进行了比较。预处理产生了各种有趣的结果，这些结果影响了 UNet 架构显示的分割结果。这种实时部署可以帮助有效地预处理图像，并实现更好的分割和检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三步预处理方法结合两种U-Net架构，用于视网膜血管分割。
AI.motivation: 视网膜神经元依赖血管供血，准确分割血管对疾病诊断至关重要，传统方法存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用Gabor滤波、高斯模糊和Sobel边缘检测+剪枝的三重预处理，结合两种改进U-Net模型进行分割对比。
AI.result: 预处理步骤显著影响分割效果，两种U-Net架构在标准指标下表现差异明显，实现实时高效分割。
AI.conclusion: 三步预处理有效提升分割精度，所提方法可为视网膜疾病智能筛查提供技术支撑。
