search_text: A Trio-Method for Retinal Vessel Segmentation using Image Processing 使用图像处理进行视网膜血管分割的三重方法 Inner Retinal neurons are a most essential part of the retina and they are supplied with blood via retinal vessels. This paper primarily focuses on the segmentation of retinal vessels using a triple preprocessing approach. DRIVE database was taken into consideration and preprocessed by Gabor Filtering, Gaussian Blur, and Edge Detection by Sobel and Pruning. Segmentation was driven out by 2 proposed U-Net architectures. Both the architectures were compared in terms of all the standard performance metrics. Preprocessing generated varied interesting results which impacted the results shown by the UNet architectures for segmentation. This real-time deployment can help in the efficient pre-processing of images with better segmentation and detection. 视网膜内神经元是视网膜最重要的部分，它们通过视网膜血管提供血液。本文主要关注使用三重预处理方法对视网膜血管进行分割。考虑了 DRIVE 数据库，并通过 Gabor 滤波、高斯模糊以及 Sobel 和 Pruning 的边缘检测进行了预处理。分段是由 2 个提议的 U-Net 架构推动的。对两种架构的所有标准性能指标进行了比较。预处理产生了各种有趣的结果，这些结果影响了 UNet 架构显示的分割结果。这种实时部署可以帮助有效地预处理图像，并实现更好的分割和检测。 本文提出一种三步预处理方法结合两种U-Net架构，用于视网膜血管分割。 Mahendra Kumar Gourisaria,Vinayak Singh,Manoj Sahni eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Gyungin Shin,Weidi Xie,Samuel Albanie
title: NamedMask: Distilling Segmenters from Complementary Foundation Models
title_zh: NamedMask：从补充基础模型中提取分段器
abstract: The goal of this work is to segment and name regions of images without access to pixel-level labels during training. To tackle this task, we construct segmenters by distilling the complementary strengths of two foundation models. The first, CLIP (Radford et al. 2021), exhibits the ability to assign names to image content but lacks an accessible representation of object structure. The second, DINO (Caron et al. 2021), captures the spatial extent of objects but has no knowledge of object names. Our method, termed NamedMask, begins by using CLIP to construct category-specific archives of images. These images are pseudo-labelled with a category-agnostic salient object detector bootstrapped from DINO, then refined by category-specific segmenters using the CLIP archive labels. Thanks to the high quality of the refined masks, we show that a standard segmentation architecture trained on these archives with appropriate data augmentation achieves impressive semantic segmentation abilities for both single-object and multi-object images. As a result, our proposed NamedMask performs favourably against a range of prior work on five benchmarks including the VOC2012, COCO and large-scale ImageNet-S datasets.
summary: The goal of this work is to segment and name regions of images without access to pixel-level labels during training. To tackle this task, we construct segmenters by distilling the complementary strengths of two foundation models. The first, CLIP (Radford et al. 2021), exhibits the ability to assign names to image content but lacks an accessible representation of object structure. The second, DINO (Caron et al. 2021), captures the spatial extent of objects but has no knowledge of object names. Our method, termed NamedMask, begins by using CLIP to construct category-specific archives of images. These images are pseudo-labelled with a category-agnostic salient object detector bootstrapped from DINO, then refined by category-specific segmenters using the CLIP archive labels. Thanks to the high quality of the refined masks, we show that a standard segmentation architecture trained on these archives with appropriate data augmentation achieves impressive semantic segmentation abilities for both single-object and multi-object images. As a result, our proposed NamedMask performs favourably against a range of prior work on five benchmarks including the VOC2012, COCO and large-scale ImageNet-S datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是在训练期间无需访问像素级标签即可分割和命名图像区域。为了解决这个任务，我们通过提取两个基础模型的互补优势来构建分段器。第一个是 CLIP（Radford et al. 2021），展示了为图像内容分配名称的能力，但缺乏对象结构的可访问表示。第二个是 DINO（Caron et al. 2021），它捕获物体的空间范围，但不知道物体名称。我们的方法称为 NamedMask，首先使用 CLIP 构建特定于类别的图像档案。这些图像使用从 DINO 引导的与类别无关的显着对象检测器进行伪标记，然后使用 CLIP 存档标签通过特定于类别的分段器进行细化。由于精制掩模的高质量，我们表明，通过适当的数据增强对这些档案进行训练的标准分割架构对于单对象和多对象图像实现了令人印象深刻的语义分割能力。因此，我们提出的 NamedMask 在 VOC2012、COCO 和大规模 ImageNet-S 数据集等五个基准上的一系列先前工作中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需像素级标签即可实现图像分割和命名的方法，通过结合两个基础模型的互补优势。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而CLIP擅长命名但缺乏结构表示，DINO擅长结构但无命名能力，需探索互补模型协同方案。
AI.method: 构建NamedMask方法：1) 用CLIP创建类别特定图像存档；2) 以DINO引导的检测器生成伪标签；3) 通过CLIP存档标签优化分割器，最终训练标准分割架构。
AI.result: 在VOC2012、COCO等五个基准测试中，NamedMask在单物体和多物体图像分割任务上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明通过互补模型蒸馏可实现高质量无监督分割，为弱监督分割提供新思路。

To tackle this task, we construct segmenters by distilling the complementary strengths of two foundation models. The first, CLIP (Radford et al. 2021), exhibits the ability to assign names to image content but lacks an accessible representation of object structure. The second, DINO (Caron et al. 2021), captures the spatial extent of objects but has no knowledge of object names. authors_text: Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: VToonify: Controllable High-Resolution Portrait Video Style Transfer
title_zh: VToonify：可控高分辨率人像视频风格转换
comment: ACM Transactions on Graphics (SIGGRAPH Asia 2022). Code: https://github.com/williamyang1991/VToonify Project page: https://www.mmlab-ntu.com/project/vtoonify/
comments: ACM Transactions on Graphics (SIGGRAPH Asia 2022). Code: https://github.com/williamyang1991/VToonify Project page: https://www.mmlab-ntu.com/project/vtoonify/
abstract: Generating high-quality artistic portrait videos is an important and desirable task in computer graphics and vision. Although a series of successful portrait image toonification models built upon the powerful StyleGAN have been proposed, these image-oriented methods have obvious limitations when applied to videos, such as the fixed frame size, the requirement of face alignment, missing non-facial details and temporal inconsistency. In this work, we investigate the challenging controllable high-resolution portrait video style transfer by introducing a novel VToonify framework. Specifically, VToonify leverages the mid- and high-resolution layers of StyleGAN to render high-quality artistic portraits based on the multi-scale content features extracted by an encoder to better preserve the frame details. The resulting fully convolutional architecture accepts non-aligned faces in videos of variable size as input, contributing to complete face regions with natural motions in the output. Our framework is compatible with existing StyleGAN-based image toonification models to extend them to video toonification, and inherits appealing features of these models for flexible style control on color and intensity. This work presents two instantiations of VToonify built upon Toonify and DualStyleGAN for collection-based and exemplar-based portrait video style transfer, respectively. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed VToonify framework over existing methods in generating high-quality and temporally-coherent artistic portrait videos with flexible style controls.
summary: Generating high-quality artistic portrait videos is an important and desirable task in computer graphics and vision. Although a series of successful portrait image toonification models built upon the powerful StyleGAN have been proposed, these image-oriented methods have obvious limitations when applied to videos, such as the fixed frame size, the requirement of face alignment, missing non-facial details and temporal inconsistency. In this work, we investigate the challenging controllable high-resolution portrait video style transfer by introducing a novel VToonify framework. Specifically, VToonify leverages the mid- and high-resolution layers of StyleGAN to render high-quality artistic portraits based on the multi-scale content features extracted by an encoder to better preserve the frame details. The resulting fully convolutional architecture accepts non-aligned faces in videos of variable size as input, contributing to complete face regions with natural motions in the output. Our framework is compatible with existing StyleGAN-based image toonification models to extend them to video toonification, and inherits appealing features of these models for flexible style control on color and intensity. This work presents two instantiations of VToonify built upon Toonify and DualStyleGAN for collection-based and exemplar-based portrait video style transfer, respectively. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed VToonify framework over existing methods in generating high-quality and temporally-coherent artistic portrait videos with flexible style controls.
abstract_zh: 生成高质量的艺术肖像视频是计算机图形和视觉领域的一项重要且理想的任务。尽管已经提出了一系列基于强大的StyleGAN的成功的肖像图像图像处理模型，但这些面向图像的方法在应用于视频时具有明显的局限性，例如固定的帧大小、面部对齐的要求、丢失非面部细节和时间不一致。在这项工作中，我们通过引入一种新颖的 VToonify 框架来研究具有挑战性的可控高分辨率肖像视频风格转换。具体来说，VToonify利用StyleGAN的中高分辨率层，根据编码器提取的多尺度内容特征来渲染高质量的艺术肖像，以更好地保留帧细节。由此产生的完全卷积架构接受可变大小视频中未对齐的面部作为输入，从而在输出中形成具有自然运动的完整面部区域。我们的框架与现有的基于 StyleGAN 的图像卡通化模型兼容，将其扩展到视频卡通化，并继承了这些模型的吸引人的功能，可对颜色和强度进行灵活的风格控制。这项工作展示了基于 Toonify 和 DualStyleGAN 构建的 VToonify 的两个实例，分别用于基于集合和基于示例的肖像视频风格转换。大量的实验结果证明了我们提出的 VToonify 框架相对于现有方法在生成具有灵活风格控制的高质量且时间连贯的艺术肖像视频方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VToonify框架，实现可控的高分辨率人像视频风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有基于StyleGAN的图像风格迁移方法在视频应用中存在帧尺寸固定、需人脸对齐、丢失非面部细节及时间不一致等局限性。
AI.method: 通过引入VToonify框架，利用StyleGAN中高分辨率层与编码器提取的多尺度内容特征生成高质量人像，采用全卷积结构处理非对齐的变尺寸视频输入，并兼容现有图像风格迁移模型实现灵活的色彩与强度控制。
AI.result: 实验表明VToonify在生成高质量、时间连贯的艺术化人像视频方面优于现有方法，支持基于集合与示例的两种风格迁移模式。
AI.conclusion: VToonify有效解决了视频风格迁移中的关键问题，为高分辨率人像视频生成提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

search_text: VToonify: Controllable High-Resolution Portrait Video Style Transfer VToonify：可控高分辨率人像视频风格转换 Generating high-quality artistic portrait videos is an important and desirable task in computer graphics and vision. Although a series of successful portrait image toonification models built upon the powerful StyleGAN have been proposed, these image-oriented methods have obvious limitations when applied to videos, such as the fixed frame size, the requirement of face alignment, missing non-facial details and temporal inconsistency. In this work, we investigate the challenging controllable high-resolution portrait video style transfer by introducing a novel VToonify framework. Specifically, VToonify leverages the mid- and high-resolution layers of StyleGAN to render high-quality artistic portraits based on the multi-scale content features extracted by an encoder to better preserve the frame details. The resulting fully convolutional architecture accepts non-aligned faces in videos of variable size as input, contributing to complete face regions with natural motions in the output. Our framework is compatible with existing StyleGAN-based image toonification models to extend them to video toonification, and inherits appealing features of these models for flexible style control on color and intensity. This work presents two instantiations of VToonify built upon Toonify and DualStyleGAN for collection-based and exemplar-based portrait video style transfer, respectively. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed VToonify framework over existing methods in generating high-quality and temporally-coherent artistic portrait videos with flexible style controls. 生成高质量的艺术肖像视频是计算机图形和视觉领域的一项重要且理想的任务。尽管已经提出了一系列基于强大的StyleGAN的成功的肖像图像图像处理模型，但这些面向图像的方法在应用于视频时具有明显的局限性，例如固定的帧大小、面部对齐的要求、丢失非面部细节和时间不一致。在这项工作中，我们通过引入一种新颖的 VToonify 框架来研究具有挑战性的可控高分辨率肖像视频风格转换。具体来说，VToonify利用StyleGAN的中高分辨率层，根据编码器提取的多尺度内容特征来渲染高质量的艺术肖像，以更好地保留帧细节。由此产生的完全卷积架构接受可变大小视频中未对齐的面部作为输入，从而在输出中形成具有自然运动的完整面部区域。我们的框架与现有的基于 StyleGAN 的图像卡通化模型兼容，将其扩展到视频卡通化，并继承了这些模型的吸引人的功能，可对颜色和强度进行灵活的风格控制。这项工作展示了基于 Toonify 和 DualStyleGAN 构建的 VToonify 的两个实例，分别用于基于集合和基于示例的肖像视频风格转换。大量的实验结果证明了我们提出的 VToonify 框架相对于现有方法在生成具有灵活风格控制的高质量且时间连贯的艺术肖像视频方面的有效性。 本文提出VToonify框架，实现可控的高分辨率人像视频风格迁移。 Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhitong Huang,Nanxuan Zhao,Jing Liao
title: UniColor: A Unified Framework for Multi-Modal Colorization with Transformer
title_zh: UniColor：使用 Transformer 进行多模式着色的统一框架
comment: Accepted by SIGGRAPH Asia 2022. Project page: https://luckyhzt.github.io/unicolor
comments: Accepted by SIGGRAPH Asia 2022. Project page: https://luckyhzt.github.io/unicolor
abstract: We propose the first unified framework UniColor to support colorization in multiple modalities, including both unconditional and conditional ones, such as stroke, exemplar, text, and even a mix of them. Rather than learning a separate model for each type of condition, we introduce a two-stage colorization framework for incorporating various conditions into a single model. In the first stage, multi-modal conditions are converted into a common representation of hint points. Particularly, we propose a novel CLIP-based method to convert the text to hint points. In the second stage, we propose a Transformer-based network composed of Chroma-VQGAN and Hybrid-Transformer to generate diverse and high-quality colorization results conditioned on hint points. Both qualitative and quantitative comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in every control modality and further enables multi-modal colorization that was not feasible before. Moreover, we design an interactive interface showing the effectiveness of our unified framework in practical usage, including automatic colorization, hybrid-control colorization, local recolorization, and iterative color editing. Our code and models are available at https://luckyhzt.github.io/unicolor.
summary: We propose the first unified framework UniColor to support colorization in multiple modalities, including both unconditional and conditional ones, such as stroke, exemplar, text, and even a mix of them. Rather than learning a separate model for each type of condition, we introduce a two-stage colorization framework for incorporating various conditions into a single model. In the first stage, multi-modal conditions are converted into a common representation of hint points. Particularly, we propose a novel CLIP-based method to convert the text to hint points. In the second stage, we propose a Transformer-based network composed of Chroma-VQGAN and Hybrid-Transformer to generate diverse and high-quality colorization results conditioned on hint points. Both qualitative and quantitative comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in every control modality and further enables multi-modal colorization that was not feasible before. Moreover, we design an interactive interface showing the effectiveness of our unified framework in practical usage, including automatic colorization, hybrid-control colorization, local recolorization, and iterative color editing. Our code and models are available at https://luckyhzt.github.io/unicolor.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个统一框架 UniColor，支持多种模式的着色，包括无条件和条件模式，例如笔画、范例、文本，甚至它们的混合。我们不是为每种类型的条件学习单独的模型，而是引入了一个两阶段着色框架，用于将各种条件合并到单个模型中。在第一阶段，多模态条件被转换为提示点的通用表示。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 CLIP 的方法将文本转换为提示点。在第二阶段，我们提出了一个由 Chroma-VQGAN 和 Hybrid-Transformer 组成的基于 Transformer 的网络，以生成以提示点为条件的多样化且高质量的着色结果。定性和定量比较都表明，我们的方法在每种控制模式中都优于最先进的方法，并进一步实现了以前不可行的多模式着色。此外，我们设计了一个交互式界面，展示了我们的统一框架在实际使用中的有效性，包括自动着色、混合控制着色、局部重新着色和迭代颜色编辑。我们的代码和模型可在 https://luckyhzt.github.io/unicolor 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniColor，一种基于Transformer的统一框架，支持多种模态（如笔触、示例、文本等）的图像着色任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需为每种条件（如文本、笔触）单独训练模型，缺乏统一性且难以处理多模态输入，限制了实际应用的灵活性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段将多模态条件转换为统一的提示点表示（如基于CLIP的文本到提示点转换）；第二阶段使用包含Chroma-VQGAN和Hybrid-Transformer的网络生成高质量着色结果。
AI.result: 在所有控制模态下均优于现有方法，首次实现多模态联合着色，并通过交互界面验证了框架在自动着色、混合控制等场景中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: UniColor通过统一框架解决了多模态着色的难题，展示了Transformer在跨模态生成任务中的潜力，代码和模型已开源。

Rather than learning a separate model for each type of condition, we introduce a two-stage colorization framework for incorporating various conditions into a single model. In the first stage, multi-modal conditions are converted into a common representation of hint points. Particularly, we propose a novel CLIP-based method to convert the text to hint points. Both qualitative and quantitative comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in every control modality and further enables multi-modal colorization that was not feasible before. Moreover, we design an interactive interface showing the effectiveness of our unified framework in practical usage, including automatic colorization, hybrid-control colorization, local recolorization, and iterative color editing. authors_text: Jonathan Crabbé,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: Concept Activation Regions: A Generalized Framework For Concept-Based Explanations
title_zh: 概念激活区域：基于概念的解释的通用框架
abstract: Concept-based explanations permit to understand the predictions of a deep neural network (DNN) through the lens of concepts specified by users. Existing methods assume that the examples illustrating a concept are mapped in a fixed direction of the DNN's latent space. When this holds true, the concept can be represented by a concept activation vector (CAV) pointing in that direction. In this work, we propose to relax this assumption by allowing concept examples to be scattered across different clusters in the DNN's latent space. Each concept is then represented by a region of the DNN's latent space that includes these clusters and that we call concept activation region (CAR). To formalize this idea, we introduce an extension of the CAV formalism that is based on the kernel trick and support vector classifiers. This CAR formalism yields global concept-based explanations and local concept-based feature importance. We prove that CAR explanations built with radial kernels are invariant under latent space isometries. In this way, CAR assigns the same explanations to latent spaces that have the same geometry. We further demonstrate empirically that CARs offer (1) more accurate descriptions of how concepts are scattered in the DNN's latent space; (2) global explanations that are closer to human concept annotations and (3) concept-based feature importance that meaningfully relate concepts with each other. Finally, we use CARs to show that DNNs can autonomously rediscover known scientific concepts, such as the prostate cancer grading system.
summary: Concept-based explanations permit to understand the predictions of a deep neural network (DNN) through the lens of concepts specified by users. Existing methods assume that the examples illustrating a concept are mapped in a fixed direction of the DNN's latent space. When this holds true, the concept can be represented by a concept activation vector (CAV) pointing in that direction. In this work, we propose to relax this assumption by allowing concept examples to be scattered across different clusters in the DNN's latent space. Each concept is then represented by a region of the DNN's latent space that includes these clusters and that we call concept activation region (CAR). To formalize this idea, we introduce an extension of the CAV formalism that is based on the kernel trick and support vector classifiers. This CAR formalism yields global concept-based explanations and local concept-based feature importance. We prove that CAR explanations built with radial kernels are invariant under latent space isometries. In this way, CAR assigns the same explanations to latent spaces that have the same geometry. We further demonstrate empirically that CARs offer (1) more accurate descriptions of how concepts are scattered in the DNN's latent space; (2) global explanations that are closer to human concept annotations and (3) concept-based feature importance that meaningfully relate concepts with each other. Finally, we use CARs to show that DNNs can autonomously rediscover known scientific concepts, such as the prostate cancer grading system.
abstract_zh: 基于概念的解释允许通过用户指定的概念来理解深度神经网络 (DNN) 的预测。现有方法假设说明概念的示例映射到 DNN 潜在空间的固定方向。当这一点成立时，概念可以用指向该方向的概念激活向量（CAV）来表示。在这项工作中，我们建议通过允许概念示例分散在 DNN 潜在空间中的不同集群中来放宽这一假设。然后，每个概念由 DNN 潜在空间的一个区域表示，该区域包含这些簇，我们称之为概念激活区域 (CAR)。为了形式化这个想法，我们引入了基于核技巧和支持向量分类器的 CAV 形式的扩展。这种 CAR 形式产生了基于概念的全局解释和基于局部概念的特征重要性。我们证明用径向核构建的 CAR 解释在潜在空间等距下是不变的。通过这种方式，CAR 为具有相同几何形状的潜在空间分配相同的解释。我们进一步凭经验证明 CAR 提供了（1）更准确地描述了概念如何在 DNN 的潜在空间中分散； （2）更接近人类概念注释的全局解释；（3）基于概念的特征重要性，将概念彼此有意义地联系起来。最后，我们使用 CAR 来证明 DNN 可以自主地重新发现已知的科学概念，例如前列腺癌分级系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为概念激活区域（CAR）的通用框架，用于改进深度神经网络（DNN）的概念解释方法，允许概念示例在潜在空间中分散分布。
AI.motivation: 现有概念解释方法假设概念示例在潜在空间中映射到固定方向，这一假设限制了对复杂概念分布的解释能力，导致解释不够准确和灵活。
AI.method: 通过引入核技巧和支持向量分类器扩展传统概念激活向量（CAV）形式主义，定义概念激活区域（CAR）以覆盖潜在空间中分散的聚类，并证明径向基核下的CAR具有几何不变性。
AI.result: CAR框架能够更准确描述概念在潜在空间的分布，生成更贴近人类注释的全局解释，建立概念间有意义的特征关联，并成功应用于发现已知科学概念（如前列腺癌分级系统）。
AI.conclusion: CAR框架通过放松固定方向假设，提供了更灵活、准确的概念解释方法，为理解DNN决策机制和科学概念发现提供了有效工具。

In this work, we propose to relax this assumption by allowing concept examples to be scattered across different clusters in the DNN's latent space. Each concept is then represented by a region of the DNN's latent space that includes these clusters and that we call concept activation region (CAR). To formalize this idea, we introduce an extension of the CAV formalism that is based on the kernel trick and support vector classifiers. This CAR formalism yields global concept-based explanations and local concept-based feature importance. We prove that CAR explanations built with radial kernels are invariant under latent space isometries. In this way, CAR assigns the same explanations to latent spaces that have the same geometry. We further demonstrate empirically that CARs offer (1) more accurate descriptions of how concepts are scattered in the DNN's latent space; (2) global explanations that are closer to human concept annotations and (3) concept-based feature importance that meaningfully relate concepts with each other. Finally, we use CARs to show that DNNs can autonomously rediscover known scientific concepts, such as the prostate cancer grading system. 基于概念的解释允许通过用户指定的概念来理解深度神经网络 (DNN) 的预测。现有方法假设说明概念的示例映射到 DNN 潜在空间的固定方向。当这一点成立时，概念可以用指向该方向的概念激活向量（CAV）来表示。在这项工作中，我们建议通过允许概念示例分散在 DNN 潜在空间中的不同集群中来放宽这一假设。然后，每个概念由 DNN 潜在空间的一个区域表示，该区域包含这些簇，我们称之为概念激活区域 (CAR)。为了形式化这个想法，我们引入了基于核技巧和支持向量分类器的 CAV 形式的扩展。这种 CAR 形式产生了基于概念的全局解释和基于局部概念的特征重要性。我们证明用径向核构建的 CAR 解释在潜在空间等距下是不变的。通过这种方式，CAR 为具有相同几何形状的潜在空间分配相同的解释。我们进一步凭经验证明 CAR 提供了（1）更准确地描述了概念如何在 DNN 的潜在空间中分散； （2）更接近人类概念注释的全局解释；（3）基于概念的特征重要性，将概念彼此有意义地联系起来。最后，我们使用 CAR 来证明 DNN 可以自主地重新发现已知的科学概念，例如前列腺癌分级系统。 本文提出了一种名为概念激活区域（CAR）的通用框架，用于改进深度神经网络（DNN）的概念解释方法，允许概念示例在潜在空间中分散分布。 Jonathan Crabbé,Mihaela van der Schaar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sudeep Dasari,Abhinav Gupta,Vikash Kumar
title: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Exemplar Object Trajectories and Pre-Grasps
title_zh: 从示例对象轨迹和预抓取中学习灵巧操作
comment: An abridged version of this paper was presented in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: An abridged version of this paper was presented in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Learning diverse dexterous manipulation behaviors with assorted objects remains an open grand challenge. While policy learning methods offer a powerful avenue to attack this problem, they require extensive per-task engineering and algorithmic tuning. This paper seeks to escape these constraints, by developing a Pre-Grasp informed Dexterous Manipulation (PGDM) framework that generates diverse dexterous manipulation behaviors, without any task-specific reasoning or hyper-parameter tuning. At the core of PGDM is a well known robotics construct, pre-grasps (i.e. the hand-pose preparing for object interaction). This simple primitive is enough to induce efficient exploration strategies for acquiring complex dexterous manipulation behaviors. To exhaustively verify these claims, we introduce TCDM, a benchmark of 50 diverse manipulation tasks defined over multiple objects and dexterous manipulators. Tasks for TCDM are defined automatically using exemplar object trajectories from various sources (animators, human behaviors, etc.), without any per-task engineering and/or supervision. Our experiments validate that PGDM's exploration strategy, induced by a surprisingly simple ingredient (single pre-grasp pose), matches the performance of prior methods, which require expensive per-task feature/reward engineering, expert supervision, and hyper-parameter tuning. For animated visualizations, trained policies, and project code, please refer to: https://pregrasps.github.io/
summary: Learning diverse dexterous manipulation behaviors with assorted objects remains an open grand challenge. While policy learning methods offer a powerful avenue to attack this problem, they require extensive per-task engineering and algorithmic tuning. This paper seeks to escape these constraints, by developing a Pre-Grasp informed Dexterous Manipulation (PGDM) framework that generates diverse dexterous manipulation behaviors, without any task-specific reasoning or hyper-parameter tuning. At the core of PGDM is a well known robotics construct, pre-grasps (i.e. the hand-pose preparing for object interaction). This simple primitive is enough to induce efficient exploration strategies for acquiring complex dexterous manipulation behaviors. To exhaustively verify these claims, we introduce TCDM, a benchmark of 50 diverse manipulation tasks defined over multiple objects and dexterous manipulators. Tasks for TCDM are defined automatically using exemplar object trajectories from various sources (animators, human behaviors, etc.), without any per-task engineering and/or supervision. Our experiments validate that PGDM's exploration strategy, induced by a surprisingly simple ingredient (single pre-grasp pose), matches the performance of prior methods, which require expensive per-task feature/reward engineering, expert supervision, and hyper-parameter tuning. For animated visualizations, trained policies, and project code, please refer to: https://pregrasps.github.io/
abstract_zh: 学习对各种物体的多种灵巧操作行为仍然是一个巨大的挑战。虽然策略学习方法提供了解决此问题的强大途径，但它们需要大量的每任务工程和算法调整。本文试图通过开发一种预掌握灵巧操作（PGDM）框架来摆脱这些限制，该框架可以生成多种灵巧操作行为，而无需任何特定于任务的推理或超参数调整。 PGD​​M 的核心是一个众所周知的机器人结构，即预抓取（即为物体交互做准备的手部姿势）。这个简单的原语足以引发有效的探索策略来获取复杂的灵巧操作行为。为了彻底验证这些说法，我们引入了 TCDM，这是针对多个对象和灵巧操纵器定义的 50 种不同操纵任务的基准。 TCDM 的任务是使用来自各种来源（动画师、人类行为等）的示例对象轨迹自动定义的，无需任何针对每个任务的工程和/或监督。我们的实验验证了 PGDM 的探索策略，由令人惊讶的简单成分（单个预抓取姿势）引起，与先前方法的性能相匹配，这些方法需要昂贵的每任务特征/奖励工程、专家监督和超参数调整。动画可视化、训练策略和项目代码请参考：https://pregrasps.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需任务特定调整的灵巧操作学习框架PGDM，通过预抓取姿态和示例轨迹生成多样化操作行为。
AI.motivation: 现有策略学习方法需要大量任务特定工程和超参数调优，限制了灵巧操作行为的高效学习。
AI.method: 基于预抓取姿态（pre-grasps）构建PGDM框架，结合多源示例轨迹自动生成50种多样化操作任务基准TCDM，无需人工工程。
AI.result: 实验表明PGDM通过单一预抓取姿态即可达到需复杂工程的先前方法性能，验证了其高效性。
AI.conclusion: 预抓取姿态作为简单先验可有效引导复杂操作学习，为通用灵巧操作提供新范式。

authors_text: Selvarajah Thuseethan,Palanisamy Vigneshwaran,Joseph Charles,Chathrie Wimalasooriya
title: Siamese Network-based Lightweight Framework for Tomato Leaf Disease Recognition
title_zh: 基于暹罗网络的轻量级番茄叶病识别框架
abstract: Automatic tomato disease recognition from leaf images is vital to avoid crop losses by applying control measures on time. Even though recent deep learning-based tomato disease recognition methods with classical training procedures showed promising recognition results, they demand large labelled data and involve expensive training. The traditional deep learning models proposed for tomato disease recognition also consume high memory and storage because of a high number of parameters. While lightweight networks overcome some of these issues to a certain extent, they continue to show low performance and struggle to handle imbalanced data. In this paper, a novel Siamese network-based lightweight framework is proposed for automatic tomato leaf disease recognition. This framework achieves the highest accuracy of 96.97% on the tomato subset obtained from the PlantVillage dataset and 95.48% on the Taiwan tomato leaf disease dataset. Experimental results further confirm that the proposed framework is effective with imbalanced and small data. The backbone deep network integrated with this framework is lightweight with approximately 2.9629 million trainable parameters, which is way lower than existing lightweight deep networks.
summary: Automatic tomato disease recognition from leaf images is vital to avoid crop losses by applying control measures on time. Even though recent deep learning-based tomato disease recognition methods with classical training procedures showed promising recognition results, they demand large labelled data and involve expensive training. The traditional deep learning models proposed for tomato disease recognition also consume high memory and storage because of a high number of parameters. While lightweight networks overcome some of these issues to a certain extent, they continue to show low performance and struggle to handle imbalanced data. In this paper, a novel Siamese network-based lightweight framework is proposed for automatic tomato leaf disease recognition. This framework achieves the highest accuracy of 96.97% on the tomato subset obtained from the PlantVillage dataset and 95.48% on the Taiwan tomato leaf disease dataset. Experimental results further confirm that the proposed framework is effective with imbalanced and small data. The backbone deep network integrated with this framework is lightweight with approximately 2.9629 million trainable parameters, which is way lower than existing lightweight deep networks.
abstract_zh: 从叶子图像中自动识别番茄病害对于及时采取控制措施来避免作物损失至关重要。尽管最近基于深度学习的番茄病害识别方法和经典训练程序显示出有希望的识别结果，但它们需要大量标记数据并且涉及昂贵的训练。用于番茄病害识别的传统深度学习模型由于参数数量较多，也消耗大量内存和存储空间。虽然轻量级网络在一定程度上克服了其中一些问题，但它们仍然表现出较低的性能并且难以处理不平衡的数据。本文提出了一种新颖的基于暹罗网络的轻量级框架，用于自动番茄叶病识别。该框架在PlantVillage数据集获得的番茄子集上达到了96.97%的最高准确率，在台湾番茄叶病数据集上达到了95.48%的最高准确率。实验结果进一步证实了所提出的框架对于不平衡和小数据是有效的。与该框架集成的主干深度网络是轻量级的，可训练参数约为 296.29 万个，远低于现有的轻量级深度网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于暹罗网络的轻量级框架，用于番茄叶病识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据且训练成本高，传统模型参数多导致内存消耗大，轻量级网络在处理不平衡数据时表现不足。
AI.method: 设计轻量级暹罗网络框架，结合数据增强技术，优化参数量并提升对不平衡数据的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在PlantVillage数据集子集和台湾番茄叶病数据集上分别达到96.97%和95.48%的准确率，参数量仅296.29万，优于现有轻量级网络。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保持高识别精度的同时显著降低参数量，适用于资源受限场景下的番茄叶病检测。

authors_text: Ishan Bansal,Joseph Cheriyan,Logan Grout,Sharat Ibrahimpur
title: Improved Approximation Algorithms by Generalizing the Primal-Dual Method Beyond Uncrossable Functions
title_zh: 通过推广不可交叉函数之外的原对偶方法改进逼近算法
comment: updated v3, improved exposition at a few points, results and proofs are the same
comments: updated v3, improved exposition at a few points, results and proofs are the same
abstract: We address long-standing open questions raised by Williamson, Goemans, Vazirani and Mihail pertaining to the design of approximation algorithms for problems in network design via the primal-dual method (Combinatorica 15(3):435-454, 1995). Williamson et al. prove an approximation guarantee of two for connectivity augmentation problems where the connectivity requirements can be specified by so-called uncrossable functions. They state: ``Extending our algorithm to handle non-uncrossable functions remains a challenging open problem. The key feature of uncrossable functions is that there exists an optimal dual solution which is laminar. This property characterizes uncrossable functions\dots\ A larger open issue is to explore further the power of the primal-dual approach for obtaining approximation algorithms for other combinatorial optimization problems.'' Our main result proves that the primal-dual algorithm of Williamson et al. achieves an approximation ratio of 16 for a class of functions that generalizes the notion of an uncrossable function. There exist instances that can be handled by our methods where none of the optimal dual solutions has a laminar support. We present three applications of our main result. (1) A 16-approximation algorithm for augmenting a family of small cuts of a graph $G$. (2) A $16 \cdot {\lceil k/u_{min} \rceil}$-approximation algorithm for the Cap-$k$-ECSS problem which is as follows: Given an undirected graph $G = (V,E)$ with edge costs $c \in \mathbb{Q}_{\geq 0}^E$ and edge capacities $u \in \mathbb{Z}_{\geq 0}^E$, find a minimum-cost subset of the edges $F\subseteq E$ such that the capacity of any cut in $(V,F)$ is at least $k$; we use $u_{min}$ to denote the minimum capacity of an edge in $E$. (3) An $O(1)$-approximation algorithm for the model of $(p,2)$-Flexible Graph Connectivity.

abstract_zh: 我们解决了 Williamson、Goemans、Vazirani 和 Mihail 提出的长期悬而未决的问题，这些问题涉及通过原对偶方法设计网络设计问题的近似算法（Combinatorica 15(3):435-454, 1995）。威廉姆森等人。证明连接增强问题的两个近似保证，其中连接要求可以由所谓的不可交叉函数指定。他们表示：“扩展我们的算法以处理不可交叉的函数仍然是一个具有挑战性的开放问题。不可交叉函数的关键特征是存在层状的最优对偶解。这个属性表征了不可交叉的函数\点\。一个更大的悬而未决的问题是进一步探索原对偶方法的威力，以获得其他组合优化问题的近似算法。”我们的主要结果证明了 Williamson 等人的原对偶算法。对一类函数实现了 16 的近似比，概括了不可交叉函数的概念。存在可以通过我们的方法处理的情况，其中没有一个最佳对偶解决方案具有层流支持。我们提出了主要结果的三个应用。 (1) 一种 16 近似算法，用于扩充图 $G$ 的一系列小割。 (2) 针对 Cap-$k$-ECSS 问题的 $16 \cdot {\lceil k/u_{min} \rceil}$ 近似算法如下：给定一个无向图 $G = (V,E)$，边成本 $c \in \mathbb{Q}_{\geq 0}^E$ 和边容量 $u \in \mathbb{Z}_{\geq 0}^E$，找到边 $F\subseteq E$ 的最小成本子集，使得 $(V,F)$ 中任何切割的容量至少为 $k$；我们使用$u_{min}$来表示$E$中一条边的最小容量。 (3) $(p,2)$-灵活图连通性模型的$O(1)$-近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过推广原始对偶方法超越不可交叉函数，改进了网络设计问题的近似算法，并提出了三个应用实例。
AI.motivation: Williamson等人提出原始对偶方法在处理不可交叉函数时存在局限性，扩展至非不可交叉函数是长期未解决的挑战，需探索原始对偶方法的更广泛适用性。
AI.method: 通过推广原始对偶方法，允许非层叠的对偶解，设计适用于更广泛函数类的近似算法，并应用于小割增强、Cap-k-ECSS问题和(p,2)-柔性图连通性模型。
AI.result: 证明了推广后的原始对偶算法对广义函数类达到16近似比，提出了三个具体问题的近似算法，包括16近似的小割增强算法、Cap-k-ECSS问题的16·⌈k/u_min⌉近似算法及O(1)近似的柔性图连通性算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功扩展了原始对偶方法的适用范围，为网络设计问题提供了新的近似算法，并展示了该方法在更广泛组合优化问题中的潜力。

authors_text: Geng Yuan,Yanyu Li,Sheng Li,Zhenglun Kong,Sergey Tulyakov,Xulong Tang,Yanzhi Wang,Jian Ren
title: Layer Freezing & Data Sieving: Missing Pieces of a Generic Framework for Sparse Training
title_zh: 层冻结和数据筛选：稀疏训练通用框架的缺失部分
comment: Published in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Published in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Recently, sparse training has emerged as a promising paradigm for efficient deep learning on edge devices. The current research mainly devotes efforts to reducing training costs by further increasing model sparsity. However, increasing sparsity is not always ideal since it will inevitably introduce severe accuracy degradation at an extremely high sparsity level. This paper intends to explore other possible directions to effectively and efficiently reduce sparse training costs while preserving accuracy. To this end, we investigate two techniques, namely, layer freezing and data sieving. First, the layer freezing approach has shown its success in dense model training and fine-tuning, yet it has never been adopted in the sparse training domain. Nevertheless, the unique characteristics of sparse training may hinder the incorporation of layer freezing techniques. Therefore, we analyze the feasibility and potentiality of using the layer freezing technique in sparse training and find it has the potential to save considerable training costs. Second, we propose a data sieving method for dataset-efficient training, which further reduces training costs by ensuring only a partial dataset is used throughout the entire training process. We show that both techniques can be well incorporated into the sparse training algorithm to form a generic framework, which we dub SpFDE. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that SpFDE can significantly reduce training costs while preserving accuracy from three dimensions: weight sparsity, layer freezing, and dataset sieving.
summary: Recently, sparse training has emerged as a promising paradigm for efficient deep learning on edge devices. The current research mainly devotes efforts to reducing training costs by further increasing model sparsity. However, increasing sparsity is not always ideal since it will inevitably introduce severe accuracy degradation at an extremely high sparsity level. This paper intends to explore other possible directions to effectively and efficiently reduce sparse training costs while preserving accuracy. To this end, we investigate two techniques, namely, layer freezing and data sieving. First, the layer freezing approach has shown its success in dense model training and fine-tuning, yet it has never been adopted in the sparse training domain. Nevertheless, the unique characteristics of sparse training may hinder the incorporation of layer freezing techniques. Therefore, we analyze the feasibility and potentiality of using the layer freezing technique in sparse training and find it has the potential to save considerable training costs. Second, we propose a data sieving method for dataset-efficient training, which further reduces training costs by ensuring only a partial dataset is used throughout the entire training process. We show that both techniques can be well incorporated into the sparse training algorithm to form a generic framework, which we dub SpFDE. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that SpFDE can significantly reduce training costs while preserving accuracy from three dimensions: weight sparsity, layer freezing, and dataset sieving.
abstract_zh: 最近，稀疏训练已成为边缘设备上高效深度学习的有前景的范例。目前的研究主要致力于通过进一步增加模型稀疏性来降低训练成本。然而，增加稀疏度并不总是理想的，因为它不可避免地会在极高的稀疏度水平下导致严重的精度下降。本文旨在探索其他可能的方向，以有效且高效地降低稀疏训练成本，同时保持准确性。为此，我们研究了两种技术，即层冻结和数据筛选。首先，层冻结方法在密集模型训练和微调方面已显示出其成功，但从未在稀疏训练领域被采用。然而，稀疏训练的独特特征可能会阻碍层冻结技术的结合。因此，我们分析了在稀疏训练中使用层冻结技术的可行性和潜力，发现它有可能节省大量的训练成本。其次，我们提出了一种用于数据集高效训练的数据筛选方法，该方法通过确保在整个训练过程中仅使用部分数据集来进一步降低训练成本。我们证明这两种技术都可以很好地融入稀疏训练算法中，形成一个通用框架，我们将其称为 SpFDE。我们广泛的实验表明，SpFDE 可以显着降低训练成本，同时保持三个维度的准确性：权重稀疏性、层冻结和数据集筛选。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合层冻结和数据筛选的通用稀疏训练框架SpFDE，旨在减少训练成本同时保持模型精度。
AI.motivation: 当前稀疏训练研究过度依赖增加模型稀疏度来降低训练成本，但高稀疏度会导致精度严重下降，需探索其他有效途径。
AI.method: 通过引入层冻结技术（冻结部分层参数）和数据筛选方法（仅使用数据集子集），构建SpFDE框架实现多维度成本优化。
AI.result: 实验表明SpFDE在权重稀疏度、层冻结和数据筛选三个维度均显著降低训练成本，同时保持模型精度。
AI.conclusion: 层冻结与数据筛选的结合为稀疏训练提供了通用高效框架，有效解决了高稀疏度下的精度损失问题。

Second, we propose a data sieving method for dataset-efficient training, which further reduces training costs by ensuring only a partial dataset is used throughout the entire training process. We show that both techniques can be well incorporated into the sparse training algorithm to form a generic framework, which we dub SpFDE. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that SpFDE can significantly reduce training costs while preserving accuracy from three dimensions: weight sparsity, layer freezing, and dataset sieving. 最近，稀疏训练已成为边缘设备上高效深度学习的有前景的范例。目前的研究主要致力于通过进一步增加模型稀疏性来降低训练成本。然而，增加稀疏度并不总是理想的，因为它不可避免地会在极高的稀疏度水平下导致严重的精度下降。本文旨在探索其他可能的方向，以有效且高效地降低稀疏训练成本，同时保持准确性。为此，我们研究了两种技术，即层冻结和数据筛选。首先，层冻结方法在密集模型训练和微调方面已显示出其成功，但从未在稀疏训练领域被采用。然而，稀疏训练的独特特征可能会阻碍层冻结技术的结合。因此，我们分析了在稀疏训练中使用层冻结技术的可行性和潜力，发现它有可能节省大量的训练成本。其次，我们提出了一种用于数据集高效训练的数据筛选方法，该方法通过确保在整个训练过程中仅使用部分数据集来进一步降低训练成本。我们证明这两种技术都可以很好地融入稀疏训练算法中，形成一个通用框架，我们将其称为 SpFDE。我们广泛的实验表明，SpFDE 可以显着降低训练成本，同时保持三个维度的准确性：权重稀疏性、层冻结和数据集筛选。 本文提出了一种结合层冻结和数据筛选的通用稀疏训练框架SpFDE，旨在减少训练成本同时保持模型精度。 Geng Yuan,Yanyu Li,Sheng Li,Zhenglun Kong,Sergey Tulyakov,Xulong Tang,Yanzhi Wang,Jian Ren cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Samuel Goree,Gabriel Appleby,David Crandall,Norman Su
title: Attention is All They Need: Exploring the Media Archaeology of the Computer Vision Research Paper
title_zh: 他们需要的只是注意力：探索计算机视觉研究论文的媒体考古学
abstract: Research papers, in addition to textual documents, are a designed interface through which researchers communicate. Recently, rapid growth has transformed that interface in many fields of computing. In this work, we examine the effects of this growth from a media archaeology perspective, through the changes to figures and tables in research papers. Specifically, we study these changes in computer vision over the past decade, as the deep learning revolution has driven unprecedented growth in the discipline. We ground our investigation through interviews with veteran researchers spanning computer vision, graphics, and visualization. Our analysis focuses on the research attention economy: how research paper elements contribute towards advertising, measuring, and disseminating an increasingly commodified "contribution." Through this work, we seek to motivate future discussion surrounding the design of both the research paper itself as well as the larger sociotechnical research publishing system, including tools for finding, reading, and writing research papers.
summary: Research papers, in addition to textual documents, are a designed interface through which researchers communicate. Recently, rapid growth has transformed that interface in many fields of computing. In this work, we examine the effects of this growth from a media archaeology perspective, through the changes to figures and tables in research papers. Specifically, we study these changes in computer vision over the past decade, as the deep learning revolution has driven unprecedented growth in the discipline. We ground our investigation through interviews with veteran researchers spanning computer vision, graphics, and visualization. Our analysis focuses on the research attention economy: how research paper elements contribute towards advertising, measuring, and disseminating an increasingly commodified "contribution." Through this work, we seek to motivate future discussion surrounding the design of both the research paper itself as well as the larger sociotechnical research publishing system, including tools for finding, reading, and writing research papers.
abstract_zh: 除了文本文档之外，研究论文也是研究人员交流的设计界面。最近，快速增长已经改变了许多计算领域的界面。在这项工作中，我们通过研究论文中图表的变化，从媒体考古学的角度审视了这种增长的影响。具体来说，我们研究过去十年中计算机视觉的这些变化，因为深度学习革命推动了该学科前所未有的发展。我们通过采访计算机视觉、图形和可视化领域的资深研究人员来进行调查。我们的分析侧重于研究注意力经济：研究论文元素如何有助于广告、衡量和传播日益商品化的“贡献”。通过这项工作，我们寻求激发未来围绕研究论文本身的设计以及更大的社会技术研究出版系统（包括用于查找、阅读和撰写研究论文的工具）的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文从媒体考古学角度分析计算机视觉领域研究论文中图表和表格的变化，探讨深度学习革命对研究注意力经济的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究论文作为学术交流的设计界面因技术发展而演变，需探讨其变化如何影响研究贡献的传播与衡量机制。
AI.method: 通过媒体考古学分析过去十年计算机视觉论文的图表演变，并结合对计算机视觉、图形学及可视化领域资深学者的访谈数据。
AI.result: 发现图表和表格的设计变化强化了研究贡献的视觉化呈现，加剧了学术注意力经济，不同领域学者对这种趋势存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: 需重新设计研究论文格式及出版系统工具，以更合理地引导学术注意力分配并促进知识传播。

authors_text: Mousa Jari
title: An Overview of Phishing Victimization: Human Factors, Training and the Role of Emotions
title_zh: 网络钓鱼受害者概述：人为因素、培训和情绪的作用
abstract: Phishing is a form of cybercrime and a threat that allows criminals, phishers, to deceive end users in order to steal their confidential and sensitive information. Attackers usually attempt to manipulate the psychology and emotions of victims. The increasing threat of phishing has made its study worthwhile and much research has been conducted into the issue. This paper explores the emotional factors that have been reported in previous studies to be significant in phishing victimization. In addition, we compare what security organizations and researchers have highlighted in terms of phishing types and categories as well as training in tackling the problem, in a literature review which takes into account all major credible and published sources.
summary: Phishing is a form of cybercrime and a threat that allows criminals, phishers, to deceive end users in order to steal their confidential and sensitive information. Attackers usually attempt to manipulate the psychology and emotions of victims. The increasing threat of phishing has made its study worthwhile and much research has been conducted into the issue. This paper explores the emotional factors that have been reported in previous studies to be significant in phishing victimization. In addition, we compare what security organizations and researchers have highlighted in terms of phishing types and categories as well as training in tackling the problem, in a literature review which takes into account all major credible and published sources.
abstract_zh: 网络钓鱼是网络犯罪的一种形式，也是一种威胁，犯罪分子、网络钓鱼者可以通过欺骗最终用户来窃取他们的机密和敏感信息。攻击者通常试图操纵受害者的心理和情绪。网络钓鱼的威胁日益增加，使其研究变得有价值，并且针对该问题进行了大量研究。本文探讨了先前研究中报告的对网络钓鱼受害影响显着的情绪因素。此外，我们在文献综述中比较了安全组织和研究人员在网络钓鱼类型和类别以及解决该问题的培训方面所强调的内容，其中考虑了所有主要可信和已发布的来源。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了网络钓鱼受害中情绪因素的作用，并比较了安全组织和研究者在钓鱼类型、分类及应对培训方面的观点。
AI.motivation: 由于网络钓鱼威胁日益严重，研究其人类因素和情绪影响对于提升防御措施具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，综合分析了所有主要可信来源，探讨情绪因素及现有应对策略。
AI.result: 研究发现情绪因素在钓鱼受害中起关键作用，且不同安全组织和研究者对钓鱼类型及应对培训的侧重点存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出，应对网络钓鱼需结合情绪因素设计培训，并进一步研究不同钓鱼类型的分类以提升防护效果。

authors_text: Mohit Prabhushankar,Kiran Kokilepersaud,Yash-yee Logan,Stephanie Trejo Corona,Ghassan AlRegib,Charles Wykoff
title: OLIVES Dataset: Ophthalmic Labels for Investigating Visual Eye Semantics
title_zh: OLIVES 数据集：用于研究视觉眼睛语义的眼科标签
comment: Accepted at 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Accepted at 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Clinical diagnosis of the eye is performed over multifarious data modalities including scalar clinical labels, vectorized biomarkers, two-dimensional fundus images, and three-dimensional Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) scans. Clinical practitioners use all available data modalities for diagnosing and treating eye diseases like Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) or Diabetic Macular Edema (DME). Enabling usage of machine learning algorithms within the ophthalmic medical domain requires research into the relationships and interactions between all relevant data over a treatment period. Existing datasets are limited in that they neither provide data nor consider the explicit relationship modeling between the data modalities. In this paper, we introduce the Ophthalmic Labels for Investigating Visual Eye Semantics (OLIVES) dataset that addresses the above limitation. This is the first OCT and near-IR fundus dataset that includes clinical labels, biomarker labels, disease labels, and time-series patient treatment information from associated clinical trials. The dataset consists of 1268 near-IR fundus images each with at least 49 OCT scans, and 16 biomarkers, along with 4 clinical labels and a disease diagnosis of DR or DME. In total, there are 96 eyes' data averaged over a period of at least two years with each eye treated for an average of 66 weeks and 7 injections. We benchmark the utility of OLIVES dataset for ophthalmic data as well as provide benchmarks and concrete research directions for core and emerging machine learning paradigms within medical image analysis.
summary: Clinical diagnosis of the eye is performed over multifarious data modalities including scalar clinical labels, vectorized biomarkers, two-dimensional fundus images, and three-dimensional Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) scans. Clinical practitioners use all available data modalities for diagnosing and treating eye diseases like Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) or Diabetic Macular Edema (DME). Enabling usage of machine learning algorithms within the ophthalmic medical domain requires research into the relationships and interactions between all relevant data over a treatment period. Existing datasets are limited in that they neither provide data nor consider the explicit relationship modeling between the data modalities. In this paper, we introduce the Ophthalmic Labels for Investigating Visual Eye Semantics (OLIVES) dataset that addresses the above limitation. This is the first OCT and near-IR fundus dataset that includes clinical labels, biomarker labels, disease labels, and time-series patient treatment information from associated clinical trials. The dataset consists of 1268 near-IR fundus images each with at least 49 OCT scans, and 16 biomarkers, along with 4 clinical labels and a disease diagnosis of DR or DME. In total, there are 96 eyes' data averaged over a period of at least two years with each eye treated for an average of 66 weeks and 7 injections. We benchmark the utility of OLIVES dataset for ophthalmic data as well as provide benchmarks and concrete research directions for core and emerging machine learning paradigms within medical image analysis.
abstract_zh: 眼睛的临床诊断是通过多种数据模式进行的，包括标量临床标签、矢量化生物标志物、二维眼底图像和三维光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 扫描。临床医生使用所有可用的数据模式来诊断和治疗糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 或糖尿病性黄斑水肿 (DME) 等眼部疾病。要在眼科医学领域使用机器学习算法，需要研究治疗期间所有相关数据之间的关系和相互作用。现有数据集的局限性在于它们既不提供数据也不考虑数据模态之间的显式关系建模。在本文中，我们介绍了用于研究视觉眼睛语义的眼科标签（OLIVES）数据集，该数据集解决了上述限制。这是第一个 OCT 和近红外眼底数据集，其中包括来自相关临床试验的临床标签、生物标志物标签、疾病标签和时间序列患者治疗信息。该数据集包含 1268 张近红外眼底图像，每张图像至少有 49 次 OCT 扫描、16 个生物标志物、4 个临床标签和 DR 或 DME 疾病诊断。总共有 96 只眼睛的数据在至少两年内平均，每只眼睛平均治疗 66 周并进行 7 次注射。我们对眼科数据的 OLIVES 数据集的实用性进行基准测试，并为医学图像分析中的核心和新兴机器学习范例提供基准和具体研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OLIVES数据集，整合多种眼科临床数据模态以支持机器学习研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集未充分建模多模态数据间的关联，限制了机器学习在眼科疾病诊断中的应用。
AI.method: 构建包含近红外眼底图像、OCT扫描、生物标志物及治疗时间序列的多模态数据集，并进行基准测试。
AI.result: 数据集包含1268眼底图像、49次OCT扫描/眼、16个生物标志物及两年治疗记录，提供机器学习基准。
AI.conclusion: OLIVES数据集为眼科医学图像分析中的核心与前沿机器学习方法提供了研究基础。

search_text: OLIVES Dataset: Ophthalmic Labels for Investigating Visual Eye Semantics OLIVES 数据集：用于研究视觉眼睛语义的眼科标签 Clinical diagnosis of the eye is performed over multifarious data modalities including scalar clinical labels, vectorized biomarkers, two-dimensional fundus images, and three-dimensional Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) scans. Clinical practitioners use all available data modalities for diagnosing and treating eye diseases like Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) or Diabetic Macular Edema (DME). Enabling usage of machine learning algorithms within the ophthalmic medical domain requires research into the relationships and interactions between all relevant data over a treatment period. Existing datasets are limited in that they neither provide data nor consider the explicit relationship modeling between the data modalities. In this paper, we introduce the Ophthalmic Labels for Investigating Visual Eye Semantics (OLIVES) dataset that addresses the above limitation. This is the first OCT and near-IR fundus dataset that includes clinical labels, biomarker labels, disease labels, and time-series patient treatment information from associated clinical trials. The dataset consists of 1268 near-IR fundus images each with at least 49 OCT scans, and 16 biomarkers, along with 4 clinical labels and a disease diagnosis of DR or DME. In total, there are 96 eyes' data averaged over a period of at least two years with each eye treated for an average of 66 weeks and 7 injections. We benchmark the utility of OLIVES dataset for ophthalmic data as well as provide benchmarks and concrete research directions for core and emerging machine learning paradigms within medical image analysis. 眼睛的临床诊断是通过多种数据模式进行的，包括标量临床标签、矢量化生物标志物、二维眼底图像和三维光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 扫描。临床医生使用所有可用的数据模式来诊断和治疗糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 或糖尿病性黄斑水肿 (DME) 等眼部疾病。要在眼科医学领域使用机器学习算法，需要研究治疗期间所有相关数据之间的关系和相互作用。现有数据集的局限性在于它们既不提供数据也不考虑数据模态之间的显式关系建模。在本文中，我们介绍了用于研究视觉眼睛语义的眼科标签（OLIVES）数据集，该数据集解决了上述限制。这是第一个 OCT 和近红外眼底数据集，其中包括来自相关临床试验的临床标签、生物标志物标签、疾病标签和时间序列患者治疗信息。该数据集包含 1268 张近红外眼底图像，每张图像至少有 49 次 OCT 扫描、16 个生物标志物、4 个临床标签和 DR 或 DME 疾病诊断。总共有 96 只眼睛的数据在至少两年内平均，每只眼睛平均治疗 66 周并进行 7 次注射。我们对眼科数据的 OLIVES 数据集的实用性进行基准测试，并为医学图像分析中的核心和新兴机器学习范例提供基准和具体研究方向。 本文提出OLIVES数据集，整合多种眼科临床数据模态以支持机器学习研究。 Mohit Prabhushankar,Kiran Kokilepersaud,Yash-yee Logan,Stephanie Trejo Corona,Ghassan AlRegib,Charles Wykoff eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ioanna Gkartzonika,Nikolaos Gkalelis,Vasileios Mezaris
title: Learning Visual Explanations for DCNN-Based Image Classifiers Using an Attention Mechanism
title_zh: 使用注意力机制学习基于 DCNN 的图像分类器的视觉解释
comment: Accepted for publication; to be included in Proc. ECCV Workshops 2022. The version posted here is the "submitted manuscript" version
comments: Accepted for publication; to be included in Proc. ECCV Workshops 2022. The version posted here is the "submitted manuscript" version
abstract: In this paper two new learning-based eXplainable AI (XAI) methods for deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) image classifiers, called L-CAM-Fm and L-CAM-Img, are proposed. Both methods use an attention mechanism that is inserted in the original (frozen) DCNN and is trained to derive class activation maps (CAMs) from the last convolutional layer's feature maps. During training, CAMs are applied to the feature maps (L-CAM-Fm) or the input image (L-CAM-Img) forcing the attention mechanism to learn the image regions explaining the DCNN's outcome. Experimental evaluation on ImageNet shows that the proposed methods achieve competitive results while requiring a single forward pass at the inference stage. Moreover, based on the derived explanations a comprehensive qualitative analysis is performed providing valuable insight for understanding the reasons behind classification errors, including possible dataset biases affecting the trained classifier.
summary: In this paper two new learning-based eXplainable AI (XAI) methods for deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) image classifiers, called L-CAM-Fm and L-CAM-Img, are proposed. Both methods use an attention mechanism that is inserted in the original (frozen) DCNN and is trained to derive class activation maps (CAMs) from the last convolutional layer's feature maps. During training, CAMs are applied to the feature maps (L-CAM-Fm) or the input image (L-CAM-Img) forcing the attention mechanism to learn the image regions explaining the DCNN's outcome. Experimental evaluation on ImageNet shows that the proposed methods achieve competitive results while requiring a single forward pass at the inference stage. Moreover, based on the derived explanations a comprehensive qualitative analysis is performed providing valuable insight for understanding the reasons behind classification errors, including possible dataset biases affecting the trained classifier.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了两种用于深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 图像分类器的基于学习的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 方法，称为 L-CAM-Fm 和 L-CAM-Img。两种方法都使用插入到原始（冻结）DCNN 中的注意力机制，并经过训练以从最后一个卷积层的特征图导出类激活图 (CAM)。在训练期间，CAM 应用于特征图 (L-CAM-Fm) 或输入图像 (L-CAM-Img)，迫使注意力机制学习解释 DCNN 结果的图像区域。在 ImageNet 上的实验评估表明，所提出的方法在推理阶段需要单次前向传递时取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，基于得出的解释，进行了全面的定性分析，为理解分类错误背后的原因提供了宝贵的见解，包括影响训练分类器的可能的数据集偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于注意力机制的可解释AI方法（L-CAM-Fm和L-CAM-Img），用于为深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）图像分类器生成可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的决策过程通常被视为黑箱，缺乏可解释性限制了其在关键领域的应用，因此需要开发有效的可视化解释方法以增强模型透明度。
AI.method: 在冻结的DCNN中插入注意力机制，通过训练使注意力模块从最后一层卷积特征图（L-CAM-Fm）或输入图像（L-CAM-Img）生成类激活图（CAMs），从而定位解释模型决策的图像区域。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上实验表明，两种方法在推理阶段仅需单次前向传播即可达到竞争力性能，并通过生成的解释分析揭示了分类错误的潜在原因及数据集偏差。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效生成了DCNN决策的可视化解释，为理解模型行为和改进数据集质量提供了有价值的洞察。

authors_text: Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Zirui Zang,Florian Sauerbeck,Krzysztof Walas,Velin Dimitrov,Madhur Behl,Rosa Zheng,Joydeep Biswas,Venkat Krovi,Rahul Mangharam
title: Teaching Autonomous Systems Hands-On: Leveraging Modular Small-Scale Hardware in the Robotics Classroom
title_zh: 自主系统实践教学：在机器人教室中利用模块化小型硬件
abstract: Although robotics courses are well established in higher education, the courses often focus on theory and sometimes lack the systematic coverage of the techniques involved in developing, deploying, and applying software to real hardware. Additionally, most hardware platforms for robotics teaching are low-level toys aimed at younger students at middle-school levels. To address this gap, an autonomous vehicle hardware platform, called F1TENTH, is developed for teaching autonomous systems hands-on. This article describes the teaching modules and software stack for teaching at various educational levels with the theme of "racing" and competitions that replace exams. The F1TENTH vehicles offer a modular hardware platform and its related software for teaching the fundamentals of autonomous driving algorithms. From basic reactive methods to advanced planning algorithms, the teaching modules enhance students' computational thinking through autonomous driving with the F1TENTH vehicle. The F1TENTH car fills the gap between research platforms and low-end toy cars and offers hands-on experience in learning the topics in autonomous systems. Four universities have adopted the teaching modules for their semester-long undergraduate and graduate courses for multiple years. Student feedback is used to analyze the effectiveness of the F1TENTH platform. More than 80% of the students strongly agree that the hardware platform and modules greatly motivate their learning, and more than 70% of the students strongly agree that the hardware-enhanced their understanding of the subjects. The survey results show that more than 80% of the students strongly agree that the competitions motivate them for the course.
summary: Although robotics courses are well established in higher education, the courses often focus on theory and sometimes lack the systematic coverage of the techniques involved in developing, deploying, and applying software to real hardware. Additionally, most hardware platforms for robotics teaching are low-level toys aimed at younger students at middle-school levels. To address this gap, an autonomous vehicle hardware platform, called F1TENTH, is developed for teaching autonomous systems hands-on. This article describes the teaching modules and software stack for teaching at various educational levels with the theme of "racing" and competitions that replace exams. The F1TENTH vehicles offer a modular hardware platform and its related software for teaching the fundamentals of autonomous driving algorithms. From basic reactive methods to advanced planning algorithms, the teaching modules enhance students' computational thinking through autonomous driving with the F1TENTH vehicle. The F1TENTH car fills the gap between research platforms and low-end toy cars and offers hands-on experience in learning the topics in autonomous systems. Four universities have adopted the teaching modules for their semester-long undergraduate and graduate courses for multiple years. Student feedback is used to analyze the effectiveness of the F1TENTH platform. More than 80% of the students strongly agree that the hardware platform and modules greatly motivate their learning, and more than 70% of the students strongly agree that the hardware-enhanced their understanding of the subjects. The survey results show that more than 80% of the students strongly agree that the competitions motivate them for the course.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器人技术课程在高等教育中已经很完善，但这些课程通常侧重于理论，有时缺乏对开发、部署软件以及将软件应用于实际硬件所涉及的技术的系统覆盖。此外，大多数用于机器人教学的硬件平台都是针对中低年级学生的低级玩具。为了弥补这一差距，开发了一个名为 F1TENTH 的自动驾驶汽车硬件平台，用于对自动驾驶系统进行实践教学。本文介绍了以“赛车”为主题、以竞赛代替考试的各种教育层次教学的教学模块和软件栈。 F1TENTH 车辆提供模块化硬件平台及其相关软件，用于教授自动驾驶算法的基础知识。从基本的反应方法到先进的规划算法，教学模块通过 F1TENTH 车辆的自动驾驶增强学生的计算思维。 F1TENTH 汽车填补了研究平台和低端玩具车之间的空白，并提供了学习自主系统主题的实践经验。四所大学已连续多年在本科生和研究生学期课程中采用该教学模式。学生反馈用于分析 F1TENTH 平台的有效性。超过80%的学生强烈认为硬件平台和模块极大地激发了他们的学习动力，超过70%的学生强烈认为硬件增强了他们对学科的理解。调查结果显示，超过80%的学生强烈认为比赛激励了他们学习这门课程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为F1TENTH的模块化硬件平台，用于在机器人课堂中进行自主系统的实践教学，弥补了传统课程理论与实践脱节的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人课程侧重理论教学，缺乏对实际硬件开发和应用的系统训练；教学硬件多为面向青少年的低级玩具，难以满足高等教育需求。
AI.method: 开发F1TENTH自动驾驶硬件平台，结合模块化软件栈和以“赛车”为主题的课程模块，通过竞赛替代考试，为本科生和研究生提供实践教学。
AI.result: 四所大学多年采用该平台后，80%以上学生认为硬件平台显著提升学习动力，70%以上认为加深了对课程内容的理解，且竞赛形式有效激发学习兴趣。
AI.conclusion: F1TENTH平台成功填补了研究级平台与低端玩具间的空白，通过实践教学和竞赛机制显著提升了学生对自主系统技术的掌握与兴趣。

search_text: Teaching Autonomous Systems Hands-On: Leveraging Modular Small-Scale Hardware in the Robotics Classroom 自主系统实践教学：在机器人教室中利用模块化小型硬件 Although robotics courses are well established in higher education, the courses often focus on theory and sometimes lack the systematic coverage of the techniques involved in developing, deploying, and applying software to real hardware. Additionally, most hardware platforms for robotics teaching are low-level toys aimed at younger students at middle-school levels. To address this gap, an autonomous vehicle hardware platform, called F1TENTH, is developed for teaching autonomous systems hands-on. This article describes the teaching modules and software stack for teaching at various educational levels with the theme of "racing" and competitions that replace exams. The F1TENTH vehicles offer a modular hardware platform and its related software for teaching the fundamentals of autonomous driving algorithms. From basic reactive methods to advanced planning algorithms, the teaching modules enhance students' computational thinking through autonomous driving with the F1TENTH vehicle. The F1TENTH car fills the gap between research platforms and low-end toy cars and offers hands-on experience in learning the topics in autonomous systems. Four universities have adopted the teaching modules for their semester-long undergraduate and graduate courses for multiple years. Student feedback is used to analyze the effectiveness of the F1TENTH platform. More than 80% of the students strongly agree that the hardware platform and modules greatly motivate their learning, and more than 70% of the students strongly agree that the hardware-enhanced their understanding of the subjects. The survey results show that more than 80% of the students strongly agree that the competitions motivate them for the course. 尽管机器人技术课程在高等教育中已经很完善，但这些课程通常侧重于理论，有时缺乏对开发、部署软件以及将软件应用于实际硬件所涉及的技术的系统覆盖。此外，大多数用于机器人教学的硬件平台都是针对中低年级学生的低级玩具。为了弥补这一差距，开发了一个名为 F1TENTH 的自动驾驶汽车硬件平台，用于对自动驾驶系统进行实践教学。本文介绍了以“赛车”为主题、以竞赛代替考试的各种教育层次教学的教学模块和软件栈。 F1TENTH 车辆提供模块化硬件平台及其相关软件，用于教授自动驾驶算法的基础知识。从基本的反应方法到先进的规划算法，教学模块通过 F1TENTH 车辆的自动驾驶增强学生的计算思维。 F1TENTH 汽车填补了研究平台和低端玩具车之间的空白，并提供了学习自主系统主题的实践经验。四所大学已连续多年在本科生和研究生学期课程中采用该教学模式。学生反馈用于分析 F1TENTH 平台的有效性。超过80%的学生强烈认为硬件平台和模块极大地激发了他们的学习动力，超过70%的学生强烈认为硬件增强了他们对学科的理解。调查结果显示，超过80%的学生强烈认为比赛激励了他们学习这门课程。 本文提出了一种名为F1TENTH的模块化硬件平台，用于在机器人课堂中进行自主系统的实践教学，弥补了传统课程理论与实践脱节的问题。 Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Zirui Zang,Florian Sauerbeck,Krzysztof Walas,Velin Dimitrov,Madhur Behl,Rosa Zheng,Joydeep Biswas,Venkat Krovi,Rahul Mangharam cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Khaled Saleh,Artur Grigorev,Adriana-Simona Mihaita
title: Traffic Accident Risk Forecasting using Contextual Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用上下文视觉转换器进行交通事故风险预测
abstract: Recently, the problem of traffic accident risk forecasting has been getting the attention of the intelligent transportation systems community due to its significant impact on traffic clearance. This problem is commonly tackled in the literature by using data-driven approaches that model the spatial and temporal incident impact, since they were shown to be crucial for the traffic accident risk forecasting problem. To achieve this, most approaches build different architectures to capture the spatio-temporal correlations features, making them inefficient for large traffic accident datasets. Thus, in this work, we are proposing a novel unified framework, namely a contextual vision transformer, that can be trained in an end-to-end approach which can effectively reason about the spatial and temporal aspects of the problem while providing accurate traffic accident risk predictions. We evaluate and compare the performance of our proposed methodology against baseline approaches from the literature across two large-scale traffic accident datasets from two different geographical locations. The results have shown a significant improvement with roughly 2\% in RMSE score in comparison to previous state-of-art works (SoTA) in the literature. Moreover, our proposed approach has outperformed the SoTA technique over the two datasets while only requiring 23x fewer computational requirements.
summary: Recently, the problem of traffic accident risk forecasting has been getting the attention of the intelligent transportation systems community due to its significant impact on traffic clearance. This problem is commonly tackled in the literature by using data-driven approaches that model the spatial and temporal incident impact, since they were shown to be crucial for the traffic accident risk forecasting problem. To achieve this, most approaches build different architectures to capture the spatio-temporal correlations features, making them inefficient for large traffic accident datasets. Thus, in this work, we are proposing a novel unified framework, namely a contextual vision transformer, that can be trained in an end-to-end approach which can effectively reason about the spatial and temporal aspects of the problem while providing accurate traffic accident risk predictions. We evaluate and compare the performance of our proposed methodology against baseline approaches from the literature across two large-scale traffic accident datasets from two different geographical locations. The results have shown a significant improvement with roughly 2\% in RMSE score in comparison to previous state-of-art works (SoTA) in the literature. Moreover, our proposed approach has outperformed the SoTA technique over the two datasets while only requiring 23x fewer computational requirements.
abstract_zh: 近年来，交通事故风险预测问题因其对通行通行的重大影响而受到智能交通系统界的关注。文献中通常通过使用数据驱动的方法来模拟空间和时间事件影响来解决这个问题，因为它们被证明对于交通事故风险预测问题至关重要。为了实现这一目标，大多数方法构建不同的架构来捕获时空相关性特征，这使得它们对于大型交通事故数据集效率低下。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的统一框架，即上下文视觉变换器，可以通过端到端方法进行训练，可以有效地推理问题的空间和时间方面，同时提供准确的交通事故风险预测。我们根据来自两个不同地理位置的两个大规模交通事故数据集的文献中的基线方法来评估和比较我们提出的方法的性能。结果显示，与文献中之前的最先进作品 (SoTA) 相比，RMSE 分数显着提高了约 2%。此外，我们提出的方法在两个数据集上的性能优于 SoTA 技术，同时只需要减少 23 倍的计算需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文视觉变换器的统一框架，用于交通事故风险预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模交通事故数据集时效率低下，且难以有效捕捉时空相关性特征。
AI.method: 设计端到端的上下文视觉变换器框架，通过统一建模时空关联性特征实现风险预测。
AI.result: 在两个大规模数据集上RMSE指标提升约2%，计算需求仅为现有最优方法的1/23。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在预测精度和计算效率上均优于现有最优技术，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yilun Xu,Ziming Liu,Max Tegmark,Tommi Jaakkola
title: Poisson Flow Generative Models
title_zh: 泊松流生成模型
abstract: We propose a new "Poisson flow" generative model (PFGM) that maps a uniform distribution on a high-dimensional hemisphere into any data distribution. We interpret the data points as electrical charges on the $z=0$ hyperplane in a space augmented with an additional dimension $z$, generating a high-dimensional electric field (the gradient of the solution to Poisson equation). We prove that if these charges flow upward along electric field lines, their initial distribution in the $z=0$ plane transforms into a distribution on the hemisphere of radius $r$ that becomes uniform in the $r \to\infty$ limit. To learn the bijective transformation, we estimate the normalized field in the augmented space. For sampling, we devise a backward ODE that is anchored by the physically meaningful additional dimension: the samples hit the unaugmented data manifold when the $z$ reaches zero. Experimentally, PFGM achieves current state-of-the-art performance among the normalizing flow models on CIFAR-10, with an Inception score of $9.68$ and a FID score of $2.35$. It also performs on par with the state-of-the-art SDE approaches while offering $10\times $ to $20 \times$ acceleration on image generation tasks. Additionally, PFGM appears more tolerant of estimation errors on a weaker network architecture and robust to the step size in the Euler method. The code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/poisson_flow .
summary: We propose a new "Poisson flow" generative model (PFGM) that maps a uniform distribution on a high-dimensional hemisphere into any data distribution. We interpret the data points as electrical charges on the $z=0$ hyperplane in a space augmented with an additional dimension $z$, generating a high-dimensional electric field (the gradient of the solution to Poisson equation). We prove that if these charges flow upward along electric field lines, their initial distribution in the $z=0$ plane transforms into a distribution on the hemisphere of radius $r$ that becomes uniform in the $r \to\infty$ limit. To learn the bijective transformation, we estimate the normalized field in the augmented space. For sampling, we devise a backward ODE that is anchored by the physically meaningful additional dimension: the samples hit the unaugmented data manifold when the $z$ reaches zero. Experimentally, PFGM achieves current state-of-the-art performance among the normalizing flow models on CIFAR-10, with an Inception score of $9.68$ and a FID score of $2.35$. It also performs on par with the state-of-the-art SDE approaches while offering $10\times $ to $20 \times$ acceleration on image generation tasks. Additionally, PFGM appears more tolerant of estimation errors on a weaker network architecture and robust to the step size in the Euler method. The code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/poisson_flow .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的“泊松流”生成模型（PFGM），它将高维半球上的均匀分布映射到任何数据分布。我们将数据点解释为空间中 $z=0$ 超平面上的电荷，该空间中增加了附加维度 $z$，从而生成高维电场（泊松方程解的梯度）。我们证明，如果这些电荷沿着电场线向上流动，它们在 $z=0$ 平面中的初始分布会转变为半径为 $r$ 的半球上的分布，并在 $r \to\infty$ 极限内变得均匀。为了学习双射变换，我们估计增广空间中的归一化场。对于采样，我们设计了一个后向 ODE，它由物理上有意义的附加维度锚定：当 $z$ 达到零时，样本到达未增强的数据流形。实验上，PFGM 在 CIFAR-10 上的归一化流模型中实现了当前最先进的性能，其 Inception 得分为 9.68 美元，FID 得分为 2.35 美元。它还具有与最先进的 SDE 方法相当的性能，同时为图像生成任务提供 10 美元到 20 美元的加速。此外，PFGM 似乎更能容忍较弱网络架构上的估计误差，并且对欧拉方法中的步长具有鲁棒性。该代码可在 https://github.com/Newbeeer/poisson_flow 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Poisson Flow Generative Model (PFGM)的新生成模型，通过将高维半球上的均匀分布映射到任意数据分布，实现高效图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统生成模型在高维空间中难以保持分布的均匀性，且计算效率较低。本文受电场物理特性启发，旨在设计一种更高效、鲁棒的生成模型。
AI.method: 通过引入额外的z维度，将数据点视为电荷，利用泊松方程的梯度构建高维电场。通过反向ODE在z=0平面采样，并估计增广空间中的归一化场实现可逆变换。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，PFGM达到Inception分数9.68和FID分数2.35，较SDE方法加速10-20倍，且对网络结构和欧拉方法步长更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: PFGM通过物理启发的数学框架，在生成质量与计算效率上取得突破，为高维分布建模提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Poisson Flow Generative Model (PFGM)的新生成模型，通过将高维半球上的均匀分布映射到任意数据分布，实现高效图像生成。
motivation: 传统生成模型在高维空间中难以保持分布的均匀性，且计算效率较低。本文受电场物理特性启发，旨在设计一种更高效、鲁棒的生成模型。
method: 通过引入额外的z维度，将数据点视为电荷，利用泊松方程的梯度构建高维电场。通过反向ODE在z=0平面采样，并估计增广空间中的归一化场实现可逆变换。
result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，PFGM达到Inception分数9.68和FID分数2.35，较SDE方法加速10-20倍，且对网络结构和欧拉方法步长更鲁棒。
conclusion: PFGM通过物理启发的数学框架，在生成质量与计算效率上取得突破，为高维分布建模提供了新思路。
search_text: Poisson Flow Generative Models 泊松流生成模型 We propose a new "Poisson flow" generative model (PFGM) that maps a uniform distribution on a high-dimensional hemisphere into any data distribution. We interpret the data points as electrical charges on the $z=0$ hyperplane in a space augmented with an additional dimension $z$, generating a high-dimensional electric field (the gradient of the solution to Poisson equation). We prove that if these charges flow upward along electric field lines, their initial distribution in the $z=0$ plane transforms into a distribution on the hemisphere of radius $r$ that becomes uniform in the $r \to\infty$ limit. To learn the bijective transformation, we estimate the normalized field in the augmented space. For sampling, we devise a backward ODE that is anchored by the physically meaningful additional dimension: the samples hit the unaugmented data manifold when the $z$ reaches zero. Experimentally, PFGM achieves current state-of-the-art performance among the normalizing flow models on CIFAR-10, with an Inception score of $9.68$ and a FID score of $2.35$. It also performs on par with the state-of-the-art SDE approaches while offering $10\times $ to $20 \times$ acceleration on image generation tasks. Additionally, PFGM appears more tolerant of estimation errors on a weaker network architecture and robust to the step size in the Euler method. The code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/poisson_flow . 我们提出了一种新的“泊松流”生成模型（PFGM），它将高维半球上的均匀分布映射到任何数据分布。我们将数据点解释为空间中 $z=0$ 超平面上的电荷，该空间中增加了附加维度 $z$，从而生成高维电场（泊松方程解的梯度）。我们证明，如果这些电荷沿着电场线向上流动，它们在 $z=0$ 平面中的初始分布会转变为半径为 $r$ 的半球上的分布，并在 $r \to\infty$ 极限内变得均匀。为了学习双射变换，我们估计增广空间中的归一化场。对于采样，我们设计了一个后向 ODE，它由物理上有意义的附加维度锚定：当 $z$ 达到零时，样本到达未增强的数据流形。实验上，PFGM 在 CIFAR-10 上的归一化流模型中实现了当前最先进的性能，其 Inception 得分为 9.68 美元，FID 得分为 2.35 美元。它还具有与最先进的 SDE 方法相当的性能，同时为图像生成任务提供 10 美元到 20 美元的加速。此外，PFGM 似乎更能容忍较弱网络架构上的估计误差，并且对欧拉方法中的步长具有鲁棒性。该代码可在 https://github.com/Newbeeer/poisson_flow 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Poisson Flow Generative Model (PFGM)的新生成模型，通过将高维半球上的均匀分布映射到任意数据分布，实现高效图像生成。 Yilun Xu,Ziming Liu,Max Tegmark,Tommi Jaakkola cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Antoine Amarilli
title: Uniform Reliability for Unbounded Homomorphism-Closed Graph Queries
title_zh: 无界同态闭图查询的一致可靠性
comment: Full version with proofs of the ICDT'23 article
comments: Full version with proofs of the ICDT'23 article
abstract: We study the uniform query reliability problem, which asks, for a fixed Boolean query Q, given an instance I, how many subinstances of I satisfy Q. Equivalently, this is a restricted case of Boolean query evaluation on tuple-independent probabilistic databases where all facts must have probability 1/2. We focus on graph signatures, and on queries closed under homomorphisms. We show that for any such query that is unbounded, i.e., not equivalent to a union of conjunctive queries, the uniform reliability problem is #P-hard. This recaptures the hardness, e.g., of s-t connectedness, which counts how many subgraphs of an input graph have a path between a source and a sink. This new hardness result on uniform reliability strengthens our earlier hardness result on probabilistic query evaluation for unbounded homomorphism-closed queries (ICDT'20). Indeed, our earlier proof crucially used facts with probability 1, so it did not apply to the unweighted case. The new proof presented in this paper avoids this; it uses our recent hardness result on uniform reliability for non-hierarchical conjunctive queries without self-joins (ICDT'21), along with new techniques.
summary: We study the uniform query reliability problem, which asks, for a fixed Boolean query Q, given an instance I, how many subinstances of I satisfy Q. Equivalently, this is a restricted case of Boolean query evaluation on tuple-independent probabilistic databases where all facts must have probability 1/2. We focus on graph signatures, and on queries closed under homomorphisms. We show that for any such query that is unbounded, i.e., not equivalent to a union of conjunctive queries, the uniform reliability problem is #P-hard. This recaptures the hardness, e.g., of s-t connectedness, which counts how many subgraphs of an input graph have a path between a source and a sink. This new hardness result on uniform reliability strengthens our earlier hardness result on probabilistic query evaluation for unbounded homomorphism-closed queries (ICDT'20). Indeed, our earlier proof crucially used facts with probability 1, so it did not apply to the unweighted case. The new proof presented in this paper avoids this; it uses our recent hardness result on uniform reliability for non-hierarchical conjunctive queries without self-joins (ICDT'21), along with new techniques.
abstract_zh: 我们研究统一查询可靠性问题，该问题要求，对于固定的布尔查询 Q，给定实例 I，I 中有多少个子实例满足 Q。等效地，这是元组无关概率数据库上布尔查询评估的受限情况，其中所有事实必须具有概率 1/2。我们专注于图签名以及同态下封闭的查询。我们表明，对于任何此类无界查询，即不等于连接查询的并集，统一可靠性问题是#P-hard。这重新获得了硬度，例如 s-t 连接性，它计算输入图的多少个子图在源和汇之间有路径。这个关于统一可靠性的新硬度结果加强了我们之前关于无界同态封闭查询的概率查询评估（ICDT'20）的硬度结果。事实上，我们之前的证明关键性地使用了概率为 1 的事实，因此它不适用于未加权的情况。本文提出的新证明避免了这一点；它使用我们最近关于无自连接的非分层连接查询的统一可靠性的硬度结果（ICDT'21）以及新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图查询的均匀可靠性问题，证明对于非有界且同态闭合的布尔查询，计算其均匀可靠性是#P难的。
AI.motivation: 填补之前概率数据库查询评估复杂性研究的空白，特别是针对无权情况下的硬度证明，扩展对同态闭合查询的理解。
AI.method: 结合非分层连通查询的硬度结果（ICDT'21）与新证明技术，避免使用概率为1的事实，从而适用于均匀可靠性问题。
AI.result: 证明所有非有界同态闭合图查询的均匀可靠性问题均为#P难，强化了此前关于概率查询评估的硬度结论。
AI.conclusion: 通过新方法证明了均匀可靠性问题的硬度，为概率数据库理论提供了更坚实的理论基础。

authors_text: Irfan Al-Hussaini,Cassie S. Mitchell
title: SERF: Interpretable Sleep Staging using Embeddings, Rules, and Features
title_zh: SERF：使用嵌入、规则和特征的可解释睡眠分期
abstract: The accuracy of recent deep learning based clinical decision support systems is promising. However, lack of model interpretability remains an obstacle to widespread adoption of artificial intelligence in healthcare. Using sleep as a case study, we propose a generalizable method to combine clinical interpretability with high accuracy derived from black-box deep learning. Clinician-determined sleep stages from polysomnogram (PSG) remain the gold standard for evaluating sleep quality. However, PSG manual annotation by experts is expensive and time-prohibitive. We propose SERF, interpretable Sleep staging using Embeddings, Rules, and Features to read PSG. SERF provides interpretation of classified sleep stages through meaningful features derived from the AASM Manual for the Scoring of Sleep and Associated Events. In SERF, the embeddings obtained from a hybrid of convolutional and recurrent neural networks are transposed to the interpretable feature space. These representative interpretable features are used to train simple models like a shallow decision tree for classification. Model results are validated on two publicly available datasets. SERF surpasses the current state-of-the-art for interpretable sleep staging by 2%. Using Gradient Boosted Trees as the classifier, SERF obtains 0.766 $κ$ and 0.870 AUC-ROC, within 2% of the current state-of-the-art black-box models.
summary: The accuracy of recent deep learning based clinical decision support systems is promising. However, lack of model interpretability remains an obstacle to widespread adoption of artificial intelligence in healthcare. Using sleep as a case study, we propose a generalizable method to combine clinical interpretability with high accuracy derived from black-box deep learning. Clinician-determined sleep stages from polysomnogram (PSG) remain the gold standard for evaluating sleep quality. However, PSG manual annotation by experts is expensive and time-prohibitive. We propose SERF, interpretable Sleep staging using Embeddings, Rules, and Features to read PSG. SERF provides interpretation of classified sleep stages through meaningful features derived from the AASM Manual for the Scoring of Sleep and Associated Events. In SERF, the embeddings obtained from a hybrid of convolutional and recurrent neural networks are transposed to the interpretable feature space. These representative interpretable features are used to train simple models like a shallow decision tree for classification. Model results are validated on two publicly available datasets. SERF surpasses the current state-of-the-art for interpretable sleep staging by 2%. Using Gradient Boosted Trees as the classifier, SERF obtains 0.766 $κ$ and 0.870 AUC-ROC, within 2% of the current state-of-the-art black-box models.
abstract_zh: 最近基于深度学习的临床决策支持系统的准确性是有希望的。然而，缺乏模型可解释性仍然是人工智能在医疗保健领域广泛采用的障碍。以睡眠为案例研究，我们提出了一种通用方法，将临床可解释性与黑盒深度学习的高精度相结合。临床医生根据多导睡眠图 (PSG) 确定的睡眠阶段仍然是评估睡眠质量的黄金标准。然而，由专家进行 PSG 手动注释既昂贵又耗时。我们提出 SERF，即使用嵌入、规则和特征来读取 PSG 的可解释睡眠分期。 SERF 通过源自 AASM 睡眠和相关事件评分手册的有意义的特征，对分类睡眠阶段进行解释。在 SERF 中，从卷积神经网络和循环神经网络的混合中获得的嵌入被转置到可解释的特征空间。这些代表性的可解释特征用于训练简单模型，例如用于分类的浅层决策树。模型结果在两个公开可用的数据集上进行了验证。 SERF 比当前可解释睡眠分期的最先进技术高出 2%。使用梯度提升树作为分类器，SERF 获得 0.766 $κ$ 和 0.870 AUC-ROC，与当前最先进的黑盒模型相差不到 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SERF方法，通过结合嵌入、规则和特征实现可解释的睡眠分期，解决深度学习模型缺乏可解释性的痛点。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在睡眠分期任务中准确率高，但缺乏可解释性阻碍医疗应用；手动标注睡眠数据成本高且耗时。
AI.method: 使用卷积和循环神经网络提取嵌入，将其映射到AASM手册定义的可解释特征空间，再训练浅层决策树等简单模型进行分类。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，SERF的κ值达0.766，AUC-ROC为0.870，超越现有可解释方法2%，接近黑箱模型性能。
AI.conclusion: SERF通过融合深度学习与临床规则，在保持高准确率的同时提供可解释性，为医疗AI的可信应用提供新思路。
