These representative interpretable features are used to train simple models like a shallow decision tree for classification. Model results are validated on two publicly available datasets. SERF surpasses the current state-of-the-art for interpretable sleep staging by 2%. Using Gradient Boosted Trees as the classifier, SERF obtains 0.766 $κ$ and 0.870 AUC-ROC, within 2% of the current state-of-the-art black-box models. 最近基于深度学习的临床决策支持系统的准确性是有希望的。然而，缺乏模型可解释性仍然是人工智能在医疗保健领域广泛采用的障碍。以睡眠为案例研究，我们提出了一种通用方法，将临床可解释性与黑盒深度学习的高精度相结合。临床医生根据多导睡眠图 (PSG) 确定的睡眠阶段仍然是评估睡眠质量的黄金标准。然而，由专家进行 PSG 手动注释既昂贵又耗时。我们提出 SERF，即使用嵌入、规则和特征来读取 PSG 的可解释睡眠分期。 SERF 通过源自 AASM 睡眠和相关事件评分手册的有意义的特征，对分类睡眠阶段进行解释。在 SERF 中，从卷积神经网络和循环神经网络的混合中获得的嵌入被转置到可解释的特征空间。这些代表性的可解释特征用于训练简单模型，例如用于分类的浅层决策树。模型结果在两个公开可用的数据集上进行了验证。 SERF 比当前可解释睡眠分期的最先进技术高出 2%。使用梯度提升树作为分类器，SERF 获得 0.766 $κ$ 和 0.870 AUC-ROC，与当前最先进的黑盒模型相差不到 2%。 本文提出SERF方法，通过结合嵌入、规则和特征实现可解释的睡眠分期，解决深度学习模型缺乏可解释性的痛点。 Irfan Al-Hussaini,Cassie S. Mitchell eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ricardo V. Godoy,Tharik J. S. Reis,Paulo H. Polegato,Gustavo J. G. Lahr,Ricardo L. Saute,Frederico N. Nakano,Helio R. Machado,Americo C. Sakamoto,Marcelo Becker,Glauco A. P. Caurin
title: EEG-Based Epileptic Seizure Prediction Using Temporal Multi-Channel Transformers
title_zh: 使用时间多通道变压器进行基于脑电图的癫痫发作预测
abstract: Epilepsy is one of the most common neurological diseases, characterized by transient and unprovoked events called epileptic seizures. Electroencephalogram (EEG) is an auxiliary method used to perform both the diagnosis and the monitoring of epilepsy. Given the unexpected nature of an epileptic seizure, its prediction would improve patient care, optimizing the quality of life and the treatment of epilepsy. Predicting an epileptic seizure implies the identification of two distinct states of EEG in a patient with epilepsy: the preictal and the interictal. In this paper, we developed two deep learning models called Temporal Multi-Channel Transformer (TMC-T) and Vision Transformer (TMC-ViT), adaptations of Transformer-based architectures for multi-channel temporal signals. Moreover, we accessed the impact of choosing different preictal duration, since its length is not a consensus among experts, and also evaluated how the sample size benefits each model. Our models are compared with fully connected, convolutional, and recurrent networks. The algorithms were patient-specific trained and evaluated on raw EEG signals from the CHB-MIT database. Experimental results and statistical validation demonstrated that our TMC-ViT model surpassed the CNN architecture, state-of-the-art in seizure prediction.
summary: Epilepsy is one of the most common neurological diseases, characterized by transient and unprovoked events called epileptic seizures. Electroencephalogram (EEG) is an auxiliary method used to perform both the diagnosis and the monitoring of epilepsy. Given the unexpected nature of an epileptic seizure, its prediction would improve patient care, optimizing the quality of life and the treatment of epilepsy. Predicting an epileptic seizure implies the identification of two distinct states of EEG in a patient with epilepsy: the preictal and the interictal. In this paper, we developed two deep learning models called Temporal Multi-Channel Transformer (TMC-T) and Vision Transformer (TMC-ViT), adaptations of Transformer-based architectures for multi-channel temporal signals. Moreover, we accessed the impact of choosing different preictal duration, since its length is not a consensus among experts, and also evaluated how the sample size benefits each model. Our models are compared with fully connected, convolutional, and recurrent networks. The algorithms were patient-specific trained and evaluated on raw EEG signals from the CHB-MIT database. Experimental results and statistical validation demonstrated that our TMC-ViT model surpassed the CNN architecture, state-of-the-art in seizure prediction.
abstract_zh: 癫痫是最常见的神经系统疾病之一，其特征是短暂且无端的事件，称为癫痫发作。脑电图（EEG）是用于诊断和监测癫痫的辅助方法。鉴于癫痫发作的意外性质，其预测将改善患者护理，优化生活质量和癫痫治疗。预测癫痫发作意味着识别癫痫患者脑电图的两种不同状态：发作前和发作间期。在本文中，我们开发了两种深度学习模型，称为时态多通道变换器（TMC-T）和视觉变换器（TMC-ViT），它们是针对多通道时态信号的基于变换器的架构的改编。此外，我们还评估了选择不同的发作前持续时间的影响，因为专家们并未就其长度达成共识，并且还评估了样本量如何使每个模型受益。我们的模型与全连接网络、卷积网络和循环网络进行了比较。这些算法根据来自 CHB-MIT 数据库的原始脑电图信号进行了针对患者的训练和评估。实验结果和统计验证表明，我们的 TMC-ViT 模型超越了 CNN 架构，是癫痫预测领域最先进的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于EEG的癫痫发作预测方法，采用时序多通道Transformer模型（TMC-T和TMC-ViT）进行癫痫发作预测。
AI.motivation: 癫痫发作具有突发性，预测其发生可优化患者护理和治疗方案，但现有方法在准确性和适应性上仍有不足。
AI.method: 开发两种改进的Transformer架构（TMC-T和TMC-ViT），适应多通道时序EEG信号，并分析不同预发作时长与样本量对模型的影响，与传统模型（如CNN）进行对比实验。
AI.result: TMC-ViT模型在CHB-MIT数据库上的实验结果表明，其性能优于CNN等现有最先进的癫痫预测方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的时序多通道模型能有效捕捉EEG特征，TMC-ViT在癫痫发作预测任务中表现最优，为临床提供了更可靠的预测工具。

Given the unexpected nature of an epileptic seizure, its prediction would improve patient care, optimizing the quality of life and the treatment of epilepsy. authors_text: Jun Gao,Tianchang Shen,Zian Wang,Wenzheng Chen,Kangxue Yin,Daiqing Li,Or Litany,Zan Gojcic,Sanja Fidler
title: GET3D: A Generative Model of High Quality 3D Textured Shapes Learned from Images
title_zh: GET3D：从图像中学习的高质量 3D 纹理形状的生成模型
abstract: As several industries are moving towards modeling massive 3D virtual worlds, the need for content creation tools that can scale in terms of the quantity, quality, and diversity of 3D content is becoming evident. In our work, we aim to train performant 3D generative models that synthesize textured meshes which can be directly consumed by 3D rendering engines, thus immediately usable in downstream applications. Prior works on 3D generative modeling either lack geometric details, are limited in the mesh topology they can produce, typically do not support textures, or utilize neural renderers in the synthesis process, which makes their use in common 3D software non-trivial. In this work, we introduce GET3D, a Generative model that directly generates Explicit Textured 3D meshes with complex topology, rich geometric details, and high-fidelity textures. We bridge recent success in the differentiable surface modeling, differentiable rendering as well as 2D Generative Adversarial Networks to train our model from 2D image collections. GET3D is able to generate high-quality 3D textured meshes, ranging from cars, chairs, animals, motorbikes and human characters to buildings, achieving significant improvements over previous methods.
summary: As several industries are moving towards modeling massive 3D virtual worlds, the need for content creation tools that can scale in terms of the quantity, quality, and diversity of 3D content is becoming evident. In our work, we aim to train performant 3D generative models that synthesize textured meshes which can be directly consumed by 3D rendering engines, thus immediately usable in downstream applications. Prior works on 3D generative modeling either lack geometric details, are limited in the mesh topology they can produce, typically do not support textures, or utilize neural renderers in the synthesis process, which makes their use in common 3D software non-trivial. In this work, we introduce GET3D, a Generative model that directly generates Explicit Textured 3D meshes with complex topology, rich geometric details, and high-fidelity textures. We bridge recent success in the differentiable surface modeling, differentiable rendering as well as 2D Generative Adversarial Networks to train our model from 2D image collections. GET3D is able to generate high-quality 3D textured meshes, ranging from cars, chairs, animals, motorbikes and human characters to buildings, achieving significant improvements over previous methods.
abstract_zh: 随着多个行业开始对大规模 3D 虚拟世界进行建模，对能够在 3D 内容的数量、质量和多样性方面进行扩展的内容创建工具的需求变得越来越明显。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是训练高性能的 3D 生成模型，该模型可以合成纹理网格，这些网格可以直接由 3D 渲染引擎使用，从而可以立即在下游应用程序中使用。先前的 3D 生成建模工作要么缺乏几何细节，要么受限于它们可以生成的网格拓扑，通常不支持纹理，要么在合成过程中利用神经渲染器，这使得它们在常见 3D 软件中的使用变得非常重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 GET3D，这是一种生成模型，可以直接生成具有复杂拓扑、丰富几何细节和高保真纹理的显式纹理 3D 网格。我们将最近在可微表面建模、可微渲染以及 2D 生成对抗网络方面取得的成功结合起来，从 2D 图像集合中训练我们的模型。 GET3D 能够生成高质量的 3D 纹理网格，范围从汽车、椅子、动物、摩托车、人物到建筑物，比以前的方法取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GET3D模型，直接从图像生成具有复杂拓扑结构、丰富几何细节和高保真纹理的3D纹理网格。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型存在几何细节不足、拓扑结构受限、缺乏纹理支持或依赖神经渲染器等问题，难以满足工业界对大规模高质量3D内容的需求。
AI.method: 结合可微分表面建模、可微分渲染和2D生成对抗网络，通过2D图像集合训练模型，直接生成显式纹理3D网格。
AI.result: 模型能生成汽车、椅子、动物、建筑等多样化高质量3D纹理网格，在几何细节和纹理保真度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GET3D通过融合2D生成技术与3D建模，实现了无需神经渲染器的高质量3D内容生成，为虚拟世界构建提供有效工具。

authors_text: Klara Janouskova,Mattia Rigotti,Ioana Giurgiu,Cristiano Malossi
title: Model-Assisted Labeling via Explainability for Visual Inspection of Civil Infrastructures
title_zh: 通过可解释性进行模型辅助标记，用于民用基础设施的目视检查
abstract: Labeling images for visual segmentation is a time-consuming task which can be costly, particularly in application domains where labels have to be provided by specialized expert annotators, such as civil engineering. In this paper, we propose to use attribution methods to harness the valuable interactions between expert annotators and the data to be annotated in the case of defect segmentation for visual inspection of civil infrastructures. Concretely, a classifier is trained to detect defects and coupled with an attribution-based method and adversarial climbing to generate and refine segmentation masks corresponding to the classification outputs. These are used within an assisted labeling framework where the annotators can interact with them as proposal segmentation masks by deciding to accept, reject or modify them, and interactions are logged as weak labels to further refine the classifier. Applied on a real-world dataset resulting from the automated visual inspection of bridges, our proposed method is able to save more than 50\% of annotators' time when compared to manual annotation of defects.

These are used within an assisted labeling framework where the annotators can interact with them as proposal segmentation masks by deciding to accept, reject or modify them, and interactions are logged as weak labels to further refine the classifier. Applied on a real-world dataset resulting from the automated visual inspection of bridges, our proposed method is able to save more than 50\% of annotators' time when compared to manual annotation of defects.
abstract_zh: 为视觉分割标记图像是一项耗时且成本高昂的任务，特别是在土木工程等必须由专门的专家注释者提供标签的应用领域中。在本文中，我们建议在民用基础设施视觉检查缺陷分割的情况下，使用归因方法来利用专家注释者和要注释的数据之间的有价值的交互。具体来说，训练分类器来检测缺陷，并与基于归因的方法和对抗性攀爬相结合，以生成和细化与分类输出相对应的分割掩模。这些在辅助标记框架中使用，注释者可以通过决定接受、拒绝或修改它们作为提议分割掩码与它们进行交互，并且交互被记录为弱标签以进一步细化分类器。将我们提出的方法应用于桥梁自动目视检查产生的真实数据集，与缺陷的手动注释相比，能够节省注释者 50% 以上的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型可解释性的辅助标注方法，用于土木基础设施的视觉缺陷分割，以减少专家标注时间。
AI.motivation: 图像分割标注在土木工程领域耗时且依赖专家，手动标注成本高昂，需寻求自动化辅助方案。
AI.method: 训练缺陷分类器并结合归因方法与对抗爬山法生成分割掩码，专家交互修改后作为弱标签迭代优化模型。
AI.result: 在桥梁检测数据集上实现专家标注时间减少50%以上。
AI.conclusion: 模型解释性辅助标注框架显著提升缺陷分割效率，验证了人机协作在专业领域标注中的有效性。

authors_text: Timothy J Stavenger,Eleanor Crane,Kevin Smith,Christopher T Kang,Steven M Girvin,Nathan Wiebe
title: Bosonic Qiskit
title_zh: 玻色奇奇特
abstract: The practical benefits of hybrid quantum information processing hardware that contains continuous-variable objects (bosonic modes such as mechanical or electromagnetic oscillators) in addition to traditional (discrete-variable) qubits have recently been demonstrated by experiments with bosonic codes that reach the break-even point for quantum error correction and by efficient Gaussian boson sampling simulation of the Franck-Condon spectra of triatomic molecules that is well beyond the capabilities of current qubit-only hardware. The goal of this Co-design Center for Quantum Advantage (C2QA) project is to develop an instruction set architecture (ISA) for hybrid qubit/bosonic mode systems that contains an inventory of the fundamental operations and measurements that are possible in such hardware. The corresponding abstract machine model (AMM) would also contain a description of the appropriate error models associated with the gates, measurements and time evolution of the hardware. This information has been implemented as an extension of Qiskit. Qiskit is an opensource software development toolkit (SDK) for simulating the quantum state of a quantum circuit on a system with Python 3.7+ and for running the same circuits on prototype hardware within the IBM Quantum Lab. We introduce the Bosonic Qiskit software to enable the simulation of hybrid qubit/bosonic systems using the existing Qiskit software development kit. This implementation can be used for simulating new hybrid systems, verifying proposed physical systems, and modeling systems larger than can currently be constructed. We also cover tutorials and example use cases included within the software to study Jaynes- Cummings models, bosonic Hubbard models, plotting Wigner functions and animations, and calculating maximum likelihood estimations using Wigner functions.
summary: The practical benefits of hybrid quantum information processing hardware that contains continuous-variable objects (bosonic modes such as mechanical or electromagnetic oscillators) in addition to traditional (discrete-variable) qubits have recently been demonstrated by experiments with bosonic codes that reach the break-even point for quantum error correction and by efficient Gaussian boson sampling simulation of the Franck-Condon spectra of triatomic molecules that is well beyond the capabilities of current qubit-only hardware. The goal of this Co-design Center for Quantum Advantage (C2QA) project is to develop an instruction set architecture (ISA) for hybrid qubit/bosonic mode systems that contains an inventory of the fundamental operations and measurements that are possible in such hardware. The corresponding abstract machine model (AMM) would also contain a description of the appropriate error models associated with the gates, measurements and time evolution of the hardware. This information has been implemented as an extension of Qiskit. Qiskit is an opensource software development toolkit (SDK) for simulating the quantum state of a quantum circuit on a system with Python 3.7+ and for running the same circuits on prototype hardware within the IBM Quantum Lab. We introduce the Bosonic Qiskit software to enable the simulation of hybrid qubit/bosonic systems using the existing Qiskit software development kit. abstract_zh: 除了传统（离散变量）量子位之外，还包含连续变量对象（玻色子模式，例如机械或电磁振荡器）的混合量子信息处理硬件的实际优势最近已通过达到量子纠错盈亏平衡点的玻色子代码实验以及对三原子分子弗兰克-康登光谱的高效高斯玻色子采样模拟得到了证明，这远远超出了当前仅量子位硬件的能力。该量子优势联合设计中心 (C2QA) 项目的目标是为混合量子位/玻色子模式系统开发指令集架构 (ISA)，其中包含此类硬件中可能的基本操作和测量的清单。相应的抽象机器模型 (AMM) 还将包含与硬件的门、测量和时间演化相关的适当误差模型的描述。此信息已作为 Qiskit 的扩展实现。 Qiskit 是一个开源软件开发工具包 (SDK)，用于在使用 Python 3.7+ 的系统上模拟量子电路的量子态，并在 IBM 量子实验室内的原型硬件上运行相同的电路。我们推出了 Bosonic Qiskit 软件，可以使用现有的 Qiskit 软件开发套件来模拟混合量子位/玻色子系统。该实现可用于模拟新的混合系统、验证所提出的物理系统以及对大于当前可构建的系统进行建模。我们还介绍了软件中包含的教程和示例用例，用于研究 Jaynes-Cummings 模型、玻色哈伯德模型、绘制维格纳函数和动画，以及使用维格纳函数计算最大似然估计。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为混合量子比特/玻色子模式系统开发指令集架构（ISA）和抽象机器模型（AMM），并基于Qiskit扩展实现玻色子Qiskit软件以模拟混合系统。
AI.motivation: 现有量子硬件在量子纠错和复杂分子光谱模拟方面存在局限性，而玻色子模式（如机械或电磁振荡器）与传统量子比特结合的混合系统展现出突破性潜力，需开发相应工具支持其研究。
AI.method: 通过扩展Qiskit开源工具包，实现混合系统的ISA定义、错误模型描述及仿真功能，并集成Jaynes-Cummings模型、玻色子Hubbard模型等教程与Wigner函数分析工具。
AI.result: 成功开发玻色子Qiskit软件，支持混合系统仿真、物理方案验证及超大规模系统建模，并提供多种示例用例和可视化分析功能。
AI.conclusion: 玻色子Qiskit为混合量子系统研究提供了关键工具，推动量子计算向更复杂的物理实现和应用领域发展。

authors_text: Mingrui Yu,Kangchen Lv,Changhao Wang,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Xiang Li
title: A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Dual-Arm Manipulation of Deformable Linear Objects with Whole-Body Obstacle Avoidance
title_zh: 全身避障双臂操纵可变形线性物体的从粗到细的框架
abstract: Manipulating deformable linear objects (DLOs) to achieve desired shapes in constrained environments with obstacles is a meaningful but challenging task. Global planning is necessary for such a highly-constrained task; however, accurate models of DLOs required by planners are difficult to obtain owing to their deformable nature, and the inevitable modeling errors significantly affect the planning results, probably resulting in task failure if the robot simply executes the planned path in an open-loop manner. In this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework to combine global planning and local control for dual-arm manipulation of DLOs, capable of precisely achieving desired configurations and avoiding potential collisions between the DLO, robot, and obstacles. Specifically, the global planner refers to a simple yet effective DLO energy model and computes a coarse path to find a feasible solution efficiently; then the local controller follows that path as guidance and further shapes it with closed-loop feedback to compensate for the planning errors and improve the task accuracy. Both simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our framework can robustly achieve desired DLO configurations in constrained environments with imprecise DLO models, which may not be reliably achieved by only planning or control.
summary: Manipulating deformable linear objects (DLOs) to achieve desired shapes in constrained environments with obstacles is a meaningful but challenging task. Global planning is necessary for such a highly-constrained task; however, accurate models of DLOs required by planners are difficult to obtain owing to their deformable nature, and the inevitable modeling errors significantly affect the planning results, probably resulting in task failure if the robot simply executes the planned path in an open-loop manner. In this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework to combine global planning and local control for dual-arm manipulation of DLOs, capable of precisely achieving desired configurations and avoiding potential collisions between the DLO, robot, and obstacles. Specifically, the global planner refers to a simple yet effective DLO energy model and computes a coarse path to find a feasible solution efficiently; then the local controller follows that path as guidance and further shapes it with closed-loop feedback to compensate for the planning errors and improve the task accuracy. Both simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our framework can robustly achieve desired DLO configurations in constrained environments with imprecise DLO models, which may not be reliably achieved by only planning or control.
abstract_zh: 在有障碍物的受限环境中操纵可变形线性物体 (DLO) 以实现所需的形状是一项有意义但具有挑战性的任务。对于这样一项高度受限的任务，全局规划是必要的；然而，由于DLO的变形性质，规划者所需的准确模型很难获得，并且不可避免的建模误差会严重影响规划结果，如果机器人简单地以开环方式执行规划路径，可能会导致任务失败。在本文中，我们提出了一个从粗到精的框架，将全局规划和局部控制相结合，用于 DLO 双臂操纵，能够精确地实现所需的配置，并避免 DLO、机器人和障碍物之间的潜在碰撞。具体来说，全局规划器参考简单而有效的DLO能量模型并计算粗路径以高效地找到可行的解决方案；然后，本地控制器遵循该路径作为指导，并通过闭环反馈进一步塑造它，以补偿规划误差并提高任务准确性。模拟和现实实验都表明，我们的框架可以在具有不精确 DLO 模型的受限环境中稳健地实现所需的 DLO 配置，而仅通过规划或控制可能无法可靠地实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种粗到细的框架，用于在受限环境中实现双臂对可变形线性物体（DLO）的精确操作并避免碰撞。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理可变形线性物体时因模型误差和环境障碍物难以实现高精度操作，单独依赖全局规划或局部控制均存在局限性。
AI.method: 框架结合全局规划与局部控制：全局规划器基于简化的DLO能量模型生成粗略路径，局部控制器通过闭环反馈优化路径以补偿误差并提升精度。
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验表明，该框架能在模型不精确的情况下鲁棒地实现目标DLO构型，优于单独规划或控制的方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合全局规划与闭环反馈的分层控制策略，可有效应对DLO操作中的模型不确定性与环境约束挑战。

search_text: A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Dual-Arm Manipulation of Deformable Linear Objects with Whole-Body Obstacle Avoidance 全身避障双臂操纵可变形线性物体的从粗到细的框架 Manipulating deformable linear objects (DLOs) to achieve desired shapes in constrained environments with obstacles is a meaningful but challenging task. Global planning is necessary for such a highly-constrained task; however, accurate models of DLOs required by planners are difficult to obtain owing to their deformable nature, and the inevitable modeling errors significantly affect the planning results, probably resulting in task failure if the robot simply executes the planned path in an open-loop manner. In this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine framework to combine global planning and local control for dual-arm manipulation of DLOs, capable of precisely achieving desired configurations and avoiding potential collisions between the DLO, robot, and obstacles. Specifically, the global planner refers to a simple yet effective DLO energy model and computes a coarse path to find a feasible solution efficiently; then the local controller follows that path as guidance and further shapes it with closed-loop feedback to compensate for the planning errors and improve the task accuracy. Both simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our framework can robustly achieve desired DLO configurations in constrained environments with imprecise DLO models, which may not be reliably achieved by only planning or control. 在有障碍物的受限环境中操纵可变形线性物体 (DLO) 以实现所需的形状是一项有意义但具有挑战性的任务。对于这样一项高度受限的任务，全局规划是必要的；然而，由于DLO的变形性质，规划者所需的准确模型很难获得，并且不可避免的建模误差会严重影响规划结果，如果机器人简单地以开环方式执行规划路径，可能会导致任务失败。在本文中，我们提出了一个从粗到精的框架，将全局规划和局部控制相结合，用于 DLO 双臂操纵，能够精确地实现所需的配置，并避免 DLO、机器人和障碍物之间的潜在碰撞。具体来说，全局规划器参考简单而有效的DLO能量模型并计算粗路径以高效地找到可行的解决方案；然后，本地控制器遵循该路径作为指导，并通过闭环反馈进一步塑造它，以补偿规划误差并提高任务准确性。模拟和现实实验都表明，我们的框架可以在具有不精确 DLO 模型的受限环境中稳健地实现所需的 DLO 配置，而仅通过规划或控制可能无法可靠地实现这一点。 本文提出了一种粗到细的框架，用于在受限环境中实现双臂对可变形线性物体（DLO）的精确操作并避免碰撞。 Mingrui Yu,Kangchen Lv,Changhao Wang,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Xiang Li cs.RO

authors_text: Borja Ibarz,Vitaly Kurin,George Papamakarios,Kyriacos Nikiforou,Mehdi Bennani,Róbert Csordás,Andrew Dudzik,Matko Bošnjak,Alex Vitvitskyi,Yulia Rubanova,Andreea Deac,Beatrice Bevilacqua,Yaroslav Ganin,Charles Blundell,Petar Veličković
title: A Generalist Neural Algorithmic Learner
title_zh: 多面手神经算法学习者
comment: To appear at LoG 2022 (Spotlight talk). 23 pages, 11 figures
comments: To appear at LoG 2022 (Spotlight talk). 23 pages, 11 figures
abstract: The cornerstone of neural algorithmic reasoning is the ability to solve algorithmic tasks, especially in a way that generalises out of distribution. While recent years have seen a surge in methodological improvements in this area, they mostly focused on building specialist models. Specialist models are capable of learning to neurally execute either only one algorithm or a collection of algorithms with identical control-flow backbone. Here, instead, we focus on constructing a generalist neural algorithmic learner -- a single graph neural network processor capable of learning to execute a wide range of algorithms, such as sorting, searching, dynamic programming, path-finding and geometry. We leverage the CLRS benchmark to empirically show that, much like recent successes in the domain of perception, generalist algorithmic learners can be built by "incorporating" knowledge. That is, it is possible to effectively learn algorithms in a multi-task manner, so long as we can learn to execute them well in a single-task regime. Motivated by this, we present a series of improvements to the input representation, training regime and processor architecture over CLRS, improving average single-task performance by over 20% from prior art. We then conduct a thorough ablation of multi-task learners leveraging these improvements. Our results demonstrate a generalist learner that effectively incorporates knowledge captured by specialist models.
summary: The cornerstone of neural algorithmic reasoning is the ability to solve algorithmic tasks, especially in a way that generalises out of distribution. While recent years have seen a surge in methodological improvements in this area, they mostly focused on building specialist models. Specialist models are capable of learning to neurally execute either only one algorithm or a collection of algorithms with identical control-flow backbone. Here, instead, we focus on constructing a generalist neural algorithmic learner -- a single graph neural network processor capable of learning to execute a wide range of algorithms, such as sorting, searching, dynamic programming, path-finding and geometry. We leverage the CLRS benchmark to empirically show that, much like recent successes in the domain of perception, generalist algorithmic learners can be built by "incorporating" knowledge. That is, it is possible to effectively learn algorithms in a multi-task manner, so long as we can learn to execute them well in a single-task regime. Motivated by this, we present a series of improvements to the input representation, training regime and processor architecture over CLRS, improving average single-task performance by over 20% from prior art. We then conduct a thorough ablation of multi-task learners leveraging these improvements. Our results demonstrate a generalist learner that effectively incorporates knowledge captured by specialist models.
abstract_zh: 神经算法推理的基石是解决算法任务的能力，尤其是以分布外泛化的方式。尽管近年来该领域的方法改进激增，但它们主要集中在构建专业模型上。专业模型能够学习以神经方式执行仅一种算法或具有相同控制流主干的算法集合。相反，在这里，我们专注于构建一个通用神经算法学习器——一个能够学习执行各种算法的单一图神经网络处理器，例如排序、搜索、动态编程、路径查找和几何。我们利用 CLRS 基准来实证表明，就像感知领域最近取得的成功一样，通用算法学习器可以通过“合并”知识来构建。也就是说，只要我们能够学会在单任务状态下很好地执行算法，就可以以多任务方式有效地学习算法。受此启发，我们对 CLRS 的输入表示、训练机制和处理器架构进行了一系列改进，将平均单任务性能比现有技术提高了 20% 以上。然后，我们利用这些改进对多任务学习者进行彻底的消融。我们的结果表明，通才学习者可以有效地整合专业模型捕获的知识。

AI.tldr: 开发一种能够学习执行多种算法（如排序、搜索等）的通用神经算法学习器。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多专注于专用模型，而本文旨在构建能泛化多种算法的通用学习器，通过多任务学习整合知识以提升性能。
AI.method: 改进输入表示、训练策略及处理器架构，基于CLRS基准进行多任务学习与消融实验。
AI.result: 单任务性能提升超20%，验证了通用学习器有效整合专用模型知识的能力。
AI.conclusion: 通用神经算法学习器能有效整合专用模型知识，为多任务学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Qihong Yang,Yangtao Deng,Yu Yang,Qiaolin He,Shiquan Zhang
title: Neural Networks Based on Power Method and Inverse Power Method for Solving Linear Eigenvalue Problems
title_zh: 基于幂法和逆幂法的神经网络求解线性特征值问题
abstract: In this article, we propose two kinds of neural networks inspired by power method and inverse power method to solve linear eigenvalue problems. These neural networks share similar ideas with traditional methods, in which the differential operator is realized by automatic differentiation. The eigenfunction of the eigenvalue problem is learned by the neural network and the iterative algorithms are implemented by optimizing the specially defined loss function. The largest positive eigenvalue, smallest eigenvalue and interior eigenvalues with the given prior knowledge can be solved efficiently. We examine the applicability and accuracy of our methods in the numerical experiments in one dimension, two dimensions and higher dimensions. Numerical results show that accurate eigenvalue and eigenfunction approximations can be obtained by our methods.
summary: In this article, we propose two kinds of neural networks inspired by power method and inverse power method to solve linear eigenvalue problems. These neural networks share similar ideas with traditional methods, in which the differential operator is realized by automatic differentiation. The eigenfunction of the eigenvalue problem is learned by the neural network and the iterative algorithms are implemented by optimizing the specially defined loss function. The largest positive eigenvalue, smallest eigenvalue and interior eigenvalues with the given prior knowledge can be solved efficiently. We examine the applicability and accuracy of our methods in the numerical experiments in one dimension, two dimensions and higher dimensions. Numerical results show that accurate eigenvalue and eigenfunction approximations can be obtained by our methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了两种受幂法和逆幂法启发的神经网络来解决线性特征值问题。这些神经网络与传统方法具有相似的思想，其中微分算子是通过自动微分来实现的。特征值问题的特征函数由神经网络学习，并通过优化专门定义的损失函数来实现迭代算法。在给定先验知识的情况下，可以有效地求解最大正特征值、最小特征值和内部特征值。我们在一维、二维和更高维度的数值实验中检验了我们的方法的适用性和准确性。数值结果表明，我们的方法可以获得准确的特征值和特征函数近似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于幂法和逆幂法的神经网络方法，用于高效求解线性特征值问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法求解特征值问题存在计算复杂度高或收敛速度慢的局限，需探索更高效的计算范式。
AI.method: 设计受幂法/逆幂法启发的神经网络，通过自动微分实现微分算子，利用损失函数优化迭代求解特征函数与特征值。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，方法在1D/2D/高维空间中均可高效准确求解最大正特征值、最小特征值及已知先验的内部特征值。
AI.conclusion: 所提神经网络方法为特征值问题提供了新思路，兼具高效性与准确性，可拓展至其他数学问题求解。

tldr: 本文提出两种基于幂法和逆幂法的神经网络方法，用于高效求解线性特征值问题。
motivation: 传统数值方法求解特征值问题存在计算复杂度高或收敛速度慢的局限，需探索更高效的计算范式。
method: 设计受幂法/逆幂法启发的神经网络，通过自动微分实现微分算子，利用损失函数优化迭代求解特征函数与特征值。
result: 数值实验表明，方法在1D/2D/高维空间中均可高效准确求解最大正特征值、最小特征值及已知先验的内部特征值。
conclusion: 所提神经网络方法为特征值问题提供了新思路，兼具高效性与准确性，可拓展至其他数学问题求解。
search_text: Neural Networks Based on Power Method and Inverse Power Method for Solving Linear Eigenvalue Problems 基于幂法和逆幂法的神经网络求解线性特征值问题 In this article, we propose two kinds of neural networks inspired by power method and inverse power method to solve linear eigenvalue problems. These neural networks share similar ideas with traditional methods, in which the differential operator is realized by automatic differentiation. The eigenfunction of the eigenvalue problem is learned by the neural network and the iterative algorithms are implemented by optimizing the specially defined loss function. The largest positive eigenvalue, smallest eigenvalue and interior eigenvalues with the given prior knowledge can be solved efficiently. We examine the applicability and accuracy of our methods in the numerical experiments in one dimension, two dimensions and higher dimensions. Numerical results show that accurate eigenvalue and eigenfunction approximations can be obtained by our methods. 在本文中，我们提出了两种受幂法和逆幂法启发的神经网络来解决线性特征值问题。这些神经网络与传统方法具有相似的思想，其中微分算子是通过自动微分来实现的。特征值问题的特征函数由神经网络学习，并通过优化专门定义的损失函数来实现迭代算法。在给定先验知识的情况下，可以有效地求解最大正特征值、最小特征值和内部特征值。我们在一维、二维和更高维度的数值实验中检验了我们的方法的适用性和准确性。数值结果表明，我们的方法可以获得准确的特征值和特征函数近似。 本文提出两种基于幂法和逆幂法的神经网络方法，用于高效求解线性特征值问题。 Qihong Yang,Yangtao Deng,Yu Yang,Qiaolin He,Shiquan Zhang math.NA,cs.AI

authors_text: Rogerio Bonatti,Sai Vemprala,Shuang Ma,Felipe Frujeri,Shuhang Chen,Ashish Kapoor
title: PACT: Perception-Action Causal Transformer for Autoregressive Robotics Pre-Training
title_zh: PACT：用于自回归机器人预训练的感知-动作因果变压器
abstract: Robotics has long been a field riddled with complex systems architectures whose modules and connections, whether traditional or learning-based, require significant human expertise and prior knowledge. Inspired by large pre-trained language models, this work introduces a paradigm for pre-training a general purpose representation that can serve as a starting point for multiple tasks on a given robot. We present the Perception-Action Causal Transformer (PACT), a generative transformer-based architecture that aims to build representations directly from robot data in a self-supervised fashion. Through autoregressive prediction of states and actions over time, our model implicitly encodes dynamics and behaviors for a particular robot. Our experimental evaluation focuses on the domain of mobile agents, where we show that this robot-specific representation can function as a single starting point to achieve distinct tasks such as safe navigation, localization and mapping. We evaluate two form factors: a wheeled robot that uses a LiDAR sensor as perception input (MuSHR), and a simulated agent that uses first-person RGB images (Habitat). We show that finetuning small task-specific networks on top of the larger pretrained model results in significantly better performance compared to training a single model from scratch for all tasks simultaneously, and comparable performance to training a separate large model for each task independently. By sharing a common good-quality representation across tasks we can lower overall model capacity and speed up the real-time deployment of such systems.
summary: Robotics has long been a field riddled with complex systems architectures whose modules and connections, whether traditional or learning-based, require significant human expertise and prior knowledge. Inspired by large pre-trained language models, this work introduces a paradigm for pre-training a general purpose representation that can serve as a starting point for multiple tasks on a given robot. We present the Perception-Action Causal Transformer (PACT), a generative transformer-based architecture that aims to build representations directly from robot data in a self-supervised fashion. Through autoregressive prediction of states and actions over time, our model implicitly encodes dynamics and behaviors for a particular robot. Our experimental evaluation focuses on the domain of mobile agents, where we show that this robot-specific representation can function as a single starting point to achieve distinct tasks such as safe navigation, localization and mapping. We evaluate two form factors: a wheeled robot that uses a LiDAR sensor as perception input (MuSHR), and a simulated agent that uses first-person RGB images (Habitat). We show that finetuning small task-specific networks on top of the larger pretrained model results in significantly better performance compared to training a single model from scratch for all tasks simultaneously, and comparable performance to training a separate large model for each task independently. By sharing a common good-quality representation across tasks we can lower overall model capacity and speed up the real-time deployment of such systems.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术长期以来一直是一个充满复杂系统架构的领域，其模块和连接，无论是传统的还是基于学习的，都需要大量的人类专业知识和先验知识。受大型预训练语言模型的启发，这项工作引入了一种预训练通用表示的范例，该表示可以作为给定机器人上多项任务的起点。我们提出了感知-动作因果变换器（PACT），这是一种基于生成变换器的架构，旨在以自我监督的方式直接从机器人数据构建表示。通过随着时间的推移对状态和动作进行自回归预测，我们的模型隐式地编码了特定机器人的动态和行为。我们的实验评估侧重于移动代理领域，我们表明这种机器人特定的表示可以作为单一起点来实现不同的任务，例如安全导航、定位和地图绘制。我们评估两种外形：使用 LiDAR 传感器作为感知输入的轮式机器人 (MuSHR)，以及使用第一人称 RGB 图像的模拟代理 (Habitat)。我们表明，与同时为所有任务从头开始训练单个模型相比，在较大的预训练模型之上微调小型特定于任务的网络会带来显着更好的性能，并且与为每个任务独立训练单独的大型模型的性能相当。通过跨任务共享通用的高质量表示，我们可以降低整体模型容量并加快此类系统的实时部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PACT的自回归机器人预训练方法，通过感知-动作因果变换器构建通用表示，用于多种机器人任务。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人系统架构复杂且依赖大量人工先验知识，需开发通用预训练模型以降低任务特定模型的训练成本。
AI.method: 设计感知-动作因果变换器（PACT），通过自监督学习从机器人数据中预测状态和动作序列，生成跨任务的共享表示。
AI.result: 在移动机器人（MuSHR）和模拟环境（Habitat）中，微调预训练模型优于从零训练单一模型或独立训练任务模型。
AI.conclusion: 共享高质量表示可降低模型容量并加速实时部署，为多任务机器人学习提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhaoyuan Yang,Yewteck Tan,Shiraj Sen,Johan Reimann,John Karigiannis,Mohammed Yousefhussien,Nurali Virani
title: Uncertainty-aware Perception Models for Off-road Autonomous Unmanned Ground Vehicles
title_zh: 越野自主无人地面车辆的不确定性感知感知模型
abstract: Off-road autonomous unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs) are being developed for military and commercial use to deliver crucial supplies in remote locations, help with mapping and surveillance, and to assist war-fighters in contested environments. Due to complexity of the off-road environments and variability in terrain, lighting conditions, diurnal and seasonal changes, the models used to perceive the environment must handle a lot of input variability. Current datasets used to train perception models for off-road autonomous navigation lack of diversity in seasons, locations, semantic classes, as well as time of day. We test the hypothesis that model trained on a single dataset may not generalize to other off-road navigation datasets and new locations due to the input distribution drift. Additionally, we investigate how to combine multiple datasets to train a semantic segmentation-based environment perception model and we show that training the model to capture uncertainty could improve the model performance by a significant margin. We extend the Masksembles approach for uncertainty quantification to the semantic segmentation task and compare it with Monte Carlo Dropout and standard baselines. Finally, we test the approach against data collected from a UGV platform in a new testing environment. We show that the developed perception model with uncertainty quantification can be feasibly deployed on an UGV to support online perception and navigation tasks.
summary: Off-road autonomous unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs) are being developed for military and commercial use to deliver crucial supplies in remote locations, help with mapping and surveillance, and to assist war-fighters in contested environments. Due to complexity of the off-road environments and variability in terrain, lighting conditions, diurnal and seasonal changes, the models used to perceive the environment must handle a lot of input variability. Current datasets used to train perception models for off-road autonomous navigation lack of diversity in seasons, locations, semantic classes, as well as time of day. We test the hypothesis that model trained on a single dataset may not generalize to other off-road navigation datasets and new locations due to the input distribution drift. Additionally, we investigate how to combine multiple datasets to train a semantic segmentation-based environment perception model and we show that training the model to capture uncertainty could improve the model performance by a significant margin. We extend the Masksembles approach for uncertainty quantification to the semantic segmentation task and compare it with Monte Carlo Dropout and standard baselines. Finally, we test the approach against data collected from a UGV platform in a new testing environment. We show that the developed perception model with uncertainty quantification can be feasibly deployed on an UGV to support online perception and navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 越野自主无人地面车辆（UGV）正在开发用于军事和商业用途，以在偏远地区运送关键物资，帮助测绘和监视，并在有争议的环境中协助作战人员。由于越野环境的复杂性以及地形、照明条件、昼夜和季节变化的变化，用于感知环境的模型必须处理大量的输入变化。当前用于训练越野自主导航感知模型的数据集在季节、位置、语义类别以及一天中的时间方面缺乏多样性。我们测试了这样一个假设：由于输入分布漂移，在单个数据集上训练的模型可能无法推广到其他越野导航数据集和新位置。此外，我们研究了如何组合多个数据集来训练基于语义分割的环境感知模型，并且我们表明训练模型以捕获不确定性可以显着提高模型性能。我们将用于不确定性量化的 Masksembles 方法扩展到语义分割任务，并将其与蒙特卡罗 Dropout 和标准基线进行比较。最后，我们在新的测试环境中针对从 UGV 平台收集的数据测试该方法。我们表明，所开发的具有不确定性量化的感知模型可以可行地部署在 UGV 上，以支持在线感知和导航任务。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为非道路自主无人地面车辆开发具有不确定性感知能力的环境感知模型，以应对复杂多变的地形和光照条件。
AI.motivation: 现有非道路环境数据集缺乏季节、地点和光照条件的多样性，导致模型泛化能力不足，无法适应新环境的输入分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 结合多数据集训练语义分割模型，引入不确定性量化方法（扩展Masksembles框架），并与Monte Carlo Dropout等基线方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 实验表明不确定性感知模型在新测试环境中的性能显著提升，验证了其在实际UGV平台部署的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知模型能有效增强非道路环境下自主无人车辆的环境感知能力，为复杂场景下的导航任务提供可靠支持。

We extend the Masksembles approach for uncertainty quantification to the semantic segmentation task and compare it with Monte Carlo Dropout and standard baselines. Finally, we test the approach against data collected from a UGV platform in a new testing environment. We show that the developed perception model with uncertainty quantification can be feasibly deployed on an UGV to support online perception and navigation tasks. 越野自主无人地面车辆（UGV）正在开发用于军事和商业用途，以在偏远地区运送关键物资，帮助测绘和监视，并在有争议的环境中协助作战人员。由于越野环境的复杂性以及地形、照明条件、昼夜和季节变化的变化，用于感知环境的模型必须处理大量的输入变化。当前用于训练越野自主导航感知模型的数据集在季节、位置、语义类别以及一天中的时间方面缺乏多样性。我们测试了这样一个假设：由于输入分布漂移，在单个数据集上训练的模型可能无法推广到其他越野导航数据集和新位置。此外，我们研究了如何组合多个数据集来训练基于语义分割的环境感知模型，并且我们表明训练模型以捕获不确定性可以显着提高模型性能。我们将用于不确定性量化的 Masksembles 方法扩展到语义分割任务，并将其与蒙特卡罗 Dropout 和标准基线进行比较。最后，我们在新的测试环境中针对从 UGV 平台收集的数据测试该方法。我们表明，所开发的具有不确定性量化的感知模型可以可行地部署在 UGV 上，以支持在线感知和导航任务。 本文旨在为非道路自主无人地面车辆开发具有不确定性感知能力的环境感知模型，以应对复杂多变的地形和光照条件。 Zhaoyuan Yang,Yewteck Tan,Shiraj Sen,Johan Reimann,John Karigiannis,Mohammed Yousefhussien,Nurali Virani cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shubhankar Gupta,Suresh Sundaram
title: Decentralized Distributed Expert Assisted Learning (D2EAL) approach for cooperative target-tracking
title_zh: 用于协作目标跟踪的去中心化分布式专家辅助学习 (D2EAL) 方法
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of cooperative target tracking using a heterogeneous multi-robot system, where the robots are communicating over a dynamic communication network, and heterogeneity is in terms of different types of sensors and prediction algorithms installed in the robots. The problem is cast into a distributed learning framework, where robots are considered as 'agents' connected over a dynamic communication network. Their prediction algorithms are considered as 'experts' giving their look-ahead predictions of the target's trajectory. In this paper, a novel Decentralized Distributed Expert-Assisted Learning (D2EAL) algorithm is proposed, which improves the overall tracking performance by enabling each robot to improve its look-ahead prediction of the target's trajectory by its information sharing, and running a weighted information fusion process combined with online learning of weights based on a prediction loss metric. Theoretical analysis of D2EAL is carried out, which involves the analysis of worst-case bounds on cumulative prediction loss, and weights convergence analysis. Simulation studies show that in adverse scenarios involving large dynamic bias or drift in the expert predictions, D2EAL outperforms well-known covariance-based estimate/prediction fusion methods, both in terms of prediction performance and scalability.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of cooperative target tracking using a heterogeneous multi-robot system, where the robots are communicating over a dynamic communication network, and heterogeneity is in terms of different types of sensors and prediction algorithms installed in the robots. The problem is cast into a distributed learning framework, where robots are considered as 'agents' connected over a dynamic communication network. Their prediction algorithms are considered as 'experts' giving their look-ahead predictions of the target's trajectory. In this paper, a novel Decentralized Distributed Expert-Assisted Learning (D2EAL) algorithm is proposed, which improves the overall tracking performance by enabling each robot to improve its look-ahead prediction of the target's trajectory by its information sharing, and running a weighted information fusion process combined with online learning of weights based on a prediction loss metric. Theoretical analysis of D2EAL is carried out, which involves the analysis of worst-case bounds on cumulative prediction loss, and weights convergence analysis. Simulation studies show that in adverse scenarios involving large dynamic bias or drift in the expert predictions, D2EAL outperforms well-known covariance-based estimate/prediction fusion methods, both in terms of prediction performance and scalability.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了使用异构多机器人系统进行协作目标跟踪的问题，其中机器人通过动态通信网络进行通信，异构性是指机器人中安装的不同类型的传感器和预测算法。该问题被纳入分布式学习框架中，其中机器人被视为通过动态通信网络连接的“代理”。他们的预测算法被认为是“专家”，可以对目标轨迹进行前瞻预测。本文提出了一种新颖的去中心化分布式专家辅助学习（D2EAL）算法，该算法通过使每个机器人通过信息共享来改进其对目标轨迹的前瞻预测，并运行加权信息融合过程并结合基于预测损失度量的权重在线学习，从而提高整体跟踪性能。对D2EAL进行了理论分析，包括累积预测损失最坏情况界限分析和权重收敛分析。仿真研究表明，在专家预测中涉及较大动态偏差或漂移的不利场景中，D2EAL 在预测性能和可扩展性方面均优于众所周知的基于协方差的估计/预测融合方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去中心化的分布式专家辅助学习（D2EAL）算法，用于解决异构多机器人系统在动态通信网络下的协作目标跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 异构多机器人系统中，不同传感器和预测算法导致专家预测存在动态偏差或漂移，传统协方差融合方法在预测性能和扩展性上存在不足。
AI.method: 将机器人视为分布式学习框架中的代理，通过信息共享与加权融合结合在线学习权重（基于预测损失度量），优化目标轨迹预测。
AI.result: 仿真表明，D2EAL在存在大动态偏差或漂移的场景下，预测性能和扩展性均优于传统协方差融合方法。
AI.conclusion: D2EAL通过理论分析和仿真验证，在动态通信网络和专家预测偏差场景下展现出优越的跟踪性能与扩展性。

authors_text: Sherif Abdulatif,Ruizhe Cao,Bin Yang
title: CMGAN: Conformer-Based Metric-GAN for Monaural Speech Enhancement
title_zh: CMGAN：用于单耳语音增强的基于一致性的 Metric-GAN
comment: 17 pages, 11 figures, and 6 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.15149
comments: 17 pages, 11 figures, and 6 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.15149
abstract: In this work, we further develop the conformer-based metric generative adversarial network (CMGAN) model for speech enhancement (SE) in the time-frequency (TF) domain. This paper builds on our previous work but takes a more in-depth look by conducting extensive ablation studies on model inputs and architectural design choices. We rigorously tested the generalization ability of the model to unseen noise types and distortions. We have fortified our claims through DNS-MOS measurements and listening tests. Rather than focusing exclusively on the speech denoising task, we extend this work to address the dereverberation and super-resolution tasks. This necessitated exploring various architectural changes, specifically metric discriminator scores and masking techniques. It is essential to highlight that this is among the earliest works that attempted complex TF-domain super-resolution. Our findings show that CMGAN outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in the three major speech enhancement tasks: denoising, dereverberation, and super-resolution. For example, in the denoising task using the Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset, CMGAN notably exceeded the performance of prior models, attaining a PESQ score of 3.41 and an SSNR of 11.10 dB. Audio samples and CMGAN implementations are available online.
summary: In this work, we further develop the conformer-based metric generative adversarial network (CMGAN) model for speech enhancement (SE) in the time-frequency (TF) domain. This paper builds on our previous work but takes a more in-depth look by conducting extensive ablation studies on model inputs and architectural design choices. We rigorously tested the generalization ability of the model to unseen noise types and distortions. We have fortified our claims through DNS-MOS measurements and listening tests. Rather than focusing exclusively on the speech denoising task, we extend this work to address the dereverberation and super-resolution tasks. This necessitated exploring various architectural changes, specifically metric discriminator scores and masking techniques. It is essential to highlight that this is among the earliest works that attempted complex TF-domain super-resolution. Our findings show that CMGAN outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in the three major speech enhancement tasks: denoising, dereverberation, and super-resolution. For example, in the denoising task using the Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset, CMGAN notably exceeded the performance of prior models, attaining a PESQ score of 3.41 and an SSNR of 11.10 dB. Audio samples and CMGAN implementations are available online.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们进一步开发了基于一致性的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN）模型，用于时频（TF）域中的语音增强（SE）。本文以我们之前的工作为基础，但通过对模型输入和架构设计选择进行广泛的消融研究，进行了更深入的研究。我们严格测试了模型对未见噪声类型和失真的泛化能力。我们通过 DNS-MOS 测量和监听测试强化了我们的主张。我们不只专注于语音降噪任务，而是将这项工作扩展到解决去混响和超分辨率任务。这就需要探索各种架构变化，特别是度量鉴别器分数和屏蔽技术。必须强调的是，这是最早尝试复杂 TF 域超分辨率的作品之一。我们的研究结果表明，CMGAN 在三个主要语音增强任务中优于现有的最先进方法：去噪、去混响和超分辨率。例如，在使用 Voice Bank+DEMAND 数据集的去噪任务中，CMGAN 的性能明显超过了现有模型，达到了 3.41 的 PESQ 分数和 11.10 dB 的 SSNR。音频样本和 CMGAN 实现可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Conformer的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN），用于单声道语音增强，在时频域中解决降噪、去混响和超分辨率三大任务。
AI.motivation: 在前人研究基础上，通过深入的消融实验优化模型输入和架构设计，验证模型对未知噪声和失真的泛化能力，并扩展至更复杂的超分辨率任务。
AI.method: 采用Conformer架构构建度量生成对抗网络，结合度量判别器评分和掩码技术，通过DNS-MOS测试和听觉实验验证效果，并进行多任务扩展研究。
AI.result: CMGAN在Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集上达到PESQ 3.41和SSNR 11.10 dB，优于现有最优方法，在降噪、去混响和超分辨率任务中均表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: CMGAN通过架构创新和多任务扩展，显著提升了语音增强效果，尤其在时频域超分辨率领域具有开创性贡献。

Our findings show that CMGAN outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in the three major speech enhancement tasks: denoising, dereverberation, and super-resolution. For example, in the denoising task using the Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset, CMGAN notably exceeded the performance of prior models, attaining a PESQ score of 3.41 and an SSNR of 11.10 dB. Audio samples and CMGAN implementations are available online. 在这项工作中，我们进一步开发了基于一致性的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN）模型，用于时频（TF）域中的语音增强（SE）。本文以我们之前的工作为基础，但通过对模型输入和架构设计选择进行广泛的消融研究，进行了更深入的研究。我们严格测试了模型对未见噪声类型和失真的泛化能力。我们通过 DNS-MOS 测量和监听测试强化了我们的主张。我们不只专注于语音降噪任务，而是将这项工作扩展到解决去混响和超分辨率任务。这就需要探索各种架构变化，特别是度量鉴别器分数和屏蔽技术。必须强调的是，这是最早尝试复杂 TF 域超分辨率的作品之一。我们的研究结果表明，CMGAN 在三个主要语音增强任务中优于现有的最先进方法：去噪、去混响和超分辨率。例如，在使用 Voice Bank+DEMAND 数据集的去噪任务中，CMGAN 的性能明显超过了现有模型，达到了 3.41 的 PESQ 分数和 11.10 dB 的 SSNR。音频样本和 CMGAN 实现可在线获取。 本文提出基于Conformer的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN），用于单声道语音增强，在时频域中解决降噪、去混响和超分辨率三大任务。 Sherif Abdulatif,Ruizhe Cao,Bin Yang cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Evripidis Bampis,Bruno Escoffier,Michalis Xefteris
title: Canadian Traveller Problem with Predictions
title_zh: 加拿大旅行者的预测问题
abstract: In this work, we consider the $k$-Canadian Traveller Problem ($k$-CTP) under the learning-augmented framework proposed by Lykouris & Vassilvitskii. $k$-CTP is a generalization of the shortest path problem, and involves a traveller who knows the entire graph in advance and wishes to find the shortest route from a source vertex $s$ to a destination vertex $t$, but discovers online that some edges (up to $k$) are blocked once reaching them. A potentially imperfect predictor gives us the number and the locations of the blocked edges. We present a deterministic and a randomized online algorithm for the learning-augmented $k$-CTP that achieve a tradeoff between consistency (quality of the solution when the prediction is correct) and robustness (quality of the solution when there are errors in the prediction). Moreover, we prove a matching lower bound for the deterministic case establishing that the tradeoff between consistency and robustness is optimal, and show a lower bound for the randomized algorithm. Finally, we prove several deterministic and randomized lower bounds on the competitive ratio of $k$-CTP depending on the prediction error, and complement them, in most cases, with matching upper bounds.
summary: In this work, we consider the $k$-Canadian Traveller Problem ($k$-CTP) under the learning-augmented framework proposed by Lykouris & Vassilvitskii. $k$-CTP is a generalization of the shortest path problem, and involves a traveller who knows the entire graph in advance and wishes to find the shortest route from a source vertex $s$ to a destination vertex $t$, but discovers online that some edges (up to $k$) are blocked once reaching them. A potentially imperfect predictor gives us the number and the locations of the blocked edges. We present a deterministic and a randomized online algorithm for the learning-augmented $k$-CTP that achieve a tradeoff between consistency (quality of the solution when the prediction is correct) and robustness (quality of the solution when there are errors in the prediction). Moreover, we prove a matching lower bound for the deterministic case establishing that the tradeoff between consistency and robustness is optimal, and show a lower bound for the randomized algorithm. Finally, we prove several deterministic and randomized lower bounds on the competitive ratio of $k$-CTP depending on the prediction error, and complement them, in most cases, with matching upper bounds.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们在 Lykouris 和 Vassivitskii 提出的学习增强框架下考虑 $k$-加拿大旅行者问题 ($k$-CTP)。 $k$-CTP 是最短路径问题的推广，涉及一个预先知道整个图并希望找到从源顶点 $s$ 到目标顶点 $t$ 的最短路径的旅行者，但在网上发现一些边（最多 $k$）一旦到达它们就被阻塞。一个可能不完美的预测器为我们提供了被阻挡边缘的数量和位置。我们为学习增强 $k$-CTP 提出了一种确定性和随机在线算法，该算法实现了一致性（预测正确时解决方案的质量）和鲁棒性（预测存在错误时解决方案的质量）之间的权衡。此外，我们证明了确定性情况的匹配下界，确定一致性和鲁棒性之间的权衡是最佳的，并显示了随机算法的下界。最后，我们根据预测误差证明了 $k$-CTP 竞争比的几个确定性和随机下限，并在大多数情况下用匹配的上限来补充它们。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在预测辅助下的k-加拿大旅行者问题（k-CTP），设计在线算法平衡预测正确时的解质量（一致性）与预测错误时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 经典CTP问题在动态边阻塞场景下难以高效求解，而引入预测信息可提升算法性能，但需应对预测误差带来的风险，需权衡一致性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出确定性和随机化在线算法，结合预测的阻塞边信息，分析其一致性与鲁棒性的权衡，并证明算法下界及预测误差相关的竞争力下界。
AI.result: 设计出最优权衡一致性和鲁棒性的算法，证明确定性算法的下界匹配性，随机算法的下界及预测误差依赖的竞争力界，并在多数情况下给出上界匹配。
AI.conclusion: 本文为预测辅助的在线路径规划提供了理论框架，证明了算法性能的最优权衡，并为未来研究预测误差影响提供了基准分析。

authors_text: Yixiao Wang,Bingheng Wang,Shenning Zhang,Han Wei Sia,Lin Zhao
title: Learning Agile Flight Maneuvers: Deep SE(3) Motion Planning and Control for Quadrotors
title_zh: 学习敏捷飞行动作：四旋翼飞行器的深度 SE(3) 运动规划和控制
abstract: Agile flights of autonomous quadrotors in cluttered environments require constrained motion planning and control subject to translational and rotational dynamics. Traditional model-based methods typically demand complicated design and heavy computation. In this paper, we develop a novel deep reinforcement learning-based method that tackles the challenging task of flying through a dynamic narrow gate. We design a model predictive controller with its adaptive tracking references parameterized by a deep neural network (DNN). These references include the traversal time and the quadrotor SE(3) traversal pose that encourage the robot to fly through the gate with maximum safety margins from various initial conditions. To cope with the difficulty of training in highly dynamic environments, we develop a reinforce-imitate learning framework to train the DNN efficiently that generalizes well to diverse settings. Furthermore, we propose a binary search algorithm that allows online adaption of the SE(3) references to dynamic gates in real-time. Finally, through extensive high-fidelity simulations, we show that our approach is robust to the gate's velocity uncertainties and adaptive to different gate trajectories and orientations.
summary: Agile flights of autonomous quadrotors in cluttered environments require constrained motion planning and control subject to translational and rotational dynamics. Traditional model-based methods typically demand complicated design and heavy computation. In this paper, we develop a novel deep reinforcement learning-based method that tackles the challenging task of flying through a dynamic narrow gate. We design a model predictive controller with its adaptive tracking references parameterized by a deep neural network (DNN). These references include the traversal time and the quadrotor SE(3) traversal pose that encourage the robot to fly through the gate with maximum safety margins from various initial conditions. To cope with the difficulty of training in highly dynamic environments, we develop a reinforce-imitate learning framework to train the DNN efficiently that generalizes well to diverse settings. Furthermore, we propose a binary search algorithm that allows online adaption of the SE(3) references to dynamic gates in real-time. Finally, through extensive high-fidelity simulations, we show that our approach is robust to the gate's velocity uncertainties and adaptive to different gate trajectories and orientations.
abstract_zh: 自主四旋翼飞行器在杂乱环境中的敏捷飞行需要受平移和旋转动力学约束的运动规划和控制。传统的基于模型的方法通常需要复杂的设计和大量的计算。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的基于深度强化学习的方法，该方法可以解决飞过动态窄门的挑战性任务。我们设计了一个模型预测控制器，其自适应跟踪参考由深度神经网络（DNN）参数化。这些参考包括遍历时间和四旋翼 SE(3) 遍历姿势，鼓励机器人在各种初始条件下以最大安全裕度飞过大门。为了应对高度动态环境中的训练困难，我们开发了一个强化模仿学习框架来有效地训练 DNN，使其能够很好地推广到不同的环境。此外，我们提出了一种二分搜索算法，允许实时将 SE(3) 引用在线适应动态门。最后，通过广泛的高保真度模拟，我们表明我们的方法对于门的速度不确定性具有鲁棒性，并且能够适应不同的门轨迹和方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的四旋翼无人机敏捷飞行控制方法，解决动态狭窄环境中安全穿越门的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统模型方法设计复杂且计算量大，难以应对动态环境中的高精度运动规划与控制需求。
AI.method: 设计结合深度神经网络参数化参考轨迹的模型预测控制器，采用强化-模仿学习框架训练网络，并引入二分查找算法实现实时动态调整。
AI.result: 高保真仿真验证方法对门速度不确定性、不同轨迹和方向具有鲁棒性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端框架有效解决了动态环境下的敏捷飞行控制问题，为复杂场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Jack Saunders,Sajad Saeedi,Wenbin Li
title: Parallel Reinforcement Learning Simulation for Visual Quadrotor Navigation
title_zh: 视觉四旋翼导航的并行强化学习仿真
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) for possible publication
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is an agent-based approach for teaching robots to navigate within the physical world. Gathering data for RL is known to be a laborious task, and real-world experiments can be risky. Simulators facilitate the collection of training data in a quicker and more cost-effective manner. However, RL frequently requires a significant number of simulation steps for an agent to become skilful at simple tasks. This is a prevalent issue within the field of RL-based visual quadrotor navigation where state dimensions are typically very large and dynamic models are complex. Furthermore, rendering images and obtaining physical properties of the agent can be computationally expensive. To solve this, we present a simulation framework, built on AirSim, which provides efficient parallel training. Building on this framework, Ape-X is modified to incorporate decentralised training of AirSim environments to make use of numerous networked computers. Through experiments we were able to achieve a reduction in training time from 3.9 hours to 11 minutes using the aforementioned framework and a total of 74 agents and two networked computers. Further details including a github repo and videos about our project, PRL4AirSim, can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/prl4airsim/home
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is an agent-based approach for teaching robots to navigate within the physical world. Gathering data for RL is known to be a laborious task, and real-world experiments can be risky. Simulators facilitate the collection of training data in a quicker and more cost-effective manner. However, RL frequently requires a significant number of simulation steps for an agent to become skilful at simple tasks. This is a prevalent issue within the field of RL-based visual quadrotor navigation where state dimensions are typically very large and dynamic models are complex. Furthermore, rendering images and obtaining physical properties of the agent can be computationally expensive. To solve this, we present a simulation framework, built on AirSim, which provides efficient parallel training. Building on this framework, Ape-X is modified to incorporate decentralised training of AirSim environments to make use of numerous networked computers. Through experiments we were able to achieve a reduction in training time from 3.9 hours to 11 minutes using the aforementioned framework and a total of 74 agents and two networked computers. Further details including a github repo and videos about our project, PRL4AirSim, can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/prl4airsim/home
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 是一种基于代理的方法，用于教导机器人在物理世界中导航。众所周知，收集强化学习数据是一项艰巨的任务，而且现实世界的实验可能存在风险。模拟器有助于以更快且更具成本效益的方式收集训练数据。然而，强化学习通常需要大量的模拟步骤才能让智能体熟练地完成简单的任务。这是基于强化学习的视觉四旋翼飞行器导航领域中的一个普遍问题，其中状态维度通常非常大，动态模型也很复杂。此外，渲染图像和获取代理的物理属性在计算上可能会很昂贵。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个基于 AirSim 的模拟框架，它提供了高效的并行训练。在此框架的基础上，Ape-X 进行了修改，纳入了 AirSim 环境的分散式训练，以利用大量联网计算机。通过实验，我们使用上述框架以及总共 74 个代理和两台联网计算机，将训练时间从 3.9 小时减少到 11 分钟。更多详细信息，包括 github 存储库和有关我们项目 PRL4AirSim 的视频，请访问 https://sites.google.com/view/prl4airsim/home

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AirSim的并行强化学习框架PRL4AirSim，用于加速视觉四旋翼无人机导航的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在视觉四旋翼导航中面临训练效率低、计算成本高的问题，尤其在高维状态空间和复杂动态模型下，单机模拟难以满足需求。
AI.method: 基于AirSim构建并行模拟框架，结合改进的Ape-X算法实现多计算机网络的分布式训练，通过74个智能体并行交互降低训练时间。
AI.result: 实验将单机训练时间从3.9小时缩短至11分钟，验证了框架在多机协同下的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过并行化和分布式计算显著提升了视觉四旋翼导航的强化学习训练效率，为复杂机器人任务提供了可行的仿真解决方案。

authors_text: Zhuoxun Zheng,Baifan Zhou,Dongzhuoran Zhou,Gong Cheng,Ernesto Jiménez-Ruiz,Ahmet Soylu,Evgeny Kharlamo
title: Query-based Industrial Analytics over Knowledge Graphs with Ontology Reshaping
title_zh: 基于知识图谱重塑的基于查询的工业分析
abstract: Industrial analytics that includes among others equipment diagnosis and anomaly detection heavily relies on integration of heterogeneous production data. Knowledge Graphs (KGs) as the data format and ontologies as the unified data schemata are a prominent solution that offers high quality data integration and a convenient and standardised way to exchange data and to layer analytical applications over it. However, poor design of ontologies of high degree of mismatch between them and industrial data naturally lead to KGs of low quality that impede the adoption and scalability of industrial analytics. Indeed, such KGs substantially increase the training time of writing queries for users, consume high volume of storage for redundant information, and are hard to maintain and update. To address this problem we propose an ontology reshaping approach to transform ontologies into KG schemata that better reflect the underlying data and thus help to construct better KGs. In this poster we present a preliminary discussion of our on-going research, evaluate our approach with a rich set of SPARQL queries on real-world industry data at Bosch and discuss our findings.
summary: Industrial analytics that includes among others equipment diagnosis and anomaly detection heavily relies on integration of heterogeneous production data. Knowledge Graphs (KGs) as the data format and ontologies as the unified data schemata are a prominent solution that offers high quality data integration and a convenient and standardised way to exchange data and to layer analytical applications over it. However, poor design of ontologies of high degree of mismatch between them and industrial data naturally lead to KGs of low quality that impede the adoption and scalability of industrial analytics. Indeed, such KGs substantially increase the training time of writing queries for users, consume high volume of storage for redundant information, and are hard to maintain and update. To address this problem we propose an ontology reshaping approach to transform ontologies into KG schemata that better reflect the underlying data and thus help to construct better KGs. In this poster we present a preliminary discussion of our on-going research, evaluate our approach with a rich set of SPARQL queries on real-world industry data at Bosch and discuss our findings.
abstract_zh: 包括设备诊断和异常检测在内的工业分析在很大程度上依赖于异构生产数据的集成。知识图（KG）作为数据格式，本体作为统一的数据模式，是一种突出的解决方案，它提供高质量的数据集成以及一种方便且标准化的数据交换方式以及在其上分层分析应用程序的方式。然而，本体设计不当，与工业数据高度不匹配，自然会导致知识图谱质量低下，阻碍工业分析的采用和可扩展性。事实上，这样的知识图谱大大增加了用户编写查询的训练时间，消耗大量冗余信息的存储空间，并且难以维护和更新。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种本体重塑方法，将本体转换为知识图谱，更好地反映底层数据，从而有助于构建更好的知识图谱。在这张海报中，我们对我们正在进行的研究进行了初步讨论，通过对博世的真实行业数据进行丰富的 SPARQL 查询来评估我们的方法，并讨论我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种本体重塑方法，通过优化知识图谱（KG）结构解决工业分析中因本体设计缺陷导致的数据整合质量低问题。
AI.motivation: 现有本体与工业数据存在高度不匹配，导致生成的KG质量低下，增加查询训练时间、存储消耗并降低可维护性，阻碍工业分析应用。
AI.method: 设计本体重塑方法，将原始本体转换为更贴合底层工业数据特征的KG模式，提升数据表示的准确性和效率。
AI.result: 基于博世真实工业数据集的SPARQL查询实验验证了方法有效性，初步显示查询性能提升与存储优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 本体重塑显著改善KG质量，为工业分析提供高质量数据基础，后续将深化方法优化与应用场景扩展。

authors_text: Tobias Schräder,Robert Graubohm,Nayel Fabian Salem,Markus Maurer
title: Designing an Automated Vehicle: Strategies for Handling Tasks of a Previously Required Accompanying Person
title_zh: 设计自动驾驶汽车：处理先前需要的陪同人员的任务的策略
abstract: When using a conventional passenger car, several groups of people are reliant on the assistance of an accompanying person, for example when getting in and out of the car. For the independent use of an automatically driving vehicle by those groups, the absence of a previously required accompanying person needs to be compensated. During the design process of an autonomous family vehicle, we found that a low-barrier vehicle design can only partly contribute to the compensation for the absence of a required human companion. In this paper, we present four strategies we identified for handling the tasks of a previously required accompanying individual. The presented top-down approach supports developers in identifying unresolved problems, in finding, structuring, and selecting solutions as well as in uncovering upcoming problems at an early stage in the development of novel concepts for driverless vehicles. As an example, we consider the hypothetical exit of persons in need of assistance. The application of the four strategies in this example demonstrates the far-reaching impact of consistently considering users in need of support in the development of automated vehicles.
summary: When using a conventional passenger car, several groups of people are reliant on the assistance of an accompanying person, for example when getting in and out of the car. For the independent use of an automatically driving vehicle by those groups, the absence of a previously required accompanying person needs to be compensated. During the design process of an autonomous family vehicle, we found that a low-barrier vehicle design can only partly contribute to the compensation for the absence of a required human companion. In this paper, we present four strategies we identified for handling the tasks of a previously required accompanying individual. The presented top-down approach supports developers in identifying unresolved problems, in finding, structuring, and selecting solutions as well as in uncovering upcoming problems at an early stage in the development of novel concepts for driverless vehicles. As an example, we consider the hypothetical exit of persons in need of assistance. The application of the four strategies in this example demonstrates the far-reaching impact of consistently considering users in need of support in the development of automated vehicles.
abstract_zh: 当使用传统客车时，几组人需要依赖陪同人员的帮助，例如进出汽车时。对于这些群体独立使用自动驾驶车辆，如果没有之前需要的陪同人员，则需要进行补偿。在自动家庭车辆的设计过程中，我们发现低障碍车辆设计只能部分补偿缺少所需人类陪伴的情况。在本文中，我们提出了四种策略，用于处理先前需要的陪同人员的任务。所提出的自上而下的方法支持开发人员识别未解决的问题，寻找、构建和选择解决方案，以及在无人驾驶汽车新概念开发的早期阶段发现即将出现的问题。例如，我们假设需要援助的人离开。此示例中四种策略的应用表明，在自动驾驶汽车的开发中持续考虑需要支持的用户会产生深远的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为自动驾驶车辆设计提供策略，以补偿传统车辆中所需陪同人员的缺失，确保特定群体的独立使用。
AI.motivation: 传统车辆中部分人群依赖陪同人员完成上下车等任务，而自动驾驶车辆需通过设计策略替代人工陪同，提升无障碍使用体验。
AI.method: 采用自上而下的方法，通过识别未解决问题、结构化解决方案并早期发现潜在问题，提出四类处理陪同人员任务的策略，并以辅助人员下车为例进行验证。
AI.result: 四类策略的应用展示了在自动驾驶车辆开发中系统性考虑用户需求的深远影响，为开发者提供可操作的解决方案框架。
AI.conclusion: 在自动驾驶车辆设计中，需从早期阶段系统性考虑用户支持需求，通过策略性设计弥补陪同人员缺失，确保包容性与实用性。

search_text: Designing an Automated Vehicle: Strategies for Handling Tasks of a Previously Required Accompanying Person 设计自动驾驶汽车：处理先前需要的陪同人员的任务的策略 When using a conventional passenger car, several groups of people are reliant on the assistance of an accompanying person, for example when getting in and out of the car. For the independent use of an automatically driving vehicle by those groups, the absence of a previously required accompanying person needs to be compensated. During the design process of an autonomous family vehicle, we found that a low-barrier vehicle design can only partly contribute to the compensation for the absence of a required human companion. In this paper, we present four strategies we identified for handling the tasks of a previously required accompanying individual. The presented top-down approach supports developers in identifying unresolved problems, in finding, structuring, and selecting solutions as well as in uncovering upcoming problems at an early stage in the development of novel concepts for driverless vehicles. As an example, we consider the hypothetical exit of persons in need of assistance. The application of the four strategies in this example demonstrates the far-reaching impact of consistently considering users in need of support in the development of automated vehicles. 当使用传统客车时，几组人需要依赖陪同人员的帮助，例如进出汽车时。对于这些群体独立使用自动驾驶车辆，如果没有之前需要的陪同人员，则需要进行补偿。在自动家庭车辆的设计过程中，我们发现低障碍车辆设计只能部分补偿缺少所需人类陪伴的情况。在本文中，我们提出了四种策略，用于处理先前需要的陪同人员的任务。所提出的自上而下的方法支持开发人员识别未解决的问题，寻找、构建和选择解决方案，以及在无人驾驶汽车新概念开发的早期阶段发现即将出现的问题。例如，我们假设需要援助的人离开。此示例中四种策略的应用表明，在自动驾驶汽车的开发中持续考虑需要支持的用户会产生深远的影响。 本文旨在为自动驾驶车辆设计提供策略，以补偿传统车辆中所需陪同人员的缺失，确保特定群体的独立使用。 Tobias Schräder,Robert Graubohm,Nayel Fabian Salem,Markus Maurer cs.HC

authors_text: Benjamin David Evans,Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Herman A. Engelbrecht,Rahul Mangharam,Hendrik W. Jordaan
title: Bypassing the Simulation-to-reality Gap: Online Reinforcement Learning using a Supervisor
title_zh: 绕过模拟与现实的差距：使用主管进行在线强化学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is a promising method to learn control policies for robots only from demonstration and experience. To cover the whole dynamic behaviour of the robot, DRL training is an active exploration process typically performed in simulation environments. Although this simulation training is cheap and fast, applying DRL algorithms to real-world settings is difficult. If agents are trained until they perform safely in simulation, transferring them to physical systems is difficult due to the sim-to-real gap caused by the difference between the simulation dynamics and the physical robot. In this paper, we present a method of online training a DRL agent to drive autonomously on a physical vehicle by using a model-based safety supervisor. Our solution uses a supervisory system to check if the action selected by the agent is safe or unsafe and ensure that a safe action is always implemented on the vehicle. With this, we can bypass the sim-to-real problem while training the DRL algorithm safely, quickly, and efficiently. We compare our method with conventional learning in simulation and on a physical vehicle. We provide a variety of real-world experiments where we train online a small-scale vehicle to drive autonomously with no prior simulation training. The evaluation results show that our method trains agents with improved sample efficiency while never crashing, and the trained agents demonstrate better driving performance than those trained in simulation.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is a promising method to learn control policies for robots only from demonstration and experience. To cover the whole dynamic behaviour of the robot, DRL training is an active exploration process typically performed in simulation environments. Although this simulation training is cheap and fast, applying DRL algorithms to real-world settings is difficult. If agents are trained until they perform safely in simulation, transferring them to physical systems is difficult due to the sim-to-real gap caused by the difference between the simulation dynamics and the physical robot. In this paper, we present a method of online training a DRL agent to drive autonomously on a physical vehicle by using a model-based safety supervisor. Our solution uses a supervisory system to check if the action selected by the agent is safe or unsafe and ensure that a safe action is always implemented on the vehicle. With this, we can bypass the sim-to-real problem while training the DRL algorithm safely, quickly, and efficiently. We compare our method with conventional learning in simulation and on a physical vehicle. We provide a variety of real-world experiments where we train online a small-scale vehicle to drive autonomously with no prior simulation training. The evaluation results show that our method trains agents with improved sample efficiency while never crashing, and the trained agents demonstrate better driving performance than those trained in simulation.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）是一种仅从演示和经验中学习机器人控制策略的有前途的方法。为了覆盖机器人的整个动态行为，DRL 训练是一个通常在模拟环境中执行的主动探索过程。尽管这种模拟训练成本低且速度快，但将 DRL 算法应用到现实环境中却很困难。如果对代理进行训练直到它们在模拟中安全执行，那么将它们转移到物理系统是很困难的，因为模拟动力学与物理机器人之间的差异导致了模拟与真实的差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于模型的安全监控器在线训练 DRL 代理在实体车辆上自动驾驶的方法。我们的解决方案使用监控系统来检查代理选择的操作是否安全或不安全，并确保始终在车辆上执行安全操作。这样，我们就可以绕过模拟到真实的问题，同时安全、快速、高效地训练 DRL 算法。我们将我们的方法与模拟和物理车辆上的传统学习进行比较。我们提供各种真实世界的实验，在线训练小型车辆自动驾驶，无需事先进行模拟训练。评估结果表明，我们的方法训练的智能体具有提高的样本效率，同时不会发生崩溃，并且训练后的智能体比模拟中训练的智能体表现出更好的驾驶性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线强化学习方法，通过使用基于模型的安全监督器，使深度强化学习代理能够在物理车辆上自主驾驶，无需预先进行仿真训练。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在仿真环境中训练高效，但将训练好的智能体部署到真实物理系统时面临仿真到现实的差距问题，导致安全性和性能下降。
AI.method: 设计基于模型的安全监督系统，实时检查智能体选择的动作是否安全，仅执行安全动作，从而在真实物理环境中直接进行在线训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需仿真预训练的情况下，提升了样本效率，训练过程中无碰撞，且实际驾驶性能优于仿真训练的智能体。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入安全监督器，本文方法有效弥合了仿真与现实的差距，为真实物理系统中的在线强化学习提供了安全高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Dongzhuoran Zhou,Baifan Zhou,Jieying Chen,Gong Cheng,Egor V. Kostylev,Evgeny Kharlamov
title: Towards Ontology Reshaping for KG Generation with User-in-the-Loop: Applied to Bosch Welding
title_zh: 通过用户在环实现知识图谱生成的本体重塑：应用于博世焊接
abstract: Knowledge graphs (KG) are used in a wide range of applications. The automation of KG generation is very desired due to the data volume and variety in industries. One important approach of KG generation is to map the raw data to a given KG schema, namely a domain ontology, and construct the entities and properties according to the ontology. However, the automatic generation of such ontology is demanding and existing solutions are often not satisfactory. An important challenge is a trade-off between two principles of ontology engineering: knowledge-orientation and data-orientation. The former one prescribes that an ontology should model the general knowledge of a domain, while the latter one emphasises on reflecting the data specificities to ensure good usability. We address this challenge by our method of ontology reshaping, which automates the process of converting a given domain ontology to a smaller ontology that serves as the KG schema. The domain ontology can be designed to be knowledge-oriented and the KG schema covers the data specificities. In addition, our approach allows the option of including user preferences in the loop. We demonstrate our on-going research on ontology reshaping and present an evaluation using real industrial data, with promising results.
summary: Knowledge graphs (KG) are used in a wide range of applications. The automation of KG generation is very desired due to the data volume and variety in industries. One important approach of KG generation is to map the raw data to a given KG schema, namely a domain ontology, and construct the entities and properties according to the ontology. However, the automatic generation of such ontology is demanding and existing solutions are often not satisfactory. An important challenge is a trade-off between two principles of ontology engineering: knowledge-orientation and data-orientation. The former one prescribes that an ontology should model the general knowledge of a domain, while the latter one emphasises on reflecting the data specificities to ensure good usability. We address this challenge by our method of ontology reshaping, which automates the process of converting a given domain ontology to a smaller ontology that serves as the KG schema. The domain ontology can be designed to be knowledge-oriented and the KG schema covers the data specificities. In addition, our approach allows the option of including user preferences in the loop. We demonstrate our on-going research on ontology reshaping and present an evaluation using real industrial data, with promising results.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）有着广泛的应用。由于行业数据量大、种类繁多，知识图谱生成的自动化是非常需要的。知识图谱生成的一个重要方法是将原始数据映射到给定的知识图谱模式，即领域本体，并根据本体构造实体和属性。然而，这种本体的自动生成要求很高，现有的解决方案往往不能令人满意。一个重要的挑战是本体工程的两个原则之间的权衡：面向知识和面向数据。前者规定本体应该对某个领域的一般知识进行建模，而后者则强调反映数据的特殊性以确保良好的可用性。我们通过本体重塑方法解决了这一挑战，该方法自动将给定领域本体转换为用作知识图谱模式的较小本体的过程。领域本体可以设计为面向知识的，KG模式涵盖了数据的特殊性。此外，我们的方法允许选择在循环中包含用户偏好。我们展示了我们正在进行的本体重塑研究，并使用真实的工业数据进行了评估，取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用户参与的本体重塑方法，用于工业知识图谱生成，解决领域本体与数据特异性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱生成方法难以平衡本体的知识导向性与数据导向性，导致工业场景中本体设计效率低下且实用性不足。
AI.method: 通过自动化将领域本体转换为适配数据特性的简化KG模式，并引入用户偏好反馈机制优化本体结构。
AI.result: 在博世焊接工业数据上的实验验证表明，该方法能有效生成符合实际需求的KG模式，展现出良好应用前景。
AI.conclusion: 本体重塑方法为工业知识图谱生成提供了兼顾领域知识与数据特性的解决方案，用户参与机制进一步提升了实用性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本体重塑方法为工业知识图谱生成提供了兼顾领域知识与数据特性的解决方案，用户参与机制进一步提升了实用性。

tldr: 本文提出一种用户参与的本体重塑方法，用于工业知识图谱生成，解决领域本体与数据特异性之间的权衡问题。
motivation: 现有知识图谱生成方法难以平衡本体的知识导向性与数据导向性，导致工业场景中本体设计效率低下且实用性不足。
method: 通过自动化将领域本体转换为适配数据特性的简化KG模式，并引入用户偏好反馈机制优化本体结构。
result: 在博世焊接工业数据上的实验验证表明，该方法能有效生成符合实际需求的KG模式，展现出良好应用前景。
conclusion: 本体重塑方法为工业知识图谱生成提供了兼顾领域知识与数据特性的解决方案，用户参与机制进一步提升了实用性。
search_text: Towards Ontology Reshaping for KG Generation with User-in-the-Loop: Applied to Bosch Welding 通过用户在环实现知识图谱生成的本体重塑：应用于博世焊接 Knowledge graphs (KG) are used in a wide range of applications. The automation of KG generation is very desired due to the data volume and variety in industries. One important approach of KG generation is to map the raw data to a given KG schema, namely a domain ontology, and construct the entities and properties according to the ontology. However, the automatic generation of such ontology is demanding and existing solutions are often not satisfactory. An important challenge is a trade-off between two principles of ontology engineering: knowledge-orientation and data-orientation. The former one prescribes that an ontology should model the general knowledge of a domain, while the latter one emphasises on reflecting the data specificities to ensure good usability. We address this challenge by our method of ontology reshaping, which automates the process of converting a given domain ontology to a smaller ontology that serves as the KG schema. The domain ontology can be designed to be knowledge-oriented and the KG schema covers the data specificities. In addition, our approach allows the option of including user preferences in the loop. We demonstrate our on-going research on ontology reshaping and present an evaluation using real industrial data, with promising results. 知识图（KG）有着广泛的应用。由于行业数据量大、种类繁多，知识图谱生成的自动化是非常需要的。知识图谱生成的一个重要方法是将原始数据映射到给定的知识图谱模式，即领域本体，并根据本体构造实体和属性。然而，这种本体的自动生成要求很高，现有的解决方案往往不能令人满意。一个重要的挑战是本体工程的两个原则之间的权衡：面向知识和面向数据。前者规定本体应该对某个领域的一般知识进行建模，而后者则强调反映数据的特殊性以确保良好的可用性。我们通过本体重塑方法解决了这一挑战，该方法自动将给定领域本体转换为用作知识图谱模式的较小本体的过程。领域本体可以设计为面向知识的，KG模式涵盖了数据的特殊性。此外，我们的方法允许选择在循环中包含用户偏好。我们展示了我们正在进行的本体重塑研究，并使用真实的工业数据进行了评估，取得了有希望的结果。 本文提出一种用户参与的本体重塑方法，用于工业知识图谱生成，解决领域本体与数据特异性之间的权衡问题。 Dongzhuoran Zhou,Baifan Zhou,Jieying Chen,Gong Cheng,Egor V. Kostylev,Evgeny Kharlamov cs.AI

authors_text: Alaa Maalouf,Yotam Gurfinkel,Barak Diker,Oren Gal,Daniela Rus,Dan Feldman
title: Deep Learning on Home Drone: Searching for the Optimal Architecture
title_zh: 家用无人机深度学习：寻找最佳架构
abstract: We suggest the first system that runs real-time semantic segmentation via deep learning on a weak micro-computer such as the Raspberry Pi Zero v2 (whose price was \$15) attached to a toy-drone. In particular, since the Raspberry Pi weighs less than $16$ grams, and its size is half of a credit card, we could easily attach it to the common commercial DJI Tello toy-drone (<\$100, <90 grams, 98 $\times$ 92.5 $\times$ 41 mm). The result is an autonomous drone (no laptop nor human in the loop) that can detect and classify objects in real-time from a video stream of an on-board monocular RGB camera (no GPS or LIDAR sensors). The companion videos demonstrate how this Tello drone scans the lab for people (e.g. for the use of firefighters or security forces) and for an empty parking slot outside the lab. Existing deep learning solutions are either much too slow for real-time computation on such IoT devices, or provide results of impractical quality. Our main challenge was to design a system that takes the best of all worlds among numerous combinations of networks, deep learning platforms/frameworks, compression techniques, and compression ratios. To this end, we provide an efficient searching algorithm that aims to find the optimal combination which results in the best tradeoff between the network running time and its accuracy/performance.
summary: We suggest the first system that runs real-time semantic segmentation via deep learning on a weak micro-computer such as the Raspberry Pi Zero v2 (whose price was \$15) attached to a toy-drone. In particular, since the Raspberry Pi weighs less than $16$ grams, and its size is half of a credit card, we could easily attach it to the common commercial DJI Tello toy-drone (<\$100, <90 grams, 98 $\times$ 92.5 $\times$ 41 mm). The result is an autonomous drone (no laptop nor human in the loop) that can detect and classify objects in real-time from a video stream of an on-board monocular RGB camera (no GPS or LIDAR sensors). The companion videos demonstrate how this Tello drone scans the lab for people (e.g. for the use of firefighters or security forces) and for an empty parking slot outside the lab. Existing deep learning solutions are either much too slow for real-time computation on such IoT devices, or provide results of impractical quality. Our main challenge was to design a system that takes the best of all worlds among numerous combinations of networks, deep learning platforms/frameworks, compression techniques, and compression ratios. To this end, we provide an efficient searching algorithm that aims to find the optimal combination which results in the best tradeoff between the network running time and its accuracy/performance.
abstract_zh: 我们建议第一个系统通过深度学习在弱微型计算机上运行实时语义分割，例如连接到玩具无人机的 Raspberry Pi Zero v2（价格为 15 美元）。特别是，由于 Raspberry Pi 的重量不到 16 美元克，大小只有信用卡的一半，因此我们可以轻松地将其连接到常见的商用 DJI Tello 玩具无人机（<\$100，<90 克，98 $\times$ 92.5 $\times$ 41 毫米）。结果是一架自主无人机（没有笔记本电脑，也没有人在环路中）可以从机载单目 RGB 摄像头（没有 GPS 或 LIDAR 传感器）的视频流中实时检测和分类物体。配套视频演示了这款 Tello 无人机如何扫描实验室中的人员（例如消防员或安全部队）以及实验室外的空停车位。现有的深度学习解决方案对于此类物联网设备上的实时计算来说要么太慢，要么提供的结果质量不切实际。我们的主要挑战是设计一个系统，在网络、深度学习平台/框架、压缩技术和压缩比的众多组合中发挥最好的作用。为此，我们提供了一种有效的搜索算法，旨在找到最佳组合，从而在网络运行时间与其准确性/性能之间实现最佳权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在低成本微型计算机（如树莓派Zero v2）上运行实时语义分割的系统，用于搭载玩具无人机进行自主物体检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方案在物联网设备上计算速度过慢或结果质量不实用，需设计兼顾运行速度与精度的最优系统。
AI.method: 开发高效搜索算法，综合评估多种网络架构、框架、压缩技术及压缩比，寻找最佳组合以平衡运行时间与性能。
AI.result: 成功实现无需GPS/LIDAR的自主无人机，可实时检测实验室人员及室外空停车位，验证了系统在轻量设备上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统在物联网设备上实现了深度学习模型运行速度与精度的最优权衡，为安防、消防等场景提供实用解决方案。
