authors_text: Sina Alisamir,Fabien Ringeval,Francois Portet
title: Cross-domain Voice Activity Detection with Self-Supervised Representations
title_zh: 具有自我监督表示的跨域语音活动检测
abstract: Voice Activity Detection (VAD) aims at detecting speech segments on an audio signal, which is a necessary first step for many today's speech based applications. Current state-of-the-art methods focus on training a neural network exploiting features directly contained in the acoustics, such as Mel Filter Banks (MFBs). Such methods therefore require an extra normalisation step to adapt to a new domain where the acoustics is impacted, which can be simply due to a change of speaker, microphone, or environment. In addition, this normalisation step is usually a rather rudimentary method that has certain limitations, such as being highly susceptible to the amount of data available for the new domain. Here, we exploited the crowd-sourced Common Voice (CV) corpus to show that representations based on Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) can adapt well to different domains, because they are computed with contextualised representations of speech across multiple domains. SSL representations also achieve better results than systems based on hand-crafted representations (MFBs), and off-the-shelf VADs, with significant improvement in cross-domain settings.
summary: Voice Activity Detection (VAD) aims at detecting speech segments on an audio signal, which is a necessary first step for many today's speech based applications. Current state-of-the-art methods focus on training a neural network exploiting features directly contained in the acoustics, such as Mel Filter Banks (MFBs). Such methods therefore require an extra normalisation step to adapt to a new domain where the acoustics is impacted, which can be simply due to a change of speaker, microphone, or environment. In addition, this normalisation step is usually a rather rudimentary method that has certain limitations, such as being highly susceptible to the amount of data available for the new domain. Here, we exploited the crowd-sourced Common Voice (CV) corpus to show that representations based on Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) can adapt well to different domains, because they are computed with contextualised representations of speech across multiple domains. SSL representations also achieve better results than systems based on hand-crafted representations (MFBs), and off-the-shelf VADs, with significant improvement in cross-domain settings.
abstract_zh: 语音活动检测 (VAD) 旨在检测音频信号上的语音片段，这是当今许多基于语音的应用程序必需的第一步。当前最先进的方法侧重于利用直接包含在声学中的特征来训练神经网络，例如梅尔滤波器组（MFB）。因此，此类方法需要额外的归一化步骤来适应声学受到影响的新领域，这可能仅仅是由于扬声器、麦克风或环境的变化所致。此外，这种标准化步骤通常是一种相当基本的方法，具有一定的局限性，例如非常容易受到新域可用数据量的影响。在这里，我们利用众包的通用语音 (CV) 语料库来证明基于自监督学习 (SSL) 的表示可以很好地适应不同的领域，因为它们是通过跨多个领域的语音的上下文表示来计算的。 SSL 表示还比基于手工制作的表示 (MFB) 和现成的 VAD 的系统取得了更好的结果，并且在跨域设置方面显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用自监督学习表示进行跨领域语音活动检测（VAD）的方法，以提升不同声学环境下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VAD方法依赖手工设计的声学特征（如MFB），需额外归一化步骤适应新领域，但该步骤效果有限且依赖数据量。
AI.method: 基于Common Voice数据集，采用自监督学习提取跨领域上下文语音表示，替代传统手工特征进行VAD建模。
AI.result: 自监督表示在跨领域场景下显著优于手工特征（MFB）和现成VAD系统，验证了其领域适应性优势。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习表示能有效提升跨领域VAD性能，减少对领域特定归一化的依赖，为实际应用提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

In addition, this normalisation step is usually a rather rudimentary method that has certain limitations, such as being highly susceptible to the amount of data available for the new domain. Here, we exploited the crowd-sourced Common Voice (CV) corpus to show that representations based on Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) can adapt well to different domains, because they are computed with contextualised representations of speech across multiple domains. SSL representations also achieve better results than systems based on hand-crafted representations (MFBs), and off-the-shelf VADs, with significant improvement in cross-domain settings. 语音活动检测 (VAD) 旨在检测音频信号上的语音片段，这是当今许多基于语音的应用程序必需的第一步。当前最先进的方法侧重于利用直接包含在声学中的特征来训练神经网络，例如梅尔滤波器组（MFB）。因此，此类方法需要额外的归一化步骤来适应声学受到影响的新领域，这可能仅仅是由于扬声器、麦克风或环境的变化所致。此外，这种标准化步骤通常是一种相当基本的方法，具有一定的局限性，例如非常容易受到新域可用数据量的影响。在这里，我们利用众包的通用语音 (CV) 语料库来证明基于自监督学习 (SSL) 的表示可以很好地适应不同的领域，因为它们是通过跨多个领域的语音的上下文表示来计算的。 SSL 表示还比基于手工制作的表示 (MFB) 和现成的 VAD 的系统取得了更好的结果，并且在跨域设置方面显着改进。 本文研究了利用自监督学习表示进行跨领域语音活动检测（VAD）的方法，以提升不同声学环境下的检测性能。 Sina Alisamir,Fabien Ringeval,Francois Portet eess.AS,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Junyoung Seo,Gyuseong Lee,Seokju Cho,Jiyoung Lee,Seungryong Kim
title: MIDMs: Matching Interleaved Diffusion Models for Exemplar-based Image Translation
title_zh: MIDM：匹配交错扩散模型以实现基于示例的图像翻译
abstract: We present a novel method for exemplar-based image translation, called matching interleaved diffusion models (MIDMs). Most existing methods for this task were formulated as GAN-based matching-then-generation framework. However, in this framework, matching errors induced by the difficulty of semantic matching across cross-domain, e.g., sketch and photo, can be easily propagated to the generation step, which in turn leads to degenerated results. Motivated by the recent success of diffusion models overcoming the shortcomings of GANs, we incorporate the diffusion models to overcome these limitations. Specifically, we formulate a diffusion-based matching-and-generation framework that interleaves cross-domain matching and diffusion steps in the latent space by iteratively feeding the intermediate warp into the noising process and denoising it to generate a translated image. In addition, to improve the reliability of the diffusion process, we design a confidence-aware process using cycle-consistency to consider only confident regions during translation. Experimental results show that our MIDMs generate more plausible images than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We present a novel method for exemplar-based image translation, called matching interleaved diffusion models (MIDMs). Most existing methods for this task were formulated as GAN-based matching-then-generation framework. However, in this framework, matching errors induced by the difficulty of semantic matching across cross-domain, e.g., sketch and photo, can be easily propagated to the generation step, which in turn leads to degenerated results. Motivated by the recent success of diffusion models overcoming the shortcomings of GANs, we incorporate the diffusion models to overcome these limitations. Specifically, we formulate a diffusion-based matching-and-generation framework that interleaves cross-domain matching and diffusion steps in the latent space by iteratively feeding the intermediate warp into the noising process and denoising it to generate a translated image. In addition, to improve the reliability of the diffusion process, we design a confidence-aware process using cycle-consistency to consider only confident regions during translation. Experimental results show that our MIDMs generate more plausible images than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于样本的图像翻译的新方法，称为匹配交错扩散模型（MIDM）。大多数用于此任务的现有方法都被制定为基于 GAN 的匹配生成框架。然而，在这个框架中，由于跨域（例如草图和照片）语义匹配的困难而引起的匹配错误可以很容易地传播到生成步骤，从而导致退化结果。受扩散模型最近成功克服 GAN 缺点的激励，我们结合扩散模型来克服这些限制。具体来说，我们制定了一个基于扩散的匹配和生成框架，通过迭代地将中间扭曲输入噪声过程并对其进行去噪以生成平移图像，从而在潜在空间中交错跨域匹配和扩散步骤。此外，为了提高扩散过程的可靠性，我们使用循环一致性设计了一个置信感知过程，以在翻译过程中仅考虑置信区域。实验结果表明，我们的 MIDM 生成的图像比最先进的方法更可信。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于示例的图像翻译新方法MIDMs，通过结合扩散模型解决跨域匹配误差传播问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN框架在跨域（如素描与照片）语义匹配时易产生误差并传播至生成阶段，导致结果退化。扩散模型能克服GAN局限性，故提出新方法。
AI.method: 构建扩散模型的匹配-生成框架，在潜在空间中迭代进行跨域匹配与扩散步骤，并设计循环一致性驱动的置信度感知机制筛选可靠区域。
AI.result: 实验表明MIDMs生成的图像质量优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过交织扩散模型与置信度感知机制，MIDMs有效缓解了跨域匹配误差传播问题，提升了图像翻译效果。

authors_text: Bryan Habas,Jack W. Langelaan,Bo Cheng
title: Inverted Landing in a Small Aerial Robot via Deep Reinforcement Learning for Triggering and Control of Rotational Maneuvers
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习触发和控制旋转动作的小型空中机器人倒立着陆
comment: 8 pages, 6 Figures, Submitted for ICRA 2023 Conference (Pending Review)
comments: 8 pages, 6 Figures, Submitted for ICRA 2023 Conference (Pending Review)
abstract: Inverted landing in a rapid and robust manner is a challenging feat for aerial robots, especially while depending entirely on onboard sensing and computation. In spite of this, this feat is routinely performed by biological fliers such as bats, flies, and bees. Our previous work has identified a direct causal connection between a series of onboard visual cues and kinematic actions that allow for reliable execution of this challenging aerobatic maneuver in small aerial robots. In this work, we first utilized Deep Reinforcement Learning and a physics-based simulation to obtain a general, optimal control policy for robust inverted landing starting from any arbitrary approach condition. This optimized control policy provides a computationally-efficient mapping from the system's observational space to its motor command action space, including both triggering and control of rotational maneuvers. This was done by training the system over a large range of approach flight velocities that varied with magnitude and direction. Next, we performed a sim-to-real transfer and experimental validation of the learned policy via domain randomization, by varying the robot's inertial parameters in the simulation. Through experimental trials, we identified several dominant factors which greatly improved landing robustness and the primary mechanisms that determined inverted landing success. We expect the learning framework developed in this study can be generalized to solve more challenging tasks, such as utilizing noisy onboard sensory data, landing on surfaces of various orientations, or landing on dynamically-moving surfaces.
summary: Inverted landing in a rapid and robust manner is a challenging feat for aerial robots, especially while depending entirely on onboard sensing and computation. In spite of this, this feat is routinely performed by biological fliers such as bats, flies, and bees. Our previous work has identified a direct causal connection between a series of onboard visual cues and kinematic actions that allow for reliable execution of this challenging aerobatic maneuver in small aerial robots. In this work, we first utilized Deep Reinforcement Learning and a physics-based simulation to obtain a general, optimal control policy for robust inverted landing starting from any arbitrary approach condition. This optimized control policy provides a computationally-efficient mapping from the system's observational space to its motor command action space, including both triggering and control of rotational maneuvers. This was done by training the system over a large range of approach flight velocities that varied with magnitude and direction. Next, we performed a sim-to-real transfer and experimental validation of the learned policy via domain randomization, by varying the robot's inertial parameters in the simulation. Through experimental trials, we identified several dominant factors which greatly improved landing robustness and the primary mechanisms that determined inverted landing success. We expect the learning framework developed in this study can be generalized to solve more challenging tasks, such as utilizing noisy onboard sensory data, landing on surfaces of various orientations, or landing on dynamically-moving surfaces.
abstract_zh: 对于空中机器人来说，快速而稳健地倒转着陆是一项具有挑战性的壮举，尤其是在完全依赖于机载传感和计算的情况下。尽管如此，这一壮举通常是由蝙蝠、苍蝇和蜜蜂等生物飞行​​者完成的。我们之前的工作已经确定了一系列机载视觉提示和运动动作之间的直接因果关系，从而可以在小型空中机器人中可靠地执行这种具有挑战性的特技飞行动作。在这项工作中，我们首先利用深度强化学习和基于物理的模拟来获得从任意进近条件开始的鲁棒倒转着陆的通用最优控制策略。这种优化的控制策略提供了从系统的观察空间到其运动命令动作空间的计算高效的映射，包括旋转机动的触发和控制。这是通过在随幅度和方向变化的大范围进近飞行速度上训练系统来完成的。接下来，我们通过域随机化，通过改变模拟中机器人的惯性参数，对学习策略进行模拟到真实的迁移和实验验证。通过实验试验，我们确定了几个大大提高着陆鲁棒性的主导因素以及决定倒转着陆成功的主要机制。我们期望本研究中开发的学习框架可以推广到解决更具挑战性的任务，例如利用嘈杂的机载传感数据、降落在不同方向的表面上或降落在动态移动的表面上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，使小型空中机器人能够实现稳健的倒置着陆，并通过模拟到现实的迁移验证了该方法。
AI.motivation: 倒置着陆对空中机器人而言极具挑战性，而生物飞行器（如蝙蝠、蜜蜂）却能轻松完成。现有方法依赖视觉线索，但需更通用的控制策略以应对复杂环境。
AI.method: 利用深度强化学习与物理仿真生成最优控制策略，并通过域随机化技术实现模拟到现实的迁移，结合实验验证控制策略的有效性。
AI.result: 成功实现从任意初始条件下的倒置着陆，识别出提升着陆鲁棒性的关键因素及成功机制，验证了策略在真实环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该学习框架可推广至更复杂任务，如处理噪声传感器数据、不同朝向表面或动态移动表面的着陆控制。

authors_text: Yuezhan Tao,Yuwei Wu,Beiming Li,Fernando Cladera,Alex Zhou,Dinesh Thakur,Vijay Kumar
title: SEER: Safe Efficient Exploration for Aerial Robots using Learning to Predict Information Gain
title_zh: SEER：利用学习预测信息增益对空中机器人进行安全高效的探索
comment: 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: We address the problem of efficient 3-D exploration in indoor environments for micro aerial vehicles with limited sensing capabilities and payload/power constraints. We develop an indoor exploration framework that uses learning to predict the occupancy of unseen areas, extracts semantic features, samples viewpoints to predict information gains for different exploration goals, and plans informative trajectories to enable safe and smart exploration. Extensive experimentation in simulated and real-world environments shows the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art exploration framework by 24% in terms of the total path length in a structured indoor environment and with a higher success rate during exploration.
summary: We address the problem of efficient 3-D exploration in indoor environments for micro aerial vehicles with limited sensing capabilities and payload/power constraints. We develop an indoor exploration framework that uses learning to predict the occupancy of unseen areas, extracts semantic features, samples viewpoints to predict information gains for different exploration goals, and plans informative trajectories to enable safe and smart exploration. Extensive experimentation in simulated and real-world environments shows the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art exploration framework by 24% in terms of the total path length in a structured indoor environment and with a higher success rate during exploration.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了传感能力有限和有效载荷/功率限制的微型飞行器在室内环境中高效 3D 探索的问题。我们开发了一个室内探索框架，该框架使用学习来预测未见过的区域的占用情况，提取语义特征，对观点进行采样以预测不同探索目标的信息增益，并规划信息轨迹以实现安全和智能的探索。在模拟和现实环境中进行的大量实验表明，就结构化室内环境中的总路径长度而言，所提出的方法比最先进的探索框架高出 24%，并且在探索过程中具有更高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEER框架，解决微空中机器人在室内环境中受限于感知能力和资源约束的高效探索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有探索方法在复杂室内环境中存在路径效率低、安全性不足的问题，需结合学习方法提升信息获取效率。
AI.method: 基于学习预测未探索区域占用状态，提取语义特征并采样视角计算信息增益，规划最优轨迹实现安全探索。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中，总路径长度比现有方法缩短24%，探索成功率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SEER框架通过信息增益预测有效优化探索路径，为资源受限的空中机器人提供了安全高效的解决方案。

search_text: SEER: Safe Efficient Exploration for Aerial Robots using Learning to Predict Information Gain SEER：利用学习预测信息增益对空中机器人进行安全高效的探索 We address the problem of efficient 3-D exploration in indoor environments for micro aerial vehicles with limited sensing capabilities and payload/power constraints. We develop an indoor exploration framework that uses learning to predict the occupancy of unseen areas, extracts semantic features, samples viewpoints to predict information gains for different exploration goals, and plans informative trajectories to enable safe and smart exploration. Extensive experimentation in simulated and real-world environments shows the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art exploration framework by 24% in terms of the total path length in a structured indoor environment and with a higher success rate during exploration. 我们解决了传感能力有限和有效载荷/功率限制的微型飞行器在室内环境中高效 3D 探索的问题。我们开发了一个室内探索框架，该框架使用学习来预测未见过的区域的占用情况，提取语义特征，对观点进行采样以预测不同探索目标的信息增益，并规划信息轨迹以实现安全和智能的探索。在模拟和现实环境中进行的大量实验表明，就结构化室内环境中的总路径长度而言，所提出的方法比最先进的探索框架高出 24%，并且在探索过程中具有更高的成功率。 本文提出SEER框架，解决微空中机器人在室内环境中受限于感知能力和资源约束的高效探索问题。 Yuezhan Tao,Yuwei Wu,Beiming Li,Fernando Cladera,Alex Zhou,Dinesh Thakur,Vijay Kumar cs.RO

authors_text: Jubril Gbolahan Adigun,Linus Eisele,Michael Felderer
title: Metamorphic Testing in Autonomous System Simulations
title_zh: 自治系统仿真中的变形测试
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 48th Euromicro Conference Series on Software Engineering and Advanced Applications (SEAA)
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 48th Euromicro Conference Series on Software Engineering and Advanced Applications (SEAA)
abstract: Metamorphic testing has proven to be effective for test case generation and fault detection in many domains. It is a software testing strategy that uses certain relations between input-output pairs of a program, referred to as metamorphic relations. This approach is relevant in the autonomous systems domain since it helps in cases where the outcome of a given test input may be difficult to determine. In this paper therefore, we provide an overview of metamorphic testing as well as an implementation in the autonomous systems domain. We implement an obstacle detection and avoidance task in autonomous drones utilising the GNC API alongside a simulation in Gazebo. Particularly, we describe properties and best practices that are crucial for the development of effective metamorphic relations. We also demonstrate two metamorphic relations for metamorphic testing of single and more than one drones, respectively. Our relations reveal several properties and some weak spots of both the implementation and the avoidance algorithm in the light of metamorphic testing. The results indicate that metamorphic testing has great potential in the autonomous systems domain and should be considered for quality assurance in this field.
summary: Metamorphic testing has proven to be effective for test case generation and fault detection in many domains. It is a software testing strategy that uses certain relations between input-output pairs of a program, referred to as metamorphic relations. This approach is relevant in the autonomous systems domain since it helps in cases where the outcome of a given test input may be difficult to determine. In this paper therefore, we provide an overview of metamorphic testing as well as an implementation in the autonomous systems domain. We implement an obstacle detection and avoidance task in autonomous drones utilising the GNC API alongside a simulation in Gazebo. Particularly, we describe properties and best practices that are crucial for the development of effective metamorphic relations. We also demonstrate two metamorphic relations for metamorphic testing of single and more than one drones, respectively. Our relations reveal several properties and some weak spots of both the implementation and the avoidance algorithm in the light of metamorphic testing. The results indicate that metamorphic testing has great potential in the autonomous systems domain and should be considered for quality assurance in this field.
abstract_zh: 变质测试已被证明对于许多领域的测试用例生成和故障检测是有效的。它是一种软件测试策略，使用程序的输入输出对之间的某些关系（称为变质关系）。这种方法与自治系统领域相关，因为它有助于解决给定测试输入的结果可能难以确定的情况。因此，在本文中，我们概述了变质测试以及自治系统领域的实现。我们利用 GNC API 以及 Gazebo 中的模拟，在自主无人机中实现障碍物检测和回避任务。特别是，我们描述了对于发展有效的变质关系至关重要的属性和最佳实践。我们还分别展示了用于单个和多个无人机的变质测试的两种变质关系。根据变质测试，我们的关系揭示了实现和回避算法的几个属性和一些弱点。结果表明，变质测试在自主系统领域具有巨大潜力，应考虑用于该领域的质量保证。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了元形态测试方法，并在自主无人机系统中实现障碍物检测与避障任务，通过GNC API和Gazebo仿真验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 自主系统测试中传统方法难以验证复杂场景下的测试结果，而元形态测试通过输入输出关系可有效发现故障，适合该领域质量保障需求。
AI.method: 基于GNC API构建无人机避障仿真环境，利用Gazebo进行场景模拟，定义单机/多机两种元形态关系并验证其对算法缺陷的检测能力。
AI.result: 元形态关系揭示了避障算法在动态障碍物处理和多机协同中的潜在缺陷，证明该方法能有效发现系统实现问题。
AI.conclusion: 元形态测试为自主系统提供了可量化的质量验证手段，应在相关领域质量保证流程中推广应用。

authors_text: Sándor P. Fekete,Peter Kramer,Christian Rieck,Christian Scheffer,Arne Schmidt
title: Efficiently Reconfiguring a Connected Swarm of Labeled Robots
title_zh: 有效地重新配置连接的标记机器人群
comment: 32 pages, 22 figures, full version of an extended abstract that appeared in the proceedings of the 33rd International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC 2022)
comments: 32 pages, 22 figures, full version of an extended abstract that appeared in the proceedings of the 33rd International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC 2022)
abstract: When considering motion planning for a swarm of $n$ labeled robots, we need to rearrange a given start configuration into a desired target configuration via a sequence of parallel, collision-free robot motions. The objective is to reach the new configuration in a minimum amount of time; an important constraint is to keep the swarm connected at all times. Problems of this type have been considered before, with recent notable results achieving constant stretch for not necessarily connected reconfiguration: If mapping the start configuration to the target configuration requires a maximum Manhattan distance of $d$, the total duration of an overall schedule can be bounded to $\mathcal{O}(d)$, which is optimal up to constant factors. However, constant stretch could only be achieved if disconnected reconfiguration is allowed, or for scaled configurations (which arise by increasing all dimensions of a given object by the same multiplicative factor) of unlabeled robots. We resolve these major open problems by (1) establishing a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ for connected, labeled reconfiguration and, most importantly, by (2) proving that for scaled arrangements, constant stretch for connected reconfiguration can be achieved. In addition, we show that (3) it is NP-complete to decide whether a makespan of 2 can be achieved, while it is possible to check in polynomial time whether a makespan of 1 can be achieved.
summary: When considering motion planning for a swarm of $n$ labeled robots, we need to rearrange a given start configuration into a desired target configuration via a sequence of parallel, collision-free robot motions. The objective is to reach the new configuration in a minimum amount of time; an important constraint is to keep the swarm connected at all times. Problems of this type have been considered before, with recent notable results achieving constant stretch for not necessarily connected reconfiguration: If mapping the start configuration to the target configuration requires a maximum Manhattan distance of $d$, the total duration of an overall schedule can be bounded to $\mathcal{O}(d)$, which is optimal up to constant factors. However, constant stretch could only be achieved if disconnected reconfiguration is allowed, or for scaled configurations (which arise by increasing all dimensions of a given object by the same multiplicative factor) of unlabeled robots. We resolve these major open problems by (1) establishing a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ for connected, labeled reconfiguration and, most importantly, by (2) proving that for scaled arrangements, constant stretch for connected reconfiguration can be achieved. In addition, we show that (3) it is NP-complete to decide whether a makespan of 2 can be achieved, while it is possible to check in polynomial time whether a makespan of 1 can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 当考虑一群标记为 $n$ 的机器人的运动规划时，我们需要通过一系列并行、无碰撞的机器人运动将给定的起始配置重新排列为所需的目标配置。目标是在最短的时间内达到新的配置；一个重要的限制是保持群体始终保持连接。以前已经考虑过此类问题，最近的显着结果实现了不一定连接的重新配置的恒定拉伸：如果将起始配置映射到目标配置需要最大曼哈顿距离 $d$，则整个调度的总持续时间可以限制为 $\mathcal{O}(d)$，这是在常数因子范围内最优的。然而，只有在允许断开连接的重新配置或未标记机器人的缩放配置（通过将给定对象的所有尺寸增加相同的乘法因子而产生）的情况下，才能实现恒定拉伸。我们通过以下方式解决这些主要的开放问题：(1) 为连接的、标记的重新配置建立 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 的下界，最重要的是，通过 (2) 证明对于缩放排列，可以实现连接的重新配置的恒定拉伸。此外，我们证明（3）决定是否可以实现 2 的完工时间是 NP 完全的，同时可以在多项式时间内检查是否可以实现 1 的完工时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在保持机器人集群连通性的前提下，高效地将标号机器人的初始配置重新排列为目标配置。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在非连通或标号机器人缩放配置下可实现常数伸缩比，但连通标号机器人集群的最优时间复杂度仍存在开放问题。
AI.method: 通过建立连通标号重配置的下界Ω(√n)，证明缩放配置下可实现常数伸缩比，并分析makespan为1/2的判定复杂度。
AI.result: 确定连通重配置时间复杂度下界，证明缩放配置可实现常数伸缩比，且makespan=2判定为NP难而makespan=1可多项式判定。
AI.conclusion: 解决了连通标号集群重配置的核心难题，为实际应用提供了理论保证与复杂度边界分析。

motivation: 现有研究在非连通或标号机器人缩放配置下可实现常数伸缩比，但连通标号机器人集群的最优时间复杂度仍存在开放问题。

search_text: Efficiently Reconfiguring a Connected Swarm of Labeled Robots 有效地重新配置连接的标记机器人群 When considering motion planning for a swarm of $n$ labeled robots, we need to rearrange a given start configuration into a desired target configuration via a sequence of parallel, collision-free robot motions. The objective is to reach the new configuration in a minimum amount of time; an important constraint is to keep the swarm connected at all times. Problems of this type have been considered before, with recent notable results achieving constant stretch for not necessarily connected reconfiguration: If mapping the start configuration to the target configuration requires a maximum Manhattan distance of $d$, the total duration of an overall schedule can be bounded to $\mathcal{O}(d)$, which is optimal up to constant factors. However, constant stretch could only be achieved if disconnected reconfiguration is allowed, or for scaled configurations (which arise by increasing all dimensions of a given object by the same multiplicative factor) of unlabeled robots. We resolve these major open problems by (1) establishing a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ for connected, labeled reconfiguration and, most importantly, by (2) proving that for scaled arrangements, constant stretch for connected reconfiguration can be achieved. In addition, we show that (3) it is NP-complete to decide whether a makespan of 2 can be achieved, while it is possible to check in polynomial time whether a makespan of 1 can be achieved. 当考虑一群标记为 $n$ 的机器人的运动规划时，我们需要通过一系列并行、无碰撞的机器人运动将给定的起始配置重新排列为所需的目标配置。目标是在最短的时间内达到新的配置；一个重要的限制是保持群体始终保持连接。以前已经考虑过此类问题，最近的显着结果实现了不一定连接的重新配置的恒定拉伸：如果将起始配置映射到目标配置需要最大曼哈顿距离 $d$，则整个调度的总持续时间可以限制为 $\mathcal{O}(d)$，这是在常数因子范围内最优的。然而，只有在允许断开连接的重新配置或未标记机器人的缩放配置（通过将给定对象的所有尺寸增加相同的乘法因子而产生）的情况下，才能实现恒定拉伸。我们通过以下方式解决这些主要的开放问题：(1) 为连接的、标记的重新配置建立 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 的下界，最重要的是，通过 (2) 证明对于缩放排列，可以实现连接的重新配置的恒定拉伸。此外，我们证明（3）决定是否可以实现 2 的完工时间是 NP 完全的，同时可以在多项式时间内检查是否可以实现 1 的完工时间。 本文研究如何在保持机器人集群连通性的前提下，高效地将标号机器人的初始配置重新排列为目标配置。 Sándor P. Fekete,Peter Kramer,Christian Rieck,Christian Scheffer,Arne Schmidt cs.CG,cs.DS,cs.RO

authors_text: Nikita Gabdullin,Anton Raskovalov
title: Google Coral-based edge computing person reidentification using human parsing combined with analytical method
title_zh: 基于Google Coral的边缘计算利用人体解析结合解析方法进行行人重识别
abstract: Person reidentification (re-ID) is becoming one of the most significant application areas of computer vision due to its importance for science and social security. Due to enormous size and scale of camera systems it is beneficial to develop edge computing re-ID applications where at least part of the analysis could be performed by the cameras. However, conventional re-ID relies heavily on deep learning (DL) computationally demanding models which are not readily applicable for edge computing. In this paper we adapt a recently proposed re-ID method that combines DL human parsing with analytical feature extraction and ranking schemes to be more suitable for edge computing re-ID. First, we compare parsers that use ResNet101, ResNet18, MobileNetV2, and OSNet backbones and show that parsing can be performed using compact backbones with sufficient accuracy. Second, we transfer parsers to tensor processing unit (TPU) of Google Coral Dev Board and show that it can act as a portable edge computing re-ID station. We also implement the analytical part of re-ID method on Coral CPU to ensure that it can perform a complete re-ID cycle. For quantitative analysis we compare inference speed, parsing masks, and re-ID accuracy on GPU and Coral TPU depending on parser backbone. We also discuss possible application scenarios of edge computing in re-ID taking into account known limitations mainly related to memory and storage space of portable devices.
summary: Person reidentification (re-ID) is becoming one of the most significant application areas of computer vision due to its importance for science and social security. Due to enormous size and scale of camera systems it is beneficial to develop edge computing re-ID applications where at least part of the analysis could be performed by the cameras. However, conventional re-ID relies heavily on deep learning (DL) computationally demanding models which are not readily applicable for edge computing. In this paper we adapt a recently proposed re-ID method that combines DL human parsing with analytical feature extraction and ranking schemes to be more suitable for edge computing re-ID. First, we compare parsers that use ResNet101, ResNet18, MobileNetV2, and OSNet backbones and show that parsing can be performed using compact backbones with sufficient accuracy. Second, we transfer parsers to tensor processing unit (TPU) of Google Coral Dev Board and show that it can act as a portable edge computing re-ID station. We also implement the analytical part of re-ID method on Coral CPU to ensure that it can perform a complete re-ID cycle. For quantitative analysis we compare inference speed, parsing masks, and re-ID accuracy on GPU and Coral TPU depending on parser backbone. We also discuss possible application scenarios of edge computing in re-ID taking into account known limitations mainly related to memory and storage space of portable devices.
abstract_zh: 由于其对科学和社会安全的重要性，人员重新识别（re-ID）正在成为计算机视觉最重要的应用领域之一。由于摄像头系统的尺寸和规模巨大，开发边缘计算重识别应用程序是有益的，其中至少部分分析可以由摄像头执行。然而，传统的 re-ID 严重依赖于深度学习 (DL) 计算要求较高的模型，这些模型不太适用于边缘计算。在本文中，我们采用了最近提出的 re-ID 方法，该方法将深度学习人体解析与分析特征提取和排序方案相结合，以更适合边缘计算 re-ID。首先，我们比较使用 ResNet101、ResNet18、MobileNetV2 和 OSNet 主干网的解析器，并表明可以使用紧凑的主干网以足够的精度执行解析。其次，我们将解析器转移到 Google Coral 开发板的张量处理单元 (TPU)，并证明它可以充当便携式边缘计算重识别站。我们还在 Coral CPU 上实现了 re-ID 方法的分析部分，以确保它可以执行完整的 re-ID 周期。为了进行定量分析，我们根据解析器主干比较 GPU 和 Coral TPU 上的推理速度、解析掩码和重新 ID 准确性。考虑到主要与便携式设备的内存和存储空间相关的已知限制，我们还讨论了边缘计算在重识别中的可能应用场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Google Coral边缘计算设备的人体重识别方法，结合人体解析与分析技术以适应边缘计算环境。
AI.motivation: 传统人体重识别依赖计算量大的深度学习模型，难以部署在边缘计算设备上，需开发轻量化方案以满足边缘设备的算力和存储限制。
AI.method: 比较ResNet101/18、MobileNetV2、OSNet等轻量化骨干网络，将解析模型移植至Google Coral TPU，结合CPU实现分析模块，通过GPU与TPU对比实验验证性能。
AI.result: 证明轻量级骨干网络可满足人体解析精度需求，Coral设备可完成端到端重识别流程，TPU推理速度优于GPU且解析掩码质量达标。
AI.conclusion: Google Coral边缘设备通过模型轻量化与硬件协同优化，可有效实现人体重识别，但需权衡便携设备的内存与存储限制。

authors_text: Sohaib Ahmad,Benjamin Fuller,Kaleel Mahmood
title: Privacy Attacks Against Biometric Models with Fewer Samples: Incorporating the Output of Multiple Models
title_zh: 针对样本较少的生物识别模型的隐私攻击：合并多个模型的输出
comment: This is a major revision of a paper titled "Inverting Biometric Models with Fewer Samples: Incorporating the Output of Multiple Models" by the same authors that appears at IJCB 2022
comments: This is a major revision of a paper titled "Inverting Biometric Models with Fewer Samples: Incorporating the Output of Multiple Models" by the same authors that appears at IJCB 2022
abstract: Authentication systems are vulnerable to model inversion attacks where an adversary is able to approximate the inverse of a target machine learning model. Biometric models are a prime candidate for this type of attack. This is because inverting a biometric model allows the attacker to produce a realistic biometric input to spoof biometric authentication systems. One of the main constraints in conducting a successful model inversion attack is the amount of training data required. In this work, we focus on iris and facial biometric systems and propose a new technique that drastically reduces the amount of training data necessary. By leveraging the output of multiple models, we are able to conduct model inversion attacks with 1/10th the training set size of Ahmad and Fuller (IJCB 2020) for iris data and 1/1000th the training set size of Mai et al. (Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2019) for facial data. We denote our new attack technique as structured random with alignment loss. Our attacks are black-box, requiring no knowledge of the weights of the target neural network, only the dimension, and values of the output vector. To show the versatility of the alignment loss, we apply our attack framework to the task of membership inference (Shokri et al., IEEE S&P 2017) on biometric data. For the iris, membership inference attack against classification networks improves from 52% to 62% accuracy.
summary: Authentication systems are vulnerable to model inversion attacks where an adversary is able to approximate the inverse of a target machine learning model. Biometric models are a prime candidate for this type of attack. This is because inverting a biometric model allows the attacker to produce a realistic biometric input to spoof biometric authentication systems. One of the main constraints in conducting a successful model inversion attack is the amount of training data required. In this work, we focus on iris and facial biometric systems and propose a new technique that drastically reduces the amount of training data necessary. By leveraging the output of multiple models, we are able to conduct model inversion attacks with 1/10th the training set size of Ahmad and Fuller (IJCB 2020) for iris data and 1/1000th the training set size of Mai et al. (Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2019) for facial data. We denote our new attack technique as structured random with alignment loss. Our attacks are black-box, requiring no knowledge of the weights of the target neural network, only the dimension, and values of the output vector. To show the versatility of the alignment loss, we apply our attack framework to the task of membership inference (Shokri et al., IEEE S&P 2017) on biometric data. For the iris, membership inference attack against classification networks improves from 52% to 62% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 身份验证系统容易受到模型反转攻击，其中对手能够近似目标机器学习模型的逆模型。生物识别模型是此类攻击的主要候选者。这是因为反转生物识别模型允许攻击者产生真实的生物识别输入来欺骗生物识别认证系统。成功进行模型反转攻击的主要限制之一是所需的训练数据量。在这项工作中，我们专注于虹膜和面部生物识别系统，并提出了一种新技术，可以大大减少所需的训练数据量。通过利用多个模型的输出，我们能够以 Ahmad 和 Fuller (IJCB 2020) 的虹膜数据训练集大小的 1/10 以及 Mai 等人的训练集大小的 1/1000 进行模型反转攻击。 （模式分析和机器智能 2019）用于面部数据。我们将我们的新攻击技术表示为具有对齐丢失的结构化随机。我们的攻击是黑盒的，不需要知道目标神经网络的权重，只需要知道输出向量的维度和值。为了展示对齐丢失的多功能性，我们将我们的攻击框架应用于生物识别数据的成员资格推断任务（Shokri 等人，IEEE S&P 2017）。对于鸢尾花，针对分类网络的成员推理攻击准确率从 52% 提高到 62%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型模型反转攻击技术，通过结合多个模型的输出，在少量训练样本下对虹膜和面部生物特征系统实施攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有模型反转攻击需要大量训练数据，限制了攻击可行性。本文旨在降低数据需求，提升攻击效率并扩展至成员推理任务。
AI.method: 采用结构化随机与对齐损失结合的方法，利用多个模型输出信息，在无需目标模型权重的情况下实现黑盒攻击。
AI.result: 虹膜数据训练集规模缩减至Ahmad等人的1/10，面部数据缩减至Mai等人的1/1000；虹膜分类网络成员推理准确率从52%提升至62%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低攻击数据需求并提升效果，验证了对齐损失的通用性，凸显生物特征系统隐私保护的迫切性。

result: 虹膜数据训练集规模缩减至Ahmad等人的1/10，面部数据缩减至Mai等人的1/1000；虹膜分类网络成员推理准确率从52%提升至62%。
conclusion: 该方法显著降低攻击数据需求并提升效果，验证了对齐损失的通用性，凸显生物特征系统隐私保护的迫切性。
search_text: Privacy Attacks Against Biometric Models with Fewer Samples: Incorporating the Output of Multiple Models 针对样本较少的生物识别模型的隐私攻击：合并多个模型的输出 Authentication systems are vulnerable to model inversion attacks where an adversary is able to approximate the inverse of a target machine learning model. Biometric models are a prime candidate for this type of attack. This is because inverting a biometric model allows the attacker to produce a realistic biometric input to spoof biometric authentication systems. One of the main constraints in conducting a successful model inversion attack is the amount of training data required. In this work, we focus on iris and facial biometric systems and propose a new technique that drastically reduces the amount of training data necessary. By leveraging the output of multiple models, we are able to conduct model inversion attacks with 1/10th the training set size of Ahmad and Fuller (IJCB 2020) for iris data and 1/1000th the training set size of Mai et al. (Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2019) for facial data. We denote our new attack technique as structured random with alignment loss. Our attacks are black-box, requiring no knowledge of the weights of the target neural network, only the dimension, and values of the output vector. To show the versatility of the alignment loss, we apply our attack framework to the task of membership inference (Shokri et al., IEEE S&P 2017) on biometric data. For the iris, membership inference attack against classification networks improves from 52% to 62% accuracy. 身份验证系统容易受到模型反转攻击，其中对手能够近似目标机器学习模型的逆模型。生物识别模型是此类攻击的主要候选者。这是因为反转生物识别模型允许攻击者产生真实的生物识别输入来欺骗生物识别认证系统。成功进行模型反转攻击的主要限制之一是所需的训练数据量。在这项工作中，我们专注于虹膜和面部生物识别系统，并提出了一种新技术，可以大大减少所需的训练数据量。通过利用多个模型的输出，我们能够以 Ahmad 和 Fuller (IJCB 2020) 的虹膜数据训练集大小的 1/10 以及 Mai 等人的训练集大小的 1/1000 进行模型反转攻击。 （模式分析和机器智能 2019）用于面部数据。我们将我们的新攻击技术表示为具有对齐丢失的结构化随机。我们的攻击是黑盒的，不需要知道目标神经网络的权重，只需要知道输出向量的维度和值。为了展示对齐丢失的多功能性，我们将我们的攻击框架应用于生物识别数据的成员资格推断任务（Shokri 等人，IEEE S&P 2017）。对于鸢尾花，针对分类网络的成员推理攻击准确率从 52% 提高到 62%。 本文提出一种新型模型反转攻击技术，通过结合多个模型的输出，在少量训练样本下对虹膜和面部生物特征系统实施攻击。 Sohaib Ahmad,Benjamin Fuller,Kaleel Mahmood cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Siyu Liu,Linfeng Liu,Xuan Vinh,Stuart Crozier,Craig Engstrom,Fatima Nasrallah,Shekhar Chandra
title: Structure Guided Manifolds for Discovery of Disease Characteristics
title_zh: 用于发现疾病特征的结构引导流形
abstract: In medical image analysis, the subtle visual characteristics of many diseases are challenging to discern, particularly due to the lack of paired data. For example, in mild Alzheimer's Disease (AD), brain tissue atrophy can be difficult to observe from pure imaging data, especially without paired AD and Cognitively Normal ( CN ) data for comparison. This work presents Disease Discovery GAN ( DiDiGAN), a weakly-supervised style-based framework for discovering and visualising subtle disease features. DiDiGAN learns a disease manifold of AD and CN visual characteristics, and the style codes sampled from this manifold are imposed onto an anatomical structural "blueprint" to synthesise paired AD and CN magnetic resonance images (MRIs). To suppress non-disease-related variations between the generated AD and CN pairs, DiDiGAN leverages a structural constraint with cycle consistency and anti-aliasing to enforce anatomical correspondence. When tested on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative ( ADNI) dataset, DiDiGAN showed key AD characteristics (reduced hippocampal volume, ventricular enlargement, and atrophy of cortical structures) through synthesising paired AD and CN scans. The qualitative results were backed up by automated brain volume analysis, where systematic pair-wise reductions in brain tissue structures were also measured
summary: In medical image analysis, the subtle visual characteristics of many diseases are challenging to discern, particularly due to the lack of paired data. For example, in mild Alzheimer's Disease (AD), brain tissue atrophy can be difficult to observe from pure imaging data, especially without paired AD and Cognitively Normal ( CN ) data for comparison. This work presents Disease Discovery GAN ( DiDiGAN), a weakly-supervised style-based framework for discovering and visualising subtle disease features. DiDiGAN learns a disease manifold of AD and CN visual characteristics, and the style codes sampled from this manifold are imposed onto an anatomical structural "blueprint" to synthesise paired AD and CN magnetic resonance images (MRIs). To suppress non-disease-related variations between the generated AD and CN pairs, DiDiGAN leverages a structural constraint with cycle consistency and anti-aliasing to enforce anatomical correspondence. When tested on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative ( ADNI) dataset, DiDiGAN showed key AD characteristics (reduced hippocampal volume, ventricular enlargement, and atrophy of cortical structures) through synthesising paired AD and CN scans. The qualitative results were backed up by automated brain volume analysis, where systematic pair-wise reductions in brain tissue structures were also measured
abstract_zh: 在医学图像分析中，许多疾病的微妙视觉特征很难辨别，特别是由于缺乏配对数据。例如，在轻度阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 中，很难从纯粹的成像数据中观察到脑组织萎缩，尤其是在没有配对 AD 和认知正常 (CN) 数据进行比较的情况下。这项工作提出了疾病发现 GAN (DiDiGAN)，这是一种基于弱监督风格的框架，用于发现和可视化微妙的疾病特征。 DiDiGAN 学习 AD 和 CN 视觉特征的疾病流形，并且从该流形采样的样式代码被强加到解剖结构“蓝图”上，以合成配对的 AD 和 CN 磁共振图像 (MRI)。为了抑制生成的 AD 和 CN 对之间的非疾病相关变化，DiDiGAN 利用具有循环一致性和抗锯齿的结构约束来强制执行解剖学对应。在阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 数据集上进行测试时，DiDiGAN 通过合成配对的 AD 和 CN 扫描显示了关键的 AD 特征（海马体积减小、心室扩大和皮质结构萎缩）。定性结果得到了自动脑容量分析的支持，其中还测量了脑组织结构的系统性成对减少

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督的基于风格的生成对抗网络（DiDiGAN），用于发现和可视化医学图像中疾病的细微特征，特别是在缺乏配对数据的情况下。
AI.motivation: 许多疾病的细微视觉特征难以通过纯影像数据识别，尤其在缺乏阿尔茨海默病（AD）与认知正常（CN）配对数据的情况下，脑组织萎缩等特征难以观察。
AI.method: DiDiGAN通过学习AD和CN的疾病流形，将从流形中采样的风格代码施加于解剖结构的'蓝图'上，合成配对的AD和CN磁共振图像，并利用结构约束、循环一致性和抗锯齿技术抑制非疾病相关变异。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上测试时，DiDiGAN成功合成了显示AD关键特征（海马体体积减少、脑室扩大、皮层结构萎缩）的配对扫描，并通过自动化脑体积分析验证了结果。
AI.conclusion: DiDiGAN能够有效发现医学图像中疾病的细微特征，为理解疾病机制和潜在早期诊断提供了新方法。

authors_text: Alphan Sahin,Rui Yang
title: Over-the-Air Computation over Balanced Numerals
title_zh: 平衡数字的无线计算
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to GLOBECOM'2022 Workshops: Workshop on Wireless Communications for Distributed Intelligence
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to GLOBECOM'2022 Workshops: Workshop on Wireless Communications for Distributed Intelligence
abstract: In this study, a digital over-the-air computation (OAC) scheme for achieving continuous-valued gradient aggregation is proposed. It is shown that the average of a set of real-valued parameters can be calculated approximately by using the average of the corresponding numerals, where the numerals are obtained based on a balanced number system. By using this property, the proposed scheme encodes the local gradients into a set of numerals. It then determines the positions of the activated orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) subcarriers by using the values of the numerals. To eliminate the need for a precise sample-level time synchronization, channel estimation overhead, and power instabilities due to the channel inversion, the proposed scheme also uses a non-coherent receiver at the edge server (ES) and does not utilize a pre-equalization at the edge devices (EDs). Finally, the theoretical mean squared error (MSE) performance of the proposed scheme is derived and its performance for federated edge learning (FEEL) is demonstrated.
summary: In this study, a digital over-the-air computation (OAC) scheme for achieving continuous-valued gradient aggregation is proposed. It is shown that the average of a set of real-valued parameters can be calculated approximately by using the average of the corresponding numerals, where the numerals are obtained based on a balanced number system. By using this property, the proposed scheme encodes the local gradients into a set of numerals. It then determines the positions of the activated orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) subcarriers by using the values of the numerals. To eliminate the need for a precise sample-level time synchronization, channel estimation overhead, and power instabilities due to the channel inversion, the proposed scheme also uses a non-coherent receiver at the edge server (ES) and does not utilize a pre-equalization at the edge devices (EDs). Finally, the theoretical mean squared error (MSE) performance of the proposed scheme is derived and its performance for federated edge learning (FEEL) is demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，提出了一种用于实现连续值梯度聚合的数字空中计算（OAC）方案。结果表明，一组实值参数的平均值可以通过相应数字的平均值来近似计算，其中数字是基于平衡数制获得的。通过利用这一特性，所提出的方案将局部梯度编码为一组数字。然后，它通过使用数字的值来确定激活的正交频分复用(OFDM)子载波的位置。为了消除对精确样本级时间同步、信道估计开销和信道反转导致的功率不稳定性的需求，所提出的方案还在边缘服务器（ES）处使用非相干接收器，并且不在边缘设备（ED）处使用预均衡。最后，推导了该方案的理论均方误差（MSE）性能，并证明了其联合边缘学习（FEEL）的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平衡数系的数字空中计算（OAC）方案，用于实现连续值梯度聚合，优化联邦边缘学习（FEEL）中的参数平均计算。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度聚合方法需要精确时间同步、信道估计和预均衡，存在高开销与不稳定问题，需设计无需这些复杂步骤的高效方案。
AI.method: 通过平衡数系将实数值参数转换为数字符号，利用数值确定OFDM子载波位置进行编码，并采用非相干接收器避免预均衡与同步需求。
AI.result: 推导了理论均方误差（MSE）性能，并验证了该方案在联邦边缘学习中的有效性，证明其可降低计算复杂度与通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过平衡数系与非相干接收技术，有效减少了同步、信道估计及预均衡需求，在保持性能的同时提升了联邦边缘学习的效率。

By using this property, the proposed scheme encodes the local gradients into a set of numerals. It then determines the positions of the activated orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) subcarriers by using the values of the numerals. To eliminate the need for a precise sample-level time synchronization, channel estimation overhead, and power instabilities due to the channel inversion, the proposed scheme also uses a non-coherent receiver at the edge server (ES) and does not utilize a pre-equalization at the edge devices (EDs). Finally, the theoretical mean squared error (MSE) performance of the proposed scheme is derived and its performance for federated edge learning (FEEL) is demonstrated. 在本研究中，提出了一种用于实现连续值梯度聚合的数字空中计算（OAC）方案。结果表明，一组实值参数的平均值可以通过相应数字的平均值来近似计算，其中数字是基于平衡数制获得的。通过利用这一特性，所提出的方案将局部梯度编码为一组数字。然后，它通过使用数字的值来确定激活的正交频分复用(OFDM)子载波的位置。为了消除对精确样本级时间同步、信道估计开销和信道反转导致的功率不稳定性的需求，所提出的方案还在边缘服务器（ES）处使用非相干接收器，并且不在边缘设备（ED）处使用预均衡。最后，推导了该方案的理论均方误差（MSE）性能，并证明了其联合边缘学习（FEEL）的性能。 本文提出一种基于平衡数系的数字空中计算（OAC）方案，用于实现连续值梯度聚合，优化联邦边缘学习（FEEL）中的参数平均计算。 Alphan Sahin,Rui Yang eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.IT

authors_text: Cassia Valentini-Botinhao,Manuel Sam Ribeiro,Oliver Watts,Korin Richmond,Gustav Eje Henter
title: Predicting pairwise preferences between TTS audio stimuli using parallel ratings data and anti-symmetric twin neural networks
title_zh: 使用并行评级数据和反对称孪生神经网络预测 TTS 音频刺激之间的成对偏好
abstract: Automatically predicting the outcome of subjective listening tests is a challenging task. Ratings may vary from person to person even if preferences are consistent across listeners. While previous work has focused on predicting listeners' ratings (mean opinion scores) of individual stimuli, we focus on the simpler task of predicting subjective preference given two speech stimuli for the same text. We propose a model based on anti-symmetric twin neural networks, trained on pairs of waveforms and their corresponding preference scores. We explore both attention and recurrent neural nets to account for the fact that stimuli in a pair are not time aligned. To obtain a large training set we convert listeners' ratings from MUSHRA tests to values that reflect how often one stimulus in the pair was rated higher than the other. Specifically, we evaluate performance on data obtained from twelve MUSHRA evaluations conducted over five years, containing different TTS systems, built from data of different speakers. Our results compare favourably to a state-of-the-art model trained to predict MOS scores.
summary: Automatically predicting the outcome of subjective listening tests is a challenging task. Ratings may vary from person to person even if preferences are consistent across listeners. While previous work has focused on predicting listeners' ratings (mean opinion scores) of individual stimuli, we focus on the simpler task of predicting subjective preference given two speech stimuli for the same text. We propose a model based on anti-symmetric twin neural networks, trained on pairs of waveforms and their corresponding preference scores. We explore both attention and recurrent neural nets to account for the fact that stimuli in a pair are not time aligned. To obtain a large training set we convert listeners' ratings from MUSHRA tests to values that reflect how often one stimulus in the pair was rated higher than the other. Specifically, we evaluate performance on data obtained from twelve MUSHRA evaluations conducted over five years, containing different TTS systems, built from data of different speakers. Our results compare favourably to a state-of-the-art model trained to predict MOS scores.
abstract_zh: 自动预测主观听力测试的结果是一项具有挑战性的任务。即使听众的偏好一致，评级也可能因人而异。虽然之前的工作重点是预测听众对个体刺激的评分（平均意见得分），但我们专注于更简单的任务，即在给定同一文本的两个语音刺激的情况下预测主观偏好。我们提出了一种基于反对称孪生神经网络的模型，该模型对波形对及其相应的偏好分数进行训练。我们探索注意力和循环神经网络，以解释一对刺激在时间上不对齐的事实。为了获得大型训练集，我们将听众对 MUSHRA 测试的评分转换为反映一对刺激中的一个刺激比另一个刺激评分更高的频率的值。具体来说，我们根据五年内进行的 12 次 MUSHRA 评估获得的数据来评估性能，其中包含根据不同说话者的数据构建的不同 TTS 系统。我们的结果与经过训练来预测 MOS 分数的最先进模型相比毫不逊色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反对称孪生神经网络的模型，用于预测两个TTS音频刺激之间的成对偏好，而非传统的单个刺激评分预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法预测个体评分存在主观差异，而直接预测成对偏好更符合实际应用场景需求，且能处理非对齐音频对的比较问题。
AI.method: 采用反对称孪生神经网络结构，结合注意力机制和循环神经网络处理非对齐音频，利用MUSHRA测试数据转换生成的偏好评分进行训练。
AI.result: 模型在12个跨年MUSHRA数据集上的表现优于现有预测MOS分数的最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 反对称孪生网络有效捕捉音频对偏好关系，为自动化主观听力测试提供新方法，未来可扩展至更多语音质量评估场景。

authors_text: Alexandre Zouaoui,Gedeon Muhawenayo,Behnood Rasti,Jocelyn Chanussot,Julien Mairal
title: Entropic Descent Archetypal Analysis for Blind Hyperspectral Unmixing
title_zh: 盲高光谱分解的熵下降原型分析
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new algorithm based on archetypal analysis for blind hyperspectral unmixing, assuming linear mixing of endmembers. Archetypal analysis is a natural formulation for this task. This method does not require the presence of pure pixels (i.e., pixels containing a single material) but instead represents endmembers as convex combinations of a few pixels present in the original hyperspectral image. Our approach leverages an entropic gradient descent strategy, which (i) provides better solutions for hyperspectral unmixing than traditional archetypal analysis algorithms, and (ii) leads to efficient GPU implementations. Since running a single instance of our algorithm is fast, we also propose an ensembling mechanism along with an appropriate model selection procedure that make our method robust to hyper-parameter choices while keeping the computational complexity reasonable. By using six standard real datasets, we show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art matrix factorization and recent deep learning methods. We also provide an open-source PyTorch implementation: https://github.com/inria-thoth/EDAA.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new algorithm based on archetypal analysis for blind hyperspectral unmixing, assuming linear mixing of endmembers. Archetypal analysis is a natural formulation for this task. This method does not require the presence of pure pixels (i.e., pixels containing a single material) but instead represents endmembers as convex combinations of a few pixels present in the original hyperspectral image. Our approach leverages an entropic gradient descent strategy, which (i) provides better solutions for hyperspectral unmixing than traditional archetypal analysis algorithms, and (ii) leads to efficient GPU implementations. Since running a single instance of our algorithm is fast, we also propose an ensembling mechanism along with an appropriate model selection procedure that make our method robust to hyper-parameter choices while keeping the computational complexity reasonable. By using six standard real datasets, we show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art matrix factorization and recent deep learning methods. We also provide an open-source PyTorch implementation: https://github.com/inria-thoth/EDAA.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于原型分析的新算法，用于盲高光谱解混，假设端元线性混合。原型分析是这项任务的自然表述。该方法不需要存在纯像素（即包含单一材料的像素），而是将端元表示为原始高光谱图像中存在的几个像素的凸组合。我们的方法利用熵梯度下降策略，该策略 (i) 为高光谱分解提供了比传统原型分析算法更好的解决方案，并且 (ii) 实现了高效的 GPU 实现。由于运行我们算法的单个实例速度很快，因此我们还提出了一种集成机制以及适当的模型选择程序，使我们的方法对超参数选择具有鲁棒性，同时保持合理的计算复杂性。通过使用六个标准的真实数据集，我们表明我们的方法优于最先进的矩阵分解和最近的深度学习方法。我们还提供开源 PyTorch 实现：https://github.com/inria-thoth/EDAA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于熵梯度下降的原型分析算法，用于盲高光谱解混任务，无需依赖纯像素假设。
AI.motivation: 传统高光谱解混方法依赖纯像素假设，但实际场景中常不存在纯像素。现有原型分析算法在解混精度和计算效率上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 采用原型分析框架，通过熵梯度下降优化端元表示；结合集成机制与模型选择策略，提升算法鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上优于现有矩阵分解和深度学习方法，提供开源PyTorch实现（GitHub链接）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在解混精度和计算效率上具有优势，适用于实际高光谱数据处理场景。

authors_text: Dario Mantegazza,Alessandro Giusti,Luca M. Gambardella,Andrea Rizzoli,Jérôme Guzzi
title: Challenges in Visual Anomaly Detection for Mobile Robots
title_zh: 移动机器人视觉异常检测的挑战
comment: Workshop paper presented at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty https://sites.google.com/umich.edu/saferobotautonomy/home
comments: Workshop paper presented at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty https://sites.google.com/umich.edu/saferobotautonomy/home
abstract: We consider the task of detecting anomalies for autonomous mobile robots based on vision. We categorize relevant types of visual anomalies and discuss how they can be detected by unsupervised deep learning methods. We propose a novel dataset built specifically for this task, on which we test a state-of-the-art approach; we finally discuss deployment in a real scenario.
summary: We consider the task of detecting anomalies for autonomous mobile robots based on vision. We categorize relevant types of visual anomalies and discuss how they can be detected by unsupervised deep learning methods. We propose a novel dataset built specifically for this task, on which we test a state-of-the-art approach; we finally discuss deployment in a real scenario.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑基于视觉检测自主移动机器人异常的任务。我们对相关类型的视觉异常进行分类，并讨论如何通过无监督深度学习方法检测它们。我们提出了一个专门为此任务构建的新颖数据集，我们在该数据集上测试了最先进的方法；我们最后讨论了实际场景中的部署。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于视觉的自主移动机器人异常检测任务，提出了一种新型数据集并测试了先进方法。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人在自主运行中需可靠检测视觉异常以确保安全，但现有方法在无监督学习和数据集方面存在不足。
AI.method: 分类视觉异常类型，采用无监督深度学习方法，构建专用数据集并测试前沿算法，最后验证实际场景部署可行性。
AI.result: 验证了无监督方法在新型数据集上的有效性，并分析了实际部署中的挑战与性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 无监督视觉异常检测可行，但需进一步优化以应对真实环境复杂性，所构建数据集为未来研究提供支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了基于视觉的自主移动机器人异常检测任务，提出了一种新型数据集并测试了先进方法。
ai_content.motivation: 移动机器人在自主运行中需可靠检测视觉异常以确保安全，但现有方法在无监督学习和数据集方面存在不足。
ai_content.method: 分类视觉异常类型，采用无监督深度学习方法，构建专用数据集并测试前沿算法，最后验证实际场景部署可行性。
ai_content.result: 验证了无监督方法在新型数据集上的有效性，并分析了实际部署中的挑战与性能表现。
ai_content.conclusion: 无监督视觉异常检测可行，但需进一步优化以应对真实环境复杂性，所构建数据集为未来研究提供支持。

search_text: Challenges in Visual Anomaly Detection for Mobile Robots 移动机器人视觉异常检测的挑战 We consider the task of detecting anomalies for autonomous mobile robots based on vision. We categorize relevant types of visual anomalies and discuss how they can be detected by unsupervised deep learning methods. We propose a novel dataset built specifically for this task, on which we test a state-of-the-art approach; we finally discuss deployment in a real scenario. 我们考虑基于视觉检测自主移动机器人异常的任务。我们对相关类型的视觉异常进行分类，并讨论如何通过无监督深度学习方法检测它们。我们提出了一个专门为此任务构建的新颖数据集，我们在该数据集上测试了最先进的方法；我们最后讨论了实际场景中的部署。 本文探讨了基于视觉的自主移动机器人异常检测任务，提出了一种新型数据集并测试了先进方法。 Dario Mantegazza,Alessandro Giusti,Luca M. Gambardella,Andrea Rizzoli,Jérôme Guzzi cs.CV,cs.RO,stat.ML

authors_text: Luca Longo
title: Modeling cognitive load as a self-supervised brain rate with electroencephalography and deep learning
title_zh: 通过脑电图和深度学习将认知负荷建模为自我监督的大脑速率
abstract: The principal reason for measuring mental workload is to quantify the cognitive cost of performing tasks to predict human performance. Unfortunately, a method for assessing mental workload that has general applicability does not exist yet. This research presents a novel self-supervised method for mental workload modelling from EEG data employing Deep Learning and a continuous brain rate, an index of cognitive activation, without requiring human declarative knowledge. This method is a convolutional recurrent neural network trainable with spatially preserving spectral topographic head-maps from EEG data to fit the brain rate variable. Findings demonstrate the capacity of the convolutional layers to learn meaningful high-level representations from EEG data since within-subject models had a test Mean Absolute Percentage Error average of 11%. The addition of a Long-Short Term Memory layer for handling sequences of high-level representations was not significant, although it did improve their accuracy. Findings point to the existence of quasi-stable blocks of learnt high-level representations of cognitive activation because they can be induced through convolution and seem not to be dependent on each other over time, intuitively matching the non-stationary nature of brain responses. Across-subject models, induced with data from an increasing number of participants, thus containing more variability, obtained a similar accuracy to the within-subject models. This highlights the potential generalisability of the induced high-level representations across people, suggesting the existence of subject-independent cognitive activation patterns. This research contributes to the body of knowledge by providing scholars with a novel computational method for mental workload modelling that aims to be generally applicable, does not rely on ad-hoc human-crafted models supporting replicability and falsifiability.

Findings point to the existence of quasi-stable blocks of learnt high-level representations of cognitive activation because they can be induced through convolution and seem not to be dependent on each other over time, intuitively matching the non-stationary nature of brain responses. Across-subject models, induced with data from an increasing number of participants, thus containing more variability, obtained a similar accuracy to the within-subject models. This highlights the potential generalisability of the induced high-level representations across people, suggesting the existence of subject-independent cognitive activation patterns. abstract_zh: 测量脑力负荷的主要原因是量化执行任务的认知成本以预测人类表现。不幸的是，目前还不存在一种具有普遍适用性的评估脑力负荷的方法。这项研究提出了一种新颖的自我监督方法，利用深度学习和连续大脑速率（认知激活指数）根据脑电图数据进行心理负荷建模，而不需要人类的陈述性知识。该方法是一种可训练的卷积循环神经网络，可在空间上保留来自脑电图数据的光谱地形头部图，以适应大脑速率变量。研究结果表明，卷积层有能力从 EEG 数据中学习有意义的高级表示，因为受试者内模型的测试平均绝对百分比误差平均值为 11%。添加长短期记忆层来处理高级表示序列并不重要，尽管它确实提高了准确性。研究结果表明，认知激活的学习高级表示的准稳定块的存在，因为它们可以通过卷积诱导，并且随着时间的推移似乎不相互依赖，直观地匹配大脑反应的非平稳性质。跨受试者模型由越来越多的参与者的数据引发，因此包含更多的变异性，获得了与受试者内模型相似的准确性。这凸显了诱发的高层次表征在人群中的潜在普遍性，表明存在独立于主体的认知激活模式。这项研究为学者们提供了一种新颖的脑力负荷建模计算方法，旨在普遍适用，不依赖于支持可复制性和可证伪性的临时人工模型，从而对知识体系做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脑电图（EEG）和深度学习的自监督方法，用于建模认知负荷，无需依赖人类声明性知识。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏通用的评估认知负荷的方法，现有方法依赖人工设计模型，难以推广。
AI.method: 采用卷积循环神经网络（CRNN），利用EEG数据的空间保留频谱拓扑图进行训练，结合自监督学习提取高阶认知激活表示。
AI.result: 单被试模型测试集平均绝对百分比误差为11%，跨被试模型准确性与单被试模型相近，表明高阶表示具有跨个体泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为认知负荷建模提供了通用计算框架，支持可重复性和可证伪性，揭示了认知激活的跨个体独立模式。

authors_text: Benoit Guillard,Sai Vemprala,Jayesh K. Gupta,Ondrej Miksik,Vibhav Vineet,Pascal Fua,Ashish Kapoor
title: Learning to Simulate Realistic LiDARs
title_zh: 学习模拟真实的激光雷达
abstract: Simulating realistic sensors is a challenging part in data generation for autonomous systems, often involving carefully handcrafted sensor design, scene properties, and physics modeling. To alleviate this, we introduce a pipeline for data-driven simulation of a realistic LiDAR sensor. We propose a model that learns a mapping between RGB images and corresponding LiDAR features such as raydrop or per-point intensities directly from real datasets. We show that our model can learn to encode realistic effects such as dropped points on transparent surfaces or high intensity returns on reflective materials. When applied to naively raycasted point clouds provided by off-the-shelf simulator software, our model enhances the data by predicting intensities and removing points based on the scene's appearance to match a real LiDAR sensor. We use our technique to learn models of two distinct LiDAR sensors and use them to improve simulated LiDAR data accordingly. Through a sample task of vehicle segmentation, we show that enhancing simulated point clouds with our technique improves downstream task performance.
summary: Simulating realistic sensors is a challenging part in data generation for autonomous systems, often involving carefully handcrafted sensor design, scene properties, and physics modeling. To alleviate this, we introduce a pipeline for data-driven simulation of a realistic LiDAR sensor. We propose a model that learns a mapping between RGB images and corresponding LiDAR features such as raydrop or per-point intensities directly from real datasets. We show that our model can learn to encode realistic effects such as dropped points on transparent surfaces or high intensity returns on reflective materials. When applied to naively raycasted point clouds provided by off-the-shelf simulator software, our model enhances the data by predicting intensities and removing points based on the scene's appearance to match a real LiDAR sensor. We use our technique to learn models of two distinct LiDAR sensors and use them to improve simulated LiDAR data accordingly. Through a sample task of vehicle segmentation, we show that enhancing simulated point clouds with our technique improves downstream task performance.
abstract_zh: 模拟真实传感器是自主系统数据生成中的一个具有挑战性的部分，通常涉及精心设计的传感器设计、场景属性和物理建模。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一个用于真实 LiDAR 传感器的数据驱动模拟的管道。我们提出了一种模型，可以直接从真实数据集中学习 RGB 图像和相应 LiDAR 特征（例如射线滴或每点强度）之间的映射。我们表明，我们的模型可以学习编码真实效果，例如透明表面上的掉落点或反射材料上的高强度返回。当应用于现成模拟器软件提供的简单光线投射点云时，我们的模型通过预测强度并根据场景外观删除点以匹配真实的 LiDAR 传感器来增强数据。我们使用我们的技术来学习两个不同 LiDAR 传感器的模型，并使用它们相应地改进模拟 LiDAR 数据。通过车辆分割的示例任务，我们表明使用我们的技术增强模拟点云可以提高下游任务性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的管道，通过学习RGB图像与LiDAR特征之间的映射关系，模拟真实LiDAR传感器的特性。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR仿真依赖手工设计的传感器模型和物理模拟，难以复现真实效果，需通过数据驱动方法提升仿真真实性。
AI.method: 基于真实数据集训练模型，直接学习RGB图像到LiDAR特征（如点云缺失、反射强度）的映射，通过预测强度值和移除特定点优化仿真点云。
AI.result: 成功构建两种LiDAR传感器模型，通过车辆分割任务验证，增强后的仿真数据在下游任务中表现优于原始仿真数据。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法能有效提升LiDAR仿真真实性，为自动驾驶等任务提供更高质量的合成数据支持。

Through a sample task of vehicle segmentation, we show that enhancing simulated point clouds with our technique improves downstream task performance. 模拟真实传感器是自主系统数据生成中的一个具有挑战性的部分，通常涉及精心设计的传感器设计、场景属性和物理建模。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一个用于真实 LiDAR 传感器的数据驱动模拟的管道。我们提出了一种模型，可以直接从真实数据集中学习 RGB 图像和相应 LiDAR 特征（例如射线滴或每点强度）之间的映射。我们表明，我们的模型可以学习编码真实效果，例如透明表面上的掉落点或反射材料上的高强度返回。当应用于现成模拟器软件提供的简单光线投射点云时，我们的模型通过预测强度并根据场景外观删除点以匹配真实的 LiDAR 传感器来增强数据。我们使用我们的技术来学习两个不同 LiDAR 传感器的模型，并使用它们相应地改进模拟 LiDAR 数据。通过车辆分割的示例任务，我们表明使用我们的技术增强模拟点云可以提高下游任务性能。 本文提出一种数据驱动的管道，通过学习RGB图像与LiDAR特征之间的映射关系，模拟真实LiDAR传感器的特性。 Benoit Guillard,Sai Vemprala,Jayesh K. Gupta,Ondrej Miksik,Vibhav Vineet,Pascal Fua,Ashish Kapoor cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Haoran Lai,Tao Wang,Shuoling Zhou
title: DLUNet: Semi-supervised Learning based Dual-Light UNet for Multi-organ Segmentation
title_zh: DLUNet：基于半监督学习的双光 UNet，用于多器官分割
abstract: The manual ground truth of abdominal multi-organ is labor-intensive. In order to make full use of CT data, we developed a semi-supervised learning based dual-light UNet. In the training phase, it consists of two light UNets, which make full use of label and unlabeled data simultaneously by using consistent-based learning. Moreover, separable convolution and residual concatenation was introduced light UNet to reduce the computational cost. Further, a robust segmentation loss was applied to improve the performance. In the inference phase, only a light UNet is used, which required low time cost and less GPU memory utilization. The average DSC of this method in the validation set is 0.8718. The code is available in https://github.com/laihaoran/Semi-SupervisednnUNet.
summary: The manual ground truth of abdominal multi-organ is labor-intensive. In order to make full use of CT data, we developed a semi-supervised learning based dual-light UNet. In the training phase, it consists of two light UNets, which make full use of label and unlabeled data simultaneously by using consistent-based learning. Moreover, separable convolution and residual concatenation was introduced light UNet to reduce the computational cost. Further, a robust segmentation loss was applied to improve the performance. In the inference phase, only a light UNet is used, which required low time cost and less GPU memory utilization. The average DSC of this method in the validation set is 0.8718. The code is available in https://github.com/laihaoran/Semi-SupervisednnUNet.
abstract_zh: 腹部多器官的手动地面实况是劳动密集型的。为了充分利用CT数据，我们开发了基于半监督学习的双光UNet。在训练阶段，它由两个轻量UNet组成，通过使用基于一致的学习同时充分利用标签和未标签数据。此外，轻UNet引入了可分离卷积和残差连接来降低计算成本。此外，应用了强大的分割损失来提高性能。在推理阶段，仅使用轻型UNet，需要较低的时间成本和较少的GPU内存占用。该方法在验证集中的平均DSC为0.8718。代码可在 https://github.com/laihaoran/Semi-SupervisednnUNet 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半监督学习的双轻量UNet模型（DLUNet），用于解决腹部多器官分割中标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 手动标注医学影像数据耗时且成本高，而CT数据中未标注信息未被充分利用，需开发兼顾标注与未标注数据的高效分割方法。
AI.method: 采用双轻量UNet结构，结合一致性学习同时利用标注与未标注数据；引入可分离卷积和残差连接降低计算成本，并使用稳健分割损失函数优化性能。推理阶段仅需单个轻量UNet以减少资源消耗。
AI.result: 在验证集上达到平均DSC 0.8718的分割精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DLUNet通过半监督学习与轻量化设计有效平衡了分割精度与计算效率，为医学图像分割提供了实用方案。

authors_text: José-Miguel Díaz-Báñez,Nadine Kroher
title: Maths, Computation and Flamenco: overview and challenges
title_zh: 数学、计算和弗拉门戈：概述和挑战
abstract: Flamenco is a rich performance-oriented art music genre from Southern Spain which attracts a growing community of aficionados around the globe. Due to its improvisational and expressive nature, its unique musical characteristics, and the fact that the genre is largely undocumented, flamenco poses a number of interesting mathematical and computational challenges. Most existing approaches in Musical Information Retrieval (MIR) were developed in the context of popular or classical music and do often not generalize well to non-Western music traditions, in particular when the underlying music theoretical assumptions do not hold for these genres. Over the recent decade, a number of computational problems related to the automatic analysis of flamenco music have been defined and several methods addressing a variety of musical aspects have been proposed. This paper provides an overview of the challenges which arise in the context of computational analysis of flamenco music and outlines an overview of existing approaches.
summary: Flamenco is a rich performance-oriented art music genre from Southern Spain which attracts a growing community of aficionados around the globe. Due to its improvisational and expressive nature, its unique musical characteristics, and the fact that the genre is largely undocumented, flamenco poses a number of interesting mathematical and computational challenges. Most existing approaches in Musical Information Retrieval (MIR) were developed in the context of popular or classical music and do often not generalize well to non-Western music traditions, in particular when the underlying music theoretical assumptions do not hold for these genres. Over the recent decade, a number of computational problems related to the automatic analysis of flamenco music have been defined and several methods addressing a variety of musical aspects have been proposed. This paper provides an overview of the challenges which arise in the context of computational analysis of flamenco music and outlines an overview of existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 弗拉门戈是来自西班牙南部的一种丰富的以表演为导向的艺术音乐流派，吸引了全球越来越多的爱好者群体。由于其即兴创作和表现力的本质、独特的音乐特征以及该流派基本上没有记录的事实，弗拉门戈提出了许多有趣的数学和计算挑战。大多数现有的音乐信息检索（MIR）方法都是在流行或古典音乐的背景下开发的，通常不能很好地推广到非西方音乐传统，特别是当基本的音乐理论假设不适用于这些流派时。近十年来，已经定义了许多与弗拉门戈音乐自动分析相关的计算问题，并提出了几种解决各种音乐方面的方法。本文概述了弗拉门戈音乐计算分析中出现的挑战，并概述了现有方法。

AI.tldr: 概述弗拉门戈音乐在计算分析中的挑战，并综述现有研究方法
AI.motivation: 弗拉门戈音乐因即兴性和独特性，现有音乐信息检索方法难以适用，需探索其计算分析的挑战与解决方案
AI.method: 通过文献综述和案例分析，定义自动分析弗拉门戈音乐的计算问题，并总结现有方法
AI.result: 概述了弗拉门戈音乐计算分析的主要挑战，总结了现有方法，并指出现有研究的局限性
AI.conclusion: 需跨学科合作，开发适应非西方音乐理论的计算方法，推动MIR技术的多样性发展

authors_text: Filipe Fernandes,Cláudia Werner
title: Software Product Line for Metaverse: Preliminary Results
title_zh: Metaverse软件产品线：初步结果
abstract: The Metaverse is a network of eXtended Reality applications (XR apps) connected to each other, over the Internet infrastructure, allowing network users, systems, and devices to access them. It is very challenging to implement solutions for XR apps, due to the combination of complex concerns that should be addressed: multiple users with non-traditional input and output devices, different hardware platforms that should be addressed, forceful interactive rates, and experimental interaction techniques, among other issues. Therefore, this work aims to present a Software Product Line (SPL)-based approach to support the development of Web XR apps. More specifically, we define a features model that represents similarities and variables (domain analysis); we defined a core composed of generic and reusable software artifacts (domain project); and we developed an interface to support the instantiation of a Web XR app family, named MetaSee Features Model Editor (domain implementation). This approach integrates with a component of the MetaSEE architecture (Metaverse for Software Engineering Education). A preliminary assessment found that Features Model has conceptual consistency from the point of view of the complexity of Web XR Apps multimodal interaction. As future work, features model and artifacts will be increased with improvements and an evaluation with a significant number of participants will be made.
summary: The Metaverse is a network of eXtended Reality applications (XR apps) connected to each other, over the Internet infrastructure, allowing network users, systems, and devices to access them. It is very challenging to implement solutions for XR apps, due to the combination of complex concerns that should be addressed: multiple users with non-traditional input and output devices, different hardware platforms that should be addressed, forceful interactive rates, and experimental interaction techniques, among other issues. Therefore, this work aims to present a Software Product Line (SPL)-based approach to support the development of Web XR apps. More specifically, we define a features model that represents similarities and variables (domain analysis); we defined a core composed of generic and reusable software artifacts (domain project); and we developed an interface to support the instantiation of a Web XR app family, named MetaSee Features Model Editor (domain implementation). This approach integrates with a component of the MetaSEE architecture (Metaverse for Software Engineering Education). A preliminary assessment found that Features Model has conceptual consistency from the point of view of the complexity of Web XR Apps multimodal interaction. As future work, features model and artifacts will be increased with improvements and an evaluation with a significant number of participants will be made.
abstract_zh: Metaverse 是一个通过互联网基础设施相互连接的扩展现实应用程序（XR 应用程序）网络，允许网络用户、系统和设备访问它们。实施 XR 应用解决方案非常具有挑战性，因为需要解决的复杂问题包括：使用非传统输入和输出设备的多个用户、需要解决的不同硬件平台、强大的交互速率和实验性交互技术等问题。因此，这项工作旨在提出一种基于软件产品线（SPL）的方法来支持 Web XR 应用程序的开发。更具体地说，我们定义一个表示相似性和变量的特征模型（领域分析）；我们定义了一个由通用且可重用的软件工件（领域项目）组成的核心；我们开发了一个接口来支持 Web XR 应用程序系列的实例化，名为 MetaSee Features Model Editor（域实现）。该方法与 MetaSEE 架构（Metaverse for Software Engineering Education）的一个组件集成。初步评估发现，从Web XR Apps多模态交互的复杂性来看，Features Model具有概念上的一致性。作为未来的工作，特征模型和工件将随着改进而增加，并且将进行大量参与者的评估。

AI.tldr: 提出基于软件产品线（SPL）的方法支持Web XR应用开发
AI.motivation: 解决元宇宙XR应用开发中面临的多用户支持、硬件兼容性、交互复杂性等技术挑战
AI.method: 构建特征模型（领域分析）、定义通用核心构件（领域项目）并开发MetaSee特征模型编辑器（领域实现），集成于MetaSEE架构
AI.result: 特征模型通过概念一致性验证，但需进一步扩展和大规模用户评估
AI.conclusion: 该SPL方法为元宇宙应用开发提供可复用框架，未来将优化模型并验证有效性

motivation: 解决元宇宙XR应用开发中面临的多用户支持、硬件兼容性、交互复杂性等技术挑战
method: 构建特征模型（领域分析）、定义通用核心构件（领域项目）并开发MetaSee特征模型编辑器（领域实现），集成于MetaSEE架构
result: 特征模型通过概念一致性验证，但需进一步扩展和大规模用户评估
conclusion: 该SPL方法为元宇宙应用开发提供可复用框架，未来将优化模型并验证有效性
search_text: Software Product Line for Metaverse: Preliminary Results Metaverse软件产品线：初步结果 The Metaverse is a network of eXtended Reality applications (XR apps) connected to each other, over the Internet infrastructure, allowing network users, systems, and devices to access them. It is very challenging to implement solutions for XR apps, due to the combination of complex concerns that should be addressed: multiple users with non-traditional input and output devices, different hardware platforms that should be addressed, forceful interactive rates, and experimental interaction techniques, among other issues. Therefore, this work aims to present a Software Product Line (SPL)-based approach to support the development of Web XR apps. More specifically, we define a features model that represents similarities and variables (domain analysis); we defined a core composed of generic and reusable software artifacts (domain project); and we developed an interface to support the instantiation of a Web XR app family, named MetaSee Features Model Editor (domain implementation). This approach integrates with a component of the MetaSEE architecture (Metaverse for Software Engineering Education). A preliminary assessment found that Features Model has conceptual consistency from the point of view of the complexity of Web XR Apps multimodal interaction. As future work, features model and artifacts will be increased with improvements and an evaluation with a significant number of participants will be made. Metaverse 是一个通过互联网基础设施相互连接的扩展现实应用程序（XR 应用程序）网络，允许网络用户、系统和设备访问它们。实施 XR 应用解决方案非常具有挑战性，因为需要解决的复杂问题包括：使用非传统输入和输出设备的多个用户、需要解决的不同硬件平台、强大的交互速率和实验性交互技术等问题。因此，这项工作旨在提出一种基于软件产品线（SPL）的方法来支持 Web XR 应用程序的开发。更具体地说，我们定义一个表示相似性和变量的特征模型（领域分析）；我们定义了一个由通用且可重用的软件工件（领域项目）组成的核心；我们开发了一个接口来支持 Web XR 应用程序系列的实例化，名为 MetaSee Features Model Editor（域实现）。该方法与 MetaSEE 架构（Metaverse for Software Engineering Education）的一个组件集成。初步评估发现，从Web XR Apps多模态交互的复杂性来看，Features Model具有概念上的一致性。作为未来的工作，特征模型和工件将随着改进而增加，并且将进行大量参与者的评估。 提出基于软件产品线（SPL）的方法支持Web XR应用开发 Filipe Fernandes,Cláudia Werner cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Saddam Hussain Khan
title: COVID-19 Detection and Analysis From Lung CT Images using Novel Channel Boosted CNNs
title_zh: 使用新型通道增强 CNN 对肺部 CT 图像进行 COVID-19 检测和分析
abstract: In December 2019, the global pandemic COVID-19 in Wuhan, China, affected human life and the worldwide economy. Therefore, an efficient diagnostic system is required to control its spread. However, the automatic diagnostic system poses challenges with a limited amount of labeled data, minor contrast variation, and high structural similarity between infection and background. In this regard, a new two-phase deep convolutional neural network (CNN) based diagnostic system is proposed to detect minute irregularities and analyze COVID-19 infection. In the first phase, a novel SB-STM-BRNet CNN is developed, incorporating a new channel Squeezed and Boosted (SB) and dilated convolutional-based Split-Transform-Merge (STM) block to detect COVID-19 infected lung CT images. The new STM blocks performed multi-path region-smoothing and boundary operations, which helped to learn minor contrast variation and global COVID-19 specific patterns. Furthermore, the diverse boosted channels are achieved using the SB and Transfer Learning concepts in STM blocks to learn texture variation between COVID-19-specific and healthy images. In the second phase, COVID-19 infected images are provided to the novel COVID-CB-RESeg segmentation CNN to identify and analyze COVID-19 infectious regions. The proposed COVID-CB-RESeg methodically employed region-homogeneity and heterogeneity operations in each encoder-decoder block and boosted-decoder using auxiliary channels to simultaneously learn the low illumination and boundaries of the COVID-19 infected region. The proposed diagnostic system yields good performance in terms of accuracy: 98.21 %, F-score: 98.24%, Dice Similarity: 96.40 %, and IOU: 98.85 % for the COVID-19 infected region. The proposed diagnostic system would reduce the burden and strengthen the radiologist's decision for a fast and accurate COVID-19 diagnosis.

Furthermore, the diverse boosted channels are achieved using the SB and Transfer Learning concepts in STM blocks to learn texture variation between COVID-19-specific and healthy images. In the second phase, COVID-19 infected images are provided to the novel COVID-CB-RESeg segmentation CNN to identify and analyze COVID-19 infectious regions. abstract_zh: 2019 年 12 月，中国武汉爆发的新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 全球大流行影响了人类生活和全球经济。因此，需要有效的诊断系统来控制其传播。然而，自动诊断系统面临着标记数据量有限、对比度变化较小以及感染与背景之间结构高度相似的挑战。在这方面，提出了一种新的基于两阶段深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的诊断系统来检测微小的异常情况并分析 COVID-19 感染。在第一阶段，开发了一种新颖的 SB-STM-BRNet CNN，结合了新通道 Squeezed and Boosted (SB) 和基于扩张卷积的 Split-Transform-Merge (STM) 模块来检测感染了 COVID-19 的肺部 CT 图像。新的 STM 模块执行多路径区域平滑和边界操作，这有助于学习微小的对比度变化和全局 COVID-19 特定模式。此外，使用 STM 块中的 SB 和迁移学习概念来学习 COVID-19 特定图像和健康图像之间的纹理变化，从而实现多样化的增强通道。在第二阶段，将 COVID-19 感染图像提供给新颖的 COVID-CB-RESeg 分割 CNN，以识别和分析 COVID-19 感染区域。所提出的 COVID-CB-RESeg 在每个编码器-解码器块和增强解码器中系统地采用区域同质性和异质性操作，并使用辅助通道同时学习 COVID-19 感染区域的低照度和边界。对于 COVID-19 感染区域，所提出的诊断系统在准确度方面表现良好：98.21％，F-score：98.24％，Dice 相似度：96.40％，IOU：98.85％。拟议的诊断系统将减轻放射科医生的负担并增强其快速、准确诊断 COVID-19 的决策能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于新型通道增强卷积神经网络（CNN）的两阶段系统，用于检测和分析肺部CT图像中的COVID-19感染。
AI.motivation: 由于COVID-19疫情对全球生命和经济的影响，亟需高效诊断系统以应对数据量有限、对比度低及感染区域与背景结构相似等挑战。
AI.method: 第一阶段设计SB-STM-BRNet CNN，结合通道压缩增强（SB）与空洞卷积的Split-Transform-Merge（STM）模块，捕捉细微对比度变化和全局感染特征；第二阶段采用COVID-CB-RESeg分割网络，通过区域同质/异质操作及辅助通道提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在COVID-19感染区域检测中，系统达到98.21%的准确率、98.24%的F值、96.40%的Dice相似度及98.85%的IOU指标。
AI.conclusion: 该系统显著提升诊断效率与准确性，可减轻放射科医生负担，为快速精准诊断提供支持。

authors_text: Ian Gemp,Thomas Anthony,Yoram Bachrach,Avishkar Bhoopchand,Kalesha Bullard,Jerome Connor,Vibhavari Dasagi,Bart De Vylder,Edgar Duenez-Guzman,Romuald Elie,Richard Everett,Daniel Hennes,Edward Hughes,Mina Khan,Marc Lanctot,Kate Larson,Guy Lever,Siqi Liu,Luke Marris,Kevin R. McKee,Paul Muller,Julien Perolat,Florian Strub,Andrea Tacchetti,Eugene Tarassov, et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
title: Developing, Evaluating and Scaling Learning Agents in Multi-Agent Environments
title_zh: 在多代理环境中开发、评估和扩展学习代理
abstract: The Game Theory & Multi-Agent team at DeepMind studies several aspects of multi-agent learning ranging from computing approximations to fundamental concepts in game theory to simulating social dilemmas in rich spatial environments and training 3-d humanoids in difficult team coordination tasks. A signature aim of our group is to use the resources and expertise made available to us at DeepMind in deep reinforcement learning to explore multi-agent systems in complex environments and use these benchmarks to advance our understanding. Here, we summarise the recent work of our team and present a taxonomy that we feel highlights many important open challenges in multi-agent research.
summary: The Game Theory & Multi-Agent team at DeepMind studies several aspects of multi-agent learning ranging from computing approximations to fundamental concepts in game theory to simulating social dilemmas in rich spatial environments and training 3-d humanoids in difficult team coordination tasks. A signature aim of our group is to use the resources and expertise made available to us at DeepMind in deep reinforcement learning to explore multi-agent systems in complex environments and use these benchmarks to advance our understanding. Here, we summarise the recent work of our team and present a taxonomy that we feel highlights many important open challenges in multi-agent research.
abstract_zh: DeepMind 的博弈论和多智能体团队研究多智能体学习的多个方面，从计算近似到博弈论中的基本概念，再到模拟丰富空间环境中的社会困境，以及在困难的团队协调任务中训练 3D 类人机器人。我们团队的一个标志性目标是利用 DeepMind 在深度强化学习方面提供的资源和专业知识来探索复杂环境中的多智能体系统，并使用这些基准来增进我们的理解。在这里，我们总结了我们团队最近的工作，并提出了一个分类法，我们认为该分类法强调了多智能体研究中的许多重要的开放挑战。

AI.tldr: 总结团队在多智能体环境中的学习代理开发、评估与扩展的近期工作，并提出一个分类法以突出多智能体研究的重要开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 利用深度强化学习资源，探索复杂环境中的多智能体系统，以推动多智能体学习领域的理解与进步。
AI.method: 通过深度强化学习方法，结合博弈论分析、社会困境模拟及复杂团队协作任务训练，开发和评估多智能体系统。
AI.result: 总结了多智能体学习的关键研究方向，并提出了一个系统化的分类框架，明确了当前研究中的核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统的研究需结合理论与实践，未来应聚焦于复杂环境下的协作机制与可扩展性挑战。

A signature aim of our group is to use the resources and expertise made available to us at DeepMind in deep reinforcement learning to explore multi-agent systems in complex environments and use these benchmarks to advance our understanding.
