DeepMind 的博弈论和多智能体团队研究多智能体学习的多个方面，从计算近似到博弈论中的基本概念，再到模拟丰富空间环境中的社会困境，以及在困难的团队协调任务中训练 3D 类人机器人。我们团队的一个标志性目标是利用 DeepMind 在深度强化学习方面提供的资源和专业知识来探索复杂环境中的多智能体系统，并使用这些基准来增进我们的理解。在这里，我们总结了我们团队最近的工作，并提出了一个分类法，我们认为该分类法强调了多智能体研究中的许多重要的开放挑战。 总结团队在多智能体环境中的学习代理开发、评估与扩展的近期工作，并提出一个分类法以突出多智能体研究的重要开放挑战。 Ian Gemp,Thomas Anthony,Yoram Bachrach,Avishkar Bhoopchand,Kalesha Bullard,Jerome Connor,Vibhavari Dasagi,Bart De Vylder,Edgar Duenez-Guzman,Romuald Elie,Richard Everett,Daniel Hennes,Edward Hughes,Mina Khan,Marc Lanctot,Kate Larson,Guy Lever,Siqi Liu,Luke Marris,Kevin R. McKee,Paul Muller,Julien Perolat,Florian Strub,Andrea Tacchetti,Eugene Tarassov, et al. (2 additional authors not shown) cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Shaobin Chen,Jie Zhou,Yuling Sun,Liang He
title: An Information Minimization Based Contrastive Learning Model for Unsupervised Sentence Embeddings Learning
title_zh: 基于信息最小化的无监督句子嵌入学习对比学习模型
abstract: Unsupervised sentence embeddings learning has been recently dominated by contrastive learning methods (e.g., SimCSE), which keep positive pairs similar and push negative pairs apart. The contrast operation aims to keep as much information as possible by maximizing the mutual information between positive instances, which leads to redundant information in sentence embedding. To address this problem, we present an information minimization based contrastive learning (InforMin-CL) model to retain the useful information and discard the redundant information by maximizing the mutual information and minimizing the information entropy between positive instances meanwhile for unsupervised sentence representation learning. Specifically, we find that information minimization can be achieved by simple contrast and reconstruction objectives. The reconstruction operation reconstitutes the positive instance via the other positive instance to minimize the information entropy between positive instances. We evaluate our model on fourteen downstream tasks, including both supervised and unsupervised (semantic textual similarity) tasks. Extensive experimental results show that our InforMin-CL obtains a state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Unsupervised sentence embeddings learning has been recently dominated by contrastive learning methods (e.g., SimCSE), which keep positive pairs similar and push negative pairs apart. The contrast operation aims to keep as much information as possible by maximizing the mutual information between positive instances, which leads to redundant information in sentence embedding. To address this problem, we present an information minimization based contrastive learning (InforMin-CL) model to retain the useful information and discard the redundant information by maximizing the mutual information and minimizing the information entropy between positive instances meanwhile for unsupervised sentence representation learning. Specifically, we find that information minimization can be achieved by simple contrast and reconstruction objectives. The reconstruction operation reconstitutes the positive instance via the other positive instance to minimize the information entropy between positive instances. We evaluate our model on fourteen downstream tasks, including both supervised and unsupervised (semantic textual similarity) tasks. Extensive experimental results show that our InforMin-CL obtains a state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 无监督句子嵌入学习最近主要由对比学习方法（例如 SimCSE）主导，这种方法使正对相似，而负对分开。对比操作的目的是通过最大化正实例之间的互信息来保留尽可能多的信息，这会导致句子嵌入中出现冗余信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于信息最小化的对比学习（InforMin-CL）模型，通过最大化正实例之间的互信息和最小化正实例之间的信息熵，保留有用信息并丢弃冗余信息，同时进行无监督句子表示学习。具体来说，我们发现可以通过简单的对比和重建目标来实现信息最小化。重建操作通过另一个正实例重建正实例，以最小化正实例之间的信息熵。我们在十四个下游任务上评估我们的模型，包括监督和无监督（语义文本相似性）任务。大量的实验结果表明我们的 InforMin-CL 获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息最小化的对比学习模型（InforMin-CL），用于无监督句子嵌入学习，通过最大化互信息并最小化正样本间的信息熵来减少冗余信息。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法（如SimCSE）通过最大化正样本互信息保留信息，但导致嵌入中存在冗余信息，影响表示效果。
AI.method: 结合对比目标与重构目标：对比操作保持正样本相似性，重构操作通过正样本间相互重建最小化信息熵，实现信息最小化。
AI.result: 在14个下游任务（包括监督和无监督任务）中，InforMin-CL达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 信息最小化策略有效平衡了信息保留与冗余消除，提升了无监督句子嵌入的质量。

authors_text: Robin Zbinden
title: Implementing and Experimenting with Diffusion Models for Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 实现和试验用于文本到图像生成的扩散模型
abstract: Taking advantage of the many recent advances in deep learning, text-to-image generative models currently have the merit of attracting the general public attention. Two of these models, DALL-E 2 and Imagen, have demonstrated that highly photorealistic images could be generated from a simple textual description of an image. Based on a novel approach for image generation called diffusion models, text-to-image models enable the production of many different types of high resolution images, where human imagination is the only limit. However, these models require exceptionally large amounts of computational resources to train, as well as handling huge datasets collected from the internet. In addition, neither the codebase nor the models have been released. It consequently prevents the AI community from experimenting with these cutting-edge models, making the reproduction of their results complicated, if not impossible. In this thesis, we aim to contribute by firstly reviewing the different approaches and techniques used by these models, and then by proposing our own implementation of a text-to-image model. Highly based on DALL-E 2, we introduce several slight modifications to tackle the high computational cost induced. We thus have the opportunity to experiment in order to understand what these models are capable of, especially in a low resource regime. In particular, we provide additional and analyses deeper than the ones performed by the authors of DALL-E 2, including ablation studies. Besides, diffusion models use so-called guidance methods to help the generating process. We introduce a new guidance method which can be used in conjunction with other guidance methods to improve image quality. Finally, the images generated by our model are of reasonably good quality, without having to sustain the significant training costs of state-of-the-art text-to-image models.
summary: Taking advantage of the many recent advances in deep learning, text-to-image generative models currently have the merit of attracting the general public attention. Two of these models, DALL-E 2 and Imagen, have demonstrated that highly photorealistic images could be generated from a simple textual description of an image. Based on a novel approach for image generation called diffusion models, text-to-image models enable the production of many different types of high resolution images, where human imagination is the only limit. However, these models require exceptionally large amounts of computational resources to train, as well as handling huge datasets collected from the internet. In addition, neither the codebase nor the models have been released. It consequently prevents the AI community from experimenting with these cutting-edge models, making the reproduction of their results complicated, if not impossible. In this thesis, we aim to contribute by firstly reviewing the different approaches and techniques used by these models, and then by proposing our own implementation of a text-to-image model. Highly based on DALL-E 2, we introduce several slight modifications to tackle the high computational cost induced. We thus have the opportunity to experiment in order to understand what these models are capable of, especially in a low resource regime. In particular, we provide additional and analyses deeper than the ones performed by the authors of DALL-E 2, including ablation studies. Besides, diffusion models use so-called guidance methods to help the generating process. We introduce a new guidance method which can be used in conjunction with other guidance methods to improve image quality. Finally, the images generated by our model are of reasonably good quality, without having to sustain the significant training costs of state-of-the-art text-to-image models.
abstract_zh: 利用深度学习的许多最新进展，文本到图像生成模型目前具有吸引公众关注的优点。其中两个模型 DALL-E 2 和 Imagen 已经证明可以通过图像的简单文本描述生成高度逼真的图像。基于一种称为扩散模型的新颖图像生成方法，文本到图像模型可以生成许多不同类型的高分辨率图像，而人类的想象力是唯一的限制。然而，这些模型需要大量的计算资源来训练，并处理从互联网收集的巨大数据集。此外，代码库和模型都尚未发布。因此，它阻止了人工智能社区尝试这些尖端模型，使得其结果的再现变得复杂，甚至不可能。在本文中，我们的目标是首先回顾这些模型使用的不同方法和技术，然后提出我们自己的文本到图像模型的实现。高度基于 DALL-E 2，我们引入了一些细微的修改来解决引起的高计算成本。因此，我们有机会进行实验，以了解这些模型的能力，特别是在资源匮乏的情况下。特别是，我们提供了比 DALL-E 2 作者所做的更深入的分析，包括消融研究。此外，扩散模型使用所谓的引导方法来帮助生成过程。我们引入了一种新的引导方法，可以与其他引导方法结合使用以提高图像质量。最后，我们的模型生成的图像具有相当好的质量，而无需承受最先进的文本到图像模型的大量训练成本。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在实现并实验基于扩散模型的文本到图像生成模型，通过优化计算成本并引入新方法提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有先进模型（如DALL-E 2）训练成本高昂且未公开代码，限制了学术界对其研究与复现，需开发更易实现且资源消耗更低的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于DALL-E 2架构进行改进，优化计算效率；提出新型引导方法以增强图像生成质量，并通过消融实验深入分析模型性能。
AI.result: 在较低资源条件下生成出质量合理的图像，验证了模型有效性；补充了原作者未开展的深度分析，证实新引导方法可提升图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了低资源文本到图像生成模型，证明了扩散模型在资源受限场景下的可行性，并为后续研究提供了优化方向与新方法。

authors_text: Jaspreet Singh,Chandan Singh
title: Learning Invariant Representations for Equivariant Neural Networks Using Orthogonal Moments
title_zh: 使用正交矩学习等变神经网络的不变表示
comment: International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), 2022
comments: International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), 2022
abstract: The convolutional layers of standard convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are equivariant to translation. However, the convolution and fully-connected layers are not equivariant or invariant to other affine geometric transformations. Recently, a new class of CNNs is proposed in which the conventional layers of CNNs are replaced with equivariant convolution, pooling, and batch-normalization layers. The final classification layer in equivariant neural networks is invariant to different affine geometric transformations such as rotation, reflection and translation, and the scalar value is obtained by either eliminating the spatial dimensions of filter responses using convolution and down-sampling throughout the network or average is taken over the filter responses. In this work, we propose to integrate the orthogonal moments which gives the high-order statistics of the function as an effective means for encoding global invariance with respect to rotation, reflection and translation in fully-connected layers. As a result, the intermediate layers of the network become equivariant while the classification layer becomes invariant. The most widely used Zernike, pseudo-Zernike and orthogonal Fourier-Mellin moments are considered for this purpose. The effectiveness of the proposed work is evaluated by integrating the invariant transition and fully-connected layer in the architecture of group-equivariant CNNs (G-CNNs) on rotated MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets.
summary: The convolutional layers of standard convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are equivariant to translation. However, the convolution and fully-connected layers are not equivariant or invariant to other affine geometric transformations. Recently, a new class of CNNs is proposed in which the conventional layers of CNNs are replaced with equivariant convolution, pooling, and batch-normalization layers. The final classification layer in equivariant neural networks is invariant to different affine geometric transformations such as rotation, reflection and translation, and the scalar value is obtained by either eliminating the spatial dimensions of filter responses using convolution and down-sampling throughout the network or average is taken over the filter responses. In this work, we propose to integrate the orthogonal moments which gives the high-order statistics of the function as an effective means for encoding global invariance with respect to rotation, reflection and translation in fully-connected layers. As a result, the intermediate layers of the network become equivariant while the classification layer becomes invariant. The most widely used Zernike, pseudo-Zernike and orthogonal Fourier-Mellin moments are considered for this purpose. The effectiveness of the proposed work is evaluated by integrating the invariant transition and fully-connected layer in the architecture of group-equivariant CNNs (G-CNNs) on rotated MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets.
abstract_zh: 标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的卷积层与平移是等变的。然而，卷积层和全连接层与其他仿射几何变换并不等变或不变。最近，提出了一类新的 CNN，其中传统的 CNN 层被等变卷积、池化和批量归一化层取代。等变神经网络中的最终分类层对于不同的仿射几何变换（例如旋转、反射和平移）是不变的，并且标量值是通过在整个网络中使用卷积和下采样消除滤波器响应的空间维度来获得的，或者对滤波器响应取平均值。在这项工作中，我们建议整合给出函数高阶统计量的正交矩，作为编码全连接层中关于旋转、反射和平移的全局不变性的有效手段。结果，网络的中间层变得等变，而分类层变得不变。为此目的考虑了最广泛使用的 Zernike、伪 Zernike 和正交 Fourier-Mellin 矩。通过在旋转 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 数据集上的组等变 CNN (G-CNN) 架构中集成不变过渡和全连接层来评估所提出工作的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用正交矩在全连接层中学习对旋转、反射和翻译不变的表示，以增强等变神经网络的不变性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN对平移等变但对其他仿射变换不等变，现有等变网络分类层难以实现全局不变性，需改进方法以应对更复杂的几何变换。
AI.method: 将Zernike、伪Zernike和正交傅里叶-梅林矩集成到等变CNN的全连接层，利用高阶统计量编码全局不变性，保持中间层等变性的同时使分类层不变。
AI.result: 在旋转MNIST和CIFAR10数据集上验证，所提方法有效提升了网络对几何变换的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 正交矩能有效增强全连接层的不变性，结合等变网络结构可显著提升对旋转、反射等仿射变换的适应能力。

search_text: Learning Invariant Representations for Equivariant Neural Networks Using Orthogonal Moments 使用正交矩学习等变神经网络的不变表示 The convolutional layers of standard convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are equivariant to translation. However, the convolution and fully-connected layers are not equivariant or invariant to other affine geometric transformations. Recently, a new class of CNNs is proposed in which the conventional layers of CNNs are replaced with equivariant convolution, pooling, and batch-normalization layers. The final classification layer in equivariant neural networks is invariant to different affine geometric transformations such as rotation, reflection and translation, and the scalar value is obtained by either eliminating the spatial dimensions of filter responses using convolution and down-sampling throughout the network or average is taken over the filter responses. In this work, we propose to integrate the orthogonal moments which gives the high-order statistics of the function as an effective means for encoding global invariance with respect to rotation, reflection and translation in fully-connected layers. As a result, the intermediate layers of the network become equivariant while the classification layer becomes invariant. The most widely used Zernike, pseudo-Zernike and orthogonal Fourier-Mellin moments are considered for this purpose. The effectiveness of the proposed work is evaluated by integrating the invariant transition and fully-connected layer in the architecture of group-equivariant CNNs (G-CNNs) on rotated MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets. 标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的卷积层与平移是等变的。然而，卷积层和全连接层与其他仿射几何变换并不等变或不变。最近，提出了一类新的 CNN，其中传统的 CNN 层被等变卷积、池化和批量归一化层取代。等变神经网络中的最终分类层对于不同的仿射几何变换（例如旋转、反射和平移）是不变的，并且标量值是通过在整个网络中使用卷积和下采样消除滤波器响应的空间维度来获得的，或者对滤波器响应取平均值。在这项工作中，我们建议整合给出函数高阶统计量的正交矩，作为编码全连接层中关于旋转、反射和平移的全局不变性的有效手段。结果，网络的中间层变得等变，而分类层变得不变。为此目的考虑了最广泛使用的 Zernike、伪 Zernike 和正交 Fourier-Mellin 矩。通过在旋转 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 数据集上的组等变 CNN (G-CNN) 架构中集成不变过渡和全连接层来评估所提出工作的有效性。 本文提出利用正交矩在全连接层中学习对旋转、反射和翻译不变的表示，以增强等变神经网络的不变性。 Jaspreet Singh,Chandan Singh cs.CV

authors_text: Shikhar Kumar
title: Understandable Robots
title_zh: 可理解的机器人
abstract: Finally, the work will include an investigation of the contextual form of explanations. In this study, we will include a time-bounded scenario in which the different levels of understanding will be tested to enable us to evaluate suitable and comprehensible explanations. For this we have proposed different levels of understanding (LOU). A user study will be designed to compare different LOU for different contexts of interaction. A user study simultating a hospital environment will be investigated.
summary: Finally, the work will include an investigation of the contextual form of explanations. In this study, we will include a time-bounded scenario in which the different levels of understanding will be tested to enable us to evaluate suitable and comprehensible explanations. For this we have proposed different levels of understanding (LOU). A user study will be designed to compare different LOU for different contexts of interaction. A user study simultating a hospital environment will be investigated.
abstract_zh: 最后，这项工作将包括对解释的上下文形式的调查。在这项研究中，我们将包括一个有时间限制的场景，其中将测试不同程度的理解，以使我们能够评估合适且可理解的解释。为此，我们提出了不同层次的理解（LOU）。用户研究旨在比较不同交互环境下的不同 LOU。将调查模拟医院环境的用户研究。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在研究如何使机器人提供更符合情境且易于理解的解释，通过设计不同理解层次（LOU）并模拟医院环境进行用户测试。
AI.motivation: 在关键场景（如医疗环境）中，机器人需提供清晰、可信的解释以确保用户正确理解和信任其行为。
AI.method: 提出不同理解层次（LOU），设计用户研究模拟医院场景，比较不同LOU在交互情境中的表现。
AI.result: 将评估不同LOU在时间限制和医院情境下的有效性，分析用户对解释的接受度与理解程度。
AI.conclusion: 情境化解释需适配任务复杂度与用户需求，未来研究应进一步优化LOU以提升人机协作的可靠性。

authors_text: Jin Zhang,Lei Zhou,Bochao Cao
title: Learning swimming via deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习学习游泳
comment: We found some errors in the experimental data
comments: We found some errors in the experimental data
abstract: For decades, people have been seeking for fishlike flapping motions that can realize underwater propulsion with low energy cost. Complexity of the nonstationary flow field around the flapping body makes this problem very difficult. In earlier studies, motion patterns are usually prescribed as certain periodic functions which constrains the following optimization process in a small subdomain of the whole motion space. In this work, to avoid this motion constraint, a variational autoencoder (VAE) is designed to compress various flapping motions into a simple action vector. Then we let a flapping airfoil continuously interact with water tunnel environment and adjust its action accordingly through a reinforcement learning (RL) framework. By this automatic close-looped experiment, we obtain several motion patterns that can result in high hydrodynamic efficiency comparing to pure harmonic motions with the same thrust level. And we find that, after numerous trials and errors, RL trainings in current experiment always converge to motion patterns that are close to harmonic motions. In other words, current work proves that harmonic motion with appropriate amplitude and frequency is always an optimal choice for efficient underwater propulsion. Furthermore, the RL framework proposed here can be also extended to the study of other complex swimming problems, which might pave the way for the creation of a robotic fish that can swim like a real fish.
summary: For decades, people have been seeking for fishlike flapping motions that can realize underwater propulsion with low energy cost. Complexity of the nonstationary flow field around the flapping body makes this problem very difficult. In earlier studies, motion patterns are usually prescribed as certain periodic functions which constrains the following optimization process in a small subdomain of the whole motion space. In this work, to avoid this motion constraint, a variational autoencoder (VAE) is designed to compress various flapping motions into a simple action vector. Then we let a flapping airfoil continuously interact with water tunnel environment and adjust its action accordingly through a reinforcement learning (RL) framework. By this automatic close-looped experiment, we obtain several motion patterns that can result in high hydrodynamic efficiency comparing to pure harmonic motions with the same thrust level. And we find that, after numerous trials and errors, RL trainings in current experiment always converge to motion patterns that are close to harmonic motions. In other words, current work proves that harmonic motion with appropriate amplitude and frequency is always an optimal choice for efficient underwater propulsion. Furthermore, the RL framework proposed here can be also extended to the study of other complex swimming problems, which might pave the way for the creation of a robotic fish that can swim like a real fish.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，人们一直在寻找像鱼一样的扑动运动，能够以较低的能源成本实现水下推进。扑动体周围非平稳流场的复杂性使得这个问题变得非常困难。在早期的研究中，运动模式通常被规定为某些周期函数，其将以下优化过程限制在整个运动空间的一个小子域中。在这项工作中，为了避免这种运动约束，设计了变分自动编码器（VAE）来将各种扑动运动压缩为简单的动作向量。然后，我们让扑动的翼型与水洞环境持续交互，并通过强化学习（RL）框架相应地调整其动作。通过这种自动闭环实验，我们获得了几种运动模式，与相同推力水平的纯简谐运动相比，这些运动模式可以带来更高的流体动力效率。我们发现，经过多次尝试和错误，当前实验中的强化学习训练总是收敛到接近简谐运动的运动模式。换句话说，当前的工作证明，具有适当幅度和频率的简谐运动始终是高效水下推进的最佳选择。此外，这里提出的强化学习框架还可以扩展到其他复杂游泳问题的研究，这可能为创建可以像真鱼一样游泳的机器鱼铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过深度强化学习方法研究鱼类般的摆动运动，以实现高效水下推进。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过预设周期性函数限制运动模式，无法全面探索最优运动空间，因此需要更灵活的优化框架。
AI.method: 设计变分自编码器（VAE）将多种摆动运动压缩为动作向量，并结合强化学习框架实现闭环实验优化。
AI.result: 实验发现，强化学习训练收敛于接近谐波运动的模式，证明适当幅值和频率的谐波运动是高效推进的最优选择。
AI.conclusion: 谐波运动在水下推进中具有优势，所提出的框架可拓展至其他复杂游动问题，为仿生机器人研发提供新思路。

And we find that, after numerous trials and errors, RL trainings in current experiment always converge to motion patterns that are close to harmonic motions. In other words, current work proves that harmonic motion with appropriate amplitude and frequency is always an optimal choice for efficient underwater propulsion. Furthermore, the RL framework proposed here can be also extended to the study of other complex swimming problems, which might pave the way for the creation of a robotic fish that can swim like a real fish. 几十年来，人们一直在寻找像鱼一样的扑动运动，能够以较低的能源成本实现水下推进。扑动体周围非平稳流场的复杂性使得这个问题变得非常困难。在早期的研究中，运动模式通常被规定为某些周期函数，其将以下优化过程限制在整个运动空间的一个小子域中。在这项工作中，为了避免这种运动约束，设计了变分自动编码器（VAE）来将各种扑动运动压缩为简单的动作向量。然后，我们让扑动的翼型与水洞环境持续交互，并通过强化学习（RL）框架相应地调整其动作。通过这种自动闭环实验，我们获得了几种运动模式，与相同推力水平的纯简谐运动相比，这些运动模式可以带来更高的流体动力效率。我们发现，经过多次尝试和错误，当前实验中的强化学习训练总是收敛到接近简谐运动的运动模式。换句话说，当前的工作证明，具有适当幅度和频率的简谐运动始终是高效水下推进的最佳选择。此外，这里提出的强化学习框架还可以扩展到其他复杂游泳问题的研究，这可能为创建可以像真鱼一样游泳的机器鱼铺平道路。 本论文通过深度强化学习方法研究鱼类般的摆动运动，以实现高效水下推进。 Jin Zhang,Lei Zhou,Bochao Cao cs.RO,physics.flu-dyn

authors_text: Hang Guo,Zhengxi Hu,Jingtai Liu
title: MGTR: End-to-End Mutual Gaze Detection with Transformer
title_zh: MGTR：使用 Transformer 进行端到端相互注视检测
abstract: People's looking at each other or mutual gaze is ubiquitous in our daily interactions, and detecting mutual gaze is of great significance for understanding human social scenes. Current mutual gaze detection methods focus on two-stage methods, whose inference speed is limited by the two-stage pipeline and the performance in the second stage is affected by the first one. In this paper, we propose a novel one-stage mutual gaze detection framework called Mutual Gaze TRansformer or MGTR to perform mutual gaze detection in an end-to-end manner. By designing mutual gaze instance triples, MGTR can detect each human head bounding box and simultaneously infer mutual gaze relationship based on global image information, which streamlines the whole process with simplicity. Experimental results on two mutual gaze datasets show that our method is able to accelerate mutual gaze detection process without losing performance. Ablation study shows that different components of MGTR can capture different levels of semantic information in images. Code is available at https://github.com/Gmbition/MGTR
summary: People's looking at each other or mutual gaze is ubiquitous in our daily interactions, and detecting mutual gaze is of great significance for understanding human social scenes. Current mutual gaze detection methods focus on two-stage methods, whose inference speed is limited by the two-stage pipeline and the performance in the second stage is affected by the first one. In this paper, we propose a novel one-stage mutual gaze detection framework called Mutual Gaze TRansformer or MGTR to perform mutual gaze detection in an end-to-end manner. By designing mutual gaze instance triples, MGTR can detect each human head bounding box and simultaneously infer mutual gaze relationship based on global image information, which streamlines the whole process with simplicity. Experimental results on two mutual gaze datasets show that our method is able to accelerate mutual gaze detection process without losing performance. Ablation study shows that different components of MGTR can capture different levels of semantic information in images. Code is available at https://github.com/Gmbition/MGTR
abstract_zh: 人们的相互注视或相互注视在我们的日常互动中无处不在，检测相互注视对于理解人类社会场景具有重要意义。目前的相互注视检测方法主要集中在两阶段方法，其推理速度受到两阶段管道的限制，并且第二阶段的性能受到第一阶段的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的单阶段相互注视检测框架，称为相互注视 TRansformer 或 MGTR，以端到端的方式执行相互注视检测。通过设计相互注视实例三元组，MGTR 可以检测每个人体头部边界框，并同时根据全局图像信息推断相互注视关系，从而简化了整个过程。两个相互注视数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够在不损失性能的情况下加速相互注视检测过程。消融研究表明，MGTR 的不同组件可以捕获图像中不同级别的语义信息。代码可在 https://github.com/Gmbition/MGTR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的一阶段互视检测框架MGTR，通过Transformer模型同时检测人脸框并推断互视关系。
AI.motivation: 现有互视检测方法采用两阶段流程，存在推理速度慢且第二阶段性能受第一阶段影响的问题。
AI.method: 设计互视实例三元组，利用Transformer模型基于全局图像信息同时完成人脸检测与互视关系推断。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明方法加速了检测过程且不损失性能，消融实验验证了不同组件对语义信息的捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: MGTR通过端到端设计有效提升了互视检测的效率和性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhijian Hou,Wanjun Zhong,Lei Ji,Difei Gao,Kun Yan,Wing-Kwong Chan,Chong-Wah Ngo,Zheng Shou,Nan Duan
title: CONE: An Efficient COarse-to-fiNE Alignment Framework for Long Video Temporal Grounding
title_zh: CONE：一种用于长视频时间接地的高效从粗到细的对齐框架
comment: ACL 2023 Camera Ready. 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
comments: ACL 2023 Camera Ready. 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
abstract: This paper tackles an emerging and challenging problem of long video temporal grounding~(VTG) that localizes video moments related to a natural language (NL) query. Compared with short videos, long videos are also highly demanded but less explored, which brings new challenges in higher inference computation cost and weaker multi-modal alignment. To address these challenges, we propose CONE, an efficient COarse-to-fiNE alignment framework. CONE is a plug-and-play framework on top of existing VTG models to handle long videos through a sliding window mechanism. Specifically, CONE (1) introduces a query-guided window selection strategy to speed up inference, and (2) proposes a coarse-to-fine mechanism via a novel incorporation of contrastive learning to enhance multi-modal alignment for long videos. Extensive experiments on two large-scale long VTG benchmarks consistently show both substantial performance gains (e.g., from 3.13% to 6.87% on MAD) and state-of-the-art results. Analyses also reveal higher efficiency as the query-guided window selection mechanism accelerates inference time by 2x on Ego4D-NLQ and 15x on MAD while keeping SOTA results. Codes have been released at https://github.com/houzhijian/CONE.
summary: This paper tackles an emerging and challenging problem of long video temporal grounding~(VTG) that localizes video moments related to a natural language (NL) query. Compared with short videos, long videos are also highly demanded but less explored, which brings new challenges in higher inference computation cost and weaker multi-modal alignment. To address these challenges, we propose CONE, an efficient COarse-to-fiNE alignment framework. CONE is a plug-and-play framework on top of existing VTG models to handle long videos through a sliding window mechanism. Specifically, CONE (1) introduces a query-guided window selection strategy to speed up inference, and (2) proposes a coarse-to-fine mechanism via a novel incorporation of contrastive learning to enhance multi-modal alignment for long videos. Extensive experiments on two large-scale long VTG benchmarks consistently show both substantial performance gains (e.g., from 3.13% to 6.87% on MAD) and state-of-the-art results. Analyses also reveal higher efficiency as the query-guided window selection mechanism accelerates inference time by 2x on Ego4D-NLQ and 15x on MAD while keeping SOTA results. Codes have been released at https://github.com/houzhijian/CONE.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了长视频时间接地（VTG）这一新兴且具有挑战性的问题，该问题定位与自然语言（NL）查询相关的视频时刻。与短视频相比，长视频的需求量也很大，但探索较少，这带来了更高的推理计算成本和更弱的多模态对齐方面的新挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 CONE，一种高效的从粗到细的对齐框架。 CONE 是一个基于现有 VTG 模型的即插即用框架，通过滑动窗口机制处理长视频。具体来说，CONE (1) 引入了一种查询引导的窗口选择策略来加速推理，(2) 通过新颖地结合对比学习提出了一种从粗到细的机制，以增强长视频的多模态对齐。对两个大规模长 VTG 基准进行的大量实验一致显示出显着的性能提升（例如，MAD 从 3.13% 提高到 6.87%）和最先进的结果。分析还揭示了更高的效率，因为查询引导的窗口选择机制将 Ego4D-NLQ 上的推理时间加快了 2 倍，将 MAD 上的推理时间加快了 15 倍，同时保持了 SOTA 结果。代码已发布于https://github.com/houzhijian/CONE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CONE框架，解决长视频时序定位（VTG）问题，通过粗到细的对齐机制提升多模态对齐效率。
AI.motivation: 长视频时序定位因计算成本高、多模态对齐弱而挑战较大，现有方法在长视频处理上效率不足。
AI.method: CONE采用滑动窗口机制，包含查询引导的窗口选择策略和基于对比学习的粗到细对齐方法。
AI.result: 在MAD和Ego4D-NLQ数据集上性能提升显著（如MAD提升6.87%），推理速度分别加快2倍和15倍。
AI.conclusion: CONE通过高效框架设计，在保持最先进性能的同时显著提升了长视频时序定位的计算效率。

authors_text: Shengcai Liu,Yu Zhang,Ke Tang,Xin Yao
title: How Good Is Neural Combinatorial Optimization? A Systematic Evaluation on the Traveling Salesman Problem
title_zh: 神经组合优化有多好？旅行商问题的系统评估
abstract: Traditional solvers for tackling combinatorial optimization (CO) problems are usually designed by human experts. Recently, there has been a surge of interest in utilizing deep learning, especially deep reinforcement learning, to automatically learn effective solvers for CO. The resultant new paradigm is termed neural combinatorial optimization (NCO). However, the advantages and disadvantages of NCO relative to other approaches have not been empirically or theoretically well studied. This work presents a comprehensive comparative study of NCO solvers and alternative solvers. Specifically, taking the traveling salesman problem as the testbed problem, the performance of the solvers is assessed in five aspects, i.e., effectiveness, efficiency, stability, scalability, and generalization ability. Our results show that the solvers learned by NCO approaches, in general, still fall short of traditional solvers in nearly all these aspects. A potential benefit of NCO solvers would be their superior time and energy efficiency for small-size problem instances when sufficient training instances are available. Hopefully, this work would help with a better understanding of the strengths and weaknesses of NCO and provide a comprehensive evaluation protocol for further benchmarking NCO approaches in comparison to other approaches.
summary: Traditional solvers for tackling combinatorial optimization (CO) problems are usually designed by human experts. Recently, there has been a surge of interest in utilizing deep learning, especially deep reinforcement learning, to automatically learn effective solvers for CO. The resultant new paradigm is termed neural combinatorial optimization (NCO). However, the advantages and disadvantages of NCO relative to other approaches have not been empirically or theoretically well studied. This work presents a comprehensive comparative study of NCO solvers and alternative solvers. Specifically, taking the traveling salesman problem as the testbed problem, the performance of the solvers is assessed in five aspects, i.e., effectiveness, efficiency, stability, scalability, and generalization ability. Our results show that the solvers learned by NCO approaches, in general, still fall short of traditional solvers in nearly all these aspects. A potential benefit of NCO solvers would be their superior time and energy efficiency for small-size problem instances when sufficient training instances are available. Hopefully, this work would help with a better understanding of the strengths and weaknesses of NCO and provide a comprehensive evaluation protocol for further benchmarking NCO approaches in comparison to other approaches.
abstract_zh: 用于解决组合优化 (CO) 问题的传统求解器通常由人类专家设计。最近，人们对利用深度学习（尤其是深度强化学习）自动学习 CO 的有效求解器的兴趣激增。由此产生的新范式被称为神经组合优化（NCO）。然而，NCO 相对于其他方法的优点和缺点尚未得到实证或理论上的充分研究。这项工作对 NCO 求解器和替代求解器进行了全面的比较研究。具体来说，以旅行商问题为测试台问题，从有效性、效率、稳定性、可扩展性和泛化能力五个方面评估求解器的性能。我们的结果表明，总体而言，通过 NCO 方法学习的求解器在几乎所有这些方面仍然低于传统求解器。 NCO 求解器的一个潜在好处是，当有足够的训练实例可用时，它们对于小规模问题实例具有卓越的时间和能源效率。希望这项工作将有助于更好地了解 NCO 的优点和缺点，并提供一个全面的评估协议，以便进一步对 NCO 方法与其他方法进行比较进行基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估神经组合优化（NCO）方法在旅行商问题（TSP）上的表现，比较其与传统求解器的优劣。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经组合优化（NCO）方法受到关注，但其相对于传统求解器的优势和不足尚未被充分研究，需通过系统性比较填补这一空白。
AI.method: 以TSP为测试问题，从有效性、效率、稳定性、可扩展性和泛化能力五个维度评估NCO求解器与传统方法的性能。
AI.result: NCO求解器在多数指标上仍逊于传统方法，但小规模问题实例中若训练数据充足，其时间与能源效率可能更优。
AI.conclusion: NCO在特定场景下具备潜力，但整体性能仍需提升；本文为后续NCO方法的基准测试提供了全面评估框架。

search_text: How Good Is Neural Combinatorial Optimization? A Systematic Evaluation on the Traveling Salesman Problem 神经组合优化有多好？旅行商问题的系统评估 Traditional solvers for tackling combinatorial optimization (CO) problems are usually designed by human experts. Recently, there has been a surge of interest in utilizing deep learning, especially deep reinforcement learning, to automatically learn effective solvers for CO. The resultant new paradigm is termed neural combinatorial optimization (NCO). However, the advantages and disadvantages of NCO relative to other approaches have not been empirically or theoretically well studied. This work presents a comprehensive comparative study of NCO solvers and alternative solvers. Specifically, taking the traveling salesman problem as the testbed problem, the performance of the solvers is assessed in five aspects, i.e., effectiveness, efficiency, stability, scalability, and generalization ability. Our results show that the solvers learned by NCO approaches, in general, still fall short of traditional solvers in nearly all these aspects. A potential benefit of NCO solvers would be their superior time and energy efficiency for small-size problem instances when sufficient training instances are available. Hopefully, this work would help with a better understanding of the strengths and weaknesses of NCO and provide a comprehensive evaluation protocol for further benchmarking NCO approaches in comparison to other approaches. 用于解决组合优化 (CO) 问题的传统求解器通常由人类专家设计。最近，人们对利用深度学习（尤其是深度强化学习）自动学习 CO 的有效求解器的兴趣激增。由此产生的新范式被称为神经组合优化（NCO）。然而，NCO 相对于其他方法的优点和缺点尚未得到实证或理论上的充分研究。这项工作对 NCO 求解器和替代求解器进行了全面的比较研究。具体来说，以旅行商问题为测试台问题，从有效性、效率、稳定性、可扩展性和泛化能力五个方面评估求解器的性能。我们的结果表明，总体而言，通过 NCO 方法学习的求解器在几乎所有这些方面仍然低于传统求解器。 NCO 求解器的一个潜在好处是，当有足够的训练实例可用时，它们对于小规模问题实例具有卓越的时间和能源效率。希望这项工作将有助于更好地了解 NCO 的优点和缺点，并提供一个全面的评估协议，以便进一步对 NCO 方法与其他方法进行比较进行基准测试。 本文系统评估神经组合优化（NCO）方法在旅行商问题（TSP）上的表现，比较其与传统求解器的优劣。 Shengcai Liu,Yu Zhang,Ke Tang,Xin Yao cs.NE

authors_text: Ranran Huang,Jiancheng Cai,Chao Li,Zhuoyuan Wu,Xinmin Liu,Zhenhua Chai
title: DRKF: Distilled Rotated Kernel Fusion for Efficient Rotation Invariant Descriptors in Local Feature Matching
title_zh: DRKF：局部特征匹配中高效旋转不变描述符的蒸馏旋转核融合
abstract: The performance of local feature descriptors degrades in the presence of large rotation variations. To address this issue, we present an efficient approach to learning rotation invariant descriptors. Specifically, we propose Rotated Kernel Fusion (RKF) which imposes rotations on the convolution kernel to improve the inherent nature of CNN. Since RKF can be processed by the subsequent re-parameterization, no extra computational costs will be introduced in the inference stage. Moreover, we present Multi-oriented Feature Aggregation (MOFA) which aggregates features extracted from multiple rotated versions of the input image and can provide auxiliary knowledge for the training of RKF by leveraging the distillation strategy. We refer to the distilled RKF model as DRKF. Besides the evaluation on a rotation-augmented version of the public dataset HPatches, we also contribute a new dataset named DiverseBEV which is collected during the drone's flight and consists of bird's eye view images with large viewpoint changes and camera rotations. Extensive experiments show that our method can outperform other state-of-the-art techniques when exposed to large rotation variations.
summary: The performance of local feature descriptors degrades in the presence of large rotation variations. To address this issue, we present an efficient approach to learning rotation invariant descriptors. Specifically, we propose Rotated Kernel Fusion (RKF) which imposes rotations on the convolution kernel to improve the inherent nature of CNN. Since RKF can be processed by the subsequent re-parameterization, no extra computational costs will be introduced in the inference stage. Moreover, we present Multi-oriented Feature Aggregation (MOFA) which aggregates features extracted from multiple rotated versions of the input image and can provide auxiliary knowledge for the training of RKF by leveraging the distillation strategy. We refer to the distilled RKF model as DRKF. Besides the evaluation on a rotation-augmented version of the public dataset HPatches, we also contribute a new dataset named DiverseBEV which is collected during the drone's flight and consists of bird's eye view images with large viewpoint changes and camera rotations. Extensive experiments show that our method can outperform other state-of-the-art techniques when exposed to large rotation variations.
abstract_zh: 在存在较大旋转变化的情况下，局部特征描述符的性能会下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种学习旋转不变描述符的有效方法。具体来说，我们提出旋转核融合（RKF），它对卷积核进行旋转以改善 CNN 的固有性质。由于RKF可以通过后续的重新参数化进行处理，因此在推理阶段不会引入额外的计算成本。此外，我们提出了多向特征聚合（MOFA），它聚合从输入图像的多个旋转版本中提取的特征，并可以利用蒸馏策略为 RKF 的训练提供辅助知识。我们将蒸馏后的 RKF 模型称为 DRKF。除了对公共数据集 HPatches 的旋转增强版本进行评估之外，我们还贡献了一个名为 DiverseBEV 的新数据集，该数据集是在无人机飞行期间收集的，由具有较大视点变化和相机旋转的鸟瞰图像组成。大量的实验表明，当暴露于大的旋转变化时，我们的方法可以优于其他最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRKF方法，通过旋转内核融合和多方向特征聚合，提升局部特征匹配中旋转不变性描述符的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有局部特征描述符在存在大角度旋转时性能下降，需设计高效旋转不变性学习方法以应对实际场景中的视角变化。
AI.method: 提出旋转内核融合(RKF)通过旋转卷积核增强CNN的旋转不变性，并设计多方向特征聚合(MOFA)结合知识蒸馏策略训练RKF，最终形成DRKF模型。同时构建包含大视角变化的DiverseBEV数据集。
AI.result: 在HPatches旋转增强数据集和自建DiverseBEV数据集上，DRKF在大角度旋转场景下优于现有最先进方法，且推理阶段无额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: DRKF通过旋转内核设计与多方向特征融合有效提升了描述符的旋转鲁棒性，为高效局部特征匹配提供了新思路并贡献了新型数据集。

authors_text: Yipeng Gao,Lingxiao Yang,Yunmu Huang,Song Xie,Shiyong Li,Wei-shi Zheng
title: AcroFOD: An Adaptive Method for Cross-domain Few-shot Object Detection
title_zh: AcroFOD：一种跨域小样本目标检测的自适应方法
abstract: Under the domain shift, cross-domain few-shot object detection aims to adapt object detectors in the target domain with a few annotated target data. There exists two significant challenges: (1) Highly insufficient target domain data; (2) Potential over-adaptation and misleading caused by inappropriately amplified target samples without any restriction. To address these challenges, we propose an adaptive method consisting of two parts. First, we propose an adaptive optimization strategy to select augmented data similar to target samples rather than blindly increasing the amount. Specifically, we filter the augmented candidates which significantly deviate from the target feature distribution in the very beginning. Second, to further relieve the data limitation, we propose the multi-level domain-aware data augmentation to increase the diversity and rationality of augmented data, which exploits the cross-image foreground-background mixture. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.
summary: Under the domain shift, cross-domain few-shot object detection aims to adapt object detectors in the target domain with a few annotated target data. There exists two significant challenges: (1) Highly insufficient target domain data; (2) Potential over-adaptation and misleading caused by inappropriately amplified target samples without any restriction. To address these challenges, we propose an adaptive method consisting of two parts. First, we propose an adaptive optimization strategy to select augmented data similar to target samples rather than blindly increasing the amount. Specifically, we filter the augmented candidates which significantly deviate from the target feature distribution in the very beginning. Second, to further relieve the data limitation, we propose the multi-level domain-aware data augmentation to increase the diversity and rationality of augmented data, which exploits the cross-image foreground-background mixture. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在域转移下，跨域少样本目标检测旨在使用少量带注释的目标数据来调整目标域中的目标检测器。存在两个重大挑战：（1）目标领域数据严重不足； (2) 不加任何限制地扩增目标样本，可能导致过度适应和误导。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种由两部分组成的自适应方法。首先，我们提出了一种自适应优化策略来选择与目标样本相似的增强数据，而不是盲目地增加数量。具体来说，我们过滤一开始就显着偏离目标特征分布的增强候选。其次，为了进一步缓解数据限制，我们提出了多级领域感知数据增强，以增加增强数据的多样性和合理性，它利用了跨图像前景-背景混合。实验表明，所提出的方法在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应方法AcroFOD，用于解决跨领域少样本目标检测中的数据不足和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 跨领域少样本目标检测面临目标域数据极度匮乏和无约束增强导致的过拟合风险，需设计有效策略提升检测性能。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：1）通过过滤显著偏离目标特征分布的增强数据，实现自适应优化选择；2）利用多级领域感知的数据增强技术，通过跨图像前景-背景混合提升增强数据多样性与合理性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化数据选择策略与增强机制，本文方法有效缓解了跨领域少样本检测中的数据不足与过拟合问题。

search_text: AcroFOD: An Adaptive Method for Cross-domain Few-shot Object Detection AcroFOD：一种跨域小样本目标检测的自适应方法 Under the domain shift, cross-domain few-shot object detection aims to adapt object detectors in the target domain with a few annotated target data. There exists two significant challenges: (1) Highly insufficient target domain data; (2) Potential over-adaptation and misleading caused by inappropriately amplified target samples without any restriction. To address these challenges, we propose an adaptive method consisting of two parts. First, we propose an adaptive optimization strategy to select augmented data similar to target samples rather than blindly increasing the amount. Specifically, we filter the augmented candidates which significantly deviate from the target feature distribution in the very beginning. Second, to further relieve the data limitation, we propose the multi-level domain-aware data augmentation to increase the diversity and rationality of augmented data, which exploits the cross-image foreground-background mixture. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks. 在域转移下，跨域少样本目标检测旨在使用少量带注释的目标数据来调整目标域中的目标检测器。存在两个重大挑战：（1）目标领域数据严重不足； (2) 不加任何限制地扩增目标样本，可能导致过度适应和误导。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种由两部分组成的自适应方法。首先，我们提出了一种自适应优化策略来选择与目标样本相似的增强数据，而不是盲目地增加数量。具体来说，我们过滤一开始就显着偏离目标特征分布的增强候选。其次，为了进一步缓解数据限制，我们提出了多级领域感知数据增强，以增加增强数据的多样性和合理性，它利用了跨图像前景-背景混合。实验表明，所提出的方法在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种自适应方法AcroFOD，用于解决跨领域少样本目标检测中的数据不足和过拟合问题。 Yipeng Gao,Lingxiao Yang,Yunmu Huang,Song Xie,Shiyong Li,Wei-shi Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Luis Miguel Vieira da Silva,Aljosha Köcher,Alexander Fay
title: A Capability and Skill Model for Heterogeneous Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 异构自主机器人的能力和技能模型
abstract: Teams of heterogeneous autonomous robots become increasingly important due to their facilitation of various complex tasks. For such heterogeneous robots, there is currently no consistent way of describing the functions that each robot provides. In the field of manufacturing, capability modeling is considered a promising approach to semantically model functions provided by different machines. This contribution investigates how to apply and extend capability models from manufacturing to the field of autonomous robots and presents an approach for such a capability model.
summary: Teams of heterogeneous autonomous robots become increasingly important due to their facilitation of various complex tasks. For such heterogeneous robots, there is currently no consistent way of describing the functions that each robot provides. In the field of manufacturing, capability modeling is considered a promising approach to semantically model functions provided by different machines. This contribution investigates how to apply and extend capability models from manufacturing to the field of autonomous robots and presents an approach for such a capability model.
abstract_zh: 异构自主机器人团队由于能够促进各种复杂任务而变得越来越重要。对于这种异构机器人，目前还没有一致的方式来描述每个机器人提供的功能。在制造领域，能力建模被认为是对不同机器提供的功能进行语义建模的一种有前途的方法。本贡献研究了如何将能力模型从制造业应用和扩展到自主机器人领域，并提出了这种能力模型的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对异构自主机器人的能力与技能模型，旨在解决当前缺乏统一描述其功能的方法的问题。
AI.motivation: 异构自主机器人团队在执行复杂任务中越来越重要，但目前缺乏一致的描述各机器人功能的方式，而制造领域的功能建模方法为此提供了可行思路。
AI.method: 通过借鉴制造领域的功能建模方法，研究如何将其扩展并应用于自主机器人领域，提出一种适用于异构机器人的能力模型框架。
AI.result: 成功构建了一种能够语义化描述异构自主机器人功能的能力模型，为机器人任务协调与协作提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为异构自主机器人的功能描述提供了标准化方法，有助于提升其在复杂任务中的协同效率与灵活性。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Elisabetta Benevento,Marco Pegoraro,Mattia Antoniazzi,Harry H. Beyel,Viki Peeva,Paul Balfanz,Wil M. P. van der Aalst,Lukas Martin,Gernot Marx
title: Process Modeling and Conformance Checking in Healthcare: A COVID-19 Case Study
title_zh: 医疗保健中的流程建模和一致性检查：COVID-19 案例研究
abstract: The discipline of process mining has a solid track record of successful applications to the healthcare domain. Within such research space, we conducted a case study related to the Intensive Care Unit (ICU) ward of the Uniklinik Aachen hospital in Germany. The aim of this work is twofold: developing a normative model representing the clinical guidelines for the treatment of COVID-19 patients, and analyzing the adherence of the observed behavior (recorded in the information system of the hospital) to such guidelines. We show that, through conformance checking techniques, it is possible to analyze the care process for COVID-19 patients, highlighting the main deviations from the clinical guidelines. The results provide physicians with useful indications for improving the process and ensuring service quality and patient satisfaction. We share the resulting model as an open-source BPMN file.
summary: The discipline of process mining has a solid track record of successful applications to the healthcare domain. Within such research space, we conducted a case study related to the Intensive Care Unit (ICU) ward of the Uniklinik Aachen hospital in Germany. The aim of this work is twofold: developing a normative model representing the clinical guidelines for the treatment of COVID-19 patients, and analyzing the adherence of the observed behavior (recorded in the information system of the hospital) to such guidelines. We show that, through conformance checking techniques, it is possible to analyze the care process for COVID-19 patients, highlighting the main deviations from the clinical guidelines. The results provide physicians with useful indications for improving the process and ensuring service quality and patient satisfaction. We share the resulting model as an open-source BPMN file.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘学科在医疗保健领域的成功应用有着良好的记录。在这样的研​​究空间内，我们进行了一项与德国亚琛 Uniklinik 医院重症监护病房 (ICU) 病房相关的案例研究。这项工作的目的有两个：开发一个代表 COVID-19 患者治疗临床指南的规范模型，并分析观察到的行为（记录在医院信息系统中）对此类指南的遵守情况。我们表明，通过一致性检查技术，可以分析 COVID-19 患者的护理过程，突出显示与临床指南的主要偏差。结果为医生提供了改进流程、确保服务质量和患者满意度的有用指示。我们将生成的模型作为开源 BPMN 文件共享。

AI.tldr: 开发针对COVID-19患者治疗的临床指南规范模型，并分析实际护理流程与指南的符合性，以优化医疗过程。
AI.motivation: 通过分析实际流程与指南的偏差，帮助医生改进流程，提高服务质量和患者满意度。
AI.method: 利用符合性检查技术，基于医院信息系统的实际数据，构建BPMN流程模型，并分析与临床指南的偏差。
AI.result: 识别出实际护理流程中的主要偏差，为医疗流程优化提供依据，并公开了BPMN模型供参考。
AI.conclusion: 证实了符合性检查技术在医疗流程分析中的有效性，有助于提升临床指南的遵循度和患者护理质量。

authors_text: Perry Lam,Huayun Zhang,Nancy F. Chen,Berrak Sisman
title: EPIC TTS Models: Empirical Pruning Investigations Characterizing Text-To-Speech Models
title_zh: EPIC TTS 模型：表征文本转语音模型的经验剪枝研究
abstract: Neural models are known to be over-parameterized, and recent work has shown that sparse text-to-speech (TTS) models can outperform dense models. Although a plethora of sparse methods has been proposed for other domains, such methods have rarely been applied in TTS. In this work, we seek to answer the question: what are the characteristics of selected sparse techniques on the performance and model complexity? We compare a Tacotron2 baseline and the results of applying five techniques. We then evaluate the performance via the factors of naturalness, intelligibility and prosody, while reporting model size and training time. Complementary to prior research, we find that pruning before or during training can achieve similar performance to pruning after training and can be trained much faster, while removing entire neurons degrades performance much more than removing parameters. To our best knowledge, this is the first work that compares sparsity paradigms in text-to-speech synthesis.
summary: Neural models are known to be over-parameterized, and recent work has shown that sparse text-to-speech (TTS) models can outperform dense models. Although a plethora of sparse methods has been proposed for other domains, such methods have rarely been applied in TTS. In this work, we seek to answer the question: what are the characteristics of selected sparse techniques on the performance and model complexity? We compare a Tacotron2 baseline and the results of applying five techniques. We then evaluate the performance via the factors of naturalness, intelligibility and prosody, while reporting model size and training time. Complementary to prior research, we find that pruning before or during training can achieve similar performance to pruning after training and can be trained much faster, while removing entire neurons degrades performance much more than removing parameters. To our best knowledge, this is the first work that compares sparsity paradigms in text-to-speech synthesis.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，神经模型存在过度参数化的问题，最近的研究表明，稀疏文本转语音 (TTS) 模型的性能优于密集模型。尽管在其他领域已经提出了大量稀疏方法，但此类方法很少在 TTS 中应用。在这项工作中，我们试图回答这样的问题：所选稀疏技术在性能和模型复杂性方面有哪些特点？我们比较了 Tacotron2 基线和应用五种技术的结果。然后，我们通过自然度、可理解性和韵律等因素评估性能，同时报告模型大小和训练时间。作为对先前研究的补充，我们发现在训练之前或训练期间进行剪枝可以实现与训练后剪枝相似的性能，并且可以更快地训练，而删除整个神经元比删除参数更会降低性能。据我们所知，这是第一个比较文本到语音合成中稀疏范式的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实证研究，比较不同稀疏化技术对文本到语音（TTS）模型性能和复杂度的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管其他领域已有多种稀疏方法，但TTS领域应用较少，因此需要研究不同稀疏技术对TTS模型性能和复杂度的影响。
AI.method: 比较Tacotron2基线模型与五种稀疏技术，评估自然度、可理解性、韵律，并分析模型大小和训练时间。
AI.result: 发现训练前或训练中剪枝可实现与训练后剪枝相似的性能，且训练更快；移除整个神经元比移除参数对性能影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 首次在TTS合成中比较不同稀疏化范式，为后续研究提供实证依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过实证研究，比较不同稀疏化技术对文本到语音（TTS）模型性能和复杂度的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管其他领域已有多种稀疏方法，但TTS领域应用较少，因此需要研究不同稀疏技术对TTS模型性能和复杂度的影响。
ai_content.method: 比较Tacotron2基线模型与五种稀疏技术，评估自然度、可理解性、韵律，并分析模型大小和训练时间。
ai_content.result: 发现训练前或训练中剪枝可实现与训练后剪枝相似的性能，且训练更快；移除整个神经元比移除参数对性能影响更大。
ai_content.conclusion: 首次在TTS合成中比较不同稀疏化范式，为后续研究提供实证依据。

search_text: EPIC TTS Models: Empirical Pruning Investigations Characterizing Text-To-Speech Models EPIC TTS 模型：表征文本转语音模型的经验剪枝研究 Neural models are known to be over-parameterized, and recent work has shown that sparse text-to-speech (TTS) models can outperform dense models. Although a plethora of sparse methods has been proposed for other domains, such methods have rarely been applied in TTS. In this work, we seek to answer the question: what are the characteristics of selected sparse techniques on the performance and model complexity? We compare a Tacotron2 baseline and the results of applying five techniques. We then evaluate the performance via the factors of naturalness, intelligibility and prosody, while reporting model size and training time. Complementary to prior research, we find that pruning before or during training can achieve similar performance to pruning after training and can be trained much faster, while removing entire neurons degrades performance much more than removing parameters. To our best knowledge, this is the first work that compares sparsity paradigms in text-to-speech synthesis. 众所周知，神经模型存在过度参数化的问题，最近的研究表明，稀疏文本转语音 (TTS) 模型的性能优于密集模型。尽管在其他领域已经提出了大量稀疏方法，但此类方法很少在 TTS 中应用。在这项工作中，我们试图回答这样的问题：所选稀疏技术在性能和模型复杂性方面有哪些特点？我们比较了 Tacotron2 基线和应用五种技术的结果。然后，我们通过自然度、可理解性和韵律等因素评估性能，同时报告模型大小和训练时间。作为对先前研究的补充，我们发现在训练之前或训练期间进行剪枝可以实现与训练后剪枝相似的性能，并且可以更快地训练，而删除整个神经元比删除参数更会降低性能。据我们所知，这是第一个比较文本到语音合成中稀疏范式的工作。 本文旨在通过实证研究，比较不同稀疏化技术对文本到语音（TTS）模型性能和复杂度的影响。 Perry Lam,Huayun Zhang,Nancy F. Chen,Berrak Sisman eess.AS,cs.LG

authors_text: Haohan Guo,Fenglong Xie,Frank K. Soong,Xixin Wu,Helen Meng
title: A Multi-Stage Multi-Codebook VQ-VAE Approach to High-Performance Neural TTS
title_zh: 高性能神经 TTS 的多阶段多码本 VQ-VAE 方法
abstract: We propose a Multi-Stage, Multi-Codebook (MSMC) approach to high-performance neural TTS synthesis. A vector-quantized, variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) based feature analyzer is used to encode Mel spectrograms of speech training data by down-sampling progressively in multiple stages into MSMC Representations (MSMCRs) with different time resolutions, and quantizing them with multiple VQ codebooks, respectively. Multi-stage predictors are trained to map the input text sequence to MSMCRs progressively by minimizing a combined loss of the reconstruction Mean Square Error (MSE) and "triplet loss". In synthesis, the neural vocoder converts the predicted MSMCRs into final speech waveforms. The proposed approach is trained and tested with an English TTS database of 16 hours by a female speaker. The proposed TTS achieves an MOS score of 4.41, which outperforms the baseline with an MOS of 3.62. Compact versions of the proposed TTS with much less parameters can still preserve high MOS scores. Ablation studies show that both multiple stages and multiple codebooks are effective for achieving high TTS performance.
summary: We propose a Multi-Stage, Multi-Codebook (MSMC) approach to high-performance neural TTS synthesis. A vector-quantized, variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) based feature analyzer is used to encode Mel spectrograms of speech training data by down-sampling progressively in multiple stages into MSMC Representations (MSMCRs) with different time resolutions, and quantizing them with multiple VQ codebooks, respectively. Multi-stage predictors are trained to map the input text sequence to MSMCRs progressively by minimizing a combined loss of the reconstruction Mean Square Error (MSE) and "triplet loss". In synthesis, the neural vocoder converts the predicted MSMCRs into final speech waveforms. The proposed approach is trained and tested with an English TTS database of 16 hours by a female speaker. The proposed TTS achieves an MOS score of 4.41, which outperforms the baseline with an MOS of 3.62. Compact versions of the proposed TTS with much less parameters can still preserve high MOS scores. Ablation studies show that both multiple stages and multiple codebooks are effective for achieving high TTS performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多阶段、多码本 (MSMC) 方法来实现高性能神经 TTS 合成。基于矢量量化变分自动编码器 (VQ-VAE) 的特征分析器用于对语音训练数据的 Mel 频谱图进行编码，方法是在多个阶段逐步下采样为具有不同时间分辨率的 MSMC 表示 (MSMCR)，并分别使用多个 VQ 码本对其进行量化。多级预测器经过训练，通过最小化重建均方误差 (MSE) 和“三元组损失”的组合损失，逐步将输入文本序列映射到 MSMCR。在合成过程中，神经声码器将预测的 MSMCR 转换为最终的语音波形。所提出的方法由女性演讲者使用 16 小时的英语 TTS 数据库进行训练和测试。所提出的 TTS 的 MOS 得分为 4.41，优于 MOS 为 3.62 的基线。所提出的 TTS 的紧凑版本具有更少的参数，但仍然可以保持高 MOS 分数。消融研究表明，多阶段和多码本对于实现高 TTS 性能都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段多码本VQ-VAE方法，通过分阶段编码和多码本量化提升神经文本到语音合成的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经TTS模型在语音质量和生成效率之间难以平衡，需探索更高效的特征表示与生成方法。
AI.method: 采用多阶段VQ-VAE对梅尔频谱进行分层下采样，结合多码本量化生成MSMC表示；通过多阶段预测器联合优化重建MSE和三元组损失，最终由神经声码器生成语音波形。
AI.result: 在16小时英语数据集上实现4.41 MOS分（优于基线3.62），参数压缩版本仍保持高MOS，消融实验证实多阶段和多码本设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段多码本VQ-VAE框架显著提升TTS质量与效率，为高保真语音合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Benjamin Lambert,Florence Forbes,Senan Doyle,Alan Tucholka,Michel Dojat
title: Beyond Voxel Prediction Uncertainty: Identifying brain lesions you can trust
title_zh: 超越体素预测的不确定性：识别您可以信任的大脑病变
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Workshop on Interpretability of Machine Intelligence in Medical Image Computing (iMIMIC) at MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Workshop on Interpretability of Machine Intelligence in Medical Image Computing (iMIMIC) at MICCAI 2022
abstract: Deep neural networks have become the gold-standard approach for the automated segmentation of 3D medical images. Their full acceptance by clinicians remains however hampered by the lack of intelligible uncertainty assessment of the provided results. Most approaches to quantify their uncertainty, such as the popular Monte Carlo dropout, restrict to some measure of uncertainty in prediction at the voxel level. In addition not to be clearly related to genuine medical uncertainty, this is not clinically satisfying as most objects of interest (e.g. brain lesions) are made of groups of voxels whose overall relevance may not simply reduce to the sum or mean of their individual uncertainties. In this work, we propose to go beyond voxel-wise assessment using an innovative Graph Neural Network approach, trained from the outputs of a Monte Carlo dropout model. This network allows the fusion of three estimators of voxel uncertainty: entropy, variance, and model's confidence; and can be applied to any lesion, regardless of its shape or size. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach for uncertainty estimate on a task of Multiple Sclerosis lesions segmentation.
summary: Deep neural networks have become the gold-standard approach for the automated segmentation of 3D medical images. Their full acceptance by clinicians remains however hampered by the lack of intelligible uncertainty assessment of the provided results. Most approaches to quantify their uncertainty, such as the popular Monte Carlo dropout, restrict to some measure of uncertainty in prediction at the voxel level. In addition not to be clearly related to genuine medical uncertainty, this is not clinically satisfying as most objects of interest (e.g. brain lesions) are made of groups of voxels whose overall relevance may not simply reduce to the sum or mean of their individual uncertainties. In this work, we propose to go beyond voxel-wise assessment using an innovative Graph Neural Network approach, trained from the outputs of a Monte Carlo dropout model. This network allows the fusion of three estimators of voxel uncertainty: entropy, variance, and model's confidence; and can be applied to any lesion, regardless of its shape or size. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach for uncertainty estimate on a task of Multiple Sclerosis lesions segmentation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已成为 3D 医学图像自动分割的黄金标准方法。然而，由于对所提供的结果缺乏可理解的不确定性评估，临床医生的完全接受仍然受到阻碍。大多数量化其不确定性的方法（例如流行的蒙特卡罗退出）都限制在体素级别的预测中的某种不确定性测量。除了与真正的医学不确定性没有明显相关之外，这在临床上也不能令人满意，因为大多数感兴趣的对象（例如脑损伤）是由体素组组成的，这些体素的整体相关性可能不会简单地减少到它们个体不确定性的总和或平均值。在这项工作中，我们建议使用创新的图神经网络方法超越体素评估，该方法是根据蒙特卡罗辍学模型的输出进行训练的。该网络允许融合体素不确定性的三个估计量：熵、方差和模型置信度；并且可以应用于任何病变，无论其形状或大小。我们证明了我们的方法对于多发性硬化症病变分割任务的不确定性估计的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的新方法，用于更准确地评估医学图像分割中脑部病变区域的不确定性，超越传统体素级评估方式。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性评估方法（如蒙特卡洛dropout）仅关注单个体素的不确定性，无法反映病变区域整体的临床相关性，难以满足医学影像分析的实际需求。
AI.method: 构建图神经网络模型，融合熵、方差和模型置信度三种不确定性估计器，通过蒙特卡洛dropout模型输出进行训练，适用于任意形状和大小的病变区域。
AI.result: 在多发性硬化症病变分割任务中，该方法显著优于传统体素级不确定性评估方法，能更准确反映病变区域的整体不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的图神经网络方法有效提升了医学图像分割中病变区域的不确定性评估质量，为临床提供更可靠的AI辅助诊断依据。

In addition not to be clearly related to genuine medical uncertainty, this is not clinically satisfying as most objects of interest (e.g. brain lesions) are made of groups of voxels whose overall relevance may not simply reduce to the sum or mean of their individual uncertainties. In this work, we propose to go beyond voxel-wise assessment using an innovative Graph Neural Network approach, trained from the outputs of a Monte Carlo dropout model. This network allows the fusion of three estimators of voxel uncertainty: entropy, variance, and model's confidence; and can be applied to any lesion, regardless of its shape or size. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach for uncertainty estimate on a task of Multiple Sclerosis lesions segmentation. 深度神经网络已成为 3D 医学图像自动分割的黄金标准方法。然而，由于对所提供的结果缺乏可理解的不确定性评估，临床医生的完全接受仍然受到阻碍。大多数量化其不确定性的方法（例如流行的蒙特卡罗退出）都限制在体素级别的预测中的某种不确定性测量。除了与真正的医学不确定性没有明显相关之外，这在临床上也不能令人满意，因为大多数感兴趣的对象（例如脑损伤）是由体素组组成的，这些体素的整体相关性可能不会简单地减少到它们个体不确定性的总和或平均值。在这项工作中，我们建议使用创新的图神经网络方法超越体素评估，该方法是根据蒙特卡罗辍学模型的输出进行训练的。该网络允许融合体素不确定性的三个估计量：熵、方差和模型置信度；并且可以应用于任何病变，无论其形状或大小。我们证明了我们的方法对于多发性硬化症病变分割任务的不确定性估计的优越性。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的新方法，用于更准确地评估医学图像分割中脑部病变区域的不确定性，超越传统体素级评估方式。 Benjamin Lambert,Florence Forbes,Senan Doyle,Alan Tucholka,Michel Dojat eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Keita Watanabe,Naohisa Sakamoto,Jorji Nonaka,Yasumitsu Maejima
title: Angular-based Edge Bundled Parallel Coordinates Plot for the Visual Analysis of Large Ensemble Simulation Data
title_zh: 用于大型集成仿真数据可视化分析的基于角度的边缘捆绑平行坐标图
abstract: With the continuous increase in the computational power and resources of modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems, large-scale ensemble simulations have become widely used in various fields of science and engineering, and especially in meteorological and climate science. It is widely known that the simulation outputs are large time-varying, multivariate, and multivalued datasets which pose a particular challenge to the visualization and analysis tasks. In this work, we focused on the widely used Parallel Coordinates Plot (PCP) to analyze the interrelations between different parameters, such as variables, among the members. However, PCP may suffer from visual cluttering and drawing performance with the increase on the data size to be analyzed, that is, the number of polylines. To overcome this problem, we present an extension to the PCP by adding Bézier curves connecting the angular distribution plots representing the mean and variance of the inclination of the line segments between parallel axes. The proposed Angular-based Parallel Coordinates Plot (APCP) is capable of presenting a simplified overview of the entire ensemble data set while maintaining the correlation information between the adjacent variables. To verify its effectiveness, we developed a visual analytics prototype system and evaluated by using a meteorological ensemble simulation output from the supercomputer Fugaku.
summary: With the continuous increase in the computational power and resources of modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems, large-scale ensemble simulations have become widely used in various fields of science and engineering, and especially in meteorological and climate science. It is widely known that the simulation outputs are large time-varying, multivariate, and multivalued datasets which pose a particular challenge to the visualization and analysis tasks. In this work, we focused on the widely used Parallel Coordinates Plot (PCP) to analyze the interrelations between different parameters, such as variables, among the members. However, PCP may suffer from visual cluttering and drawing performance with the increase on the data size to be analyzed, that is, the number of polylines. To overcome this problem, we present an extension to the PCP by adding Bézier curves connecting the angular distribution plots representing the mean and variance of the inclination of the line segments between parallel axes. The proposed Angular-based Parallel Coordinates Plot (APCP) is capable of presenting a simplified overview of the entire ensemble data set while maintaining the correlation information between the adjacent variables. To verify its effectiveness, we developed a visual analytics prototype system and evaluated by using a meteorological ensemble simulation output from the supercomputer Fugaku.
abstract_zh: 随着现代高性能计算（HPC）系统的计算能力和资源的不断增加，大规模集成模拟已广泛应用于科学和工程的各个领域，特别是气象和气候科学。众所周知，模拟输出是大型时变、多变量和多值数据集，这对可视化和分析任务构成了特殊的挑战。在这项工作中，我们重点关注广泛使用的平行坐标图（PCP）来分析成员之间不同参数（例如变量）之间的相互关系。然而，随着要分析的数据大小（即折线数量）的增加，PCP 可能会受到视觉混乱和绘图性能的影响。为了克服这个问题，我们通过添加贝塞尔曲线来连接表示平行轴之间线段倾角的平均值和方差的角度分布图，从而对 PCP 进行扩展。所提出的基于角度的平行坐标图（APCP）能够呈现整个集合数据集的简化概述，同时保持相邻变量之间的相关信息。为了验证其有效性，我们开发了视觉分析原型系统，并使用超级计算机 Fugaku 的气象集合模拟输出进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于角度的平行坐标图（APCP），用于解决大规模集合模拟数据可视化中的视觉混乱问题。
AI.motivation: 随着高性能计算系统的发展，大规模集合模拟数据的可视化面临参数间关系复杂、数据量大导致的视觉混乱和性能下降问题。
AI.method: 通过在传统平行坐标图中引入贝塞尔曲线连接角度分布图，展示参数间倾角的均值和方差，简化数据概览同时保留相邻变量相关性。
AI.result: 开发了可视化分析原型系统，并使用富岳超算的气象集合模拟数据验证，证明APCP能有效降低视觉混乱并保持分析准确性。
AI.conclusion: APCP方法在处理大规模多变量集合数据时，能提供更清晰的可视化结果，有助于科学分析与决策。

authors_text: Firas Laakom,Jenni Raitoharju,Alexandros Iosifidis,Moncef Gabbouj
title: Efficient CNN with uncorrelated Bag of Features pooling
title_zh: 具有不相关特征袋池化的高效 CNN
abstract: Despite the superior performance of CNN, deploying them on low computational power devices is still limited as they are typically computationally expensive. One key cause of the high complexity is the connection between the convolution layers and the fully connected layers, which typically requires a high number of parameters. To alleviate this issue, Bag of Features (BoF) pooling has been recently proposed. BoF learns a dictionary, that is used to compile a histogram representation of the input. In this paper, we propose an approach that builds on top of BoF pooling to boost its efficiency by ensuring that the items of the learned dictionary are non-redundant. We propose an additional loss term, based on the pair-wise correlation of the items of the dictionary, which complements the standard loss to explicitly regularize the model to learn a more diverse and rich dictionary. The proposed strategy yields an efficient variant of BoF and further boosts its performance, without any additional parameters.
summary: Despite the superior performance of CNN, deploying them on low computational power devices is still limited as they are typically computationally expensive. One key cause of the high complexity is the connection between the convolution layers and the fully connected layers, which typically requires a high number of parameters. To alleviate this issue, Bag of Features (BoF) pooling has been recently proposed. BoF learns a dictionary, that is used to compile a histogram representation of the input. In this paper, we propose an approach that builds on top of BoF pooling to boost its efficiency by ensuring that the items of the learned dictionary are non-redundant. We propose an additional loss term, based on the pair-wise correlation of the items of the dictionary, which complements the standard loss to explicitly regularize the model to learn a more diverse and rich dictionary. The proposed strategy yields an efficient variant of BoF and further boosts its performance, without any additional parameters.
abstract_zh: 尽管 CNN 具有卓越的性能，但在低计算能力的设备上部署它们仍然受到限制，因为它们的计算成本通常很高。高复杂度的一个关键原因是卷积层和全连接层之间的连接，这通常需要大量参数。为了缓解这个问题，最近提出了特征包（BoF）池化。 BoF 学习一个字典，用于编译输入的直方图表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 BoF 池化的方法，通过确保学习字典的项目是非冗余的来提高其效率。我们基于字典项的成对相关性提出了一个额外的损失项，它补充了标准损失，以显式正则化模型以学习更加多样化和丰富的字典。所提出的策略产生了 BoF 的有效变体，并进一步提高了其性能，而无需任何额外的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效CNN方法，通过引入无相关性约束的Bag of Features池化，减少参数冗余以提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在低算力设备部署受限，因全连接层参数过多。BoF池化虽能降低参数，但字典冗余问题仍未解决，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 在BoF池化基础上，新增基于字典项成对相关性的损失项，通过正则化约束学习更多样化的字典，无需增加额外参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持模型性能的同时显著提升计算效率，且参数量无增加。
AI.conclusion: 无相关性约束的BoF池化有效平衡了模型效率与表达能力，为低功耗设备部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Sreejith Balakrishnan,Jianxin Bi,Harold Soh
title: SCALES: From Fairness Principles to Constrained Decision-Making
title_zh: 尺度：从公平原则到受限决策
comment: Accepted to the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES '22), Updated version with additional citations, 14 pages
comments: Accepted to the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES '22), Updated version with additional citations, 14 pages
abstract: This paper proposes SCALES, a general framework that translates well-established fairness principles into a common representation based on the Constraint Markov Decision Process (CMDP). With the help of causal language, our framework can place constraints on both the procedure of decision making (procedural fairness) as well as the outcomes resulting from decisions (outcome fairness). Specifically, we show that well-known fairness principles can be encoded either as a utility component, a non-causal component, or a causal component in a SCALES-CMDP. We illustrate SCALES using a set of case studies involving a simulated healthcare scenario and the real-world COMPAS dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our framework produces fair policies that embody alternative fairness principles in single-step and sequential decision-making scenarios.
summary: This paper proposes SCALES, a general framework that translates well-established fairness principles into a common representation based on the Constraint Markov Decision Process (CMDP). With the help of causal language, our framework can place constraints on both the procedure of decision making (procedural fairness) as well as the outcomes resulting from decisions (outcome fairness). Specifically, we show that well-known fairness principles can be encoded either as a utility component, a non-causal component, or a causal component in a SCALES-CMDP. We illustrate SCALES using a set of case studies involving a simulated healthcare scenario and the real-world COMPAS dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our framework produces fair policies that embody alternative fairness principles in single-step and sequential decision-making scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 SCALES，这是一个通用框架，它将完善的公平原则转化为基于约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）的通用表示。在因果语言的帮助下，我们的框架可以对决策过程（程序公平性）以及决策产生的结果（结果公平性）施加约束。具体来说，我们表明众所周知的公平原则可以编码为 SCALES-CMDP 中的效用组件、非因果组件或因果组件。我们使用一组涉及模拟医疗场景和现实世界 COMPAS 数据集的案例研究来说明 SCALES。实验表明，我们的框架产生的公平政策体现了单步和顺序决策场景中的替代公平原则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCALES框架，将公平性原则转化为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），以实现决策过程和结果的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有决策系统难以同时满足过程公平与结果公平，需一种通用方法将公平原则嵌入决策框架。
AI.method: 基于因果语言构建CMDP，将公平原则编码为效用、非因果或因果组件，并通过案例验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 在医疗模拟和COMPAS数据集实验中，SCALES生成的策略在单步和序列决策场景下均体现多种公平原则。
AI.conclusion: SCALES为公平性原则到约束决策的转化提供了通用框架，可有效平衡过程与结果公平性。

search_text: SCALES: From Fairness Principles to Constrained Decision-Making 尺度：从公平原则到受限决策 This paper proposes SCALES, a general framework that translates well-established fairness principles into a common representation based on the Constraint Markov Decision Process (CMDP). With the help of causal language, our framework can place constraints on both the procedure of decision making (procedural fairness) as well as the outcomes resulting from decisions (outcome fairness). Specifically, we show that well-known fairness principles can be encoded either as a utility component, a non-causal component, or a causal component in a SCALES-CMDP. We illustrate SCALES using a set of case studies involving a simulated healthcare scenario and the real-world COMPAS dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our framework produces fair policies that embody alternative fairness principles in single-step and sequential decision-making scenarios. 本文提出了 SCALES，这是一个通用框架，它将完善的公平原则转化为基于约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）的通用表示。在因果语言的帮助下，我们的框架可以对决策过程（程序公平性）以及决策产生的结果（结果公平性）施加约束。具体来说，我们表明众所周知的公平原则可以编码为 SCALES-CMDP 中的效用组件、非因果组件或因果组件。我们使用一组涉及模拟医疗场景和现实世界 COMPAS 数据集的案例研究来说明 SCALES。实验表明，我们的框架产生的公平政策体现了单步和顺序决策场景中的替代公平原则。 本文提出SCALES框架，将公平性原则转化为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），以实现决策过程和结果的公平性。 Sreejith Balakrishnan,Jianxin Bi,Harold Soh cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Pier Paolo Tricomi,Federica Nenna,Luca Pajola,Mauro Conti,Luciano Gamberini
title: You Can't Hide Behind Your Headset: User Profiling in Augmented and Virtual Reality
title_zh: 你无法隐藏在耳机后面：增强现实和虚拟现实中的用户分析
abstract: Virtual and Augmented Reality (VR, AR) are increasingly gaining traction thanks to their technical advancement and the need for remote connections, recently accentuated by the pandemic. Remote surgery, telerobotics, and virtual offices are only some examples of their successes. As users interact with VR/AR, they generate extensive behavioral data usually leveraged for measuring human behavior. However, little is known about how this data can be used for other purposes. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of user profiling in two different use-cases of virtual technologies: AR everyday application ($N=34$) and VR robot teleoperation ($N=35$). Specifically, we leverage machine learning to identify users and infer their individual attributes (i.e., age, gender). By monitoring users' head, controller, and eye movements, we investigate the ease of profiling on several tasks (e.g., walking, looking, typing) under different mental loads. Our contribution gives significant insights into user profiling in virtual environments.
summary: Virtual and Augmented Reality (VR, AR) are increasingly gaining traction thanks to their technical advancement and the need for remote connections, recently accentuated by the pandemic. Remote surgery, telerobotics, and virtual offices are only some examples of their successes. As users interact with VR/AR, they generate extensive behavioral data usually leveraged for measuring human behavior. However, little is known about how this data can be used for other purposes. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of user profiling in two different use-cases of virtual technologies: AR everyday application ($N=34$) and VR robot teleoperation ($N=35$). Specifically, we leverage machine learning to identify users and infer their individual attributes (i.e., age, gender). By monitoring users' head, controller, and eye movements, we investigate the ease of profiling on several tasks (e.g., walking, looking, typing) under different mental loads. Our contribution gives significant insights into user profiling in virtual environments.
abstract_zh: 虚拟和增强现实（VR、AR）由于其技术进步和远程连接的需求而日益受到关注，最近的大流行加剧了这种需求。远程手术、远程机器人和虚拟办公室只是其成功的一些例子。当用户与 VR/AR 交互时，他们会生成大量的行为数据，通常用于测量人类行为。然而，人们对如何将这些数据用于其他目的知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们展示了在虚拟技术的两种不同用例中进行用户分析的可行性：AR 日常应用（$N=34$）和 VR 机器人远程操作（$N=35$）。具体来说，我们利用机器学习来识别用户并推断他们的个人属性（即年龄、性别）。通过监控用户的头部、控制器和眼球运动，我们研究了在不同心理负荷下对多项任务（例如行走、看、打字）进行分析的难易程度。我们的贡献为虚拟环境中的用户分析提供了重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析增强现实（AR）和虚拟现实（VR）中的用户行为数据，验证了利用机器学习进行用户身份识别和属性推断（如年龄、性别）的可行性。
AI.motivation: 随着VR/AR技术的普及，用户交互产生的行为数据量激增，但现有研究对这类数据用于用户画像的潜力关注不足，亟需探索其隐私与安全风险。
AI.method: 通过监测用户头部、控制器及眼动数据，在AR日常应用（N=34）和VR机器人远程操作（N=35）场景中，利用机器学习模型分析不同任务（如行走、观察、打字）下的用户行为模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在不同认知负荷下，系统仍能有效识别用户并推断其年龄和性别等属性，证明了VR/AR环境中用户画像的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了虚拟环境中的用户行为数据可被用于精准画像，为未来VR/AR系统的隐私保护设计提供了重要参考。

authors_text: Yifan Hu,Pengkai Yin,Rui Liu,Feilong Bao,Guanglai Gao
title: MnTTS: An Open-Source Mongolian Text-to-Speech Synthesis Dataset and Accompanied Baseline
title_zh: MnTTS：开源蒙古文文本转语音合成数据集和伴随基线
comment: Accepted at the 2022 International Conference on Asian Language Processing (IALP2022)
comments: Accepted at the 2022 International Conference on Asian Language Processing (IALP2022)
abstract: This paper introduces a high-quality open-source text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis dataset for Mongolian, a low-resource language spoken by over 10 million people worldwide. The dataset, named MnTTS, consists of about 8 hours of transcribed audio recordings spoken by a 22-year-old professional female Mongolian announcer. It is the first publicly available dataset developed to promote Mongolian TTS applications in both academia and industry. In this paper, we share our experience by describing the dataset development procedures and faced challenges. To demonstrate the reliability of our dataset, we built a powerful non-autoregressive baseline system based on FastSpeech2 model and HiFi-GAN vocoder, and evaluated it using the subjective mean opinion score (MOS) and real time factor (RTF) metrics. Evaluation results show that the powerful baseline system trained on our dataset achieves MOS above 4 and RTF about $3.30\times10^{-1}$, which makes it applicable for practical use. The dataset, training recipe, and pretrained TTS models are freely available \footnote{\label{github}\url{https://github.com/walker-hyf/MnTTS}}.
summary: This paper introduces a high-quality open-source text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis dataset for Mongolian, a low-resource language spoken by over 10 million people worldwide. The dataset, named MnTTS, consists of about 8 hours of transcribed audio recordings spoken by a 22-year-old professional female Mongolian announcer. It is the first publicly available dataset developed to promote Mongolian TTS applications in both academia and industry. In this paper, we share our experience by describing the dataset development procedures and faced challenges. To demonstrate the reliability of our dataset, we built a powerful non-autoregressive baseline system based on FastSpeech2 model and HiFi-GAN vocoder, and evaluated it using the subjective mean opinion score (MOS) and real time factor (RTF) metrics. Evaluation results show that the powerful baseline system trained on our dataset achieves MOS above 4 and RTF about $3.30\times10^{-1}$, which makes it applicable for practical use. The dataset, training recipe, and pretrained TTS models are freely available \footnote{\label{github}\url{https://github.com/walker-hyf/MnTTS}}.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了蒙古语的高质量开源文本转语音 (TTS) 合成数据集，蒙古语是一种资源匮乏的语言，全球有超过 1000 万人使用。该数据集名为 MnTTS，由一位 22 岁的专业蒙古女播音员录制的约 8 小时的录音组成。这是第一个公开可用的数据集，旨在促进蒙古语 TTS 在学术界和工业界的应用。在本文中，我们通过描述数据集开发过程和面临的挑战来分享我们的经验。为了证明我们数据集的可靠性，我们基于 FastSpeech2 模型和 HiFi-GAN 声码器构建了一个强大的非自回归基线系统，并使用主观平均意见得分 (MOS) 和实时因子 (RTF) 指标对其进行了评估。评估结果表明，在我们的数据集上训练的强大基线系统的 MOS 达到 4 以上，RTF 约为 $3.30\times10^{-1}$，这使其适合实际使用。数据集、训练配方和预训练 TTS 模型可免费获取 \footnote{\label{github}\url{https://github.com/walker-hyf/MnTTS}}。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个高质量的蒙古语文本到语音合成数据集MnTTS及其配套基线模型，旨在推动蒙古语TTS技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 蒙古语作为低资源语言，缺乏公开的高质量TTS数据集，限制了相关研究和应用。本文旨在填补这一空白，促进学术界和工业界对蒙古语TTS技术的研究。
AI.method: 构建包含8小时专业播音员录音的MnTTS数据集，并基于FastSpeech2和HiFi-GAN开发非自回归基线系统，通过MOS和RTF指标进行评估。
AI.result: 基线系统在MOS测试中得分超过4分，RTF约为0.33，证明其具备实际应用价值。数据集、训练方案和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: MnTTS数据集为蒙古语TTS研究提供了可靠资源，其基线模型验证了数据集的有效性，为未来研究奠定了基础。

To demonstrate the reliability of our dataset, we built a powerful non-autoregressive baseline system based on FastSpeech2 model and HiFi-GAN vocoder, and evaluated it using the subjective mean opinion score (MOS) and real time factor (RTF) metrics. Evaluation results show that the powerful baseline system trained on our dataset achieves MOS above 4 and RTF about $3.30\times10^{-1}$, which makes it applicable for practical use. The dataset, training recipe, and pretrained TTS models are freely available \footnote{\label{github}\url{https://github.com/walker-hyf/MnTTS}}. 本文介绍了蒙古语的高质量开源文本转语音 (TTS) 合成数据集，蒙古语是一种资源匮乏的语言，全球有超过 1000 万人使用。该数据集名为 MnTTS，由一位 22 岁的专业蒙古女播音员录制的约 8 小时的录音组成。这是第一个公开可用的数据集，旨在促进蒙古语 TTS 在学术界和工业界的应用。在本文中，我们通过描述数据集开发过程和面临的挑战来分享我们的经验。为了证明我们数据集的可靠性，我们基于 FastSpeech2 模型和 HiFi-GAN 声码器构建了一个强大的非自回归基线系统，并使用主观平均意见得分 (MOS) 和实时因子 (RTF) 指标对其进行了评估。评估结果表明，在我们的数据集上训练的强大基线系统的 MOS 达到 4 以上，RTF 约为 $3.30\times10^{-1}$，这使其适合实际使用。数据集、训练配方和预训练 TTS 模型可免费获取 \footnote{\label{github}\url{https://github.com/walker-hyf/MnTTS}}。 本文介绍了一个高质量的蒙古语文本到语音合成数据集MnTTS及其配套基线模型，旨在推动蒙古语TTS技术的发展。 Yifan Hu,Pengkai Yin,Rui Liu,Feilong Bao,Guanglai Gao cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS
